// thinClientApiRequest(method, data, isAsync) // returns a jQuery post request result
let thinClientApiRequest = function (method, data, isAsync) {
        $.getJSON('config.json', function (config) {
            let shipExecServiceUrl = config.ShipExecServiceUrl;
            let authorizationToken = shipExecServiceUrl.startsWith('http') ? { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + JSON.parse(window.localStorage.getItem("TCToken")).access_token } : '';
            return $.post({ url: shipExecServiceUrl + '/' + method, data: data, async: isAsync, headers: authorizationToken });
        });
    }

// Source: 2.2 Update 4 (21UPDATE4)_CBR1.5_1735.cs
// ShowLoader(callback) // returns undefined
      ShowLoader: function (callback)
      {
        $('div.loading').removeClass('ng-hide').addClass('ng-show');

        if ($.isFunction(callback)) { callback() };
      },

// HideLoader(callback) // returns undefined
      HideLoader: function (callback)
      {
        $('div.loading').removeClass('ng-show').addClass('ng-hide');
        this.HideOverlay();
      },

// ShowOverlay() // returns undefined
      ShowOverlay: function ()
      {
        if ($('div.overlay').length === 0)
        {
          //console.log('div.overlay not found, creating');
          $('div.body-content').first().append($('<div />')
            .addClass('overlay')
            .css({
              'content': '',
              'position': 'fixed',
              'top': 0, 'left': 0,
              'width': '100vw',
              'height': '100vh',
              'background-color': 'rgba(0, 0, 0, .25)',
              'z-index': 1049
            })).show();

          /*
            .overlay {
              content: '';
              display: none;
              position: fixed;
              top: 0;
              left: 0;
              width: 100%;
              height: 100%;
              background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, .25);
              z-index: 1049;
            }
          */
        }
        else
        {
          $('div.overlay').show();
        }
      },

// HideOverlay() // returns undefined
      HideOverlay: function ()
      {
        $('div.overlay').hide();
      },

// ShowErrorAlert(ErrorMessage) // returns undefined
      ShowErrorAlert: function (ErrorMessage)
      {
        var divAlert = $('<div />').attr('id', this.GetRandomAlphaNumericString());

        $(divAlert).addClass('alert alert-dismissible alert-bottom alert-danger ng-scope')
          .css({ 'z-index': 1550, 'cursor': 'pointer' })
          .attr('role', 'alert')
          .append($('<button />')
            .attr('type', 'button')
            .addClass('close')
            .append($('<span />')
              .attr('aria-hidden', 'false')
              .text('x'))
            .append($('<span />')
              .addClass('sr-only')
              .text('Close')))
          .append($('<div />')
            .append($('<div />')
              // .append($('<span />').addClass('glyphicon glyphicon-alert'))
              // .css({ 'position': 'relative', 'top': '2px' })
              .addClass('ng-scope alert-message')
              .text(ErrorMessage)
              .prepend($('<span />')
                .css('padding-right', '10px')
                .addClass('glyphicon glyphicon-alert custom-error-icon'))));

        $('body').append($(divAlert).show());
        /*
          <button type="button" class="close" onclick="$(this).closest('div').hide();">
            <span aria-hidden="false">×</span>
            <span class="sr-only">Close</span>
          </button>
          <div>
            <div class="ng-scope alert-message"></div>
          </div>
        */
      },

// Source: AAFES (Dan Daniels) (AAFES)_AAFES CBR_1661.cs
// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        $(document).ready(function() {
            $('[id="Consignee Name Address"]').on('keydown', $('[id="Consignee Name Address"]').find("input[name='code']"), function(e) { 
                var keyCode = e.keyCode || e.which; 

                if (keyCode == 9) { 
                    e.preventDefault(); 
                    // look up the address on tab
                    $('[caption="Consignee Name Address"]').find('button[ng-click="search(nameaddress)"]').click();
                } 
            });
        });
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        // set focus into the Load ID box
         $("input:text").first().focus();
         
        // Populate existing Batches into custom shipping template Batch List drop down
        //  ... This also auto populates package misc_reference 5 
         this.vm.batches = this.GetBatches(client.userContext);
    };

// GetBatches(context) // returns batches
this.GetBatches = function (context) {        
        var batches;
        var data = { SearchCriteria: null, CompanyId: context.CompanyId };
        this.thinClientAPIRequest('GetBatches', data, false).done(function (response) {
            batches = response.Batches;
            console.log(batches);
        });
        
        return batches;
    };

// showSaveShippingProfileModal(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined

            $saveShipmentProfileModal.modal('show');
            }

// showDeleteShippingProfileModal(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
vm.showDeleteShippingProfileModal = function(shipmentRequest)
            {
            $deleteShipmentProfileModal.modal('show');
            }

// saveShippingProfile(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
vm.saveShippingProfile = function(shipmentRequest)
            {
            var selsvc = this.selectedServices[0].Symbol;
            shipmentRequest.Action = 'S';
            shipmentRequest.ShippingProfileName = vm.currentShippingProfile;
            shipmentRequest.SelService = selsvc;
            var data = { Data: JSON.stringify(shipmentRequest) };
            client.httpClient('UserMethod', data).then(
                function(ret) {
                var curprofilelist = JSON.parse(atob(ret.Data));
                vm.shippingProfiles = curprofilelist;
                })
            
            $saveShipmentProfileModal.modal('hide');
            }

// deleteShippingProfile(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
vm.deleteShippingProfile = function(shipmentRequest)
            {
            shipmentRequest.Action = 'D';
            shipmentRequest.ShippingProfileName = vm.currentShippingProfile;
            var data = { Data: JSON.stringify(shipmentRequest) };
            client.httpClient('UserMethod', data).then(
                function(ret) {
                var curprofilelist = JSON.parse(atob(ret.Data));
                vm.shippingProfiles = curprofilelist;
                })
            
            $deleteShipmentProfileModal.modal('hide');
            }

// shippingProfileChange(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
vm.shippingProfileChange = function (shipmentRequest)
            {
            var tmpShippingProfile = vm.shippingProfiles.find(({ ShippingProfileName }) => ShippingProfileName === this.currentShippingProfile);
            var newShippingProfile = structuredClone(tmpShippingProfile);    
            if( newShippingProfile !== null && newShippingProfile !== undefined) {
                var selsvc = newShippingProfile.SelService;
                var myservice = {Symbol: selsvc };
                if( newShippingProfile.Packages[0].ProactiveRecovery === true) {
                    newShippingProfile.Packages[0].SelectedProactiveRecoveryInstructions = [4096,2048,32];                    
                }

                var today = new Date();
                var curdate = {Year: today.getFullYear(), Month: today.getMonth() + 1, Day: today.getDate()};
                newShippingProfile.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = curdate;
                this.currentShipment = newShippingProfile;
                this.selectedServices[0] = myservice;
                }
            }

// CreateReturnLabelFromPrevious() // returns undefined
vm.CreateReturnLabelFromPrevious = function ()
            {
            vm.currentShipment = structuredClone(vm.lastShipmentRequest);
            vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].ReturnDelivery = true;
            vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].ReturnDeliveryMethod = 0;
            vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].ProactiveRecovery = false;
            vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].DirectDelivery = false;
            vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].Proof = false;
            vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].ProofRequireSignature = false; 
            vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Service = { Symbol: "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.2DA" };
            if (!vm.selectedServices) {
                vm.selectedServices = [];
            }
            vm.selectedServices.push(vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Service);
            };

// showProcessEODModal(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
vm.showProcessEODModal = function(shipmentRequest)
            {
            $processEODModal.modal('show');
            }

// ProcessEOD(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
vm.ProcessEOD = function(shipmentRequest)
            {
            shipmentRequest.Action = 'EOD';
            var data = { Data: JSON.stringify(shipmentRequest) };
            client.httpClient('UserMethod', data).then(
                function(ret) {
                var eodresult = ret.Data;
                $processEODModal.modal('hide');                
                })
            }

// Shipping() // returns undefined
this.Shipping = function () {
        
        //debugger;
        
        this.vm.useCustomGoodsTab = false;
        this.vm.customAddCommodity = customAddCommodity;
        this.vm.importerOfRecordSameAsConsignee = importerOfRecordSameAsConsignee;
        this.vm.addSameAsConsigneeCheckbox = addSameAsConsigneeCheckbox;
        this.vm.addSameAsConsigneeCheckbox();
                
        this.vm.delegateTravelerLabel = delegateTravelerLabel;
        
        this.vm.delegateTabSelected = delegateTabSelected;
        
        this.vm.anotherTabSelected = anotherTabSelected;
        
        var includeIndex = this.vm.profile.CommercialInvoiceMethods.findIndex(function(item) { return item.Name == 'Included'})
        this.vm.profile.CommercialInvoiceMethods.splice(includeIndex, 1);

        if (this.vm.shipping.IsTraveler) {
            client.shipping.notificationGeneralVisibilityBtn.hide();
            client.shipping.returnDeliveryNotificationBtn.hide();
        }

        function delegateTravelerLabel(shipmentRequest) {

            //vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Service = vm.selectedServices[0];            
            var data = { Data: JSON.stringify(shipmentRequest) };
            
            debugger;
            
            var result = client.thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false).responseJSON;
            var travelerlabelresp = JSON.parse(atob(result.Data));
            var travelerlabelpdf64 = travelerlabelresp.DocumentResponses[0].PdfData[0];
            
            // This works but only when the user switches to the new tab and refereshes page
            var dataURI = "data:application/pdf;base64," + travelerlabelpdf64;
            window.open(dataURI, '_blank');

            // This also fails
            //let pdfWindow = window.open("")
            //setTimeout(() => pdfWindow.document.title = 'Delegate Label',50);
            //const iframe = pdfWindow.document.createElement('iframe');
            //iframe.width = '100%';
            //iframe.height = '100%';
            //iframe.title = 'PDF Viewer';  
            //iframe.src = 'data:application/pdf;base64, ' + encodeURI(travelerlabelpdf64);
            //pdfWindow.document.body.appendChild(iframe);
            
            
            // Original code that fails on the document.write call
            //let pdfWindow = window.open("")
            //setTimeout(() => pdfWindow.document.title = 'Delegate Label',50);
            //pdfWindow.document.write(
            //    "<iframe width='100%' height='100%' src='data:application/pdf;base64, " +
            //    encodeURI(travelerlabelpdf64) + "'></iframe>"
            //    )            

            alert("Delegate Label Created");
        }

        function delegateTabSelected() {
            $('#btnSave').hide();
            $('#btnPrintTravelerLabel').show();
        }
        
        function anotherTabSelected() {
            $('#btnSave').show();
            $('#btnPrintTravelerLabel').hide();
        }
        
        $('body').on('click', 'input[ng-click="vm.selectLicensePlate(licensePlate)"]', this.vm, function(e) {
            client.shipping.changeStateProvince('');
            var stateProvince = e.data.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.StateProvince;
            $('name-address[address-property-name="Consignee"] input[name="stateProvince"]').val(stateProvince);
        });        
        
        $('body').on('click', client.shipping.intl.importerOfRecordClearSelector, function(e) {
            client.shipping.intl.$iorSameAsConsignee.get(0).checked = false;
        });

        $('body').on('change', client.shipping.consignee.countrySelector, this.vm, function(e) {
            client.shipping.changeStateProvince(e.data.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country);
        });

        $('body').on('change', client.shipping.consignee.stateProvinceSelector, this.vm, function(e) {
            e.data.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.StateProvince = e.target.value;
            
        });

        $('body').on('click', 'button:contains("'+ this.vm.addCommodityContentsButtonTitle +'")', this.vm, function(e) {
            var interval = setInterval(function(vm) {
                var commodityModalTitle = $('.modal-content h4:contains("Add/Edit Commodity")');
                if (commodityModalTitle.length) {
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    var commodityModal = commodityModalTitle.closest('div.modal-dialog');
                    commodityModal.removeClass('modal-lg').addClass('modal-md');
                    var tabPanes = commodityModal.find('.tab-content:first > div.tab-pane');
                    hideTabs(commodityModal);
                    hideGeneralElement(tabPanes.eq(0), vm);
                }
            }, 10, e.data)

            function hideTabs(commodityModal) {
                var hideIndex = ['1','2','3','4','5','6','7'];
                Array.from(commodityModal.find('li.uib-tab.nav-item')).forEach(function(item) {
                    if (hideIndex.indexOf(item.getAttribute('index')) > -1) $(item).hide();
                });
            }

            function hideGeneralElement(generalPane, vm) {
                var paneRow = generalPane.find('div.row');
                // var originCountry = paneRow.find('div[caption="Origin Country"]').parent().append('<div class="row col-md-12 col-lg-12 ng-scope" \>')
                // var coo = paneRow.find('div[caption="Origin Country"]').closest('div.row');
                // coo.find('div[caption="' + vm.translations.Common.UnitWeight + '"]').hide();
                
                var originCountry = $(paneRow.find('div[caption="Origin Country"]').closest('div.row')[0].outerHTML);
                originCountry.find('div[caption="' + vm.translations.Common.OriginCountry + '"]').removeClass('col-md-6').addClass('col-md-12')
                originCountry.find('div[caption="' + vm.translations.Common.UnitWeight + '"]').hide();
                Array.from(paneRow.find('div')).forEach(function(item) {
                    if (item.classList.contains('col-md-6')) {
                        $(item).removeClass('col-md-6').addClass('col-md-12');
                    }
                })
                
                // coo = coo[0].outerHTML;

                var hideGeneralElement = [
                    vm.translations.Common.CommodityCondition,
                    vm.translations.Common.ApprovedCommunityMemberNumber,
                    vm.translations.Common.OriginCountry,
                    vm.translations.Common.ManufacturerIDCode,
                    vm.translations.Common.OriginDescription
                ];

                hideGeneralElement.forEach(function(item) {
                    var generalElement = paneRow.find('div[caption="' + item + '"]');
                    generalElement.hide(); //remove() causes id error
                });
                
                // $(coo).insertBefore(paneRow[5])
                // originCountry.insertBefore(paneRow[5])
                originCountry.insertBefore(paneRow[5]);
            }
        });

        function customAddCommodity() {

        }

        function importerOfRecordSameAsConsignee(checked) {
            if (checked) {
                this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].ImporterOfRecord = {
                    Company: this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Company,
                    Contact: this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Contact,
                    Address1: this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Address1,
                    Address2: this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Address2,
                    Address3: this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Address3,
                    City: this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.City,
                    StateProvince: this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.StateProvince,
                    PostalCode: this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.PostalCode,
                    Country: this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country
                }
            } else {
                this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].ImporterOfRecord = {}
            }
        }

        function addSameAsConsigneeCheckbox () {
            var interval = setInterval(function(vm) {
                var $target = $(client.shipping.intl.importerOfRecordBtnSelector);
                if ($target.length) {
                    clearInterval(interval)
                    client.shipping.intl.$iorSameAsConsignee = $('<input type="checkbox">');
                    client.shipping.intl.$iorSameAsConsignee.click(function(e) { vm.importerOfRecordSameAsConsignee(e.target.checked) });
                    $target.before(client.shipping.intl.$iorSameAsConsignee, '<label style="padding-left: 6px;">Same As Consignee</label>');
                }
            }, 10, this)
        }       
    }

// PreRate(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
this.PreRate = function (shipmentRequest, userParams) {
    }

// PostRate(shipmentRequest, rateResults) // returns undefined
this.PostRate = function (shipmentRequest, rateResults) {
        debugger;
        modifiedRateResults();
        if (this.vm.shipping.IsMailroom) {
            rateResults[0].customRateResults = customRateResults;
        }

        function modifiedRateResults() {
            for(var i = 0; i< rateResults.length; i++) {
                var rateService = rateResults[i].PackageDefaults.Service;
                rateService.Name = rateService.Name.replace('(CSAdapter)', '').trim();
                rateResults[i].SortIndex = rateService.Symbol == shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol ? 0 : i + 1;
            }
        } 

        function customRateResults(vm) {
            var selectService = selectSortIndex();
            vm.selectService = [ selectService ];
            vm.selectedRow = selectService.Symbol;

            vm.customOnSelectService = customOnSelectService;

            function selectSortIndex () {
                for(var index in rateResults) {
                    if (rateResults[index].SortIndex === 0) {
                        return rateResults[index].PackageDefaults.Service;
                    }
                }
            }

            function customOnSelectService(service, serviceType) {
                if (this.profile.ProfileSetting.ServiceSelectionMode === this.serviceSelectionMode.ShipByService) {
                    this.onSelectService(service, serviceType)
                } else {
                    this.selectService = [ service ];
                    this.selectedRow = service.Symbol;
                    if (!this.profile.ProfileSetting.DisableJustificationMessage) {
                        this.selectedRow = service.Symbol;
                        if (serviceType === "ApplicableService" && selectSortIndex() !== service)
                            this.justify = true;
                        else if (serviceType === "NotApplicableService")
                            this.justify = true;
                        else
                            this.justify = false;
                    } else this.justify = false;
                }
            }
        }
    }

// PreSearchHistory(searchCriteria) // returns undefined
this.PreSearchHistory = function (searchCriteria) {
        this.vm.shipping ??= client.setMailroomOrTraveler(this.vm.profile.Name);
        if (this.vm.shipping.IsTraveler) searchCriteria.WhereClauses.push({ FieldName: 'MiscReference20', FieldValue: client.userName, Operator: 5 });
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) {

        this.vm.shipping ??= client.setMailroomOrTraveler(this.vm.profile.Name);
        if (this.vm.shipping.IsMailroom) client.shipping.loadValue.focus();        
        client.shipping.consignee.updateStateProvince(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults?.Consignee?.Country);
        
        if (this.vm.shipping.IsTraveler) {
            this.vm.disableShipMode = true;
            this.vm.createLicensePlateButtonCaption = 'Get Rate'
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20 = client.userName;
        } 
        this.vm.validateClientMatter = this.validateClientMatter;
        
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipNotificationEmail = true;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipNotificationAddressEmail = client.userName;        
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DeliveryNotificationEmail = true;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail = client.userName;        
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DeliveryExceptionNotificationEmail = true;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail = client.userName;  
        // shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ShipperReference = '040614-548313';
    }

// PostSelectAddressBook(shipmentRequest, nameaddress) // returns undefined
this.PostSelectAddressBook = function (shipmentRequest, nameaddress) {
        client.shipping.changeStateProvince('');
    }

// validateClientMatter() // returns undefined
this.validateClientMatter = function() {

        if( theVM.currentShipment.Packages[0].ShipperReference === null) {
            alert('Client Matter field is required. Please enter a valid client matter number!');
            setFocus('input[name="ShipperReference_txt"]');            
            return;
        }
        
        var cmFound = false;
        var cm = theVM.currentShipment.Packages[0].ShipperReference;
        var cmValidationList = theVM.fieldOptions.ShipperReference.FieldOptionValidations;
        for(var i = 0; i < cmValidationList.length; i++) {
            var cmValidationItem = cmValidationList[i];
            if( cmValidationItem.Value == cm) {
                cmFound = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        if( cmFound )
            theVM.saveLicensePlate();
        else {
            alert("Client Matter field is invalid. Please enter a valid client matter number!");
            setFocus('input[name="ShipperReference_txt"]');                        
        }
    }

// function CopyOriginAddressToReturnAddress() // returns void
    function CopyOriginAddressToReturnAddress()
    {
        debugger;
        var currentUserOriginAddress = vm?.profile?.UserInformation?.Address;
        
        if (currentUserOriginAddress !== undefined && $.isEmptyObject(currentUserOriginAddress) ===false)
        {
            vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress = currentUserOriginAddress;
            console.log ("User Origin Address to Return Address : OK");
        }
        else
        {
             console.log ("Error: Origin Address not found");
        }
    }

// function LoadCostCenter() // returns void
    function LoadCostCenter()
    {
        var currentUserData = vm?.profile?.UserInformation?.Address.CustomData;
        var costCenter = GetUserData(currentUserData, "CostCenter");
        if ($.isEmptyObject(costCenter) === false)
        {
             console.log ("CostCenter detected: " + JSON.stringify(costCenter));
             vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ShipperReference = costCenter.Value;
             $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ShipperReference"]').prop( "disabled", true );
        }
        else
        {
            console.log ("Error: CostCenter not found");
        }
    }

// function InitShipment(calleeMethod) // returns void
    function InitShipment(calleeMethod)
    {
        debugger;
        console.log ("Info: InitShipment called by: " + calleeMethod);
        
         if (location.hash === '#!/shipping') 
         {
            var currentShipper = vm?.currentShipment?.PackageDefaults?.Shipper;
            
            if (currentShipper!=undefined && currentShipper != "MNHQ")
            {
                LoadCostCenter(); 
    			var originAddressCompany,isLoaded;
                var originAddressLoadedInterval = setInterval(function(){
                originAddressCompany = $('[name="company"]:eq(2)').val();
                if (originAddressCompany!=undefined && originAddressCompany.length)
                {
                    clearInterval(originAddressLoadedInterval);	
                    CopyOriginAddressToReturnAddress();
                }
            },50);
            }
         }
    }

{

}

 this.thinClientAPIRequest = function (method, data, isAsync) {
        var shipExecServiceUrl = clientService.config.ShipExecServiceUrl;
        var authorizationToken = clientService.authorizationToken();
        return $.post({ url: shipExecServiceUrl + '/' + method, data: data, async: isAsync, headers: authorizationToken }).responseJSON
    }

    var clientService = {
        config: $.getJSON({url:'config.json', async: false}).responseJSON,
        authorizationToken: function () {
            if (JSON.parse(window.localStorage.getItem("TCToken")))
                return { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + JSON.parse(window.localStorage.getItem("TCToken")).access_token };
        }
    }

    var client = {
        userContext: function () {
            var userContextUrl = 'api/usercontext/GET';
            var shipExecServiceUrl = clientService.config.ShipExecServiceUrl;
            if (shipExecServiceUrl.startsWith('http')) {
                var url = new URL(shipExecServiceUrl);
                userContextUrl = url.origin + '/' + userContextUrl;
            }
            var authorizationToken = clientService.authorizationToken();
            return $.get({url: userContextUrl, headers: authorizationToken, async: false}).responseJSON;
        }(),
        dismiss: $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function () { $('div[role="alert"]:visible').hide(); }),
        alert: (function () {
            var closealert = $('<button class="close" />').append('<span>&times;</span>');
            var uibalert = $('<div hidden class="alert alert-dismissible alert-bottom ng-scope" role="alert" style="z-index: 2000;" />');
            uibalert.append(closealert).append('<span style="padding-right: 10px" />');

            $('body').append(uibalert);
            closealert.on('click', function () { uibalert.hide(); })

            return {
                Info: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-success alert-danger');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-info').show();
                },
                Success: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-info alert-danger');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-success').show();
                },
                Danger: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-info alert-success');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-danger').show();
                }
            }
        })()
    }

    this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) { 
		debugger;
       shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference =   this.GetCustom("Custom1", "User", shipmentRequest);
       shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference =  this.GetCustom("Custom2", "User", shipmentRequest);
       // shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference1 =  this.GetCustom("Custom3", "User", shipmentRequest);
    };

    this.GetCustom = function(fieldName, customDataType, shipmentRequest) {
        var returnValue = "";
        var customData = null;
        if (customDataType === "User") {
            if (shipmentRequest &&
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults &&
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress &&
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData)
                customData = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
        }

        if (customData) {
            customData.forEach(function(customField) {
                if (fieldName === customField.Key) returnValue = customField.Value;
            });
        }
        return returnValue;

    };

}

// function (shipmentRequest) // returns void
    this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) { 
		debugger;
       shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference =   this.GetCustom("Custom1", "User", shipmentRequest);
       shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference =  this.GetCustom("Custom2", "User", shipmentRequest);
       // shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference1 =  this.GetCustom("Custom3", "User", shipmentRequest);
    };

// function (fieldName, customDataType, shipmentRequest) // returns string
    this.GetCustom = function(fieldName, customDataType, shipmentRequest) {
        var returnValue = "";
        var customData = null;
        if (customDataType === "User") {
            if (shipmentRequest &&
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults &&
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress &&
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData)
                customData = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
        }

        if (customData) {
            customData.forEach(function(customField) {
                if (fieldName === customField.Key) returnValue = customField.Value;
            });
        }
        return returnValue;

    };

// GetEmail() // returns string
   GetEmail(){
      var emailText = "";
      var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a"); 
      Array.from(tags).forEach(function(tag){
         if(tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!","").trim(); 
      });
      return emailText;
   }

// AssignCustomEvents() // returns void
    this.AssignCustomEvents = function(){
        $("#btnCustomBatchProcessing").on( "click", function() {
        debugger;
            var userMethodParams = {"ActionMessage": "CustomBatchProcessing"};
            var data = { Data: JSON.stringify(userMethodParams), UserContext: client.userContext };
            var shipExecServiceUrl = client.config.ShipExecServiceUrl;
            var authorizationToken = client.getAuthorizationToken();
            $.post({ url: shipExecServiceUrl + '/' + 'UserMethod', data : data, async:false, headers: authorizationToken });
        });     
    }

// ShowAssignGoodsPane() // returns void
    ShowAssignGoodsPane()
    {
      let that = this;

      //get rid of any previous entries
      $('#listItemContainer li:gt(0)').remove();

      //change the column width to make the descriptions longer
      //change this back when the user clicks the 'Apply' button
      $('div.ui-tab-container').toggleClass('col-md-8 col-md-6').siblings('div').toggleClass('col-md-4 col-md-6')

      //set a reference to the packages object as well as the commodities objects
      this.packages = this.viewModel.currentShipment.Packages;
      this.goods = this.json.data.map(m => m.boxes).flat();
      this.goods.sort((a, b) => { return a.skuId - b.skuId });

      //loop the commodities to create a master list item for each
      $(this.goods).each(function(a, b)
      {
        let k = 'e' + (Math.random() + 1).toString(36).substring(2);
        b.UniqueId = k;

        //copy the source element
        let item = $('#liClone').clone(true).data(b);

        //change the id of the main containing element so we don't run into issue later
        //each clone is a discreet list item which corresponds to a commodity
        $(item).attr('id', k);

        //the customer is sending amounts that have sometimes 10 digits after the decimal point which is throwing exceptions when trying
        //to parseFloat so this is the simplest way to get around that.
        //let cost = Math.round(b.UnitValue.Amount * 100) / 100;

        $(item).find('.goods-sku').html('SKU: <strong>' + b.skuId + '</strong>');
        $(item).find('.goods-quantity').html('Quantity: <strong>' + b.quantity + '</strong>');
        $(item).find('.goods-declared-value').html('Unit Cost: <strong>$' + b.unitPrice + '</strong>');

        //append it to our list
        $('#divAssignCommodities ul.list-group').append(item);

        //assign all goods to the first package
        that.packages[0].CommodityContents.push(that.GetCommodityContentObject(b));

        //update the weight and declared value in the root of the object
        let weight = that.packages[0].Weight;
        let dva = that.packages[0].DeclaredValueAmount;
        const thisWeight = (+b.quantity * +b.weightLbs);
        const thisValue = (+b.quantity * +b.unitPrice);

        if (!weight.Amount) { weight.Amount = 0; }
        that.packages[0].Weight.Amount += (+b.quantity * +b.weightLbs).toFixed(2);

        if (!dva.Amount) { dva.Amount = 0; }
        that.packages[0].DeclaredValueAmount.Amount += Math.round((+b.quantity * +b.unitPrice) * 100) / 100;

        //show it gracefully
        $(item).show();
      });

      //that.UpdatePackageCounts();
      //$('li[heading=Goods] a:first').click();
      $('#divAssignCommodities').show().animate({ left: 0 }, 400);
      $('.scan-input:visible').first().focus();
      $('#divAssignCommodities').find('[data-toggle="tooltip"]').tooltip();
    }

// HideAssignGoodsPane() // returns void
    HideAssignGoodsPane()
    {
      let u = $('#divAssignCommodities').outerWidth() + 100;
      $('#divAssignCommodities').animate({ left: -u }, 400, function() { $(this).hide(); });
      $('div.ui-tab-container').toggleClass('col-md-8 col-md-6').siblings('div').toggleClass('col-md-4 col-md-6');
    }

// MoveGoodToBox(li, destBox) // returns void
    MoveGoodToBox(li, destBox)
    {
      let vm = this.ClassViewModel;
      let that = this;
      let data = $(li).data();
      let destCC = this.packages[destBox - 1].CommodityContents || [];

      //find the box the item currently resides in
      //split this statement up over a few calls to make it easier to read
      let allGoods = this.packages.map(m => m.CommodityContents).flat();
      let item = allGoods.find(cc => cc.UniqueId == data.UniqueId);

      if (+item.PkgIndex == +destBox) { console.log('Item already exists in box.'); return false; }

      //remove the item from its current box
      this.packages[item.PkgIndex - 1].CommodityContents = this.packages[item.PkgIndex - 1].CommodityContents.filter(p => p.UniqueId != data.UniqueId);

      //add it to the new box
      item.PkgIndex = destBox;
      destCC.push(item);
      $(li).find('.pkg-index-text').fadeOut().promise().done(function(e) { $(this).text(destBox).fadeIn(); });

      //console.log(vm.currentShipment.Packages);
      $('li[heading="Goods"]:visible:first > a').trigger('click');
      $('#goods .btn-group').find('.btn:gt(0)').not('.active').first().trigger('click');

      //update the weights and values
      //this data will have changed by now so get a new reference to the object
      allGoods = this.packages.map(m => m.CommodityContents).flat();
      //the items array will have the CommodityContents object for every package in the shipment

      //sort by package index
      //update the weight and declared values for all the packages in the shipment
      allGoods = allGoods.sort((a, b) => { return a.PkgIndex - b.PkgIndex });
      $(allGoods).each(function(a, b)
      {
        let pkg = that.packages[b.PkgIndex - 1];

        if ((a == 0) || (b.PkgIndex != allGoods[a - 1].PkgIndex))
        {
          pkg.Weight.Amount = 0;
          pkg.DeclaredValueAmount.Amount = 0;
        }

        pkg.Weight.Amount += +b.PVTotalWeight;
        pkg.DeclaredValueAmount.Amount += +b.PVTotalValue;
      });
    }

// InitiateDelegates() // returns void
    InitiateDelegates()
    {
      let that = this

      $('body').delegate('#btnAssignCommodities', 'click', function()
      {
        if ($('#divAssignCommodities:visible').length > 0) return;
        that.ShowAssignGoodsPane();
      });

      $('body').delegate('#btnApplyCommodityAssignments', 'click', function(e)
      {
        that.ApplyCommodityAssignments();
      });

      $('body').delegate('#btnCancelAssignGoods', 'click', function(e)
      {
        that.HideAssignGoodsPane();
      });

      $('body').delegate('.assign-to-new-box', 'click', function(e)
      {
        let li = $(e.target).closest('li');
        $('button[ng-click="vm.addPackage();"]').trigger('click').promise().done((e) =>
        {
          const cp = +$('#spanCurrentPackageIndex').text();
          that.MoveGoodToBox(li, cp);
        });
      });

      $('body').delegate('.assign-to-current-box', 'click', function(e)
      {
        let li = $(e.target).closest('li');
        const cp = +$('#spanCurrentPackageIndex').text();
        that.MoveGoodToBox(li, cp);
      });

      $('body').delegate('.undo-box-assignment', 'click', function(e)
      {
        let li = $(e.target).closest('li');
        that.MoveGoodToBox(li, 1);
      });

    }

this.PageLoaded = function(location) {
        //22 May 2023 - Below Code (Line 4 to 7) is added to navigate to Shipping screen on login instead of Welcome Screen.
        if (location === '/') {
            document.location = '#!/shipping';
        }

        $(".dropdown-menu li:first a").text("Shipping");
        if (location === '/shipping') {
            //06 June 2023 - Below Code (Line 14 to 20) is added to remove the unwanted weight Units.
            $(document).ready(function() {
                setTimeout(function() {
                    $('select:eq(24) option[label="OZ"]').remove();
                    $('select:eq(24) option[label="MG"]').remove();
                    $('select:eq(24) option[label="G"]').remove();
                }, 1500);
            });

           
            this.vm.returnStatus = this.GetReturnStatus();
            
            var UserCountry=this.vm.profile.UserInformation.Address.Country.toLowerCase();
            pickuplink='https://www.ups.com/'+ UserCountry +'/en/business-solutions/pickup-dropoff-options/ups-on-call-pickup.page';
             var desc = [
                '<span style="font-weight:bold;">Instructions</span><br>Shipments using service level as UPS Worldwide Express Freight must be palletized, stackable, fork-liftable, shrink-wrapped and banded to the skip.<br/>Shipments destined to Saudi Arabia must be packaged separately.<br/><b>For shipments originating from USA:</b><br>i.	Email all export documents ( Ex : Invoice, Shipper’s export declaration and packing list) to <a href="mailto:internationaldocs.us@ups.com">internationaldocs.us@ups.com</a> with the tracking number as the subject header of the email on the same day the shipment is picked up<br>ii.	For shipments valued over USD 2,500: <br>1.	Shippers filing directly with the Census Bureau must supply the AES Internal Transaction Number (ITN) at the time of pickup by UPS. The ITN should be placed on the label or on the invoice as close to the total value as possible.<br>2.	UPS can file the AES information on behalf of the shipper for a fee. The shipper must supply all necessary information for the filing, including their EIN number, License/License Exemption/License Exception and Export Control Classification Number (ECCN).<br><b>For shipments originating from EU countries:</b><br>i.	Shippers Export Declaration (SED)/ Export Procedure:<br>1.	First step: the exporter or his representative has to lodge an export declaration at the customs house of export responsible for supervising the place where the exporter is established. The customs house of export is responsible for granting the release for export and issue an Export Accompanying Document (EAD) with a unique Movement Reference Number (MRN).<br>2.	Second step: the carrier launches the MRN electronically to the customs house of exit that is responsible to supervise the physical export.<br><b>Please contact your local UPS customer care to schedule a pick-up at your convenience.'
            ];
            
            var name = document.querySelector("body > div.main-container > div.container-fluid.body-content.body > div > div.ng-scope > div > div > div:nth-child(2)");
            name.appendChild(document.createElement('div')).innerHTML = desc;
            
            alert('Please click on "Close Manifest" to transfer all your shipping information to UPS.')
        }
		
		 if (location === '/closemanifest') {
        $('.panel-footer').append('<div style="margin-left:10px"><b>For scheduling pick-up, please <a target="_blank" href="'+ pickuplink +'">click here</a> to access the contact details of nearest UPS center.</div>'); 
    
    }
    }

// PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns void
this.PreShip = function(shipmentRequest, userParams) {

        var freightfound = 0;
        var frieghterr = 0;

        for (var i = 0; i <= shipmentRequest.Packages.length - 1; i++) {
            if (parseInt(shipmentRequest.Packages[i].Weight.Amount) >= 70) {
                freightfound = "1";
            }
            if (freightfound == "1") {
                if (parseInt(shipmentRequest.Packages[i].Weight.Amount) < 70) {
                    frieghterr = "1";
                }
            }
        }
        if (freightfound == "0") {
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = {
                Symbol: "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.EXPSVR"
            }
        } else {
            if (frieghterr == "0") {
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = {
                    Symbol: "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.EXPFRT"
                }
            } else {
                alert("Cannot create one shipment with 2 different service levels.");
            }
        }
        for (var i = 0; i <= shipmentRequest.Packages.length - 1; i++) {
            if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol == "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.EXPFRT") {
                shipmentRequest.Packages[i].Packaging = "CUSTOMER_PALLET";
            }
            shipmentRequest.Packages[i].ImportDelivery = true;

        }
        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.Country == "US") {
            if ($('select[name="CarrierInstructions"]').val() == '?') {
                alert("Please confirm shipment value");
                throw ("Excpetion");
            } else {
                if (shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference == null || shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference == "") {
                    if ($('select[name="CarrierInstructions"]').val() == 'string:Yes') {
                        alert("Please Enter ITN/ EES number in ConsigneeReference");
                        throw ("Excpetion");
                    }
                }
            }
        } else {
            if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.Country != "undefined") {
                alert("For EU Exports : Shipments above 1000 EUR, a formal export declaration is required. A formal electronic export declaration must be sent to customs authorities by the exporter or their representative. Customs authorities grant the release for export and issue an Export Accompanying Document (EAD) with a unique Movement Reference Number (MRN). The EAD has to accompany the shipment. UPS is responsible for the exit clearance at the EU border.")
            }
        }
    }

// PostShip(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) // returns void
this.PostShip = function(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) {
        let confirmReprocess = confirm("Do you want to create more shipments?" + "\n" + " OK = YES and CANCEL = NO");

        if (confirmReprocess) {
            document.location = '#!/shipping';
        } else {
            document.location = '#!/closemanifest';
        }
    }

// ValidateShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns boolean
function(shipmentRequest){
    var weight = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Weight;
    var weightLimit = 0;
    var totalWeight = 0;
            weightLimit = 50;
    var i;
    for(i = 0; i < shipmentRequest.Packages.length; i++)
    {
        var pkgWeight = parseFloat(shipmentRequest.Packages[i].Weight.Amount);
        if(pkgWeight > weightLimit){
           return confirm("One or more packages is 50lb or greater.  Are you sure you want to continue?");
        //throw {errorCode:999,message:"You cannot ship  greater than " + weightLimit + " " + weight.Units + "."};
    } else{
        return true;
    }
    }

}

// ValidatePackage(pkg) // returns void
function(pkg){
    debugger;
    var weight = pkg.Weight;
    var weightLimit = 0;
    var totalWeight = 0;
            weightLimit = 50;

        var pkgWeight = parseFloat(pkg.Weight.Amount);
        if(pkgWeight > weightLimit){
            alert("Previous package weight is greater than 50lb.");
        } 
    }

// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
  this.PageLoaded = (location) =>
  {
    AJAX_SE23.SetClientContext();

    if (location == '/')
    {
      let style = '<style> .listview { padding: 10px; } </style>';

      let buttons = '<div id="divButtonRow" style="display: flex; flex-wrap: no-wrap; flex-direction: row; justify-content: center;">'
      buttons += '<div class="listview" style="padding: 10px;"><button ast-event="GetUiTweaks" class="btn btn-primary">UI Tweaks</button></div>';
      buttons += '<div class="listview" style="padding: 10px;"><button ast-event="GetPackVerify1" class="btn btn-primary disabled">PackVerify 1</button></div>';
      buttons += '<div class="listview" style="padding: 10px;"><button ast-event="GetPackVerify2" class="btn btn-primary">PackVerify 2</button></div>';
      buttons += '<div class="listview" style="padding: 10px;"><button ast-event="GetPackVerify3" class="btn btn-primary disabled">PackVerify 3</button></div>';
      buttons += '<div class="listview" style="padding: 10px;"><button ast-event="GetBatching" class="btn btn-primary disabled">Batch Processing</button></div></div>';

      $('div.body-content').append(style, buttons);

      $('div.listview > button').on('click', (e) => 
      {
        AJAX_SE23.MakeUserMethodRequest({ MethodName: $(e.currentTarget).attr('ast-event') }).then((result) => 
        {
          $('body').append(atob(result.Data));
        });
      });
    }
  }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) { 
        shipmentRequest.SendViewModelToClient = this.GetViewModelFromTemplate;
        shipmentRequest.AlertTitle = '';
        shipmentRequest.AlertMessage = '';
        angular.element('[ng-model="vm.loadValue"]').focus();
    }

// PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
this.PostLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest) {
        
        shipmentRequest.SendViewModelToClient = this.GetViewModelFromTemplate;

        if( shipmentRequest.Packages[0].UserData1 !== null )	{
	    if( shipmentRequest.Packages[0].UserData1.length > 0 ) {
	        if( shipmentRequest.Packages[0].UserData1.substring(0,1) == "~") {
                    shipmentRequest.AlertTitle = "ShipExec Alert";
                    shipmentRequest.AlertMessage = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].UserData1.substring(1);
                    angular.element('[ng-model="AlertModalNewShipment"]').modal('show');
	            }
	        else {
                    shipmentRequest.AlertTitle = "ShipExec Alert";
                    shipmentRequest.AlertMessage = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].UserData1;
                    angular.element('[ng-model="AlertModal"]').modal('show');
	        }
		}
	}
    }

// GetViewModelFromTemplate(viewModel) // returns undefined
this.GetViewModelFromTemplate = function(viewModel){
        vm = viewModel;
    }

// GetViewModelFromTemplate(viewModel) // returns undefined
this.GetViewModelFromTemplate = function(viewModel) {
        if (vm === undefined) {
            vm = viewModel;
        }
    }
