// this.ConsigneeCountryChange() // returns undefined
this.ConsigneeCountryChange = function () {
        setInternationalPackaging(this.currentShipment, this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee);
    }

// function setInternationalPackaging(shipmentRequest, nameAddress) // returns undefined
function setInternationalPackaging(shipmentRequest, nameAddress) {
        var isInternational = nameAddress.Country != 'US';
        $('[property="Packaging"] select').prop('disabled', isInternational);
        if (isInternational) {
            var packages = shipmentRequest.Packages;
            for (var i = 0; i < packages.length; i++) {
                packages[i].Packaging = 'LETTER';
            }
        }
    }

// function appendCSS() // returns undefined
function appendCSS(){
        var style = document.createElement('style');
        style.innerHTML = 'input:focus, textarea:focus, select:focus{background-color: #ffffcc;}';
        style.innerHTML += 'li.active a.ng-binding { background-color: #dddddd !important; }';
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    }

// function dismissAlertDialog() // returns undefined
function dismissAlertDialog() {
        $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function(e) {
            $('div.alert-danger:visible').hide();
        })
    }

// var client.init() // returns undefined
init: function () {          
            String.prototype.addButtonLabel = function(text) {
                var interval = setInterval(function(selector) { 
                    var $element = $(selector);
                    if ($element.length) {
                        clearInterval(interval);                        
                        $element.parent().removeClass('col-md-3');
                        $element.parent().addClass('col-md-4'); 
                        $element.wrap('<label class="ng-binding">').after(text);
                    } 
                }, 10, this);
            }
        }

// dismiss // returns jQuery delegate handler result
dismiss: $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function () { $('div[role="alert"]:visible').hide(); }),

// alert // returns object with Info, Success, and Danger methods for UI alerts
alert: (function () {
            var closealert = $('<button class="close" />').append('<span>&times;</span>');
            var uibalert = $('<div hidden class="alert alert-dismissible alert-bottom ng-scope" role="alert" style="z-index: 2000;" />');
            uibalert.append(closealert).append('<span style="padding-right: 10px" />');

            $('body').append(uibalert);
            closealert.on('click', function () { uibalert.hide(); })

            return {
                Info: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-success alert-danger');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-info').show();
                },
                Success: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-info alert-danger');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-success').show();
                },
                Danger: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-info alert-success');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-danger').show();
                }
            }
        })()

// singleCheckbox() // returns undefined
function singleCheckbox() {
        var $checkbox = $(this);
        if ($checkbox.is(':checked') && $checkbox.is('[name]')) {
            // the name of the box is retrieved using the .attr() method
            // as it is assumed and expected to be immutable
            var group = 'input:checkbox[name="' + $checkbox.attr("name") + '"]';

            // the checked state of the group/box on the other hand will change
            // and the current value is retrieved using .prop() method
            $(group).prop('checked', false);
            $checkbox.prop('checked', true);
        }

    }

// appendCSS() // returns undefined
function appendCSS(){
        var style = document.createElement('style');
        style.innerHTML = 'input:focus, textarea:focus, select:focus{background-color: #ffffcc;}';
        style.innerHTML += 'li.active a.ng-binding { background-color: #dddddd !important; }';
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    }

// dismissAlertDialog() // returns undefined
function dismissAlertDialog() {
        $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function(e) {
            $('div.alert-danger:visible').hide();
        })
    }

                        clearInterval(interval);                        
                        $element.parent().removeClass('col-md-3');
                        $element.parent().addClass('col-md-4'); 
                        $element.wrap('<label class="ng-binding">').after(text);
                    } 
                }, 10, this);
            }
        }

// client.alert() // returns object
alert: (function () {
            var closealert = $('<button class="close" />').append('<span>&times;</span>');
            var uibalert = $('<div hidden class="alert alert-dismissible alert-bottom ng-scope" role="alert" style="z-index: 2000;" />');
            uibalert.append(closealert).append('<span style="padding-right: 10px" />');

            $('body').append(uibalert);
            closealert.on('click', function () { uibalert.hide(); })

            return {
                Info: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-success alert-danger');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-info').show();
                },
                Success: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-info alert-danger');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-success').show();
                },
                Danger: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-info alert-success');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-danger').show();
                }
            }
        })()

// Source: Epiq Bankruptcy Services (EPIQ)_Epiq CBR with UserContext Fix 2.0_1805.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
  this.PageLoaded = function(location)
  {

    if (location == '/shipping')
    {
      $(function()
      {
        $('input[type=text][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Description"]').val('DOCUMENTS');
        $('div[ng-hide="vm.profile.FieldOptions.Consignee.IsHidden"]').delegate('input[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]', 'blur', function(e)
        {
          $('div[ng-hide="vm.profile.FieldOptions.Consignee.IsHidden"] button[ng-click="search(nameaddress)"]').trigger('click');
        });
      });
    }

    if (location == '/batchmanager')
    {
      $(document).ready(function()
      {
        $.globalEval('var userContext;');

        $('#batchUpdateTabs').delegate('li', 'click', function(e)
        {
          e.preventDefault();
          e.stopImmediatePropagation();
          e.stopPropagation();

          var i = $(this).attr('index');
          UIMethods.SwitchToTab(i);
        });

        $('body').delegate('input[required]', 'keydown', function(e)
        {
          $(this).removeClass('has-error');
        });

        $('body').delegate('#buttonBulkEditBatch', 'click', function(e)
        {
          BatchClass.EditThisBatch(this);
        });

        $('body').delegate('#checkboxthirdparty', 'click', function(e)
        {
          BatchClass.CheckForThirdPartyBilling();
        });

        $('body').delegate('#buttonBulkUpdateBatch', 'click', function(e)
        {
          BatchClass.UpdateCurrentBatch();
        });

        $('body').delegate('#buttonCancelBulkUpdateBatch', 'click', function(e)
        {
          BatchClass.CancelUpdateCurrentBatch();
        });

      });
    }
  }

// SwitchToTab(tab) // returns void
      SwitchToTab: function(tab)
      {
        $('#divCustomTabContainer div.tab-pane').not(':eq(' + tab + ')').hide().removeClass('active');
        $('#batchUpdateTabs li.uib-tab').not(':eq(' + tab + ')').removeClass('active');

        $('#divCustomTabContainer div.tab-pane:eq(' + tab + ')').show().addClass('active');
        $('#batchUpdateTabs li.uib-tab:eq(' + tab + ')').addClass('active');
      }

// SetCurrentViewModel(vm) // returns void
      SetCurrentViewModel(vm)
      {
        currentViewModel = vm;
      },

// EditThisBatch(btn) // returns void
      EditThisBatch: function(btn)
      {
        /* Add the batch id to the text at the bottom of the div. */
        $('.batch-id').text($(btn).closest('tr').find('td:eq(1)').text());

        $('#divCustomTabContainer form').trigger('reset');
        $('#divCustomTabContainer input').removeClass('has-error');

        UIMethods.SwitchToTab(0);

        $('#divCustomTabContainer').fadeIn();
      },

// CheckForThirdPartyBilling() // returns void
      CheckForThirdPartyBilling: function()
      {
        var chkval = $('#checkboxthirdparty').prop('checked');

        /* Remove any errors before showing the tab. */
        $('#tabThirdPartyBilling input[type=text]').removeClass('has-error');

        if (chkval == true)
        {
          /* Switch to tab. */
          UIMethods.SwitchToTab(2);
        }
        else
        {
          /* Clear the form on the third party billing tab. */
          $('form[name=FormThirdPartyOptions]')[0].reset();
        }
      },

// CancelUpdateCurrentBatch() // returns void
      CancelUpdateCurrentBatch: function()
      {
        $('#divCustomTabContainer form').trigger('reset');
        $('#divCustomTabContainer input').removeClass('has-error');

        $('#divCustomTabContainer').fadeOut();
      },

// UpdateCurrentBatch() // returns false|undefined
      UpdateCurrentBatch: function()
      {
        if (CheckForRequiredValues() == false) { return false; }

        //var UserMethod = {};
        //UserMethod.ServerMethod = 'UpdateBatchData';

        var dataObject = {};

        dataObject.BatchReference = $('.batch-id').text();
        dataObject.Shipper = $('#selectshippers option:selected').val();
        dataObject.PackageType = $('#selectpackagetype option:selected').val();
        dataObject.DeliveryConfirmation = $('#checkboxdeliveryconfirmation').prop('checked');
        dataObject.SignatureRequired = $('#deliveryconfirmationcontainer input[type=radio]:checked').val();
        dataObject.BillingOption = $('#selectbilling option:selected').val();

        dataObject.Telephone = $('#inputphone').val();
        dataObject.PackageWeight = $('#inputweight').val();
        dataObject.PackageDeclaredValue = $('#inputdeclared').val();
        dataObject.Client = $('#inputclient').val();
        dataObject.GoodsDescription = $('#inputgoods').val();
        dataObject.ConsigneeAccount = $('#inputaccountnumber').val();

        dataObject.DomesticServiceMethod = $('#selectdomesticservice option:selected').val();
        dataObject.InternationalServiceMethod = $('#selectintlservice option:selected').val();
        dataObject.DomesticSaturday = $('#checkboxdomesticsaturdaydel').prop('checked');
        dataObject.DomesticInternational = $('#checkboxintlsaturdaydel').prop('checked');

        dataObject.ThirdPartyBilling = false;

        if ($('#checkboxthirdparty').prop('checked') == true)
        {
          /* Need to add 3rd party billing data. */
          dataObject.ThirdPartyBilling = true;
          dataObject.ThirdPartyCompany = $('#inputThirdPartyCompany').val().trim();
          dataObject.ThirdPartyContact = $('#inputThirdPartyContact').val().trim();
          dataObject.ThirdPartyAddress1 = $('#inputThirdPartyAddress1').val().trim();
          dataObject.ThirdPartyAddress2 = $('#inputThirdPartyAddress2').val().trim();
          dataObject.ThirdPartyAddress3 = $('#inputThirdPartyAddress3').val().trim();
          dataObject.ThirdPartyCity = $('#inputThirdPartyCity').val().trim();
          dataObject.ThirdPartyState = $('#inputThirdPartyState').val().trim();
          dataObject.ThirdPartyPostalCode = $('#inputThirdPartyPostalCode').val().trim();
          dataObject.ThirdPartyAccount = $('#inputThirdPartyAccount').val().trim();
          dataObject.ThirdPartyCountry = $('#selectThirdPartyCountry option:selected').val().replace("string:", "");
        }

        this.MakeUserMethodRequest('UpdateBatchData', dataObject).then(function() { $('#divCustomTabContainer').fadeOut(); });

        //UserMethod.MethodData = dataObject;
      },

// ParseEncodedData(data) // returns promise
      ParseEncodedData: async function(data)
      {
        let deferred = $.Deferred();

        //nothing came back from the server.
        if (!data) deferred.resolve('No data passed to parser');

        let parseResult = $.parseHTML(data.Data || data)[0].textContent;

        //best guess that the return was json.  parse as json and return
        let f = parseResult.slice(0, 1), l = parseResult.slice(-1);
        let bJsonFirst = ((f.indexOf('{') !== -1) || (f.indexOf('[') !== -1));
        let bJsonLast = ((l.indexOf('}') !== -1) || (l.indexOf(']') !== -1));

        if (bJsonFirst && bJsonLast) { deferred.resolve($.parseJSON(parseResult)) }

        //if the result of the parse was a number, return an integer (may need to change this to a float (++ instead of +)
        //note:  don't parse as float unless you know it's a float.
        //do this in the dev tools console:
        //let pf = '7'; console.log('pf as int', +(pf)); console.log('pf as float', ++(pf));
        //else, return the string
        deferred.resolve($.isNumeric(parseResult) ? +(parseResult) : (parseResult));

        return deferred.promise();
      },

// MakeUserMethodRequest(MethodName, MethodData, callback) // returns promise
      MakeUserMethodRequest: async function(MethodName, MethodData, callback)
      {
        let defjam = $.Deferred();

        let m = {};
        m.ServerMethod = MethodName;
        m.MethodData = MethodData || null;

        let u = new User();
        //all my userMethod calls take two params, a ServerMethod: string, and MethodData: any

        var ajaxObject = {
          UserContext: u.UserContext || await u.GetUserContext(),
          Data: JSON.stringify(m)
        };

        $.ajax(
          {
            url: u.UserMethodUrl,
            method: 'POST',
            dataType: 'json',
            data: ajaxObject,
            headers: u.GetRequestHeaders()
          }).done(function(data)
          {

            if (data.ErrorCode == 0) { defjam.resolve(true); }
            //let t = BatchClass.ParseEncodedData(data).then(function(result)
            //{
            //  defjam.resolve(result);
            //});

          }).fail(function(xhr)
          {
            defjam.reject('Error in ajax call');
            console.log(xhr);
            console.log('Method name: ', MethodName);
            console.log('Method data: ', MethodData);
          });

        return defjam.promise();
      }

// Start(callback) // returns promise|undefined
    async Start(callback)
    {
      let that = this;
      if (this.UserInformation)
      {
        let u = {};
        u.CompanyId = this.UserInformation.CompanyId || null;
        u.UserId = this.UserInformation.UserId || null;
        u.SiteId = this.UserInformation.SitdId || null;
        this.UserContext = u;
      }

      //use localStorage for UserMethodUrl and UserContextUrl
      if (window.localStorage.getItem('cbrValues'))
      {
        let cbr = $.parseJSON(window.localStorage.getItem('cbrValues'));
        this.UserContextUrl = decodeURIComponent(cbr.UserContextUrl) || null;
        this.UserMethodUrl = decodeURIComponent(cbr.UserMethodUrl) || null;
      }

      //check for the two items that we need.  if they exist, no need to go further.
      if (this.UserContext && this.UserContext.CompanyId && this.UserMethodUrl)
      {
        if ($.isFunction(callback)) callback(true);
      }

      //nothing found in localStorage, add stuff.
      that.GetJsonConfig().then(function(data)
      {
        let _rootUrl = new URL(data.ShipExecServiceUrl).origin;

        that.UserContextUrl = _rootUrl + '/api/usercontext/GET';
        that.UserMethodUrl = _rootUrl + '/api/ShippingService/UserMethod';

        //write the values to local storage
        let cbr = {};
        cbr.UserContextUrl = encodeURIComponent(that.UserContextUrl);
        cbr.UserMethodUrl = encodeURIComponent(that.UserMethodUrl);
        window.localStorage.setItem('cbrValues', JSON.stringify(cbr));

        //this is actually a set/get for the class var
        that.GetUserContext().then(function() { if ($.isFunction(callback)) callback(true); });
      });
    }

// GetUserContext() // returns promise
    async GetUserContext()
    {
      let that = this;
      return $.ajax({
        method: 'GET',
        url: that.UserContextUrl,
        dataType: 'json',
        headers: that.GetRequestHeaders(),
        done: function(data)
        {
          that.UserContext = data;
          return data;
        }
      });
    }

// GetJsonConfig() // returns promise
    async GetJsonConfig()
    {
      return $.ajax({
        method: 'GET',
        url: 'config.json',
        dataType: 'json',
        done: function(data)
        {
          return data;
        }
      });
    }

// GetRequestHeaders() // returns object
    GetRequestHeaders()
    {
      //get the bearer token from local storage
      let _authToken = null;
      let _token = window.localStorage.getItem('TCToken') || null;
      if (_token) { _authToken = $.parseJSON(_token).access_token; }

      return { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + _authToken };
    }

// SwitchToTab(tab) // returns void
      SwitchToTab: function(tab)
      {
        $('#divCustomTabContainer div.tab-pane').not(':eq(' + tab + ')').hide().removeClass('active');
        $('#batchUpdateTabs li.uib-tab').not(':eq(' + tab + ')').removeClass('active');

        $('#divCustomTabContainer div.tab-pane:eq(' + tab + ')').show().addClass('active');
        $('#batchUpdateTabs li.uib-tab:eq(' + tab + ')').addClass('active');
      }

// CheckForRequiredValues() // returns boolean
    function CheckForRequiredValues()
    {
      var bValid = true;

      if ($('#inputclient').val().trim().length == 0)
      {
        $('#inputclient').addClass('has-error');
        bValid = false;
        UIMethods.SwitchToTab(0);
      }

      /* If the 3rd party billing checkbox is checked, all the text fields need to be filled out. */
      if (($('#checkboxthirdparty').prop('checked') == true) && (bValid == true))
      {
        var textBoxes = $('#tabThirdPartyBilling input[type=text]');
        $(textBoxes).each(function(x, y)
        {
          if ($(this).val().trim().length == 0)
          {
            $(this).addClass('has-error');
            bValid = false;
            UIMethods.SwitchToTab(2);
          }
        });
      }

      return bValid;
    }

      SetCurrentViewModel(vm)
      {
        currentViewModel = vm;
      },

        $('#divCustomTabContainer input').removeClass('has-error');

        UIMethods.SwitchToTab(0);

        $('#divCustomTabContainer').fadeIn();
      },

          UIMethods.SwitchToTab(2);
        }
        else
        {
          /* Clear the form on the third party billing tab. */
          $('form[name=FormThirdPartyOptions]')[0].reset();
        }
      },

// ParseEncodedData(data) // returns Promise
      ParseEncodedData: async function(data)
      {
        let deferred = $.Deferred();

        //nothing came back from the server.
        if (!data) deferred.resolve('No data passed to parser');

        let parseResult = $.parseHTML(data.Data || data)[0].textContent;

        //best guess that the return was json.  parse as json and return
        let f = parseResult.slice(0, 1), l = parseResult.slice(-1);
        let bJsonFirst = ((f.indexOf('{') !== -1) || (f.indexOf('[') !== -1));
        let bJsonLast = ((l.indexOf('}') !== -1) || (l.indexOf(']') !== -1));

        if (bJsonFirst && bJsonLast) { deferred.resolve($.parseJSON(parseResult)) }

        //if the result of the parse was a number, return an integer (may need to change this to a float (++ instead of +)
        //note:  don't parse as float unless you know it's a float.
        //do this in the dev tools console:
        //let pf = '7'; console.log('pf as int', +(pf)); console.log('pf as float', ++(pf));
        //else, return the string
        deferred.resolve($.isNumeric(parseResult) ? +(parseResult) : (parseResult));

        return deferred.promise();
      },

// MakeUserMethodRequest(MethodName, MethodData, callback) // returns Promise
      MakeUserMethodRequest: async function(MethodName, MethodData, callback)
      {
        let defjam = $.Deferred();

        let m = {};
        m.ServerMethod = MethodName;
        m.MethodData = MethodData || null;

        let u = new User();
        //all my userMethod calls take two params, a ServerMethod: string, and MethodData: any

        var ajaxObject = {
          UserContext: u.UserContext || await u.GetUserContext(),
          Data: JSON.stringify(m)
        };

        $.ajax(
          {
            url: u.UserMethodUrl,
            method: 'POST',
            dataType: 'json',
            data: ajaxObject,
            headers: u.GetRequestHeaders()
          }).done(function(data)
          {

            let t = Tools.ParseEncodedData(data).then(function(result)
            {
              defjam.resolve(result);
            });

          }).fail(function(xhr)
          {
            defjam.reject('Error in ajax call');
            console.log(xhr);
            console.log('Method name: ', MethodName);
            console.log('Method data: ', MethodData);
          });

        return defjam.promise();
      }

// function ShowLoader() // returns undefined
  function ShowLoader ()
  {
    $('div.loading').removeClass('ng-hide').addClass('ng-show');
  }

// function HideLoader() // returns undefined
  function HideLoader ()
  {
    $('div.loading').removeClass('ng-show').addClass('ng-hide');
  }

// function ShowOverlay() // returns undefined
  function ShowOverlay ()
  {
    $('div.overlay').show();
  }

// function HideOverlay() // returns undefined
  function HideOverlay ()
  {
    $('div.overlay').hide();
  }

// function ShowErrorAlert(ErrorMessage) // returns undefined
      ShowErrorAlert: function (ErrorMessage)
      {
        $('#divCustomAlert div.alert-message').text(ErrorMessage).closest('div.alert').show();
      }

// function GetCurrentWeightFromScale() // returns undefined
      GetCurrentWeightFromScale: function ()
      {
        var w;

        if ($('input[type=button][ng-click="vm.getWeight()"').attr('disabled') === 'disabled')
        {
          w = $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Amount"]').val();
          $('span.dim-val.dim-weight').text(w);
        }
        else
        {
          $('input[type=button][ng-click="vm.getWeight()"]').click(function ()
          {
            w = $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Amount"]').val();
            $('span.dim-val.dim-weight').text(w);
          });
        }
      }

// function ShowContainerTable(tableIndex) // returns undefined
      ShowContainerTable: function (tableIndex)
      {
        try
        {
          var currentContainer = $('div.table-box-contents table.table-custom:visible');
          var targetContainer;

          /* fallbackContainer is used when the last table in the container is reached.  Go back to the beginning on 'next', to the end on 'prev'. */
          //var fallbackContainer;
          var uiNavButton;

          //console.log($('span.current-container-index.container-val').text());
          var currentContainerIndex = parseInt($('span.current-container-index.container-val').text());

          switch (tableIndex)
          {
            case 'prev':
              // targetContainer = $('div.table-box-contents table.table-custom:eq(' + ($(currentContainer).index() - 1) + ')');
              targetContainer = $('div.table-box-contents table.table-custom:eq(' + (currentContainerIndex - 2) + ')');


              //fallbackContainer = $('div.table-box-contents table.table-custom').last();
              uiNavButton = $('button[type=button][ng-click="vm.previousPackage();"]').first();
              break;

            case 'next':
              targetContainer = $('div.table-box-contents table.table-custom:eq(' + ($(currentContainer).index() + 1) + ')');
              //fallbackContainer = $('div.table-box-contents table.table-custom').first();
              uiNavButton = $('button[type=button][ng-click="vm.nextPackage();"]').first();
              break;

            default:
              targetContainer = $('div.table-box-contents table.table-custom:eq(' + tableIndex + ')');
              break;
          }

          // if (targetContainer.length === 0) {
          //   targetContainer = fallbackContainer;
          // }

          $(uiNavButton).click();

          $(currentContainer).fadeOut(200).hide().promise().done(function ()
          {
            var rows = $(targetContainer).find('tr').length;
            if (rows > 2)
            {
              $(targetContainer).find('tr.empty-table').hide();
            }
            $(targetContainer).fadeIn(200).show().promise().done(function () { UpdateItemCounts(); });
          });

          /* Update the text to show 'Container X of Y'.  .index() + 1 as the index is 0 based. */
          $('span.current-container-index').text($(targetContainer).index() + 1);

          /* Now get the box associated with the table and change the select option. */
          var selIndex = $(targetContainer).data().SelectedIndex;

          $('#selectClonedBoxTypes').prop('selectedIndex', selIndex);

        }
        catch (error)
        {
          Logger.Log({ Source: GetCallingFunctionName(), Error: error });
        }
      }

// Source: F Schumacher (FSCHUMAC)_Product Area (8942X4) CBR_1801.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
  this.PageLoaded = function(location)
  {
    if (window.location.hash == '#!/shipping')
    {
      window.localStorage.removeItem('cbrValues');
    }
  };

// PreLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns void
  this.PreLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams)
  {
    Tools.ShowLoader();
  };

// PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns void
  this.PostLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest)
  {
    ConsolidatedOrders.InitElements();
    Tools.HideLoader();

    GetWeightFromScale();
  };

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns Promise<void>
  this.NewShipment = async function(shipmentRequest)
  {
    Tools.SetCurrentViewModel(this.vm, Tools.FocusOnLoadInput());
    if (Tools.GetCurrentShipper() != '7F4175') { $('#divDoNotRateShop').hide(); }

    //below is for testing the new user method requests
    await Tools.MakeUserMethodRequest('GetJsonObject').then((data) => console.log(data));
  };

// PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns void
  this.PreShip = function(shipmentRequest, userParams)
  {
    shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference7 = $('input[type=text][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference7"]').val();
  };

// GetWeightFromScale(callback) // returns void
  function GetWeightFromScale(callback)
  {
    $('[ng-click="vm.getWeight()"]').trigger('click').promise().done(function()
    {
      /* Set the default box type to 'BAG 1'.  The multiple props and attr are for older browsers. */
      if ($.isFunction(callback)) callback;
    });
  }

// InitElements() // returns void
      InitElements: function()
      {
        /* Create the Consolidate Orders button dynamically. */
        /* This is done on the post load for my customer as they want to have a primary order loaded first. */
        /* With each consolidated order being added, I am comparing the consignee to the primary order to confirm this order is going to the correct consignee. */
        $('div.top-tool-bar > div.pull-left').append($('<button />')
          .addClass('btn btn-xs btn-primary')
          .attr('id', 'buttonConsolidateOrders')
          .text('Consolidate Orders').fadeIn());

        /* Set up all delegates from within this block. */
        $('body').delegate('#buttonConsolidateOrders', 'click', function(e)
        {
          ConsolidatedOrders.ShowConsolidatedOrderDialog();
        });

        $('body').delegate('#buttonAddOrderNumbers', 'click', function(e)
        {
          ConsolidatedOrders.AddOrderNumbersToList();
        });

        /* Customer uses a scanner that appends the <enter> key after the scan.  This delegate fires when that happens. */
        $('body').delegate('#textOrderNumber', 'keyup', function(e)
        {
          var keycode = e.keyCode ? e.keyCode : e.which;
          if ((keycode == 13) | (keycode == 9))
          {
            ConsolidatedOrders.AddOrderNumbersToList();
          }
        });

        $('body').delegate('#buttonSaveConsolidatedOrders', 'click', function(e)
        {
          ConsolidatedOrders.SaveConsolidatedOrderNumbers();
        });

        $('body').delegate('#buttonCloseConsolidatedOrdersWithoutSaving', 'click', function(e)
        {
          ConsolidatedOrders.CloseDialogWithoutSaving();
        });

      },

// ShowConsolidatedOrderDialog() // returns void
      ShowConsolidatedOrderDialog: function()
      {
        Tools.ShowOverlay();

        /* Get rid of any existing options. */
        $('#selectConsolidatedOrders').empty();

        /* Add whatever orders are already in the Shipper Reference to the select box. */
        var shipperReferenceVal = $('input[type=text][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ShipperReference"]').val();
        var arrayOrders = Tools.GetUniqueArrayFromString(shipperReferenceVal);

        $(arrayOrders).each(function(a, b)
        {
          $('#selectConsolidatedOrders')
            .append($('<option />')
              .val(b)
              .text(b)
              .removeClass('not-processed')
              .addClass('processed')
              .css('color', '#265ca1'));
        });

        $('#divModalConsolidateShipments').fadeIn('fast').promise().done(function()
        {
          /* Clear the input box, then focus on it. */
          $('#textOrderNumber').val([]).focus();
        });

      },

// AddOrderNumbersToList() // returns boolean|void
      AddOrderNumbersToList: function()
      {
        var inVal = $('#textOrderNumber').val();
        var bExists;

        /* Do not add duplicate entries to the select box. */
        $('#selectConsolidatedOrders').find('option').each(function()
        {
          if (this.text == inVal)
          {
            bExists = true;
            /* Break out of the .each loop. */
            return false;
          }
        });

        if (bExists == true)
        {
          $('#textOrderNumber').val([]).focus();
          return false;
        }

        /* The order number is unique, add it to the select box. */
        if (inVal.length > 0)
        {
          $('#selectConsolidatedOrders')
            .append($('<option />')
              .val(inVal)
              .text(inVal)
              .addClass('not-processed')
              .trigger('change'))
            .promise().done(function()
            {
              $('#textOrderNumber').val([]).focus();
            });
        }
      },

// SaveConsolidatedOrderNumbers() // returns void
      SaveConsolidatedOrderNumbers: function()
      {
        try
        {
          var ordersToQuery = '';
          $('#selectConsolidatedOrders > option.not-processed').each(function()
          {
            ordersToQuery += $(this).text() + ',';
          });

          /* Done creating the list of orders to get from the server which is now held in the ordersToQuery variable. */
          /* Hide the div. */
          $('#divModalConsolidateShipments').hide();

          /* Make sure there are orders in the list. */
          if (ordersToQuery.length > 0)
          {
            Tools.ShowLoader();
            ConsolidatedOrders.GetOrderInformationFromCustomer(ordersToQuery);
          }
          else
          {
            Tools.ShowErrorAlert('ERROR: No unique orders to pull from the server.  All consolidated orders have already been added to this shipment.');
          }
        }
        catch (error)
        {
          console.log(error.message)
        }
      },

// GetOrderInformationFromCustomer(OrderList) // returns void
      GetOrderInformationFromCustomer: function(OrderList)
      {
        let json = Tools.MakeUserMethodRequest('GetOrderInformation', OrderList);

        $.when(json).done(function(jsonData)
        {
          /* Check for a valid element OR an array of entries. */
          if ($.isEmptyObject(jsonData))
          {
            Tools.ShowErrorAlert('ERROR 182:  No order data returned by server.');
            return false;
          }

          $(jsonData).each(function(a, b)
          {
            /* For testing, this is set to '!== true' so it will return order data.  This needs to be set to '=== true' for any other case. */
            if (ConsolidatedOrders.CheckForMatchingConsignee(b) === true)
            {
              var currentPackage = Tools.GetCurrentPackage();

              if (!currentPackage)
              {
                Tools.ShowErrorAlert('ERROR:  Could not add commodities to package for order ' + b.Header.Order_Number + '.  See error console for details.');
                return false;
              }

              ConsolidatedOrders.AddCommoditiesToPackage(b.Details, currentPackage);
              ConsolidatedOrders.UpdateReferencesWithOrderNumbers(b.Header.Order_Number);
            }
            else
            {
              Tools.ShowErrorAlert('ERROR 500:  Could not add commodities for order ' + b.Header.Order_Number + '.  Address mismatch.');
            }

          }).promise().done(Tools.HideLoader());
        });
      },

// AddCommoditiesToPackage(CommodityContents, CurrentPackage) // returns void
      AddCommoditiesToPackage: function(CommodityContents, CurrentPackage)
      {
        /* The commodityContent object has a number of items that can't be pushed to the shipmentRequest array. */
        /* Create a new object just with the items needed in the shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].CommodityContents array. */
        try
        {
          if (!CurrentPackage.CommodityContents)
          {
            CurrentPackage.CommodityContents = [];
          }

          /* GetTranslatedUnitOfMeasurement() can be handled on the server side, it's only here because I pulled this code out of the PackVerify class. */
          /* EntryId is not needed. */
          $(CommodityContents).each(function(x, item)
          {
            /* Map the CommodityContent object here that will be used on the server.  */
            var CommodityObject =
            {
              UnitWeight: { Amount: '1' },
              Quantity: item.COMMODITY_CONTENTS_QUANTITY,
              ProductCode: item.COMMODITY_CONTENTS_PRODUCT_CODE,
              UnitValue: { Amount: item.COMMODITY_CONTENTS_UNIT_VALUE, Currency: 'USD' },
              QuantityUnitMeasure: GetTranslatedUnitOfMeasurement(item.COMMODITY_CONTENTS_QUANTITY_UNIT_MEASURE),
              Description: item.COMMODITY_CONTENTS_DESCRIPTION,
              OriginCountry: item.COMMODITY_CONTENTS_ORIGIN_COUNTRY.length > 0 ? item.COMMODITY_CONTENTS_ORIGIN_COUNTRY : 'US',
              ConsigneePostalCode: item.CONSIGNEE_POSTALCODE ? item.CONSIGNEE_POSTALCODE.substring(0, 5) : null,
              EntryId: GetRandomNumber(8),
              OrderNumber: item.Order_Number,
              HarmonizedCode: item.COMMODITY_CONTENTS_TARRIFFCODE1,
              HarmonizedCode2: item.COMMODITY_CONTENTS_TARRIFCODE2,
              AverageWeight: item.COMMODITY_CONTENTS_AVERAGEWEIGHT,
              UserData1: item.COMMODITY_CONTENTS_COMMENTS
            };

            CurrentPackage.CommodityContents.push(CommodityObject);
          });

          /* The UpdateCommodities function updates the view in the UI by clicking the pagination buttons. */
          UpdateCommodities(CurrentPackage.CommodityContents);
        }
        catch (error)
        {
          console.log(error.message);
        }
      },

// CheckForMatchingConsignee(CustomerOrderObject) // returns boolean|undefined
      CheckForMatchingConsignee: function(CustomerOrderObject)
      {
        try
        {
          var con = $('name-address[nameaddress="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee"]');
          var a = {
            conCompany: $(con).find('input[name="company"]').val().trim().toUpperCase(),
            conAddress1: $(con).find('input[name="address1"]').val().trim().toUpperCase(),
            conCity: $(con).find('input[name="city"]').val().trim().toUpperCase(),
            conState: $(con).find('input[name="stateProvince"]').val().trim().toUpperCase(),
            conPostalCode: $(con).find('input[name="postalCode"]').val().trim().substring(0, 5).toUpperCase()
          };

          var hdr = CustomerOrderObject.Header;
          console.log(hdr);
          var b = {
            conCompany: hdr.CONSIGNEE_COMPANY.trim().toUpperCase(),
            conAddress1: hdr.CONSIGNEE_ADDRESS_LINE_1.trim().toUpperCase(),
            conCity: hdr.CONSIGNEE_CITY.trim().toUpperCase(),
            conState: hdr.CONSIGNEE_STATEPROVINCE.trim().toUpperCase(),
            conPostalCode: hdr.CONSIGNEE_POSTALCODE.trim().substring(0, 5).toUpperCase()
          };

          /* Remove all the spaces in the strings so we get a good comparison, not one that's thrown off by an extra space. */
          let aa = JSON.stringify(a).replaceAll(' ', '');
          let bb = JSON.stringify(b).replaceAll(' ', '');

          /* Quick comparison to see if the strings match. */
          if (aa != bb)
          {
            console.log(`CheckForMatchingConsignee(), Message: Could not add order ${CustomerOrderObject.orderNumber} (${CustomerOrderObject.orderId}). Primary order data to follow.`);
            console.log('Primary order: ', a);
            console.log('Secondary order: ', b);
          }

          return aa == bb;
        }
        catch (error)
        {
          console.log(error.message);
        }
      },

// UpdateReferencesWithOrderNumbers(OrderNumber) // returns void
      UpdateReferencesWithOrderNumbers: function(OrderNumber)
      {
        var inputShipperReference = $('input[type=text][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ShipperReference"]');
        var inputMiscReference07 = $('input[type=text][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference7"]');
        var shipperReferenceVal = $(inputShipperReference).val() + ',' + OrderNumber;
        var newUniqueString = Tools.GetUniqueCSVStringFromString(shipperReferenceVal);

        /* Set these input values.  ShipperReference is used by the customer, MiscReference7 is used by the SBR to update each record post-ship. */
        /* ShipperReference ONLY keeps the first order number when it goes to PostShip, before the comma, MiscReference7 keeps the entire string. */
        /* On the server-side, if MiscReference7 contains a comma, each item in the csv list gets posted back.  If MiscReference7 is empty, the ShipperReference is used instead for a single post-back. */
        $(inputShipperReference).val(newUniqueString).trigger('change');
        $(inputMiscReference07).val(newUniqueString).trigger('change');
      },

// CloseDialogWithoutSaving() // returns void
      CloseDialogWithoutSaving: function()
      {
        $('#selectConsolidatedOrders').empty();
        $('#divModalConsolidateShipments').hide();
        /* HideLoader will hide the loader as well as the overlay. */
        Tools.HideLoader();
      }

// PollDomForElement(element, timeoutInSeconds) // returns Promise<number>
      PollDomForElement: async function(element, timeoutInSeconds = 10)
      {
        var t = parseInt(timeoutInSeconds * 5);
        var i = 0;

        return new Promise((resolve, reject) =>
        {
          var checkExist = setInterval(function()
          {
            i++;

            if ($(element).length > 0)
            {
              /* Stop the timer. */
              clearInterval(checkExist);
              resolve(1);
            }

            /* The loop has timed out. */
            if (i == t)
            {
              clearInterval(checkExist);
              reject(new Error('Operation timed out waiting for ' + element + ' to attach to the DOM.'));
            }

          }, 200);

        });
      },

// GetUserObject() // returns User
      GetUserObject: function()
      {
        if (!user) user = new User(this.currentViewModel.UserInformation);
        return user;
      },

// SetCurrentShipmentRequest(shipmentRequest) // returns void
      SetCurrentShipmentRequest: function(shipmentRequest)
      {
        currentShipmentRequest = shipmentRequest;
      },

// GetCurrentShipmentRequest() // returns object
      GetCurrentShipmentRequest: function()
      {
        return currentShipmentRequest;
      },

// SetCurrentViewModel(viewModel, callback) // returns void
      SetCurrentViewModel: function(viewModel, callback)
      {
        user = new User(viewModel.UserInformation, true);
        currentViewModel = viewModel;
        if ($.isFunction(callback)) { callback(); }
      },

// GetCurrentViewModel() // returns object
      GetCurrentViewModel: function()
      {
        return currentViewModel;
      },

// GetCurrentShipmentRequest() // returns object
      GetCurrentShipmentRequest: function()
      {
        return currentViewModel.currentShipment;
      },

// GetCurrentShipper() // returns string
      GetCurrentShipper: function()
      {
        return this.GetCurrentViewModel().profile.Shippers[0].Symbol;
      },

// GetCurrentPackage() // returns object|null
      GetCurrentPackage: function()
      {
        /* Make sure the ID attribute is added within the shipping template. */
        /*
        <span class="small">{{vm.translations.Common.Package}}</span>:
        <span class="small" id="spanCurrentPackageIndex">{{vm.packageIndex + 1}}</span>  <!-- EDIT THIS ELEMENT -->
        <span class="small">{{vm.translations.Common.Of}}</span>
        <span class="small">{{vm.totalPackages}}</span>
        */
        /* If this function throws an error, check the console for an error:
        This usually means the element that holds the current package index was not found.
        Check the ID of the element or the selector as it probably changed with a template update.
        */
        var packageIndex;
        try
        {
          if ($('#spanCurrentPackageIndex').length > 0)
          {
            packageIndex = parseInt($('#spanCurrentPackageIndex').text() - 1);
          }
          else
          {
            packageIndex = parseInt($('div.top-tool-bar > div.pull-right > span.small:eq(1)').text() - 1);
          }

          return this.GetCurrentShipmentRequest().Packages[packageIndex];
        }
        catch (error)
        {
          console.log(error.message);
          return null;
        }
      },

// GetPackageZero() // returns object
      GetPackageZero: function()
      {
        return this.GetCurrentShipmentRequest().Packages[0];
      },

// ShowLoader() // returns void
      ShowLoader: function()
      {
        $('div.loading').removeClass('ng-hide').addClass('ng-show');
      },

// HideLoader() // returns void
      HideLoader: function()
      {
        $('div.loading').removeClass('ng-show').addClass('ng-hide');
        this.HideOverlay();
      },

// ShowOverlay() // returns void
      ShowOverlay: function()
      {
        if ($('div.overlay').length === 0)
        {
          //console.log('div.overlay not found, creating');
          $('div.body-content').first().append($('<div />').addClass('overlay').css(
            {
              content: '',
              position: 'fixed',
              top: 0,
              left: 0,
              width: '100vw',
              height: '100vh',
              'background-color': 'rgba(0, 0, 0, .25)',
              'z-index': 1049
            })).show();
          /*
          .overlay {
            content: '';
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, .25);
            z-index: 1049;
          }
        */
        }
        else
        {
          $('div.overlay').show();
        }
      },

// HideOverlay() // returns void
      HideOverlay: function()
      {
        $('div.overlay').hide();
      },

// ShowErrorAlert(ErrorMessage) // returns void
      ShowErrorAlert: function(ErrorMessage)
      {
        var divAlert = $('<div />').attr('id', this.GetRandomAlphaNumericString());

        $(divAlert).addClass('alert alert-dismissible alert-bottom alert-danger ng-scope')
          .css(
            {
              'z-index': 1550,
              cursor: 'pointer'
            })
          .attr('role', 'alert')
          .append($('<button />').attr('type', 'button').addClass('close')
            .append($('<span />')
              .attr('aria-hidden', 'false').text('x'))
            .append($('<span />').addClass('sr-only').text('Close')))
          .append($('<div />')
            .append($('<div />').addClass('ng-scope alert-message').text(ErrorMessage)
              .prepend($('<span />').css('padding-right', '10px').addClass('glyphicon glyphicon-alert custom-error-icon'))));

        $('body').append($(divAlert).show());
        /*
          <button type="button" class="close" onclick="$(this).closest('div').hide();">
            <span aria-hidden="false">×</span>
            <span class="sr-only">Close</span>
          </button>
          <div>
            <div class="ng-scope alert-message"></div>
          </div>
        */
      },

// GetRandomAlphaNumericString() // returns string
      GetRandomAlphaNumericString: function()
      {
        /* When using this function to create unique element id's.  Keep in mind that id's can't start with a number, I prefix 'se' here for that reason. */
        return 'se' + (+new Date()).toString(16).slice(-12);
      },

// WaitForElement(element, waitThenFocus, defaultValue, timeoutInSeconds, callback) // returns Promise<void>
      WaitForElement: async function(element, waitThenFocus, defaultValue, timeoutInSeconds, callback)
      {
        let a = await Tools.PollDomForElement(element, timeoutInSeconds).then(function(promiseResult)
        {
          if (defaultValue) { $(element).val(defaultValue); }

          if ($.isFunction(callback)) { callback(); }

          if (waitThenFocus == true) { $(element).focus(); }

        }).catch(error =>
        {
          console.log('WaitForElement()', error);

        }).finally(() =>
        {
          /* If anything is needed to run whether the promise is resolved or rejected, put it here. */
        });
      },

// FocusOnLoadInput() // returns void
      FocusOnLoadInput: function()
      {
        Tools.WaitForElement('[ng-model="vm.loadValue"]', true, null, null);
      },

// GetUniqueArrayFromString(inString, stringDelimiter) // returns array
      GetUniqueArrayFromString: function(inString, stringDelimiter = ',')
      {
        var trimArray = $.grep(inString.split(stringDelimiter), function(a)
        {
          return a.trim().length > 0;
        });

        /* Get rid of any duplicate array entries. */
        trimArray = trimArray.filter((e, i, a) => a.indexOf(e) === i);
        return trimArray;
      },

// GetUniqueCSVStringFromArray(inArray) // returns string
      GetUniqueCSVStringFromArray: function(inArray)
      {
        /* Get rid of any duplicate array entries. */
        var uniqueArray = inArray.filter((e, i, a) => a.indexOf(e) === i);
        var newUniqueString = '';

        $(uniqueArray).each(function(a, b)
        {
          if (b.trim().length > 0)
          {
            newUniqueString += b.trim() + ',';
          }
        });

        return newUniqueString;
      },

// GetUniqueCSVStringFromString(inString) // returns string
      GetUniqueCSVStringFromString: function(inString)
      {
        var uniqueArray = this.GetUniqueArrayFromString(inString, undefined);
        return this.GetUniqueCSVStringFromArray(uniqueArray);
      },

// Sleep(ms) // returns Promise<void>
      Sleep: function(ms)
      {
        return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
      },

// ParseEncodedData(data) // returns Promise<any>
      ParseEncodedData: async function(data)
      {
        let deferred = $.Deferred();

        //nothing came back from the server.
        if (!data) deferred.resolve('No data passed to parser');

        let parseResult = $.parseHTML(data.Data || data)[0].textContent;

        //best guess that the return was json.  parse as json and return
        let f = parseResult.slice(0, 1), l = parseResult.slice(-1);
        let bJsonFirst = ((f.indexOf('{') !== -1) || (f.indexOf('[') !== -1));
        let bJsonLast = ((l.indexOf('}') !== -1) || (l.indexOf(']') !== -1));

        if (bJsonFirst && bJsonLast) { deferred.resolve($.parseJSON(parseResult)) }

        //if the result of the parse was a number, return an integer (may need to change this to a float (++ instead of +)
        //note:  don't parse as float unless you know it's a float.
        //do this in the dev tools console:
        //let pf = '7'; console.log('pf as int', +(pf)); console.log('pf as float', ++(pf));
        //else, return the string
        deferred.resolve($.isNumeric(parseResult) ? +(parseResult) : (parseResult));

        return deferred.promise();
      },

// MakeUserMethodRequest(MethodName, MethodData, callback) // returns Promise<any>
      MakeUserMethodRequest: async function(MethodName, MethodData, callback)
      {
        let defjam = $.Deferred();

        let m = {};
        m.ServerMethod = MethodName;
        m.MethodData = MethodData || null;

        let u = this.GetUserObject();

        var ajaxObject = {
          UserContext: u.UserContext || await u.GetUserContext(),
          Data: JSON.stringify(m)
        };

        $.ajax(
          {
            url: u.UserMethodUrl,
            method: 'POST',
            dataType: 'json',
            data: ajaxObject,
            headers: u.GetRequestHeaders()
          }).done(function(data)
          {
            let t = Tools.ParseEncodedData(data).then(function(result)
            {
              defjam.resolve(result);
            });

          }).fail(function(xhr)
          {
            defjam.reject('Error in ajax call');
            console.log(xhr);
            console.log('Method name: ', MethodName);
            console.log('Method data: ', MethodData);
          });

        return defjam.promise();
      }

// constructor(ViewModelUserInformation, callback) // returns User
    constructor(ViewModelUserInformation, callback)
    {
      this.UserInformation = ViewModelUserInformation;
      this.Start(callback);
    }

// Start(callback) // returns Promise<void>
    async Start(callback)
    {
      let that = this;
      if (this.UserInformation)
      {
        let u = {};
        u.CompanyId = this.UserInformation.CompanyId || null;
        u.UserId = this.UserInformation.UserId || null;
        u.SiteId = this.UserInformation.SitdId || null;
        this.UserContext = u;
      }

      //use localStorage for UserMethodUrl and UserContextUrl
      if (window.localStorage.getItem('cbrValues'))
      {
        let cbr = $.parseJSON(window.localStorage.getItem('cbrValues'));
        this.UserContextUrl = decodeURIComponent(cbr.UserContextUrl) || null;
        this.UserMethodUrl = decodeURIComponent(cbr.UserMethodUrl) || null;
      }

      //check for the two items that we need.  if they exist, no need to go further.
      if (this.UserContext.CompanyId && this.UserMethodUrl) return (true);

      //nothing found in localStorage, add stuff.
      that.GetJsonConfig().then(function(data)
      {
        let _rootUrl = new URL(data.ShipExecServiceUrl).origin;

        that.UserContextUrl = _rootUrl + '/api/usercontext/GET';
        that.UserMethodUrl = _rootUrl + '/api/ShippingService/UserMethod';

        //write the values to local storage
        let cbr = {};
        cbr.UserContextUrl = encodeURIComponent(that.UserContextUrl);
        cbr.UserMethodUrl = encodeURIComponent(that.UserMethodUrl);
        window.localStorage.setItem('cbrValues', JSON.stringify(cbr));

        //this is actually a set/get for the class var
        that.GetUserContext().then(function() { if ($.isFunction(callback)) callback(that); });
      });
    }

// GetUserContext() // returns Promise<any>
    async GetUserContext()
    {
      let that = this;
      return $.ajax({
        method: 'GET',
        url: that.UserContextUrl,
        dataType: 'json',
        headers: that.GetRequestHeaders(),
        done: function(data)
        {
          that.UserContext = data;
          return data;
        }
      });
    }

// GetJsonConfig() // returns Promise<any>
    async GetJsonConfig()
    {
      return $.ajax({
        method: 'GET',
        url: 'config.json',
        dataType: 'json',
        done: function(data)
        {
          return data;
        }
      });
    }

// GetRequestHeaders() // returns object
    GetRequestHeaders()
    {
      //get the bearer token from local storage
      let _authToken = null;
      let _token = window.localStorage.getItem('TCToken') || null;
      if (_token) { _authToken = $.parseJSON(_token).access_token; }

      return { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + _authToken };
    }

// ShowConsolidatedOrderDialog() // returns void
      ShowConsolidatedOrderDialog: function ()
      {
        Tools.ShowOverlay();

        /* Get rid of any existing options. */
        $('#selectConsolidatedOrders').empty();

        /* Add whatever orders are already in the Shipper Reference to the select box. */
        var shipperReferenceVal = $('input[type=text][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ShipperReference"]').val();
        var arrayOrders = Tools.GetUniqueArrayFromString(shipperReferenceVal);

        $(arrayOrders).each(function (a, b)
        {
          $('#selectConsolidatedOrders').append($('<option />')
            .val(b)
            .text(b)
            .removeClass('not-processed')
            .addClass('processed')
            .css('color', '#265ca1'));
        });

        $('#divModalConsolidateShipments').fadeIn('fast').promise().done(function () 
        {
          /* Clear the input box, then focus on it. */
          $('#textOrderNumber').val([]).focus();
        });
      }

// AddOrderNumbersToList() // returns boolean|void
      AddOrderNumbersToList: function ()
      {
        var inVal = $('#textOrderNumber').val();
        var bExists;

        /* Do not add duplicate entries to the select box. */
        $('#selectConsolidatedOrders').find('option').each(function ()
        {
          if (this.text == inVal) 
          {
            bExists = true;
            /* Break out of the .each loop. */
            return false;
          }
        });

        if (bExists == true)
        {
          $('#textOrderNumber').val([]).focus();
          return false;
        }

        /* The order number is unique, add it to the select box. */
        if (inVal.length > 0)
        {
          $('#selectConsolidatedOrders').append($('<option />')
            .val(inVal)
            .text(inVal)
            .addClass('not-processed')
            .trigger('change'))
            .promise().done(function ()
            {
              $('#textOrderNumber').val([]).focus();
            });
        }
      }

// CloseDialogWithoutSaving() // returns void
      CloseDialogWithoutSaving: function ()
      {
        $('#selectConsolidatedOrders').empty();
        $('#divModalConsolidateShipments').hide();

        /* HideLoader will hide the loader as well as the overlay. */
        Tools.HideLoader();
      }

// SetCurrentUserContext(viewModel, bIncludeUser) // returns false|void
      SetCurrentUserContext: function (viewModel, bIncludeUser)
      {
        /* If we only need the CompanyId, we can get that from the vmProfile. */
        /* If we need the UserId, we'll need to use a $.get call. */
        var localContext = {};

        try
        {
          /* The .UserInformation is not always populated in time and will throw an error so wrap it in a try/catch. */
          /* If this info is available, assign it to the local object and return out of the function. */
          if (viewModel.UserInformation.CompanyId)
          {
            localContext.CompanyId = viewModel.UserInformation.CompanyId;
            localContext.UserId = viewModel.UserInformation.UserId;
            currentUserContext = localContext;
            return false;
          }

          if (!currentUserContext.UserId && bIncludeUser === true)
          {
            $.ajax(
              {
                url: 'api/usercontext/GET',
                method: 'GET',
                async: false
              })
              .done(function (data)
              {
                localContext = data;
              })
              .fail(function (jqXHR, textStatus)
              {
                Logger.Log({ Source: 'SetCurrentUserContext()', Error: { name: 'AjaxError', message: jqXHR.ResponseText } });
              });
          }
          else if (!currentUserContext.CompanyId)
          {
            /* Just need the CompanyId, get it from the profile, but don't null out the UserId if it is present. */
            localContext.CompanyId = viewModel.profile.CompanyId;
            localContext.UserId = currentUserContext.UserId;
          }
        }
        catch (error)
        {
          Logger.Log({ Source: 'SetCurrentUserContext()', Error: error });
        }

        currentUserContext = localContext;

      }, /* end GetUserContext: function (vmProfile, bIncludeUser) */

// GetCurrentUserContext() // returns object
      GetCurrentUserContext: function ()
      {
        return currentUserContext;
      },

        currentShipmentRequest = shipmentRequest;
      },

      GetCurrentShipmentRequest: function ()
      {
        return currentShipmentRequest;
      },

        currentViewModel = viewModel;

        if ($.isFunction(callback)) { callback(); }
      },

// GetCurrentPackage() // returns object|null
      GetCurrentPackage: function ()
      {
        /* Make sure the ID attribute is added within the shipping template. */
        /*
        <span class="small">{{vm.translations.Common.Package}}</span>:&nbsp;
        <span class="small" id="spanCurrentPackageIndex">{{vm.packageIndex + 1}}</span>&nbsp; <!-- EDIT THIS ELEMENT -->
        <span class="small">{{vm.translations.Common.Of}}</span>&nbsp;
        <span class="small">{{vm.totalPackages}}</span>
        */

        /* If this function throws an error, check the console for an error:
           This usually means the element that holds the current package index was not found.  
           Check the ID of the element or the selector as it probably changed with a template update.
        */
        var packageIndex;

        try
        {
          if ($('#spanCurrentPackageIndex').length > 0)
          {
            packageIndex = parseInt($('#spanCurrentPackageIndex').text() - 1);
          }
          else
          {
            packageIndex = parseInt($('div.top-tool-bar > div.pull-right > span.small:eq(1)').text() - 1);
          }

          return this.GetCurrentShipmentRequest().Packages[packageIndex];
        }
        catch (error)
        {
          Logger.Log({ Source: 'GetCurrentPackage()', Message: 'Could not get package with an index of ' + packageIndex + '.' });
          return null;
        }

      },

      },

      },

      },

// ShowOverlay() // returns void
      ShowOverlay: function ()
      {
        if ($('div.overlay').length === 0)
        {
          //console.log('div.overlay not found, creating');
          $('div.body-content').first().append($('<div />')
            .addClass('overlay')
            .css({
              'content': '',
              'position': 'fixed',
              'top': 0, 'left': 0,
              'width': '100vw',
              'height': '100vh',
              'background-color': 'rgba(0, 0, 0, .25)',
              'z-index': 1049
            })).show();

          /*
            .overlay {
              content: '';
              display: none;
              position: fixed;
              top: 0;
              left: 0;
              width: 100%;
              height: 100%;
              background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, .25);
              z-index: 1049;
            }
          */
        }
        else
        {
          $('div.overlay').show();
        }
      },

      {
        $('div.overlay').hide();
      },

// ShowErrorAlert(ErrorMessage) // returns void
      ShowErrorAlert: function (ErrorMessage)
      {
        var divAlert = $('<div />').attr('id', this.GetRandomAlphaNumericString());

        $(divAlert).addClass('alert alert-dismissible alert-bottom alert-danger ng-scope')
          .css({ 'z-index': 1550, 'cursor': 'pointer' })
          .attr('role', 'alert')
          .append($('<button />')
            .attr('type', 'button')
            .addClass('close')
            .append($('<span />')
              .attr('aria-hidden', 'false')
              .text('x'))
            .append($('<span />')
              .addClass('sr-only')
              .text('Close')))
          .append($('<div />')
            .append($('<div />')
              // .append($('<span />').addClass('glyphicon glyphicon-alert'))
              // .css({ 'position': 'relative', 'top': '2px' })
              .addClass('ng-scope alert-message')
              .text(ErrorMessage)
              .prepend($('<span />')
                .css('padding-right', '10px')
                .addClass('glyphicon glyphicon-alert custom-error-icon'))));

        $('body').append($(divAlert).show());
        /*
          <button type="button" class="close" onclick="$(this).closest('div').hide();">
            <span aria-hidden="false">×</span>
            <span class="sr-only">Close</span>
          </button>
          <div>
            <div class="ng-scope alert-message"></div>
          </div>
        */
      },

// GetRandomAlphaNumericString() // returns string
      GetRandomAlphaNumericString: function ()
      {
        /* When using this function to create unique element id's.  Keep in mind that id's can't start with a number, I prefix 'se' here for that reason. */
        return 'se' + (+new Date).toString(16).slice(-12);
      },

// ParseReturnData(data) // returns any
      ParseReturnData: function (data)
      {
        var rVal;
        try
        {
          rVal = JSON.parse(data);
        }
        catch
        {
          try
          {
            rVal = JSON.parse($("<div />").html(data).text());
          }
          catch (error)
          {
            rVal = data;
          }
        }
        return rVal;
      },

// WaitForElement(element, waitThenFocus, defaultValue, timeoutInSeconds, callback) // returns Promise<void>
      WaitForElement: async function (element, waitThenFocus, defaultValue, timeoutInSeconds, callback)
      {
        let a = await PollDomForElement(element, timeoutInSeconds).then(function (promiseResult)
        {
          if (defaultValue) { $(element).val(defaultValue); }

          if ($.isFunction(callback)) { callback(); }

          if (waitThenFocus == true) { $(element).focus(); }

        }).catch(error =>
        {
          Logger.Log({ Source: 'WaitForElement()', Error: error });

        }).finally(() =>
        {
          /* If anything is needed to run whether the promise is resolved or rejected, put it here. */
        });
      },

// WaitForSelectOptions(selectElement, optionLength, indexOptionToSelect, stringOptionToSelect, bClearFirst, timeoutInSeconds, callback) // returns Promise<void>
      WaitForSelectOptions: async function (selectElement, optionLength = 1, indexOptionToSelect, stringOptionToSelect, bClearFirst, timeoutInSeconds, callback)
      {

        if (indexOptionToSelect && stringOptionToSelect)
        {
          throw new error('Cannot use both indexOptionToSelect and stringOptionToSelect.  Please use only one option and try again.');
        }

        if (bClearFirst) { $(selectElement).val([]); }

        var element = selectElement + ' option:gt(' + optionLength + ')';

        let a = await PollDomForElement(element, timeoutInSeconds).then(function (promiseResult)
        {
          if ($.isFunction(callback)) { callback(); }

          if (indexOptionToSelect) { $(selectElement + ' option').eq(indexOptionToSelect).prop({ 'selected': 'selected' }); }

          if (stringOptionToSelect) { $(selectElement).val(stringOptionToSelect); }

        }).catch(error =>
        {
          Logger.Log({ Source: 'WaitForSelectOptions()', Error: error });

        }).finally(() =>
        {
          /* If anything is needed to run whether the promise is resolved or rejected, put it here. */
        });
      },

// WaitForTableRows(table, tableRowsNeeded, timeoutInSeconds, callback) // returns Promise<void>
      WaitForTableRows: async function (table, tableRowsNeeded = 1, timeoutInSeconds, callback)
      {
        var element = table + ' tr:gt(' + tableRowsNeeded + ':visible)';

        let a = await PollDomForElement(element, timeoutInSeconds).then(function (promiseResult)
        {
          if ($.isFunction(callback)) { callback(); }

        }).catch(error =>
        {
          Logger.Log({ Source: 'WaitForTableRows()', Error: error });

        }).finally(() =>
        {
          /* If anything is needed to run whether the promise is resolved or rejected, put it here. */
        });
      },

// WaitForInputValues(inputSelector, minEntries, timeoutInSeconds, callback) // returns Promise<void>
      WaitForInputValues: async function (inputSelector, minEntries, timeoutInSeconds, callback)
      {
        let a = await PollInputsForValues(inputSelector, minEntries, timeoutInSeconds).then(function (promiseResult)
        {
          if ($.isFunction(callback)) { callback(); }

        }).catch(error =>
        {
          Logger.Log({ Source: 'WaitForInputValues()', Error: error });

        }).finally(() =>
        {
          /* If anything is needed to run whether the promise is resolved or rejected, put it here. */
        });
      },
