// GetUniqueArrayFromString(inString, stringDelimiter) // returns array
      GetUniqueArrayFromString: function (inString, stringDelimiter = ',')
      {
        var trimArray = $.grep(inString.split(stringDelimiter), function (a)
        {
          return a.trim().length > 0;
        });

        /* Get rid of any duplicate array entries. */
        trimArray = trimArray.filter((e, i, a) => a.indexOf(e) === i);

        return trimArray;
      },

// GetUniqueCSVStringFromArray(inArray) // returns string
      GetUniqueCSVStringFromArray: function (inArray)
      {
        /* Get rid of any duplicate array entries. */
        var uniqueArray = inArray.filter((e, i, a) => a.indexOf(e) === i);
        var newUniqueString = '';

        $(uniqueArray).each(function (a, b)
        {
          if (b.trim().length > 0)
          {
            newUniqueString += b.trim() + ',';
          }
        });

        return newUniqueString;
      },

// GetUniqueCSVStringFromString(inString) // returns string
      GetUniqueCSVStringFromString: function (inString)
      {
        var uniqueArray = this.GetUniqueArrayFromString(inString, undefined);
        return this.GetUniqueCSVStringFromArray(uniqueArray);
      },

// MakeUserMethodRequest(requestMethod, requestData, bAsync, callback) // returns any
      MakeUserMethodRequest: function (requestMethod, requestData, bAsync = true, callback)
      {
        Tools.ShowLoader();

        var retJson;

        var dataObject = {
          ServerMethod: requestMethod,
          MethodData: requestData
        };

        var ajaxObject = {
          UserContext: Tools.GetCurrentUserContext(),
          Data: JSON.stringify(dataObject)
        };

        var ajaxRequest = $.ajax(
          {
            url: 'api/ShippingService/UserMethod',
            method: 'POST',
            contentType: 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=UTF-8',
            dataType: 'json',
            async: bAsync,
            data: ajaxObject
          });

        ajaxRequest.done(function (json)
        {
          /* Returning out of here only returns out of the ajax request, not out of the function. */
          retJson = Tools.ParseReturnData(json.Data);
        });

        ajaxRequest.fail(function (jqXHR, textStatus)
        {
          Logger.Log({ Source: 'MakeUserMethodRequest()', Error: { name: 'AjaxError', message: jqXHR.ResponseText } });
          retJson = jqXHRError;
        });

        ajaxRequest.always(function (jqXHR, textStatus, jqXHRError) 
        {
          Tools.HideLoader();
          if ($.isFunction(callback)) { callback(retJson); }
        });
        
        return retJson;
      },

// InitializeCustomElements() // returns void
      InitializeCustomElements: function ()
      {
        /* Reset the rate shopping checkbox. */
        $('#chkDoNotRateShop').prop('checked', false);
      },

// Sleep(seconds) // returns Promise<void>
      Sleep: function (seconds)
      {
        var s = seconds * 1000;
        return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, s));
      }

// Log(LogObject) // returns void
      Log: function (LogObject)
      {
        try
        {
          /*
          Usage:
            Errors:
              try {
                ...
              } catch (error) {
                Logger.Log({ Source: 'FunctionName()', Error: error });
                OR
                Logger.Log({ Source: 'FunctionName()', Error: { name: 'Error name', message: 'Error message' } });
                OR 
                Logger.Log({ Source: 'FunctionName()', Error: { name: 'Error name', message: 'Error message' }, Data: 'Simple or complex data object.' });
              }

            Info (default, no 'Type' needed):
              Logger.Log({ Source: 'FunctionName()', Message: 'Test of server info logging', Data: 'Simple or complex data object.' });

            All others:
              Logger.Log({ Source: 'FunctionName()', Type: 'Trace', Message: 'Test of server info logging with a complex data object.', Data: SessionData.GetCurrentUserContext() });
              Logger.Log({ Source: 'FunctionName()', Type: 'Fatal', Message: 'Test of server info logging with a simple data string.', Data: 'Simple data string literal.' });
              Logger.Log({ Source: 'FunctionName()', Type: 'Debug', Message: 'Test of server debug logging with no data object.' });
          */

          /* If the LogObject has an 'error' object, set the LogLevel here.  This makes the LogLevel variable optional for errors. */
          if (LogObject.Error)
          {
            LogObject.LogLevel = LogLevel.Error;

            /* Can't pass the error container to the server without preparing it inside a new object first. */
            var e = {};
            e.name = LogObject.Error.name;
            e.message = LogObject.Error.message;
            LogObject.Error = e;
          }
          else if (!LogObject.LogLevel)
          {
            /* If the LogObject does NOT have an 'error' object AND there is no LogLevel set, use .Info.  This makes the LogLevel variable optional for info logging. */
            LogObject.LogLevel = LogLevel.Info;
          }

          /* All logging will go to the console, output here. */
          switch (LogObject.LogLevel)
          {
            case LogLevel.Error:

              console.error('Exception encountered in', LogObject.Source);
              console.error(LogObject.Error.name);
              console.error(LogObject.Error.message);

              /* Use .trace if needed but within the Angular sandbox the .trace object can be huge and convoluted. */
              /* Be careful if passing .trace data on to the server as it will contain various data types and directives. */
              //console.error(LogObject.Error.trace);

              /* Don't use console.error for the data object, it causes readability issues. */
              if (LogObject.Data) { console.log(LogObject.Data); }
              break;

            /* Using the same nomenclature used by SBR logging. */
            case LogLevel.Info:
            case LogLevel.Debug:
            case LogLevel.Trace:
            case LogLevel.Fatal:
            default:

              console.log('Output from', LogObject.Source);
              console.log(LogObject.Message);
              if (LogObject.Data) { console.log(LogObject.Data); }
              break;
          }

          if (Tools.GetServerDebugMode() == true)
          {
            var dataObject = {
              ServerMethod: 'AddClientEntry',
              MessageObject: LogObject
            };

            var ajaxObject = {
              UserContext: Tools.GetCurrentUserContext(),
              Data: JSON.stringify(dataObject)
            };

            /* async doesn't necessarily need to be set to false here but I think it helps with data collisions and getting the error messages to appear in chronological order on the server. */
            var ajaxRequest = $.ajax({
              url: 'api/ShippingService/UserMethod',
              method: 'POST',
              contentType: 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=UTF-8',
              dataType: 'json',
              data: ajaxObject,
              async: true
            });

            ajaxRequest.done(function (json)
            {
              /* There is no return for this call, if the POST does come back with data, it's a server message/error like 'UserContext cannot be null' or more likely '{"Data":"","ErrorCode":0}' */
              //console.log(JSON.parse(json.Data));
            });

            ajaxRequest.fail(function (jqXHR, textStatus)
            {
              console.log('Unable to log message to server.');
              console.log(jqXHR);
              console.log(textStatus);
            });

            ajaxRequest.always(function (jqXHR, textStatus, jqXHRError) 
            {

            });
          }

          /* Need to hide the loader outside the decision trees. */
          Tools.HideLoader();

        }
        catch (error)
        {
          console.log(error.message);
        }
      }

// Source: FalconNDX (FNDX)_Falcon_CBR_1794.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
this.PageLoaded = function(location) { 
        debugger;
        
        //Days List
        const days = ["Sunday","Monday","Tuesday","Wednesday","Thursday","Friday","Saturday"];
         
        // Current Date
        var dt = new Date();  
       //dt.setDate(dt.getDate()  +1);
        //alert(dt);
        
        //Finding Last Date of the Month
        var lastDate=new Date(dt.getFullYear(),dt.getMonth()+1 ,0);
        var onlyDate_lastDate= lastDate.getDate();
       
        
          
        //Months List  
        var month= dt.getMonth()+1;
        var nextmonth =dt.getMonth()+1;  //Get the current month
        
        
        //Year
        var currentYear = dt.getFullYear();
  
        
        
                
        var nextdate=dt.getDate()+1;    
        var newdate=dt.getDate()+2;
        
        
        
        /* Comparing current date(saturday/sunday) with lastdate of the month
        1. Current date and last date is saturday 
        2. Next to Current date and last date is saturday */
        
        /* Scenarios
        1. Current date - Saturday , Last date - Sunday 
            Next to current date should match with last date.
        2. Current date - Sunday , Last date - Sunday
            Current date should match with last date.
        3. Current date - Saturday , Last date - Saturday
        4. Current date - Sunday , Last date - Saturday
        
        
        
        */
        
       if(dt.getDate()== onlyDate_lastDate && days[dt.getDay()] == "Saturday")
       {
           
           if(month==12)
            {
                nextmonth=1; // Setting next month if current date is last date of the month eg: 31/07/2022 => 07 to 08
                newdate=2;
                currentYear=currentYear + 1;
            }else
            {
                 nextmonth=month +1; 
                  newdate=1;
                  currentYear=currentYear;
            }
            
            
           
           
       }
       
     
      else if(dt.getDate()== onlyDate_lastDate && days[dt.getDay()] == "Sunday")
       {
           
           if(month==12)
            {
                nextmonth=1; // Setting next month if current date is last date of the month eg: 31/07/2022 => 07 to 08
                newdate=1;
                currentYear=currentYear + 1;
            }else
            {
              
                 nextmonth=month +1; 
                  newdate=1;
                  currentYear=currentYear;
            }
            
            
           
           
       }
        else if(nextdate == onlyDate_lastDate )  
       {
            
             if(month==12)
            {
                nextmonth=1; // Setting next month if current date is last date of the month eg: 31/07/2022 => 07 to 08
                newdate=1;
                currentYear=currentYear + 1;
            }else
            {
                 nextmonth=month +1; 
                  newdate=1;
                  currentYear=currentYear;
            }
            
             
           
       }
       
     //Saturday to Monday 
       var monthIndex = nextmonth;
                if(monthIndex<10)
                monthIndex=('0'+monthIndex);
                
       var mondateIndex=newdate;
                if(mondateIndex<10)
                mondateIndex=('0'+mondateIndex);
                
       var lastdate=(currentYear+"-"+ monthIndex+"-"+mondateIndex);
        
     if(days[dt.getDay()] == "Saturday")
        {
            lastdate=(currentYear+"-"+ monthIndex+"-"+mondateIndex);
            $('input[type=text][ng-model="vm.startshipdate.value"]').val(lastdate).change();
        }
         
         
      
      //Sunday to Monday   
         var sundateIndex=dt.getDate();
       
         if(dt.getDate()==onlyDate_lastDate)
            {
              
                 sundateIndex=newdate;   
                   
            }
            else
            {
               
                sundateIndex=dt.getDate()+1;
            }

        
          if(sundateIndex<10)
            sundateIndex=('0'+sundateIndex);
                     
           if(days[dt.getDay()] == "Sunday")
            {
                 lastdate=(currentYear+"-"+ monthIndex+"-"+sundateIndex);
                 $('input[type=text][ng-model="vm.startshipdate.value"]').val(lastdate).change();
            }
           
    }

// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
    this.PageLoaded = function(location) {
        vm = this.vm;
        console.log(vm);
        GetUserContext();
        if(location === '/shipping'){
            var interval = setInterval(function () {
                var $terms = $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Terms"]');
                var loaded = $terms.length;
                if (loaded) {
                    //removeDropDown();
                    
                    $('body').delegate('#AddMultiplePackages', 'click', function () {
                        AddMultiplePackagesModel();
                    });
                    
                     $('body').delegate('#MultiCloseModal', 'click', function () {
                        MultiCloseModal();
                    });
                    
                    $('body').delegate('#AddMultiPackagesReal', 'click', function () {
                        AddMultiPackagesReal();
                    });
                    
                    clearInterval(interval);
                }
            }, 50);
            
        }
    }

// Source: FMC (FMC)_FMC Reference Rule_2486.cs
// ajaxGet(url) // returns the AJAX response result
function ajaxGet(url) {
    var result;
    $.ajax({
        type: "GET",
        url: url,
        async: false,
        success: function(response) {
            result = response;
        }
    });
    return result;
}

// userDataOnlyHistoryView(searchCriteria) // returns void
function userDataOnlyHistoryView(searchCriteria)
{
    var userContext;
    userContext = GetUserContext(userContext);
    searchCriteria.WhereClauses.push({ FieldName: 'UserId', FieldValue: userContext.UserId, Operator: 0 });
}

// this.NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined; updates UI-related view model state and shipment fields
    this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        debugger;
        vm = this.vm;
        vm.xReceiverAccountsIsHidden = true;
        vm.xTransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddressCodesIsHidden = true;


        vm.xReceiverAccounts = getReceiverAccounts();
        if (pageLoaded) {
            vm.xThirdPartyCode = tpbTransportationChargesAddressBookEntries;
        }
        var originCustomData = GetCustomData(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress);
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference2 = GetKeyValue('Custom1', originCustomData);
        //if (typeof shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress !== "undefined") shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Code = "";
    };

// this.ReceiverAccountsChange() // returns undefined; updates consignee account based on selected UI value
    this.ReceiverAccountsChange = function () {
        debugger;
        this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Account = this.xReceiverAccount.Account;
    }

// this.TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddressChange() // returns undefined; updates third-party billing address selection from UI state
    this.TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddressChange = function () {
        debugger;
        this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling = true;
        this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress = this.xTransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress;
        this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress = this.xTransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress;
    }

// this.PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined; initializes and manipulates UI elements/events after page load
    this.PageLoaded = function (location) {

        appendCSS();
        debugger;
        getUserContext();
        dismissAlertDialog();
        pageLoaded = true;
        debugger;
        if (location == "/shipping") {
            tpbTransportationChargesAddressBookEntries = getAddressBookEntries('Third Party Billing', this.vm.UserInformation);
            vm.xTransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddressBookEntries = tpbTransportationChargesAddressBookEntries;
            vm.xReceiverAccountsChange = this.ReceiverAccountsChange;
            vm.xTransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddressChange = this.TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddressChange;

            vm.changeTransportationCharges = this.ChangeTransportationCharges;


            // $('body').delegate('name-address[address-property-name="OriginAddress"] input[name="PostalCode"]', 'keydown', function() {
            //    alert('hello');
            //});

            // Domestic Tab
            $('body').delegate('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.TransportationCharges1"]', 'change', function () {
                var vm = this.vm;
                debugger;
                var $billOption = $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.TransportationCharges"]');
                //  alert($billOption.val());
                //  console.log("Value: " + $billOption.val());


                if ($billOption.val() == "thirdParty") {
                    $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').hide();
                    //$('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').hide();

                    $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] label:contains("Third Party Options")').show();
                    $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').show();
                } else if ($billOption.val() == "consignee") {
                    $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').show();
                    $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').show();

                    $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] label:contains("Third Party Options")').hide();
                    $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').hide();
                } else {
                    $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').hide();
                    $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').hide();

                    $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] label:contains("Third Party Options")').hide();
                    $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').hide();
                }
            });

            var tpbSelectedIndex = 0;
            $('body').delegate('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress1"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]', 'change', function () {
                console.log("HERE44545");
                var tpbSelect = document.querySelectorAll('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]');
                tpbSelectedIndex = tpbSelect[0].selectedIndex + 1;

                //if(tpbSelectedIndex = 0) {
                //   tpbSelectedIndex = tpbSelect[0].selectedIndex + 1;
                //} else {
                //   tpbSelectedIndex = tpbSelect[0].selectedIndex
                //}

                $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] button[title="Search Addresses"]').click();

                setTimeout(function () {

                    console.log("Index: " + tpbSelectedIndex);
                    var tpbSelect = document.querySelectorAll('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]');
                    tpbSelect[0].selectedIndex = tpbSelectedIndex

                }, 1500);


            });

            // International Tab
            $('body').delegate('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.DutiesAndTaxes1"]', 'change', function () {
                var $billOption = $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.DutiesAndTaxes"]');
                //   alert($billOption.val());
                if ($billOption.val() == "thirdParty") {
                    $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').hide();
                    $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').hide();

                    $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] label:contains("Who pays Duties and Taxes")').show();
                    $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').show();
                } else if ($billOption.val() == "consignee") {
                    $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').show();
                    $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').show();

                    $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] label:contains("Who pays Duties and Taxes")').hide();
                    $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').hide();
                } else {
                    $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').hide();
                    $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').hide();

                    $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] label:contains("Who pays Duties and Taxes")').hide();
                    $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').hide();
                }
            });


            $('body').delegate('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress1"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]', 'change', function () {
                $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] button[title="Search Addresses"]').click();
            });

            var startTime = new Date();
            var pageLoaded = setInterval(function () {
                if ((new Date().getTime() - startTime.getTime()) / 1000 >= 2) {
                    clearInterval(pageLoaded);
                    //    console.log('clearinterval');
                } else {
                    var tpbFound = false;
                    var consigneeFound = false;
                    var $thirdPartyBillingAddress = $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"]');
                    var $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress = $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"]');
                    var tpbSearchAddress = $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Search Addresses"]');
                    var $consignee = $('name-address[address-property-name="Consignee"]');
                    var consineeSearchAddress = $consignee.find('[title="Search Addresses"]');
                    if ($thirdPartyBillingAddress.length && tpbSearchAddress.length) {
                        tpbFound = true;
                    }

                    if ($consignee.length && consineeSearchAddress.length) {
                        consigneeFound = true;
                    }
                    var loaded = tpbFound && consigneeFound;


                    // console.log(`is consignee loaded: ${loaded}`)

                    if (loaded) {
                        if ($thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Search Addresses"]').length > 0) {
                            startTime.setMinutes(startTime.getMinutes() - 1);

                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Search Addresses"]').hide();
                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Validate Address"]').hide();

                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('label:contains("Save Address")').hide();
                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('select[ng-model="nameaddress.IsUpdateAddressBookEntry"]').hide();
                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('select[ng-model="nameaddress.AddressBookIdToProcess"]').hide();

                            $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').hide();
                            $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').hide();

                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('label:contains("Third Party Options")').hide();
                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').hide();

                            //International
                            $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Search Addresses"]').hide();
                            $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Validate Address"]').hide();

                            $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress.find('label:contains("Save Address")').hide();
                            $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress.find('select[ng-model="nameaddress.IsUpdateAddressBookEntry"]').hide();
                            $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress.find('select[ng-model="nameaddress.AddressBookIdToProcess"]').hide();

                            $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').hide();
                            $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').hide();

                            $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress.find('label:contains("Who pays Duties and Taxes")').hide();
                            $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress.find('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').hide();

                        }
                    }
                }
            }, 125);
        }
    };

// function appendCSS() // returns undefined; injects CSS that affects focus styling in the UI
    function appendCSS() {
        var style = document.createElement('style');
        style.innerHTML = 'input:focus, textarea:focus, select:focus{background-color: #ffffcc;}';
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    }

// function dismissAlertDialog() // returns undefined; attaches UI focus handler to hide alert messages
    function dismissAlertDialog() {
        $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function (e) {
            $('div.alert-danger:visible').hide();
        })
    }

// Source: FortessaTS (FTS)_FortessaCBR_1897.cs
// this.Shipping() // returns void
this.Shipping = function () {
        this.vm.getWeight = customGetWeight;
        //shipperReferenceKeyUp();
        miscReference7KeyUp();
        replaceSelectBoxTypeWithInputText(this.vm.profile.BoxTypes);

        $('body').delegate(client.shipping.addPackageButton, 'keyup', function (e) {

            if (e.key === 'Tab' || e.key === "Enter") {
                //client.shipping.shipperReference.focus();
                client.shipping.miscRef7.focus();
            }
        })


        function shipperReferenceKeyUp() {
            $('body').delegate(client.shipping.shipperReference, 'keydown', function (e) {
                if (e.key === 'Tab' || e.key === "Enter") {
                    client.shipping.$inputBoxType.focus();
                }
            })
        }

        function miscReference7KeyUp() {
            $('body').delegate(client.shipping.miscRef7, 'keydown', function (e) {
                if (e.key === 'Tab' || e.key === "Enter") {
                    client.shipping.$inputBoxType.focus();
                }
            })
        }


        function customGetWeight() {
            if (this.profile.ScaleConfiguration) {
                var url = client.config.ClientSupportServiceUrl + '/api/Scale/Read'
                var ret = $.post({ url: url, data: this.profile.ScaleConfiguration.ScaleDefinition, async: false }).responseJSON;
                if (ret != undefined) {
                    if (ret.ErrorCode == 0) {
                        this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].Weight = {
                            "Amount": ret.Weight.toFixed(2),
                            "Units": ret.WeightUnit.toUpperCase()
                        };
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        function replaceSelectBoxTypeWithInputText(boxTypes) {
            var interval = setInterval(function () {
                client.shipping.$selectBoxType = $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].BoxType"]');
                if (client.shipping.$selectBoxType.length > 0) {
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    client.shipping.$inputBoxType = $('<input type="text" />').attr({ class: client.shipping.$selectBoxType.attr('class') });
                    client.shipping.$selectBoxType.hide();
                    client.shipping.$inputBoxType.insertAfter(client.shipping.$selectBoxType);

                    client.shipping.$inputBoxType.keyup(boxTypes, function (e) {
                        if (e.key === 'Tab' || e.key === "Enter") {
                            for (var boxType of e.data) {
                                if (boxType.Name == this.value) {
                                    this.value = '';
                                    client.shipping.$selectBoxType.val(boxType.Id).change();
                                    client.shipping.addPackageButton.focus();
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    });

                }
            }, 10);
        }




    }

// this.PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns void
this.PostLoad = function (loadValue, shipmentRequest) {
        this.vm.getWeight();
		
        //scroll selected service into view
        scrollIntoView($('[ng-model="vm.selectedServices"]'), shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol);

		//var shipDate = { Month: 8, Day: 29, Year: 2024 }
        //this.vm.startshipdate.value = new Date(shipDate.Year, shipDate.Month, shipDate.Day);
        //shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = shipDate;
		
        //this.vm.overrideOptimization = pastDueDate(shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].MiscReference6)
        pastDueDate(shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].MiscReference6);
		
		//checkAndSetShipDate(this.vm);
		checkAndSetShipDateTest(this.vm);
		
        this.vm.arriveByDate = client.shipping.arriveByDate;
        client.shipping.$inputBoxType.focus();

        function pastDueDate(miscReference6) {
            //if (miscReference6 && miscReference6.trim().length != 0 && miscReference6 != '*1900-01-01T00:00:00*') {

            if (miscReference6 && miscReference6.trim().length != 0) {

                miscReference6 = miscReference6.replaceAll('*', '');
                client.shipping.arriveByDate = miscReference6.split("T")[0];

                var dateRequired = Date.parse(miscReference6);
                if (dateRequired <= Date.now() && miscReference6 != "1900-01-01T00:00:00") {
                    $('h1').removeClass('text-success').addClass('text-danger');
                    return true;
                }
                else {
                    $('h1').removeClass('text-danger').addClass('text-success');
                }
            };
            return false;
        }

        //scroll into view stuff
        function isIE() {
            return /*@cc_on!@*/false || !!document.documentMode;
        }

        function scrollIntoView(element, value) {
            if (!isIE()) {
                var interval = setInterval(function () {
                    if (element.val() == value) {
                        clearInterval(interval);
                        var optionTop = element.find('[value="' + value + '"]').offset().top;
                        var selectTop = element.offset().top;
                        element.scrollTop(element.scrollTop() + (optionTop - selectTop));
                    }
                }, 50);

            }

        }

		function checkAndSetShipDate(viewModel) {
            var hardCutoffTime = 6;
            var currentDateTime = new Date();//can simulate it being other dates and times by changing this value
            console.log("Current datetime returned: " + currentDateTime);
            var hours = currentDateTime.getHours();
            var dayOfWeek = currentDateTime.getDay();

            console.log("Hours: " + hours);
            console.log("Day: " + dayOfWeek);

            

            var dateInterval = setInterval(function () {
                var $shipDt = $('[ng-model="vm.startshipdate.value"]');

                if ($shipDt.length) {
                    clearInterval(dateInterval);
                    
                    if (dayOfWeek == 6) {
                        //day is saturday, add 2 days and return new date
                        var newDate = addDays(2);
						//var dateFinal = newDate.getFullYear()+'/'+(newDate.getMonth()+1)+'/'+newDate.getDate();
                        console.log("New Date: " + dateFinal);
						//var shipDate = { Month: 8, Day: 29, Year: 2024 }
						viewModel.startshipdate.value = new Date(newDate.Year, newDate.Month, newDate.Day);
						shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = shipDate;
						//$('[ng-model="vm.startshipdate.value"]').val(dateFinal).change();
                        //viewModel.startshipdate.value = newDate;
						//shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = dateFinal;
                        //return;
                    }

                    if (hours >= hardCutoffTime) {
                        //cutoff time reached, change date as follows
                        if (dayOfWeek == 5) {
                            //add 3 days making Monday the ship date
                            var newDate = addDays(3);
							var dateFinal = newDate.getFullYear()+'/'+(newDate.getMonth()+1)+'/'+newDate.getDate();
                            console.log("New Date: " + dateFinal);
							viewModel.startshipdate.value = new Date(newDate.Year, newDate.Month, newDate.Day);
							shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = dateFinal;
							//$('[ng-model="vm.startshipdate.value"]').val(dateFinal).change();
                            //viewModel.startshipdate.value = newDate;
							//shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = dateFinal;
                            //return;
                        }

                        else {
                            //add 1 day to the date making tomorrow the ship date
                            var newDate = addDays(1);
							var dateFinal = newDate.getFullYear()+'/'+(newDate.getMonth()+1)+'/'+newDate.getDate();
                            console.log("New Date: " + dateFinal);
							viewModel.startshipdate.value = new Date(newDate.Year, newDate.Month, newDate.Day);
							shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = dateFinal;
							//$('[ng-model="vm.startshipdate.value"]').val(dateFinal).change();
                            //viewModel.startshipdate.value = newDate;
							//shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = dateFinal;
                            //return;
                        }
                    }
                }
            });
            

            

        }

        function addDays(days) {
            var date = new Date();
            date.setDate(date.getDate() + days);
			
			console
            return date;
        }
		
		function checkAndSetShipDateTest(viewModel)
		{
			debugger;
			var hardCutoffTime = 16;
			var currentDateTime = new Date();
			var hours = currentDateTime.getHours();
            var dayOfWeek = currentDateTime.getDay();
			
			if (dayOfWeek == 6) {
				var finalDate = addDays(2);
				console.log("New date" + finalDate);
				var month = finalDate.getMonth() + 1;
				var day = finalDate.getDate();
				var year = finalDate.getFullYear();
				console.log("Month " + month + " Day " + day + " Year " + year);
				//var shipDate = { Month: 8, Day: 30, Year: 2024 }
				var shipDate = {Month: month, Day: day, Year: year};
				viewModel.startshipdate.value = new Date(shipDate.Year, shipDate.Month, shipDate.Day);
				shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = shipDate;
			}
			
			if (hours >= hardCutoffTime) {
				if (dayOfWeek == 5) {
					var finalDate = addDays(3);
					console.log("New date" + finalDate);
					var month = finalDate.getMonth() + 1;
					var day = finalDate.getDate();
					var year = finalDate.getFullYear();
					console.log("Month " + month + " Day " + day + " Year " + year);
					//var shipDate = { Month: 8, Day: 30, Year: 2024 }
					var shipDate = {Month: month, Day: day, Year: year};
					viewModel.startshipdate.value = new Date(shipDate.Year, shipDate.Month, shipDate.Day);
					shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = shipDate;
				}
				
				else{
					var finalDate = addDays(1);
					console.log("New date" + finalDate);
					var month = finalDate.getMonth() + 1;
					var day = finalDate.getDate();
					var year = finalDate.getFullYear();
					console.log("Month " + month + " Day " + day + " Year " + year);
					//var shipDate = { Month: 8, Day: 30, Year: 2024 }
					var shipDate = {Month: month, Day: day, Year: year};
					viewModel.startshipdate.value = new Date(shipDate.Year, shipDate.Month, shipDate.Day);
					shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = shipDate;
				}
				
			}
			
		}

    }

// this.NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {

        this.vm.overrideOptimization = false;
        this.vm.arriveByDate = '';
        $('h1').removeClass('text-danger').removeClass('text-success');
		
        client.shipping.loadValue.focus();
        client.shipping.maintabfocus('General');
        client.shipping.subtabfocus('Consignee', 'Account/Tax');

		

        //check and set the CPD checkbox here
        checkAndSetCPD(this.vm);


        //check for CPD flag here, set checked if true
        function checkAndSetCPD(viewModel) {
            //create interval here to watch for CPD checkbox
            var interval = setInterval(function () {
                var $cpdCB = $('[ng-model="vm.cpdProcessFlow"]');

                if ($cpdCB.length) {
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    var cpdFlag = sessionStorage.getItem("cpdflag");
                    //status can be True, False or Null

                    if (cpdFlag == "true") {
                        viewModel.cpdProcessFlow = true;
                    }
                    else {
                        viewModel.cpdProcessFlow = false;
                    }


                }
            }, 10)

        }

		
    }

// this.AddPackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns void
this.AddPackage = function (shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
        this.vm.getWeight();

        if (this.vm.cpdProcessFlow) {
            //$(client.shipping.shipperReference).focus().select();
            $(client.shipping.miscRef7).focus().select();
        }
        else {
            client.shipping.$inputBoxType.focus();
        }
    }

// this.PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns void
this.PreShip = function (shipmentRequest, userParams) {
        for (var i = 0; i < shipmentRequest.Packages.length; i++) {
            shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference20 = this.vm.overrideOptimization ? '1' : '0';
			
        }
		//this.vm.startshipdate.value = new Date('2024-08-30');
		//checkAndSetShipDate(this.vm);
		
		
		function checkAndSetShipDate(viewModel) {
            var hardCutoffTime = 10;
            var currentDateTime = new Date();//can simulate it being other dates and times by changing this value
            console.log("Current datetime returned: " + currentDateTime);
            var hours = currentDateTime.getHours();
            var dayOfWeek = currentDateTime.getDay();

            console.log("Hours: " + hours);
            console.log("Day: " + dayOfWeek);

            

            var dateInterval = setInterval(function () {
                var $shipDt = $('[ng-model="vm.startshipdate.value"]');

                if ($shipDt.length) {
                    clearInterval(dateInterval);
                    
                    if (dayOfWeek == 6) {
                        //day is saturday, add 2 days and return new date
                        var newDate = addDays(2);
						var dateFinal = newDate.getFullYear()+'/'+(newDate.getMonth()+1)+'/'+newDate.getDate();
                        console.log("New Date: " + dateFinal);
						$('[ng-model="vm.startshipdate.value"]').val(dateFinal).change();
                        //viewModel.startshipdate.value = newDate;
						//shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = dateFinal;
                        //return;
                    }

                    if (hours >= hardCutoffTime) {
                        //cutoff time reached, change date as follows
                        if (dayOfWeek == 5) {
                            //add 3 days making Monday the ship date
                            var newDate = addDays(3);
							var dateFinal = newDate.getFullYear()+'/'+newDate.getMonth()+1+'/'+newDate.getDate();
                            console.log("New Date: " + dateFinal);
							$('[ng-model="vm.startshipdate.value"]').val(dateFinal).change();
                            //viewModel.startshipdate.value = newDate;
							//shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = dateFinal;
                            //return;
                        }

                        else {
                            //add 1 day to the date making tomorrow the ship date
                            var newDate = addDays(1);
							var dateFinal = newDate.getFullYear()+'/'+(newDate.getMonth()+1)+'/'+newDate.getDate();
                            console.log("New Date: " + dateFinal);
							$('[ng-model="vm.startshipdate.value"]').val(dateFinal).change();
                            //viewModel.startshipdate.value = newDate;
							//shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = dateFinal;
                            //return;
                        }
                    }
                }
            });
            

            

        }

        function addDays(days) {
            var date = new Date();
            date.setDate(date.getDate() + days);
            return date;
        }
		
		
    }

// Source: GAP (GAP)_Gap Reference rule with ON Hanger Pooler_2507.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
    this.PageLoaded = function(location) { 
        vm = this.vm;
        
        $(document).ready(function() {  
            debugger;
            if (vm.profile.Shippers[0].Email !== null && vm.profile.Shippers[0].Email !== "" && vm.profile.Shippers[0].Email.toLowerCase().indexOf(".pool") >= 0)
            {
                $("#poolerDiv").show();
                pooler = true;
                vm.Gap_PoolerCheckboxClick= function()
                {
                    if (document.getElementById("pooler") !== null && document.getElementById("pooler").checked)
                    {
                        $("input[type=text][ng-model=\"vm.deliverDate.value\"]").val("2099-01-01").trigger("input").trigger("change");
                        //$("input[type=text][ng-model=\"vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ShipperReference\"]").val("Pool Carrier").trigger("input").trigger("change");
                        //$("input[type=text][ng-model=\"vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ConsigneeReference\"]").val(vm.profile.Shippers[0].Email.replace("@", "").replace(" ", "").replace(".pool", "").replace(".POOL", "")).trigger("input").trigger("change");
                        $("input[type=text][ng-model=\"vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Amount\"]").val("5").trigger("input").trigger("change");
                        $("#dateDiv").hide();
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        $("input[type=text][ng-model=\"vm.deliverDate.value\"]").val("").trigger("input").trigger("change");
                        $("input[type=text][ng-model=\"vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ShipperReference\"]").val("").trigger("input").trigger("change");
                        $("input[type=text][ng-model=\"vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ConsigneeReference\"]").val("").trigger("input").trigger("change");
                        $("input[type=text][ng-model=\"vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Amount\"]").val("").trigger("input").trigger("change");
                        $("#dateDiv").show();
                    }
                };
            }
        });
        
    };

// GetShipToAddressCustomData() // returns the CustomData for the first address book entry
        this.GetShipToAddressCustomData = function(){
        //debugger;
        var payloadShipToAddress = {
            "Skip": 0,
            "Take": 10,
            "WhereClauses": [{
                "FieldName": "Id",
                "FieldValue": consigneeId,
                "Operator": 0
            }]
        };
        
        var data = {
            CompanyId: client.userContext.CompanyId,
            addressBookIds: addrsBookId,
            SearchCriteria: payloadShipToAddress
        };
        //console.log(data);
      
        ShipToAddressBook = client.thinClientAPIRequest('GetAddressBookEntries_AddressBook', data, false).responseJSON;
    
        console.log(ShipToAddressBook.AddressBookEntries[0].CustomData);
        
        return ShipToAddressBook.AddressBookEntries[0].CustomData;
                
    };

// PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns void
    this.PreShip = function(shipmentRequest, userParams) { 
        debugger;
        const st_company = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Company.toUpperCase();
        addrsBookId = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.AddressBookId;
        consigneeId = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Id;
        
        if(st_company == "UPS MI" || st_company.includes("MAIL INNOVATIONS"))
        {
            console.log("Mail Innovatoins Shipment");
            console.log(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.AddressBook);
            console.log(addrsBookId);
            console.log(consigneeId);
                
            addressCustomData = this.GetShipToAddressCustomData();
            mi_flag = client.getValueByKey('Custom1',addressCustomData);
                  
            if(mi_flag !== "MI_TPB"){
               throw new Error("Please contact GAP ShipExec Admin for Mail Innovation Authorization [Ship-Exec-stores-dg@gap.com].");
            }
            else
            {
               shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling = true;
               shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress = {
                    Company : "UPS Mail Innovations",
                    Contact : "Shipping",
                    Address1 : "13050 Marlay Ave",
                    Address2 : "Suite 100",
                    City : "Fontana",
                    StateProvince : "CA",
                    PostalCode : "92337",
                    Country : "US",
                    Email : "upsusmi01transportation@ups.com",
                    Account : "7500YW"
                };
                      
            }
        }

        if (pooler)
        {
            if (document.getElementById("pooler").checked)
            {
                for (var p of shipmentRequest.Packages)
                {
                    p.MiscReference4 = vm.profile.Shippers[0].Email.replace("@", "").replace(" ", "").replace(".pool", "").replace(".POOL", "").toUpperCase();
                }               
            }
        }

        var misc3reference = "200.30.6035.5102.90059";
        for (var i = 0; i < shipmentRequest.Packages.length; i++) {
            shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference1 = shipmentRequest.Packages[i].ShipperReference;
            shipmentRequest.Packages[i].ShipperReference = "";
            //Address 1
            if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Address1 == "1112 Turkey Mountain Rd.")
            {
                console.log('found 1/4 address');
                shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference3 = misc3reference;
                shipmentRequest.Packages[i].ShipperReference = misc3reference;
            }
             //Address 2
            if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Address1 == "102R Demi Rd.")
            {
                                console.log('found 1/4 address');

                shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference3 = misc3reference;
                                shipmentRequest.Packages[i].ShipperReference = misc3reference;

            }
              //Address 3
            if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Address1 == "17511 S. Susana Rd.")
            {
                                console.log('found 1/4 address');

                shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference3 = misc3reference;
                                shipmentRequest.Packages[i].ShipperReference = misc3reference;

            }
               //Address 4
            if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Address1 == "200 Terminal St.")
            {
                                console.log('found 1/4 address');

                shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference3 = misc3reference;
                                shipmentRequest.Packages[i].ShipperReference = misc3reference;

            }
        }
        console.log('PRESHIP');
        console.log(shipmentRequest);

    };

// PostShip(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) // returns void
    this.PostShip = function(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) {
        
        if (pooler)
        {
            if (shipmentResponse.PackageDefaults.ErrorCode === 0)
            {
                if (document.getElementById("pooler").checked)
                    document.getElementById("pooler").click();
            }
            
        }
        
    };

// PreRate(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns void
    this.PreRate = function(shipmentRequest, userParams) {

        if (pooler)
        {
            if (document.getElementById("pooler").checked)
            {  
                //alert( shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipper);
                for (var p of shipmentRequest.Packages)
                {
                    p.MiscReference4 = vm.profile.Shippers[0].Email.replace("@", "").replace(" ", "").replace(".pool", "").replace(".POOL", "");
                    //alert(p.MiscReference4);
                } 
            }
            else
            {
                for (var p of shipmentRequest.Packages)
                {
                    p.MiscReference4 = ""
                }
            }
        }
    };

// Source: GAP (GAP)_Gap Reference Rule_110.cs
// GetUserName() // returns the matched user email from the UI text
function GetUserName() {
      var helloUser = $('a[title="Manage"]:contains("Hello")').text();
      return helloUser.match(/[a-zA-Z]+[a-zA-Z0-9._]+@[a-zA-Z]+\.[a-zA-Z.]{2,5}/i);
  }

                            return false;  // Break out of the .each() loop
                        }
                    }
                });
            }, 1500);
            
        
       
         
        function  translateDates() {
            const monthMapping = {
                "January": "Janvier",
                "February": "Février",
                "March": "Mars",
                "April": "Avril",
                "May": "Mai",
                "June": "Juin",
                "July": "Juillet",
                "August": "Août",
                "September": "Septembre",
                "October": "Octobre",
                "November": "Novembre",
                "December": "Décembre"
                };
                
                const dayMapping = {
                  'Mon': 'Lun',
                  'Tue': 'Mar',
                  'Wed': 'Mer',
                  'Thu': 'Jeu',
                  'Fri': 'Ven',
                  'Sat': 'Sam',
                  'Sun': 'Dim'
                };


                const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear();
                $("small[aria-label]").each(function() {
                  var day = $(this).text().trim();
                  var translatedDay = dayMapping[day];
                  if (translatedDay) {
                    $(this).text(translatedDay);
                  }
                });
                
                $("strong").each(function() {
                  var dateText = $(this).text().trim();
                  var month = dateText.split(' ')[0];
                  var translatedMonth = monthMapping[month];
                  if (translatedMonth) {
                      var updatedText = dateText.replace(month, translatedMonth);
                      $(this).text(updatedText);
                  }
                });

                var buttonLeft = document.querySelector('.uib-left');
                var buttonRight = document.querySelector('.uib-right');
        
                if (buttonLeft) {
                    $(buttonLeft).off('click.custom').on('click.custom', function() {
                       return getCurrentMonthYear('previous');
                        // Your logic here
                    });
                }
                
                if (buttonRight) {
                    $(buttonRight).off('click.custom').on('click.custom', function() {
                       return getCurrentMonthYear('next');
                        // Your logic here
                    });
                }


            }

            function getCurrentMonthYear(action) {
                const frenchMonths = ['Janvier', 'Février', 'Mars', 'Avril', 'Mai', 'Juin', 'Juillet', 'Août', 'Septembre', 'Octobre', 'Novembre', 'Décembre'];
                let monthYear = null;
               
                $('strong.ng-binding').each(function() {
                    let text = $(this).text();
                    
                    for (let i = 0; i < frenchMonths.length; i++) {
                        if (text.includes(frenchMonths[i])) {
                            if(action=='next') {
                                $(this).text(getNextMonthYearInFrench(text));
                            } else {
                                $(this).text(getPreviousMonthYearInFrench(text));
                            }
                            return false;  // Break out of the .each() loop
                        }
                    }
                });
                
                return monthYear;
            }


            function getNextMonthYearInFrench(dateStr) {
                var monthNamesFr = ['Janvier', 'Février', 'Mars', 'Avril', 'Mai', 'Juin', 'Juillet', 'Août', 'Septembre', 'Octobre', 'Novembre', 'Décembre'];
                var splitDate = dateStr.split(' ');
                var month = splitDate[0];
                var year = splitDate[1];
            
                var currentMonthIndex = monthNamesFr.indexOf(month);
                
                // Check if the current month is December.
                if (currentMonthIndex === 11) {
                    // Increment the year and reset the month to January.
                    year++;
                    month = monthNamesFr[0];
                } else {
                    // Get the next month.
                    month = monthNamesFr[currentMonthIndex + 1];
                }
                
                return month + ' ' + year;
            }


            function getPreviousMonthYearInFrench(dateStr) {
                var monthNamesFr = ['Janvier', 'Février', 'Mars', 'Avril', 'Mai', 'Juin', 'Juillet', 'Août', 'Septembre', 'Octobre', 'Novembre', 'Décembre'];
                var splitDate = dateStr.split(' ');
                var month = splitDate[0];
                var year = splitDate[1];
            
                var currentMonthIndex = monthNamesFr.indexOf(month);
                
                // Check if the current month is January.
                if (currentMonthIndex === 0) {
                    // Decrement the year and set the month to December.
                    year--;
                    month = monthNamesFr[11];
                } else {
                    // Get the previous month.
                    month = monthNamesFr[currentMonthIndex - 1];
                }
                
                return month + ' ' + year;
            }

                this.translateMenuToFrench();
               
                  // Bind the translation function to the click event of the arrow elements in the date picker
            },

         function deliverDatePicker() {

            translateToFrench = {
                "Months": {
                  "January": "Janvier",
                  "February": "Février",
                  "March": "Mars",
                  "April": "Avril",
                  "May": "Mai",
                  "June": "Juin",
                  "July": "Juillet",
                  "August": "Août",
                  "September": "Septembre",
                  "October": "Octobre",
                  "November": "Novembre",
                  "December": "Décembre"
                },
                "Days": {
                  "Sunday": "Dimanche",
                  "Monday": "Lundi",
                  "Tuesday": "Mardi",
                  "Wednesday": "Mercredi",
                  "Thursday": "Jeudi",
                  "Friday": "Vendredi",
                  "Saturday": "Samedi"
                }
              };

            var datePicker = $('div.uib-daypicker');
            var currentMonth = datePicker.find('th button strong');
            for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(translateToFrench['Months'])) {
                if (currentMonth.text().indexOf(key) != -1) {
                    currentMonth.text(currentMonth.text().replace(key, value));
                }
            }



            datePicker.find('th small').each(function () {
                $(this).text(translateToFrench.Days[this.innerHTML]);
            })
        }

                var translationObj = this.createTranslationObjects();

            translateElements2: function(selector, translation, replacer) {
                $(selector).each(function() {
                    var text = $(this).val();
                    if (translation[text] !== undefined) {
                        replacer.call(this, text, translation[text]);
                    }
                });
            },
            translateElements: function(selector, translation, replacer) {
                $(selector).each(function() {
                    var text = $(this).text().trim();
                    if (translation[text] !== undefined) {
                        replacer.call(this, text, translation[text]);
                    }
                });
            },

            replaceText: function(oldText, newText) {
                this.innerHTML = this.innerHTML.replace(oldText, newText);
            },
            replaceText2: function(oldText, newText) {
                this.innerText = this.innerText.replace(oldText, newText);
            },

            replaceValue: function(oldText, newText) {
                $(this).val(newText);
            },

            replaceLabel: function(oldText, newText) {
                $(this).attr('label', newText);
            },
             replaceLabel2(selector, oldText, newText) {
                $(selector).each(function() {
                    if ($(this).attr('label') === oldText) {
                        $(this).attr('label', newText);
                    }
                });
            },

            handleSpecificCases: function() {
                $('h5:contains("No commodities added")').text('Aucune marchandise ajoutée');
                $('label.control-label.no-left-padding.ng-binding').each(function() {
                    if ($(this).attr('style') === "text-align: center" && $(this).html() === "&nbsp;of&nbsp;&nbsp;1") {
                        $(this).html('&nbsp;de&nbsp;&nbsp;1');
                    }
                });
            },
        };

// this.AddPackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns undefined
    this.AddPackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
       
        $('label.control-label.no-left-padding.ng-binding').each(function() {
            // Check if the label has the correct style and text
            if ($(this).attr('style') === "text-align: center" && $(this).html() === "&nbsp;de&nbsp;&nbsp;"+ (packageIndex)) {
                // Change the label's text
                $(this).html('&nbsp;de&nbsp;&nbsp;' + (packageIndex+1));
            }
        });
    }

// this.RemovePackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns undefined
    this.RemovePackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
       
        $('label.control-label.no-left-padding.ng-binding').each(function() {
            // Check if the label has the correct style and text
            if ($(this).attr('style') === "text-align: center" && $(this).html() === "&nbsp;de&nbsp;&nbsp;"+ (packageIndex+2)) {
                // Change the label's text
                $(this).html('&nbsp;de&nbsp;&nbsp;' + (packageIndex+1));
            }
        });
    }

// this.PostShipOrder(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) // returns undefined
    this.PostShipOrder = function(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) {
        selectCanadaForAllCountrySelects();
    }

// Source: GAP INC (GAPMailrooms)_DirectToMobileCBR_1918.cs
// OnCboReturnAddressChange() // returns void
const OnCboReturnAddressChange = () => 
	{		
		//debugger;
		
		var selectedReturnAddress = $("#cboPredefinedReturnAddress select").val().replace('string:', '');
		
		returnAddressList = GetReturnAddresses();
		
		 if ($.isEmptyObject(returnAddressList) === false)
		 {					
			if (returnAddressList!=undefined)
			{
				var returnAddress = returnAddressList.find(x => x.ReturnLocationDescription === selectedReturnAddress);
				
				if (returnAddress !== undefined)
				{
					//debugger;
					
					vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress = returnAddress.LocationAddress;

					CopyReturnAddressToOriginAddress();
					
				}
			} 
		 }								
	}

// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
this.PageLoaded = function(location) {    
        vm = this.vm;
        
        ConfigureD2MShipment("this.PageLoaded");
	
        $("#tabAddresses").on( "focusout", "input", function() {
          //CopyReturnAddressToOriginAddress();
        });
        
        GetReturnAddresses();
        
        setD2MCheckboxAsChecked();
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) { 
        vm = this.vm;
		
        ConfigureD2MShipment("this.NewShipment");
		
        this.vm.PredefinedReturnAddress =  GetReturnAddresses();
		
		var returnTabInterval = setInterval(function(){
									
					var tabIsLoaded = $("#cboPredefinedReturnAddress select");
		
				if (tabIsLoaded)
				{
					clearInterval(returnTabInterval);
					if (IsEventAttached($("#cboPredefinedReturnAddress select"), "change", OnCboReturnAddressChange) === false)
					{			
						debugger;
						$("#cboPredefinedReturnAddress select").on("change", OnCboReturnAddressChange);											
					}					
				}
		},50);				

// IsEventAttached($element, elementEvent, elementEventHandler) // returns boolean
	function IsEventAttached($element, elementEvent, elementEventHandler)
	{			
		debugger;
		
		var result = false;
					
		if (($("#cboPredefinedReturnAddress select").get(0) != undefined) && ($._data($element.get(0), "events") != undefined))
		{
			var elementEvents = $._data($element.get(0), "events");
			elementEventHandler = elementEventHandler.toString();
			result = (elementEvents && elementEvents[elementEvent]?.some(ev => ev.handler.toString() === elementEventHandler))
		}
		
		return result;
	}

// GetUserCustomData(userData, key) // returns object
    function GetUserCustomData(userData, key){
		
        LogStartMethod("GetUserCustomData()");
		
        var result = {};
        
        if ($.isEmptyObject(userData) === false)
        {
            var currentUserDataKeyValue = userData.find(x => x.Key === key);			   
        	
        	if (currentUserDataKeyValue !== undefined)
        	{
        		result =  currentUserDataKeyValue;	        	
        	}    
        }
        
        return result;
    }

// SetShipmentRequestUserData(shipmentRequest) // returns shipmentRequest
    function SetShipmentRequestUserData(shipmentRequest)
    {
         shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData1 = $('#DirectToMobileShipmentID').is(":checked");
         return shipmentRequest;
    }

// CopyOriginAddressToReturnAddress() // returns void
    function CopyOriginAddressToReturnAddress()
    {			        
		LogStartMethod("CopyOriginAddressToReturnAddress()");
		
        var currentUserOriginAddress = vm?.profile?.UserInformation?.Address;
        
        if (currentUserOriginAddress !== undefined && $.isEmptyObject(currentUserOriginAddress) === false)
        {
            vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress = currentUserOriginAddress;
            LogMethodInfo("User Origin Address to Return Address : OK");
        }
        else
        {
             LogMethodInfo("Error: Origin Address not found");
        }			
    }

// CurrentUserIsD2MEnabled() // returns boolean
    function CurrentUserIsD2MEnabled()
    {
			
		LogStartMethod("CurrentUserIsD2MEnabled()");
		
		var currentUserData = vm?.profile?.UserInformation?.Address.CustomData;
		
		var isD2MEnableForCurrentUser = GetUserCustomData(currentUserData, D2M_USER_CUSTOM_DATA_KEY);
		
		var infoMessage ="";
		
		var result =  false;
		
        if ($.isEmptyObject(isD2MEnableForCurrentUser) === false)
        {
             var d2mCustomEntry = JSON.stringify(isD2MEnableForCurrentUser);
             
             if (JSON.parse(d2mCustomEntry).Value === 'true')
             {
                 infoMessage = "D2M User ENABLED";
                 result = true;
             }
             else
             {
                infoMessage = "D2M User DISABLED";
                result = false;
             }
        }
        else
        {
             infoMessage = "WARNING:" + D2M_USER_CUSTOM_DATA_KEY + " NOT DETECTED";
        }
		
		LogMethodInfo(infoMessage);
		
		return result;
    }

// CurrentShipperIsD2MEnabled() // returns boolean
    function CurrentShipperIsD2MEnabled(){
                
		LogStartMethod("CurrentShipperIsD2MEnabled()");
		
		var currentShipperSymbol = vm?.currentShipment?.PackageDefaults?.Shipper;
		
		var authorizedD2MShipperList = [{"ShipperName": "GAP INC. (1EA270)","ShipperSymbol":"NYPD"} , {"ShipperName": "GAP INC. (5X0693)","ShipperSymbol":"SAN_FRANCISCO"}, {"ShipperName": "GAP INC. (1EY347)","ShipperSymbol":"PLEASANTON"}];
		
		var infoMessage = "D2M shipping for current shipper symbol " + currentShipperSymbol + " is ";
		
		var result =  false;
		
		var isCurrentShipperEnabledForD2M = authorizedD2MShipperList.find(x => x.ShipperSymbol === currentShipperSymbol);
		
		result = (isCurrentShipperEnabledForD2M != undefined) ? true : false;
		
		infoMessage = result? infoMessage + "authorized" : "WARNING " + infoMessage + "NOT authorized";
		
		LogMethodInfo(infoMessage);
		
		return result;		 
    }

// ConfigureD2MShipment(calleeMethod) // returns void
    function ConfigureD2MShipment(calleeMethod){
        
        debugger;
        		
		LogStartMethod("ConfigureD2MShipment()",calleeMethod);
					
		var infoMessage = "D2M shipment ";
		
		if (location.hash === '#!/shipping')		
		{
			if (CurrentShipperIsD2MEnabled() && CurrentUserIsD2MEnabled()) 
			{
				infoMessage += "is ENABLED for current shipper and current user";
				
				var originAddressCompany;
				
				var originAddressLoadedInterval = setInterval(function(){
					originAddressCompany = $('[name="company"]:eq(1)').val();
					if (originAddressCompany!=undefined && originAddressCompany.length)
					{
						EnableReturn();
						clearInterval(originAddressLoadedInterval);	
					}
				},50);
			}
			else
			{
				infoMessage += "is NOT ENABLED for shipper and user";
				var isLoaded;
				var removeD2M = setInterval(function(){
					isLoaded = $('#DirectToMobileShipmentID').is(":checked");
					if (isLoaded!=undefined && (isLoaded === false || isLoaded === false))
					{											
						$('#d2m_checkbox_div_id').remove();						
						DisableReturn();
						clearInterval(removeD2M);	
					}
				},50);
				
				
			}
		}
		else
		{
			infoMessage = "WARNING " + infoMessage + "called outside of shipping action";
		}
		LogMethodInfo(infoMessage);
    }

// LogStartMethod(method, calleeMethod) // returns void
	function LogStartMethod(method,calleeMethod = "")
	{
		if (calleeMethod != "")
		{
			console.log ("...STARTING " + method + " called by " + calleeMethod);	
		}
		else
		{
			console.log ("...STARTING " + method);	
		}			
	}

// LogMethodInfo(message) // returns void
	function LogMethodInfo(message)
	{
		console.log ("      "+ message);				
	}

// CopyReturnAddressToOriginAddress() // returns void
	function CopyReturnAddressToOriginAddress(){
	
        $('[name="company"]:eq(1)').val($('[name="company"]:eq(2)').val());
        $('[name="company"]:eq(1)').trigger("change");
        
        $('[name="contact"]:eq(1)').val($('[name="contact"]:eq(2)').val());
        $('[name="contact"]:eq(1)').trigger("change");
        
        $('[name="address1"]:eq(1)').val($('[name="address1"]:eq(2)').val());
        $('[name="address1"]:eq(1)').trigger("change");
        
        $('[name="address2"]:eq(1)').val($('[name="address2"]:eq(2)').val());
        $('[name="address2"]:eq(1)').trigger("change");
        
        $('[name="address3"]:eq(1)').val($('[name="address3"]:eq(2)').val());
        $('[name="address3"]:eq(1)').trigger("change");
        
        $('[name="city"]:eq(1)').val($('[name="city"]:eq(2)').val());
        $('[name="city"]:eq(1)').trigger("change");
        
        $('[name="stateProvince"]:eq(1)').val($('[name="stateProvince"]:eq(2)').val());
        $('[name="stateProvince"]:eq(1)').trigger("change");
        
        $('[name="postalCode"]:eq(1)').val($('[name="postalCode"]:eq(2)').val());
        $('[name="postalCode"]:eq(1)').trigger("change");
        
        $('[name="Country"]:eq(1)').val($('[name="Country"]:eq(2)').val());
        $('[name="Country"]:eq(1)').trigger("change");
	}

// EnableReturn() // returns void
	function EnableReturn()
	{		
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.Account"].IsHidden = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.Address1"].IsRequired = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.Address2"].IsHidden = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.Address3"].IsHidden = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.City"].IsRequired = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.Code"].IsHidden = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.Company"].IsRequired = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.Contact"].IsRequired = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.Country"].IsRequired = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.Email"].IsHidden = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.Fax"].IsHidden = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.Group"].IsHidden = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.Phone"].IsHidden = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.PostalCode"].IsRequired = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.StateProvince"].IsRequired = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.TaxId"].IsHidden = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.AccountNumberTaxIdTab"].IsHidden = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.EmailTab"].IsHidden = true;
		vm.profile.FieldOptions["ReturnAddress.PhoneFaxTab"].IsHidden = true;
	}
