// GetReturnAddresses() // returns returnAddressList
	function GetReturnAddresses()
	{
		var userMethodParams = { "action": "GetD2MAddressBook"};
		
		var data = { Data: JSON.stringify(userMethodParams), UserContext: client.userContext };
		
		var returnAddressList = undefined;
		
		thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false).done(function (response) {
			
			if (response.ErrorCode != 0) 
			{
				alert(response.ErrorMessage);
			} 
			else 
			{
				
				var json = DecodeReturnString(response.Data);
				returnAddressList = json.ReturnAddressList;		
				returnAddressList.forEach(function (returnAddress) {
					var x = returnAddress;
					console.log(x);
				});
			}
		});
		return returnAddressList;
	}

// DecodeReturnString(data) // returns parsed object or undefined
	function DecodeReturnString(data)
	{ 
	  try
	  { 
		return JSON.parse($("<div />").html(data).text());
	  }
	  catch (error)
	  { 
		console.log(error.name);
		console.log(error.message);
		console.log(data);
	  }
	}

// setD2MCheckboxAsChecked() // returns void
	function setD2MCheckboxAsChecked()
	{
		var checkIsLoadedInterval = setInterval(function(){
								
		var checkIsLoaded =  $('#DirectToMobileShipmentID');
	
		if (checkIsLoaded)
		{
			$('#DirectToMobileShipmentID').prop( "checked", true );
			clearInterval(checkIsLoadedInterval);								
		}
	    },50);
	}

// thinClientAPIRequest(method, data, isAsync) // returns jqXHR
	function thinClientAPIRequest (method, data, isAsync) {
        var shipExecServiceUrl = client.config.ShipExecServiceUrl;
        var authorizationToken = client.getAuthorizationToken();
        return $.post({ url: shipExecServiceUrl + '/' + method, data: data, async: isAsync, headers: authorizationToken });
    };

// Source: GAP INC (GAPMailrooms)_French changes_1862.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
    this.PageLoaded = function(location) {   
        if (location == '/') document.location = '#!/shipping';
        
        $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function () { $('div[role="alert"]:visible').hide(); })
        $('body').on('click', 'input[ng-click="vm.opendeliverDate()"], button[ng-click="vm.opendeliverDate()"]', translateDates);
        $('a[href="/Manage"][title="Manage"]').remove();

        
        setInterval(function() {
            translateDates();
            $('button').each(function() {
                const frenchMonths = ['Janvier', 'Février', 'Mars', 'Avril', 'Mai', 'Juin', 'Juillet', 'Août', 'Septembre', 'Octobre', 'Novembre', 'Décembre'];
                let text = $(this).text().trim();
                let month = text.split(' ')[0];

                $('button.btn.btn-sm.btn-info.uib-datepicker-current.ng-binding').each(function() {
                    let text = $(this).text().trim();
                    if (text === 'Today') {
                        $(this).text('Aujourd\'hui');  // Translate "Today" to French
                    }
                });
                $('button.btn.btn-sm.btn-danger.uib-clear.ng-binding').each(function() {
                    let text = $(this).text().trim();
                    if (text === 'Clear') {
                        $(this).text('Effacer');  // Translate "Clear" to French
                    }
                });

                $('button.btn.btn-sm.btn-success.pull-right.uib-close.ng-binding').each(function() {
                    let text = $(this).text().trim();
                    if (text === 'Close') {
                        $(this).text('Fermer');  // Translate "Close" to French
                    }
                });
                
        
                for (let i = 0; i < frenchMonths.length; i++) {
                    if (month.includes(frenchMonths[i])) {
                        $(this).prop('disabled', true);  // Disable the button if it contains a month name
                        return false;  // Break out of the .each() loop
                    }
                }
            });
        }, 1500);
       
         
        function  translateDates() {
            const monthMapping = {
                "January": "Janvier",
                "February": "Février",
                "March": "Mars",
                "April": "Avril",
                "May": "Mai",
                "June": "Juin",
                "July": "Juillet",
                "August": "Août",
                "September": "Septembre",
                "October": "Octobre",
                "November": "Novembre",
                "December": "Décembre"
                };
                
                const dayMapping = {
                  'Mon': 'Lun',
                  'Tue': 'Mar',
                  'Wed': 'Mer',
                  'Thu': 'Jeu',
                  'Fri': 'Ven',
                  'Sat': 'Sam',
                  'Sun': 'Dim'
                };


                const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear();
                $("small[aria-label]").each(function() {
                  var day = $(this).text().trim();
                  var translatedDay = dayMapping[day];
                  if (translatedDay) {
                    $(this).text(translatedDay);
                  }
                });
                
                $("strong").each(function() {
                  var dateText = $(this).text().trim();
                  var month = dateText.split(' ')[0];
                  var translatedMonth = monthMapping[month];
                  if (translatedMonth) {
                      var updatedText = dateText.replace(month, translatedMonth);
                      $(this).text(updatedText);
                  }
                });

                var buttonLeft = document.querySelector('.uib-left');
                var buttonRight = document.querySelector('.uib-right');
        
                if (buttonLeft) {
                    $(buttonLeft).off('click.custom').on('click.custom', function() {
                       return getCurrentMonthYear('previous');
                        // Your logic here
                    });
                }
        
                if (buttonRight) {
                    $(buttonRight).off('click.custom').on('click.custom', function() {
                       return getCurrentMonthYear('next');
                        // Your logic here
                    });
                }


            }

            function getCurrentMonthYear(action) {
                const frenchMonths = ['Janvier', 'Février', 'Mars', 'Avril', 'Mai', 'Juin', 'Juillet', 'Août', 'Septembre', 'Octobre', 'Novembre', 'Décembre'];
                let monthYear = null;
               
                $('strong.ng-binding').each(function() {
                    let text = $(this).text();
                    
                    for (let i = 0; i < frenchMonths.length; i++) {
                        if (text.includes(frenchMonths[i])) {
                            if(action=='next') {
                                $(this).text(getNextMonthYearInFrench(text));
                            } else {
                                $(this).text(getPreviousMonthYearInFrench(text));
                            }
                            return false;  // Break out of the .each() loop
                        }
                    }
                });
                
                return monthYear;
            }


            function getNextMonthYearInFrench(dateStr) {
                var monthNamesFr = ['Janvier', 'Février', 'Mars', 'Avril', 'Mai', 'Juin', 'Juillet', 'Août', 'Septembre', 'Octobre', 'Novembre', 'Décembre'];
                var splitDate = dateStr.split(' ');
                var month = splitDate[0];
                var year = splitDate[1];
            
                var currentMonthIndex = monthNamesFr.indexOf(month);
                
                // Check if the current month is December.
                if (currentMonthIndex === 11) {
                    // Increment the year and reset the month to January.
                    year++;
                    month = monthNamesFr[0];
                } else {
                    // Get the next month.
                    month = monthNamesFr[currentMonthIndex + 1];
                }
                
                return month + ' ' + year;
            }


            function getPreviousMonthYearInFrench(dateStr) {
                var monthNamesFr = ['Janvier', 'Février', 'Mars', 'Avril', 'Mai', 'Juin', 'Juillet', 'Août', 'Septembre', 'Octobre', 'Novembre', 'Décembre'];
                var splitDate = dateStr.split(' ');
                var month = splitDate[0];
                var year = splitDate[1];
            
                var currentMonthIndex = monthNamesFr.indexOf(month);
                
                // Check if the current month is January.
                if (currentMonthIndex === 0) {
                    // Decrement the year and set the month to December.
                    year--;
                    month = monthNamesFr[11];
                } else {
                    // Get the previous month.
                    month = monthNamesFr[currentMonthIndex - 1];
                }
                
                return month + ' ' + year;
            }

                this.translateMenuToFrench();

            },

         function deliverDatePicker() {

            translateToFrench = {
                "Months": {
                  "January": "Janvier",

                  "Monday": "Lundi",
                  "Tuesday": "Mardi",
                  "Wednesday": "Mercredi",
                  "Thursday": "Jeudi",
                  "Friday": "Vendredi",
                  "Saturday": "Samedi"
                }
              };

            var datePicker = $('div.uib-daypicker');
            var currentMonth = datePicker.find('th button strong');
            for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(translateToFrench['Months'])) {
                if (currentMonth.text().indexOf(key) != -1) {
                    currentMonth.text(currentMonth.text().replace(key, value));
                }
            }



            datePicker.find('th small').each(function () {
                $(this).text(translateToFrench.Days[this.innerHTML]);
            })
        }

                var translationObj = this.createTranslationObjects();

                this.translateElements('select option', translationObj.labeltTranslation, this.replaceLabel);
                this.translateElements('td.ng-binding', translationObj.tdTranslation, this.replaceText);

            translateElements2: function(selector, translation, replacer) {
                $(selector).each(function() {
                    var text = $(this).val();
                    if (translation[text] !== undefined) {
                        replacer.call(this, text, translation[text]);
                    }
                });
            },
            translateElements: function(selector, translation, replacer) {
                $(selector).each(function() {
                    var text = $(this).text().trim();
                    if (translation[text] !== undefined) {
                        replacer.call(this, text, translation[text]);
                    }
                });
            },

            replaceText: function(oldText, newText) {
                this.innerHTML = this.innerHTML.replace(oldText, newText);
            },

            replaceValue: function(oldText, newText) {
                $(this).val(newText);
            },

            replaceLabel: function(oldText, newText) {
                $(this).attr('label', newText);
            },

            handleSpecificCases: function() {
                $('h5:contains("No commodities added")').text('Aucune marchandise ajoutée');
                $('label.control-label.no-left-padding.ng-binding').each(function() {
                    if ($(this).attr('style') === "text-align: center" && $(this).html() === "&nbsp;of&nbsp;&nbsp;1") {
                        $(this).html('&nbsp;de&nbsp;&nbsp;1');
                    }
                });
            },
        };

        var intervalId = setInterval(function() {
            client.init(); 
            clearInterval(intervalId);
        }, 1000);

        switch(location) {
            case '/shipping':
                this.vm.translations.ThinClient.CreateAShipment = "Créer un envoi";
                break;
            case '/history':
                $("h4:first").text("Historique");
                
                break;
            // Add more cases as needed
        }
     }

// AddPackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns undefined
    this.AddPackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
       
        $('label.control-label.no-left-padding.ng-binding').each(function() {
            // Check if the label has the correct style and text
            if ($(this).attr('style') === "text-align: center" && $(this).html() === "&nbsp;de&nbsp;&nbsp;"+ (packageIndex)) {
                // Change the label's text
                $(this).html('&nbsp;de&nbsp;&nbsp;' + (packageIndex+1));
            }
        });
    }

// RemovePackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns undefined
    this.RemovePackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
       
        $('label.control-label.no-left-padding.ng-binding').each(function() {
            // Check if the label has the correct style and text
            if ($(this).attr('style') === "text-align: center" && $(this).html() === "&nbsp;de&nbsp;&nbsp;"+ (packageIndex+2)) {
                // Change the label's text
                $(this).html('&nbsp;de&nbsp;&nbsp;' + (packageIndex+1));
            }
        });
    }

// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
this.PageLoaded = function (location) {
        
        if (location == '/shipping') this.Shipping();
        else if (location == '/history') this.History();
        else if (location == '/closemanifest') this.CloseManifest();
        else if (location == '/manifestdocuments') this.ManifestDocuments();
        else if (location == '/transmit') this.Transmit();
        else if (location == '/groupmanager') this.GroupManager();
        else if (location == '/managedata') this.ManageData();
    }

// Shipping() // returns void
this.Shipping = function () {
        translateSelectAddressBookOption();
        this.vm.pickupRequestButtonCaption = client.translateToFrench['Pickup Request'];
        this.vm.translations.ThinClient.CreateAShipment = client.translateToFrench['Create a Shipment'];
        this.vm.translations.ThinClient.Reset = client.translateToFrench['Reset'];
        this.vm.translations.ThinClient.Continue = client.translateToFrench['Continue'];
        this.vm.translations.Common.Clear = client.translateToFrench['Clear'];
        this.vm.translations.Common.SelectAction = client.translateToFrench['Select Action'];
        this.vm.translations.Common.Add = client.translateToFrench['Add'];
        this.vm.translations.Common.Update = client.translateToFrench['Update'];
        this.vm.translations.Common.Today = 'hello'

        function translateSelectAddressBookOption () {
            var interval = setInterval(function () {
                var $selectAddressBook = $('form[name="addressForm"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.AddressBookIdToProcess"] option[label="Select address book"]');
                if ($selectAddressBook.length >= 3) {
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    $selectAddressBook.each(function () {
                        if (client.translateToFrench[this.text] !== undefined) {
                            $(this).attr('label', client.translateToFrench[this.text]);
                        }
                    });
                }
            });
        }
    }

// History() // returns void
this.History = function () {
        'h4:contains("History")'.$textToFrench();
        angular.element(document).ready(function () {
            translateReportsToFrench();
        });
         
        function translateReportsToFrench () {
            $('#reports option').each(function () {
                if (client.translateToFrench[this.text] !== undefined) {
                    $(this).attr('label', client.translateToFrench[this.text]);
                }
            });
        }
    }

        'shipper-carrier select option:contains("Select Carrier...")'.textToFrench();
    }

// Source: GAP INC (GAPMailrooms)_Gap Mailrooms BR_70.cs
// GetEmail() // returns the extracted email text from the UI anchor tags
GetEmail(){
      var emailText = "";
      var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a"); 
      Array.from(tags).forEach(function(tag){
         if(tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!","").trim(); 
      });
      return emailText;
   }

// this.PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
  this.PageLoaded = function (location)
  {
    vm = this.vm;
    GetUserContext();
    console.log(vm)

    if (location === '/batchdetail')
    {
      $('body').delegate('#voidBReference', 'click', function ()
      {
        voidBatchJS(this);
      });
    }
    if (location === '/batchmanager')
    {
      console.log(userContext)
      $('body').delegate('#voidBReference', 'click', function ()
      {
        voidBatchJS(this);
      });

      $('body').delegate('#printPSlip', 'change', function ()
      {
        console.log("I have been changed..." + $('#printPSlip').is(":checked"))
      })
    }
    if (location === '/history')
    {
      $('body').delegate('.void-all-btn', 'click', function (e)
      {
        VoidAll(e.currentTarget);
      });

      $('body').delegate('.RePrint-AMP-btn', 'click', function (e)
      {
        RePrintAMP(e.currentTarget);
      });

      // $('body').delegate('#VoidAll', 'click', function ()
      // {
      //   VoidAll(this);
      // });
      $('body').delegate('#CancelCloseModal', 'click', function ()
      {
        CloseModalClose();
      });
      $('body').delegate('#VoidReal', 'click', function ()
      {
        VoidReal();
      });
    }
    if (location === '/shipping')
    {
      var interval = setInterval(function ()
      {
        var $service = $('[ng-model="vm.selectedServices"]');
        var loaded = $service.length;
        if (loaded)
        {
          $('[ng-model="vm.selectedServices"]').removeClass("service");
          $('body').delegate('#AddMultiplePackages', 'click', function ()
          {
            AddMultiplePackagesModel();
          });

          $('body').delegate('#MultiCloseModal', 'click', function ()
          {
            MultiCloseModal();
          });

          $('body').delegate('#AddMultiPackagesReal', 'click', function ()
          {
            AddMultiPackagesReal();
          });

          $('body').delegate('#Split', 'click', function ()
          {
            Split();
          });

          $('body').delegate('#AddAll', 'click', function ()
          {
            AddAll();
          });
          clearInterval(interval);
        }
      }, 50);
    }



  }

// function editableTable() // returns undefined
  function editableTable()
  {
    const celdas = document.querySelectorAll("#miTabla td");
    celdas.forEach(celda =>
    {
      celda.addEventListener("dblclick", function ()
      {
        if (this.cellIndex === this.parentElement.cells.length - 1)
        {
          return;
        }
        if (this.cellIndex === 2)
        {
          // QTY
          return;
        }

        const texto = this.textContent;
        this.innerHTML = "";

        const input = document.createElement("input");
        input.type = "text";
        input.value = texto;
        this.appendChild(input);
        input.select();

        input.addEventListener("blur", function ()
        {
          this.parentElement.textContent = this.value;
          this.remove();
        });
      });
    });
  }

// function AddMultiPackagesReal() // returns undefined
  function AddMultiPackagesReal()
  {
    var NumberPackage = $("#NumberPackage").val();
    if (NumberPackage === null || NumberPackage === "")
    {
      client.alert.Danger("Number Package is required")
      return;
    }
    for (var i = 0; i < NumberPackage; i++)
    {
      var elem = $('#duplicate');
      elem.click();
    }

    $("#NumberPackage").val("");
    MultiCloseModal();

  }

  }

// this.PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
  this.PreShip = function (shipmentRequest, userParams)
  {
    var url = new URL(window.location.href);
    console.log(url);
    if (url.hash.includes("batchReference"))
    {
      vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].MiscReference20 = "Batch-Manual";
      var misc = $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].MiscReference20"]');
      console.log(misc);
    }
    console.log(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol);
    if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol.indexOf("SHIPCONSOLE") !== -1){
        console.log("Fedex");
        if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country != null && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country != "US"){
            console.log("International")
            let commodities = [];
            let test = [];
            let description = new Map();
            let currIndex = 0;
            shipmentRequest.Packages.forEach((item, index) => {
                if(item.CommodityContents !== null && item.CommodityContents !== undefined && item.CommodityContents !== []){
                    item.CommodityContents.forEach((commodity, commindex) => {
                        if(description.get(commodity.Description) !== undefined){
                            test[description.get(commodity.Description)].Quantity = String(parseInt(test[description.get(commodity.Description)].Quantity) + parseInt(commodity.Quantity));
                            console.log("Adding: " + commodity.Description)
                            console.log(commodity.Quantity)
                        } else {
                            
                            description.set(commodity.Description, currIndex);
                            let tempCommodity = {
                                UnitValue: commodity.UnitValue,
                                UnitWeight: commodity.UnitWeight,
                                QuantityUnitMeasure: commodity.QuantityUnitMeasure,
                                ExportQuantityUnitMeasure1: commodity.ExportQuantityUnitMeasure1,
                                ExportQuantityUnitMeasure2: commodity.ExportQuantityUnitMeasure2,
                                LicenseUnitValue: commodity.LicenseUnitValue,
                                DdtcUnitMeasure: commodity.DdtcUnitMeasure,
                                Origin: commodity.Origin,
                                OriginCountry: commodity.OriginCountry,
                                ProductCode: commodity.ProductCode,
                                HarmonizedCode: commodity.HarmonizedCode,
                                Quantity: commodity.Quantity,
                                Description: commodity.Description,
                                LicenseExpirationDate: commodity.LicenseExpirationDate,
                                NaftaRvcAvgStartDate: commodity.NaftaRvcAvgStartDate,
                                nAFTARVCAvgEndDate: commodity.nAFTARVCAvgEndDate
                            }
                            let anotherRandom = Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 12);
                            let NewCommodity =
                            {
                              "UnitValue": commodity.UnitValue,
                              "UnitWeight": commodity.UnitWeight,
                              "QuantityUnitMeasure": "PC",
                              "ExportQuantityUnitMeasure1": "PC",
                              "ExportQuantityUnitMeasure2": "PC",
                              "LicenseUnitValue": {
                                "Currency": "USD"
                              },
                              "DdtcUnitMeasure": "PC",
                              "packageIndex": commindex,
                              "Origin": {
                                "AddressBookIdToProcess": null
                              },
                              "OriginCountry": commodity.OriginCountry,
                              "ProductCode": commodity.ProductCode,
                              "HarmonizedCode": commodity.HarmonizedCode,
                              "Quantity": commodity.Quantity,
                              "Description": commodity.Description,
                              "LicenseExpirationDate": null,
                              "NaftaRvcAvgStartDate": null,
                              "nAFTARVCAvgEndDate": null,
                              "$$hashKey": "object:" + commindex + "1" + anotherRandom
                            };
        
                            test[currIndex] = NewCommodity;
                            console.log("Adding new comm");
                            console.log(JSON.stringify(test, null, 2))
                            currIndex+=1;
                        }
                    })
                }
                
                //commodities.push(item.CommodityContents)
                shipmentRequest.Packages[index].CommodityContents = []
            })
            shipmentRequest.Packages[0].CommodityContents = test;
            console.log(JSON.stringify(test, null, 2))
        } else {
            console.log("Domestic")
        }
        
    }
}

// this.PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
  this.PostLoad = function (loadValue, shipmentRequest)
  {
    try
    {
      //alert = function(){}
      this.vm.getWeight();

    }
    catch (error)
    {
      console.log("Error getting weight")
    }
    if (!shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData1)
    {
      client.alert.Danger("Loaded Value " + loadValue + " not found")
    } else
    {
      const Lines = JSON.parse(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData1);
      Lines.forEach(line =>
      {
        const fila = document.createElement("tr");
        fila.innerHTML = `
            <td>${line.LineNo}</td>
            <td>${line.ItemNo}</td>
            <td>${line.TotalOrderQuantity}</td>
            <td>${line.SaleUnitOfMeasure}</td>
            <td>${line.SaleUnitPrice}</td>
            <td>${line.ItemDescription}</td>
            <td></td>
            <td>${line.UnitWeight}</td>
            <td></td>
            <td>0</td>
            <td>0</td>
            <td><button class='btn btn-xs btn-success glyphicon glyphicon-plus'></button></td>
            <td hidden>${line.IsKitOrBundle}</td>
            <td hidden>${line.KitDetails ? JSON.stringify(line.KitDetails) : "[]"}</td>
            <td hidden>${line.InternationalDetails ? line.InternationalDetails.CountryOfOrigin : ""}</td>
            <td hidden>${line.InternationalDetails ? line.InternationalDetails.ExportCurrencyCode : ""}</td>
            <td hidden>${line.InternationalDetails ? line.InternationalDetails.ExportTariffCode : ""}</td>
            <td hidden>${line.InternationalDetails ? line.InternationalDetails.ExportUnitPrice : ""}</td>
            `;
        if (line.IsKitOrBundle && line.KitDetails == null)
        {
          client.alert.Danger("WARNING: Kit Details are empty when Commodity Set to Kit");
        }
        document.querySelector("#miTabla").appendChild(fila);
      });
      editableTable();

      const buttons = document.querySelectorAll("#miTabla button");
      buttons.forEach(button =>
      {
        button.addEventListener("click", function ()
        {
          const fila = this.parentElement.parentElement;
          AddCommodity(fila, 1, 0);
        });
      });
      const tabla = document.querySelector("#miTabla");
      tabla.classList.remove("hidden");
    }
    console.log(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate)
    var today = new Date();
    shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate.Day = today.getDate();
    shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate.Year = today.getFullYear();
    shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate.Month = today.getMonth() + 1;
    if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country != null && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country != 'US')
    {
      for (var ii = 0; ii < shipmentRequest.Packages.length; ii++)
      {
        shipmentRequest.Packages[ii].CommercialInvoiceMethod = 1;
        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country == 'GB')
        {
            console.log(shipmentRequest.Packages[ii]);
            shipmentRequest.Packages[ii].AdditionalHardcopyDocumentation = false;
        }
      }
      
    }

  }

// function AddAll() // returns undefined
  function AddAll()
  {
    var rows = document.querySelectorAll("#miTabla")[0].rows;

    for (var ii = 0; ii < rows.length; ii++)
    {
      if (ii != 0)
      {
        var commodityPerPkg = rows[ii].cells[2].textContent;
        rows[ii].cells[10].textContent = commodityPerPkg;
        AddCommodity(rows[ii], 1, 0);
        rows[ii].cells[10].textContent = 0;
      }
    }
  }

// function Split() // returns undefined
  function Split()
  {
    var TotalPackages = vm.currentShipment.Packages.length - (vm.packageIndex);

    var rows = document.querySelectorAll("#miTabla")[0].rows;

    for (var ii = 0; ii < rows.length; ii++)
    {
      if (ii != 0)
      {
        var commodityPerPkg = Math.floor(rows[ii].cells[2].textContent / (TotalPackages));
        console.log("Packages: " + commodityPerPkg)
        for (let i = vm.packageIndex; i < vm.currentShipment.Packages.length; i++)
        {
          console.log("Adding package: " + i)
          console.log(rows[ii])
          rows[ii].cells[10].textContent = commodityPerPkg;
          AddCommodity(rows[ii], 0, i);
        }
        rows[ii].cells[10].textContent = 0;
      }
    }


  }

// function AddCommodity(fila, Type, newPackageIndex) // returns undefined
  function AddCommodity(fila, Type, newPackageIndex)
  {
    console.log("Trying to get package for index: " + newPackageIndex)
    if (fila.cells[2].textContent == "" || fila.cells[2].textContent == 0)
    {
      client.alert.Danger("No Commodity Left");
      return;
    }
    if (fila.cells[10].textContent == "" || Number(fila.cells[10].textContent) <= 0 || isNaN(fila.cells[10].textContent))
    {
      client.alert.Danger("Invalid Amount to Ship: ");
      return;
    }
    console.log("10: " + fila.cells[10].textContent)
    console.log("2: " + fila.cells[2].textContent)
    if (Number(fila.cells[10].textContent) > Number(fila.cells[2].textContent))
    {
      client.alert.Danger("Ship Quantity can't be more that QTY ");
      return;
    }
    var packageIndex = 0;
    if (Type == 1)
    {
      packageIndex = vm.packageIndex;
    } else
    {
      packageIndex = newPackageIndex;
    }
    console.log(fila.cells[12].textContent ? fila.cells[12].textContent : "Not found in cell 12");
    console.log("Getting isBundle: " + fila.cells[12].textContent)
    if (fila.cells[12] && fila.cells[12].textContent == "true")
    {
      console.log("Bundle")
      console.log(fila.cells[13].textContent)
      var kitDetails = JSON.parse(fila.cells[13].textContent)
      if (kitDetails.length < 1)
      {
        client.alert.Danger("WARNING: Kit Details are empty when Commodity Set to Kit");
        fila.cells[10].textContent = 0;
        return;
      } else
      {
        kitDetails.forEach(detail =>
        {
          console.log(detail)
          console.log(detail.KitComponentPartDesc)
          detail.UnitsPerAssembly = detail.UnitsPerAssembly * fila.cells[10].textContent;
          console.log("Adding units: " + detail.UnitsPerAssembly)
          addToCommodityList(detail, packageIndex, true)
        });
      }
    } else
    {
      console.log("Not bundle")
      addToCommodityList(fila.cells, packageIndex, false)
    }

    fila.cells[2].textContent = fila.cells[2].textContent - fila.cells[10].textContent;
    fila.cells[10].textContent = 0;
    console.log(vm.currentShipment.Packages[packageIndex].CommodityContents);
  }

// function addToCommodityList(cells, index, isBundle) // returns undefined
  function addToCommodityList(cells, index, isBundle)
  {
    var OldCommodity = vm.currentShipment.Packages[index].CommodityContents;
    var NewCommodity;
    let min = 5;
    let max = 100;
    let randomNumber = Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1)) + min;
    let anotherRandom = Date.now().toString(36) + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 12);
    if (!cells || cells === "")
    {
      client.alert.Danger("Error: Commodity Data unavailable");
      console.log(cells);
      return;
    }
    if (isBundle)
    {
      let price = 0;
      if (cells.InternationalInfo == null || cells.InternationalInfo.ExportUnitPrice == null)
      {
        price = cells.SaleUnitPrice
        console.log('Value price updated to: ' + price)
      }
      else
      {
        price = cells.InternationalInfo.ExportUnitPrice
        console.log('Value price updated 2: ' + price)
      }
      NewCommodity = [
        {
          "UnitValue": {
            "Currency": cells.InternationalInfo.ExportCurrencyCode,
            "Amount": price
          },
          "UnitWeight": {
            "Units": "LB",
            "Amount": cells.UnitWeight
          },
          "QuantityUnitMeasure": "PC",
          "ExportQuantityUnitMeasure1": "PC",
          "ExportQuantityUnitMeasure2": "PC",
          "LicenseUnitValue": {
            "Currency": "USD"
          },
          "DdtcUnitMeasure": "PC",
          "packageIndex": index,
          "Origin": {
            "AddressBookIdToProcess": null
          },
          "OriginCountry": cells.InternationalInfo.CountryOfOrigin,
          "ProductCode": cells.KitComponentPart,
          "HarmonizedCode": cells.InternationalInfo.ExportTariffCode,
          "Quantity": cells.UnitsPerAssembly,
          "Description": cells.KitComponentPartDesc,
          "LicenseExpirationDate": null,
          "NaftaRvcAvgStartDate": null,
          "nAFTARVCAvgEndDate": null,
          "$$hashKey": "object:" + index + "1" + anotherRandom
        }];
    }
    else
    {
      let price = 0;
      if (cells[17].textContent == null || cells[17].textContent == "")
      {
        price = cells[4].textContent
        console.log('Value price updated to: ' + price)
      }
      else
      {
        price = cells[17].textContent
        console.log('Value price updated 2: ' + price)
      }
      NewCommodity = [
        {
          "UnitValue": {
            "Currency": cells[15].textContent,
            "Amount": price
          },
          "UnitWeight": {
            "Units": "LB",
            "Amount": cells[7].textContent
          },
          "QuantityUnitMeasure": "PC",
          "ExportQuantityUnitMeasure1": "PC",
          "ExportQuantityUnitMeasure2": "PC",
          "LicenseUnitValue": {
            "Currency": cells[16].textContent
          },
          "DdtcUnitMeasure": "PC",
          "packageIndex": index,
          "Origin": {
            "AddressBookIdToProcess": null
          },
          "OriginCountry": cells[14].textContent,
          "ProductCode": cells[1].textContent,
          "HarmonizedCode": cells[16].textContent,
          "Quantity": cells[10].textContent,
          "Description": cells[5].textContent,
          "LicenseExpirationDate": null,
          "NaftaRvcAvgStartDate": null,
          "nAFTARVCAvgEndDate": null,
          "$$hashKey": "object:" + index + "1" + randomNumber
        }];
      //This is wrong an not tested
      //if(line.InternationalDetails!=null && line.InternationalDetails.ExportUnitPrice==null)
      //{
      //    "UnitValue": cells[17].SaleUnitPrice;
      //}
      //else if(line.InternationalDetails!=null && line.InternationalDetails.ExportUnitPrice!=null)
      //{
      //   "UnitValue":cells[15].InternationalInfo.ExportUnitPrice ; 
      //}
    }
    if (!OldCommodity || OldCommodity.length === 0)
    {
      vm.currentShipment.Packages[index].CommodityContents = NewCommodity;
    }
    else
    {
      vm.currentShipment.Packages[index].CommodityContents = OldCommodity.concat(NewCommodity);
    }
  }

// this.NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
  this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest)
  {

    var tableHeaderRowCount = 1;
    var table = document.getElementById('miTabla');
    console.log("table size: ")
    if (table && table.rows)
    {
      var rowCount = table.rows.length;
    } else
    {
      var rowCount = 0
    }

    for (var i = tableHeaderRowCount; i < rowCount; i++)
    {
      table.deleteRow(tableHeaderRowCount);
    }

  }

// function VoidReal() // returns undefined
  function VoidReal()
  {
    var ShipID = $('#ShipID').val();
    var GlobalMSn = $('#GlobalMSn').val();
    var Carrier = $('#Carrier').val();

    var searchParams =
    {
      "SearchCriteria": {
        "Skip": 0,
        "Take": 200,
        "WhereClauses": [
          {
            "FieldName": "ShipId",
            "FieldValue": ShipID,
            "Operator": 0
          }
        ],
        "OrderByClauses": [
          {
            "FieldName": "GlobalMsn",
            "Direction": "desc"
          }
        ]
      },
      "CompanyId": "4cf9324f-c58c-4694-ad37-3adcd3056c9b"
    };
    var data = searchParams;
    var response = client.thinClientAPIRequest('SearchPackageHistory', data, false).done(function (response)
    {
      console.log(response);
      if (response.ErrorCode != 0)
      {
        client.alert.Danger(response.ErrorMessage);
      } else
      {
        console.log(response.Packages.length)
        console.log(response.Packages)
        response.Packages.forEach((package2, idx, array) =>
        {
          console.log(package2.GlobalMsn);
          var currentPackage = [];
          currentPackage.push(package2.GlobalMsn);
          var voidParams =
          {
            "GlobalMsns": currentPackage,
            "CompanyId": "4cf9324f-c58c-4694-ad37-3adcd3056c9b"
          };
          console.log('Processing: ' + package2.GlobalMsn)
          var data2 = voidParams;
		  console.log(voidParams);
          var response2 = client.thinClientAPIRequest('VoidPackages_History', data2, true).done(function (response2)
          {
            console.log(response2);
            if (response2.Packages[0].ErrorCode != 0)
            {
              client.alert.Danger(response2.Packages[0].ErrorMessage)
            }
            if (idx === array.length - 1)
            {
              CloseModalClose();
              var elemento = document.querySelector('button[ng-click="vm.changeReport()"]'); if (elemento) { elemento.click(); }
            }

          });
        });
       
      }
    });
  }

// function CallUserMethod(GlobalMSN, Machine) // returns undefined
    function CallUserMethod(GlobalMSN, Machine = ""){
        let usermethodParams = { "Action": "RePrintAMP", "GlobalMSN": GlobalMSN };
        let data = { UserContext: userContext, "Data": JSON.stringify(usermethodParams) };
        console.log(data);
        let response = client.thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, true, Machine).done(function (response)
        {
            console.log(response);
            const decodedDataString = decodeHtmlEntities(response.Data);
            const dataObject = JSON.parse(decodedDataString);

            console.log(dataObject);
            dataObject.forEach(item => {
              
              if (item.RawData !== undefined && item.RawData.length > 0){
                  printDocuments(item);
              }
                  
              if (item.PdfData !== undefined && item.PdfData.length > 0) {
                  downloadPdf(item);
              }
              
              if (item.ImageData !== undefined && item.ImageData.length > 0) {
                  client.alert.Danger('Image NOT SUPPORTED');
                  /*TODO download image*/
              }
            });
        });
    }

// function RePrintAMP(Package) // returns undefined
    function RePrintAMP(Package){
        let GlobalMSN = $(Package).data('custom-attribute1');
        let Carrier = $(Package).data('custom-attribute2');

        if(!Carrier.includes("CONNECTSHIP") && !Carrier.includes("TANDATA_LTL")){
          alert("Funcionality only support CONNECTSHIP carriers");
          return;
        }
        
        let Machine = '';
        fetch('https://localhost:5001/api/SystemInformation/ComputerName',{
            method:'GET',
        }).then(response => response.json())
        .then(data2 => {
            Machine = data2;
            CallUserMethod(GlobalMSN, Machine)
            
        }).catch(error => {
            console.log(error);
            CallUserMethod(GlobalMSN)
        });
    }

// function decodeHtmlEntities(text) // returns string
    function decodeHtmlEntities(text) {
        const element = document.createElement('div');
        element.innerHTML = text;
        return element.textContent;
    }

// function downloadPdf(pdfDocuments) // returns undefined
    function downloadPdf(pdfDocuments) {      
        let pdfArray = pdfDocuments.PdfData;
        let documentName = pdfDocuments.DocumentName;
        let file = {};
        console.log(pdfArray.length);
        for (let count = 0; count < pdfArray.length; count++) {
            if (navigator.userAgent.indexOf("MSIE ") > -1 || navigator.userAgent.indexOf("Trident/") > -1) {
              let byteCharacters = atob(pdfArray[count]);
              let byteNumbers = new Array(byteCharacters.length);
                for (let i = 0; i < byteCharacters.length; i++) {
                    byteNumbers[i] = byteCharacters.charCodeAt(i);
                }
                let byteArray = new Uint8Array(byteNumbers);
                file = new Blob([byteArray], { type: 'application/pdf' });
                window.navigator.msSaveOrOpenBlob(file, documentName + ".pdf");
            } else {
                let documentAfterConversion = base64ToArrayBuffer(pdfArray[count]);
                let a = window.document.createElement("a");
                file = new Blob([documentAfterConversion], { type: 'application/pdf' });
                let fileUrl = URL.createObjectURL(file);
                a.href = fileUrl;
                a.download = documentName + ".pdf";
                document.body.appendChild(a);
                a.click();
                document.body.removeChild(a);
            }          
      }
  }

// function base64ToArrayBuffer(base64) // returns ArrayBuffer
  function base64ToArrayBuffer(base64) {
      let binaryString = window.atob(base64);
      let len = binaryString.length;
      let bytes = new Uint8Array(len);
      for (let i = 0; i < len; i++) {
          bytes[i] = binaryString.charCodeAt(i);
      }
      return bytes.buffer;
  }

// function printDocuments(printData) // returns undefined
  function printDocuments(printData) {
    let request = new XMLHttpRequest();
    request.open('POST','https://localhost:5001/api/Printer/Print', true);
    request.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8');
    /*request.onreadystatechange = function() {
        if (this.readyState === 4) {
            if (this.status === 200) {
                if (printData.RawData.length === 1) {
                    documents.shift();
                } else {
                    printData.RawData.shift();
                    documents[0] = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(printData));
                }
                printDocuments(documents);
            } else {
              console.log("Error");
            }
        }
    };*/
    request.send(JSON.stringify({
        'PrinterName': printData.LocalPort,
        'RawPrintData': printData.RawData[0]
    }));
        
  }

// Source: GENERAL INSULATION (GENINSU)_Client Rules_1700.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
this.PageLoaded = function(location) { 
     
     $( document ).ready(function() {
        $('input[name="account"]').attr("list","AccountList");
        $('input[name="account"]').prop('list', 'AccountList');
        $('input[ng-model="nameaddress.Account"]').prop('list', 'AccountList');
      });
     
     $('input[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Terms"]').val("string:SHIPPER");
     $('input[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Terms"]').trigger('change');
     
        $('body').delegate('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Terms"]', 'change', function () {
        $('input[name="account"]').attr("list","AccountList");
        $('input[name="account"]').prop('list', 'AccountList');
        $('input[ng-model="nameaddress.Account"]').prop('list', 'AccountList');
        
            });
   
        $('body').delegate('[ng-model="vm.selectedServices"]', 'change', function () {
            var currentServiceSelected = $('[ng-model="vm.selectedServices"]').val();
           
            
            
            var selectedService = this[this.selectedIndex].value;

           var symbol = selectedService.split('.');

           var isGeninsu = symbol[0] == 'GENINSU' && symbol[1] == 'Custom'

           //$('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling"]').prop('checked', isGeninsu).change();
           
            
            
            
            
        });
   
   
        $('body').delegate('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference19"]', 'change', function () {
            
            let currentPackageIndex = this.name.replace('NMFCNumbers', '');
            console.log(currentPackageIndex);
            
                $('select[name="SubClassNumbers'+currentPackageIndex+'"]').empty();
                 //if ($(this).val() == 'String:86700') {  
                const arrayName = $(this).val().split(":");
                
                $.each(eval("NMFC"+arrayName[1]), function(index,obj) {

                 $('textarea[name="LtlDescription'+currentPackageIndex+'"]').addClass("ng-valid");
                 $('textarea[name="LtlDescription'+currentPackageIndex+'"]').addClass("ng-empty");
                 $('textarea[name="LtlDescription'+currentPackageIndex+'"]').addClass("ng-touched");

                 console.log(obj["description"]);

                 $('input[name="item_number_txt'+currentPackageIndex+'"]').trigger('change');

              });
              
        });

// PreRate(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
this.PreRate = function(shipmentRequest, userParams) {
        
        let tpb = $('input[type=checkbox][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling"]').first();

        if ($(tpb).prop('checked') === true)
      
        {
      
          //uncheck the box before rating
      
          //use .click instead of .prop('checked') as .click will update the VM
      
          $(tpb).click();
      
       
      
          //set a global variable to access later
      
          tpbChecked = true;
      
        }

    }

// PostRate(shipmentRequest, rateResults) // returns undefined
this.PostRate = function (shipmentRequest, rateResults) {
         //if the global variable tpbChecked has a value, check the box after rating.

        if (tpbChecked)
        {
            $('input[type=checkbox][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling"]').first().click();
            //clean up
            tpbChecked = null;
        }
    }

// PostSearchHistory(packages) // returns undefined
this.PostSearchHistory = function(packages) {
    var checkExist = setInterval(function ()
        {
          if ($('table[ng-table="vm.tableParamsForDetailed"] tr').length > 1)
          {
            clearInterval(checkExist);
            $('table[ng-table="vm.tableParamsForDetailed"] tr:gt(1)').find('td:eq(2) > div:not(.ng-hide)').html(function() 
            {
                var trackingN = $(this).text().trim();
                
                
              if(trackingN.startsWith('1Z')) {
              return "<a href=https://wwwapps.ups.com/WebTracking/track?track=yes&trackNums=" + $(this).text().trim() + "&requester=ST/trackdetails target='_new'>" + $(this).text().trim() + "</a>";
              }   else {
              return "<a href=https://online.chrobinson.com/tracking/#/?trackingNumber=" + $(this).text().trim() + "&requester=ST/trackdetails target='_new'>" + $(this).text().trim() + "</a>";
              }
            });
          }
        }, 100);
    }

// AddPackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns undefined
this.AddPackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
        $('select[name="SubClassNumbers'+eval(packageIndex-1)+'"]').empty();
       $('select[name="NMFCNumbers'+eval(packageIndex-1)+'"]').val(''); 
       shipmentRequest.Packages[eval(packageIndex-1)].MiscReference19 = '';
        
    }

// PreviousPackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns undefined
this.PreviousPackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {		  
    $('select[name="SubClassNumbers'+eval(packageIndex+1)+'"]').empty();   
    $('select[name="NMFCNumbers'+eval(packageIndex+1)+'"]').val(''); 
    shipmentRequest.Packages[eval(packageIndex+1)].MiscReference19 = '';
    }

    }

// Source: GlaxoSmithKline LLC (gsk)_Glasko Smith BR_69.cs
// function AddEmailToNotification(event) // returns undefined
    this.AddEmailToNotification = function(event) {
        var currentTarget = event.currentTarget;
        var ngModelName = currentTarget.attributes['ng-model'].nodeValue.split('.').pop();
        var emailAddress = GetShipmentEmailAddresses(this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults);
        var pkg = this.currentShipment.Packages[0];

        if (ngModelName.indexOf('DeliveryException') >= 0){
            SetDeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, ngModelName, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        } else if (ngModelName.indexOf('Delivery') >= 0) {
            SetDeliveryNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, ngModelName, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        } else {
            SetShipNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, ngModelName, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        }
    }

// this.SaveButton(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
this.SaveButton = function (shipmentRequest, userParams) {
        // set email variables
        requestorEmail = $["[property=MiscReference12] input"].val();
        requestorNotes = $["[property=MiscReference1] input"].val();
        approverNotes = $["[property=MiscReference4] input"].val();
        // send the email
        callUserMethod(3, requestorEmail, requestorNotes, approverNotes);
    }

// this.PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
this.PreShip = function (shipmentRequest, userParams) {

        // check to make sure the user doesnt need supervisor permission
        var NoApprovalNeeded = [
            // services
            "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.GND",
            "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.3DA",
            "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.EPD",
            "UPSAPI.UPS.GND",
            "UPSAPI.UPS.3DA",
            "UPSAPI.UPS.EXPEDITED",
            // payment terms
            "CONSIGNEE",
            "PREPURCHASED"
        ];

        // popup in place of email
        /*
        var supervisorEmail = callUserMethod(2);
        if (supervisorEmail != '') {
            supervisorEmail = ',' + supervisorEmail;
        }
        var requestorNotes = $("[property=MiscReference1] input").val();
        if (requestorNotes == "") {
            requestorNotes = "*Please be sure to update the requestor note setcion and provide some information supporting the shipment choices in your supervisor email";
        }
        var confirmMessage = "WARNING: This shipment will require Supervisor approval.\rPlease include the following information:\r" + requestorNotes + "\r\rSend your email to: \ralberto.pla@globaleagle.com,Ryan.Saladeen@globaleagle.com" + supervisorEmail +"\r\rClick OK to save or Cancel to make changes";
        */
           
        //message when email is in place
        var confirmMessage = "WARNING: This shipment will require Supervisor approval. \r\rClick OK to save and sent a notifications \rClick Cancel to make changes";

        if (shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].MiscReference3 != "Approved") {
            if (callUserMethod(1) == "supervisor" || shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeThirdPartyBilling == true) {
                shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].MiscReference3 = "No Approval Required";
            } else {
                if (NoApprovalNeeded.includes(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol) ||
                    NoApprovalNeeded.includes(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Terms)) {
                    shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].MiscReference3 = "No Approval Required";
                } else {
                    if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference3 != "Approved") {
                        if (confirm(confirmMessage)) {
                            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].MiscReference3 = "Approval Required";
                            // set email variables
                            requestorEmail = $["[property=MiscReference12] input"].val();
                            requestorNotes = $["[property=MiscReference1] input"].val();
                            approverNotes = $["[property=MiscReference4] input"].val();
                            // send the email
                            callUserMethod(3, requestorEmail, requestorNotes, approverNotes);
                            this.vm.saveShipment();
                        } 
                        throw ({ message: "Print process cancelled", errorCode: "NOTICE: " });
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

// this.NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        if (callUserMethod(1) == 'supervisor') {
            this.vm.fieldOptions["MiscReference3"].IsDisabled = false;
        }
        shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].MiscReference12 = userEmail;

        // general visibility
        shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].NotificationFailureAddressEmail = userEmail;
        // ship notification
        shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ShipNotificationEmail = true;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ShipNotificationAddressEmail = userEmail;
        // delivery notification
        shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].DeliveryNotificationEmail = true;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail = userEmail;
        // delivery exeption notification
        shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].DeliveryExceptionNotificationEmail = true;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail = userEmail;
        // return delivery notification
        shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ReturnDeliveryNotificationEmail = true;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ReturnDeliveryNotificationAddressEmail = userEmail;
    }

// Source: HARLEY DAVIDSON (HD)_HD CBR 2.3 Fix_1758.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
    this.PageLoaded = function (location) {

        if (location == '/') {
            var w = window.location.href + "batchmanager";
            window.location.replace(w);
        }

        if (location == '/batchmanager') {
            $(document).ready(function () {
                $.globalEval('var userContext;');

                var dataObject = {};
                dataObject.Action = "GetDealerId";
                dataObject.Content = "";
                debugger;
                var data = { Data: JSON.stringify(dataObject), UserContext: client.userContext };
                clientService.thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false).done(function (jsonData) {
                    debugger;
                    //console.log(jsonData.Data);
                    $('body').find('a[ng-click="vm.itemPerPageChanged(0)"]').first().trigger('click').promise().done(function (e) {
                        ProcessDealerId(jsonData.Data);
                    });
                });
            }); //end document.ready
        }

        if (location == '/batchdetail') {
            $(document).ready(function () {
                try {
                    $('body').delegate('a[ng-model="vm.itemsPerPage"][ng-click="vm.itemPerPageChanged(0)"]', 'click', function (e) {
                        var waitForTable = setInterval(function () {
                            /* The spanTotalBatchItems element text defaults to a value of 0, need to wait until it changes before we continue. */
                            if (($('#spanTotalBatchItems').length > 0) && ($('#spanTotalBatchItems').text() != "0")) {
                                var currentDate = new Date();
                                var totalBatchItems = parseInt($('#spanTotalBatchItems').text());

                                /* Once this condition is met, we can remove the rows we don't want. */
                                if ($('#tableBatchDetails tr').length >= totalBatchItems) {
                                    clearInterval(waitForTable);
                                    //console.log('table rows condition met.');
                                    /* Loop the table rows. */
                                    $('#tableBatchDetails tr:gt(0)').each(function (x, y) {
                                        var tdDate = new Date($(this).find('td:eq(1)').text());
                                        if (tdDate < currentDate) {
                                            $(this).remove();
                                        }
                                    }).promise().done(function (e) {
                                        $('#tableBatchDetails').show();
                                        var i = $('#tableBatchDetails tr').length;
                                        $('#spanTotalBatchItems').text(i);
                                    });
                                } //end if ($('#tableBatchDetails tr').length >= totalBatchItems) 

                            } //end if (($('#spanTotalBatchItems').length > 0) && ($('#spanTotalBatchItems').text() != "0")) 

                        }, 250);
                    });

                    /* Event handler for the 'View Labels' button. */
                    $('body').delegate('#buttonViewCheckedLabels', 'click', function (e) {
                        //prevent the subsequent listeners from firing
                        e.stopImmediatePropagation();
                        // console.log("Click");
                        ViewCheckedLabels();
                        //   $('#tableBatchDetails').find('input[type=checkbox]:checked').each(function () 
                        //   { 
                        //     ViewCheckedLabels();
                        //   });
                    }); //end button delegate

                    /* Trigger the click of the 'All' button.  Maybe in the future add an id to the element to make the code a bit more readable. */
                    $('a[ng-model="vm.itemsPerPage"][ng-click="vm.itemPerPageChanged(0)"]').trigger('click');


                }
                catch (err) {
                    console.error(err.message);
                }
            }); //end document.ready
        }

    }

// ViewCheckedLabels() // returns void
    function ViewCheckedLabels() {
        $('#tableBatchDetails').find('input[type=checkbox]:checked').each(function () {
            // console.log("Print");
            var btnPrint = $(this).closest('tr').find('input[type="button"][value="Print"]').first().trigger('click');
        });
    }

// ProcessDealerId(DealerId) // returns void
    function ProcessDealerId(DealerId) {
        var WaitForDealerId;

        var tdDealerId = $('td:contains(' + DealerId + ')').first();

        if (tdDealerId.length == 0) {
            /* Wait 150 milliseconds before trying to find the dealer id in the batch list.  A better way would be to get the number of batch items, then wait for that number of rows to show.  Work on that next. */
            WaitForDealerId = setTimeout(function () {
                ProcessDealerId(DealerId);
            }, 150)
        }
        else {
            //console.log('DealerID Found.');
            clearTimeout(WaitForDealerId);
            $(tdDealerId).find('a').first().trigger('click');
        }

    }

// client.dismiss() // returns jQuery delegate result
        dismiss: $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function () { $('div[role="alert"]:visible').hide(); }),

// client.alert.Info(msg) // returns void
                Info: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-success alert-danger');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-info').show();
                },

// client.alert.Success(msg) // returns void
                Success: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-info alert-danger');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-success').show();
                },

// client.alert.Danger(msg) // returns void
                Danger: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-info alert-success');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-danger').show();
                }

// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
this.PageLoaded = function (location) {
        if (location == '/') {
            var bmvar = window.location.origin + window.location.pathname + "#!/batchmanager";
            window.location.replace(bmvar);
        }
        
        //<a href="" ng-click="vm.linkToDetails(batch.Info.BatchReference)" class="ng-binding">000046</a>
        
        if (window.location.hash == '#!/batchmanager') {
            var waitForT = setInterval(function () {
            //  $('body').delegate('a[ng-click="vm.linkToDetails(0)"]', 'click', function (e) {
            const alink = $('a[ng-click="vm.linkToDetails(batch.Info.BatchReference)"]:visible');
            if (alink.length > 0)
            {
                $(alink).trigger('click');
                clearInterval(waitForT);
            }
            
                        // $('a[ng-click="vm.linkToDetails(0)"]').trigger('click');
                    // }); //end button delegate
        //}
            }, 250);
        }
        
        if (window.location.hash == '#!/batchdetail') {
            $(document).ready(function () {
                try {
                    $('body').delegate('a[ng-model="vm.itemsPerPage"][ng-click="vm.itemPerPageChanged(0)"]', 'click', function (e) {
                        var waitForTable = setInterval(function () {
                            /* The spanTotalBatchItems element text defaults to a value of 0, need to wait until it changes before we continue. */
                            if (($('#spanTotalBatchItems').length > 0) && ($('#spanTotalBatchItems').text() != "0")) {
                                var currentDate = new Date();
                                var totalBatchItems = parseInt($('#spanTotalBatchItems').text());

                                /* Once this condition is met, we can remove the rows we don't want. */
                                if ($('#tableBatchDetails tr').length >= totalBatchItems) {
                                    clearInterval(waitForTable);
                                    //console.log('table rows condition met.');
                                    /* Loop the table rows. */
                                    $('#tableBatchDetails tr:gt(0)').each(function (x, y) {
                                        var dueDate = new Date($(this).find('td:eq(1)').text());
                                        if (dueDate < currentDate) {
                                            $(this).remove();
                                        }
                                    }).promise().done(function (e) {
                                        $('#tableBatchDetails').show();
                                        var i = $('#tableBatchDetails tr').length;
                                        $('#spanTotalBatchItems').text(i);
                                    });
                                }
                            }
                        }, 250);
                    });

                    /* Event handler for the 'View Labels' button. */
                    $('body').delegate('#buttonViewCheckedLabels', 'click', function (e) {
                        //prevent the subsequent listeners from firing
                        e.stopImmediatePropagation();
                        // console.log("Click");
                        ViewCheckedLabels();
                    }); //end button delegate

                    /* Trigger the click of the 'All' button.  Maybe in the future add an id to the element to make the code a bit more readable. */
                    $('a[ng-model="vm.itemsPerPage"][ng-click="vm.itemPerPageChanged(0)"]').trigger('click');
                    
                    if (!$('#HazAlertShipment_panel').is(':visible')) {
	                $('#HazAlertShipment_panel').modal('show');
	                $('#HazAlertShipment_panel').on('shown.bs.modal', function() {
	                	$(this).find('[autofocus]').focus();
	                });
	            }
                }
                catch (err) {
                    console.error(err.message);
                }
            }); //end document.ready
        }
        
        if (window.location.hash == '#!/history') {
        }
        
        $('select[id="reports"]').hide();
        $('ul.navbar-nav a:contains("History")').text('Claim Search');
    } //end PageLoaded

// ViewCheckedLabels() // returns void
function ViewCheckedLabels() {
        const batchItemArr = [];
        $('#tableBatchDetails').find('input[type=checkbox]:checked').each(function () {
            //debugger;
            console.log("Print");
            var btnPrint = $(this).closest('tr').find('input[type="button"][value="Print"]').first().trigger('click');
            batchItemArr.push($(this).attr('data'))
        });
        var dataObject = {};
        dataObject.Action = "RemoveBatchItem";
        let bLen = batchItemArr.length;
        for (let i = 0; i < bLen; i++) {
            if (i == 0) {
                dataObject.Content = batchItemArr[i];
            } else {
                dataObject.Content += "," + batchItemArr[i];
            }
        }
        var data = { Data: JSON.stringify(dataObject), UserContext: client.userContext };
        //debugger;
        clientService.thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false)
    }
