// Source: Hyve Solutions (HYVE)_Hyve_Solutions_CBR_1593.cs
// PostSelectAddressBook(shipmentRequest, nameaddress) // returns void
this.PostSelectAddressBook = function (shipmentRequest, nameaddress) {
		//alert("Country " + nameaddress.Country);
		
		var clientContext;
		var resp;

        $.ajax({
            type: "GET",
            url: "api/usercontext/GET",
            async: false,
            cache: false,
            success: function (result) {
                debugger;
                clientContext = result;
            },
            error: function (jqXhr, exception) {
                debugger;
            }
        });
     
        $.ajax({
            type: "POST",
            url: "api/ShippingService/UserMethod",
            async: false,
            cache: false,
            dataType: "json",           
            data: { UserContext: clientContext , "Data": nameaddress.Country},    
            success: function (response) {
                debugger;
				resp = JSON.stringify(response);
				resp = JSON.parse(resp);
				if (resp.Data !== "" && resp.Data !== undefined)
				{
					var IOR = JSON.parse(resp.Data);
					shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ImporterOfRecord = IOR;
				}
				else
				{
					alert('No available Importer of Records');
				}
            },
            error: function (xhr) {
                debugger;
                alert(xhr.responseText);
            }
        });
		
	}

// Source: ICON Clinical Research (PRAInternational)_PRA Intl Business Rules_1574.cs
// this.PageLoaded(location) // returns void
    this.PageLoaded = function (location) {
        //getUserContext();  // Removed for CBR fix 07202022

        /* Only apply these functions to the shipping page. */
        if (window.location.hash == "#!/shipping") {
            $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function (e) {
                $('div.alert-danger:visible').hide();
            })

            var checkExist = setInterval(function () {

                if ((window.jQuery !== undefined) && ($('select[name=Country]').length > 0)) {
                    /* Stop the timer. */
                    clearInterval(checkExist);

                    /* Register the event that fires when a user clicks the 'Reset' button on the main page. */
                    $('body').delegate('button[ng-click="vm.newShipment()"]:eq(0)', 'click', function (e) {
                        DisableThirdPartyBillingElements();
                    });

                    /* Disable the ThirdPartyBilling edit button. */
                    $('input[type=button][ng-disabled="!vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling"]').prop('disabled', true).attr('disabled', true);

                    /* For select boxes which are enabled, remove the default country of United States. */
                    $('select[name=Country][disabled!=disabled]').prop('selectedIndex', 0);

                    /* Trying to fix a bug where the Ship From country select element is disabled and set to the wrong country. */
                    /* Enable the element. */
                    $('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]:eq(1)').prop('disabled', false);

                    /* Hide the End Of Day dropdown menu. */
                    $('ul.nav.navbar-nav li.dropdown:eq(1) > a.dropdown-toggle').hide();

                    /* Change captions for tabs when processing return shipments. */
                    /* Register the event on change. */
                    $('body').delegate('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ReturnDeliveryMethod"]', 'change', function (e) {
                        var isReturn = $(this).val().length > 0;
                        ReturnNameAddressCaption(isReturn);
                        vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ReturnDelivery = isReturn;
                    });

                    $('body').delegate('name-address[address-property-name="Consignee"] select[name="Country"]', 'change', checkOriginConsigneeCountry);
                    $('body').delegate('name-address[address-property-name="OriginAddress"] select[name="Country"]', 'change', checkOriginConsigneeCountry);
                } /* if ((window.jQuery... */

            }, 50); /* var checkExist = setInterval... */

        } /* if (window.location.hash... */
    };

// function checkOriginConsigneeCountry() // returns boolean|void
    function checkOriginConsigneeCountry() {
        var shipFromCountry = getObjectValue(vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.Country);
        var shipToCountry = getObjectValue(vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country);

        /* If we have no shipToCountry OR the shipFromCountry is either US or CA, disable the elements, return out. */
        if (!shipToCountry | shipFromCountry == "US" | shipFromCountry == "CA") {
            DisableThirdPartyBillingElements();
            return false;
        }

        if (shipFromCountry != shipToCountry) {
            /* If the shipFromCountry does NOT equal the shipToCountry then ship Third Party. */
            SetThirdPartyBilling(vm.currentShipment);
        }
        else {
            /* Now check to see if both the origin and destination countries are members of the EU. */
            if ((IsMemberOfEu(shipFromCountry)) && (IsMemberOfEu(shipToCountry))) {
                SetThirdPartyBilling(vm.currentShipment);
            }

            //ShipThirdPartyBilling((IsMemberOfEu(shipFromCountry)) && (IsMemberOfEu(shipToCountry)));
        }

        if (shipFromCountry != "US") {
            $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Units"]').val('string:KG').change();
            $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Dimensions.Units"]').val('number:1').change();
        }
    }

// this.NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
    this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        this.vm.IsValid = this.IsValidated;
        this.vm.TemplateInit = this.PageInitialize;
        this.vm.emailNotificationAddress = this.EmailNotificationAddress;
        var originCustomData = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference1 = GetKeyValue('Custom1', originCustomData);
        ReturnNameAddressCaption(false);
    };

// this.PostSelectAddressBook(shipmentRequest, nameaddress, addressName) // returns void
    this.PostSelectAddressBook = function (shipmentRequest, nameaddress, addressName) {
        debugger;
        if (addressName !== '' && addressName !== 'ThirdPartyBillingAddress') {
            var checkExist = setInterval(function () {

                if (($('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]:eq(0)').val().length > 0) && ($('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]:eq(1)').val().length > 0)) {

                    /* Stop the timer. */
                    clearInterval(checkExist);
                    /* The values are stored in the format of 'string:CC'.  We only want the CC. */
                    var shipToCountry = $('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]:eq(0)').val().replace('string:', '');
                    var shipFromCountry = $('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]:eq(1)').val().replace('string:', '');

                    /* If we have no shipToCountry OR the shipFromCountry is either US or CA, disable the elements, return out. */
                    if (!shipToCountry | shipFromCountry == "US" | shipFromCountry == "CA") {
                        DisableThirdPartyBillingElements();
                        return false;
                    }

                    if (shipFromCountry != shipToCountry) {
                        /* If the shipFromCountry does NOT equal the shipToCountry then ship Third Party. */
                        SetThirdPartyBilling(shipmentRequest);
                    }
                    else {
                        /* Now check to see if both the origin and destination countries are members of the EU. */
                        if ((IsMemberOfEu(shipFromCountry)) && (IsMemberOfEu(shipToCountry))) {
                            SetThirdPartyBilling(shipmentRequest);
                        }

                        //ShipThirdPartyBilling((IsMemberOfEu(shipFromCountry)) && (IsMemberOfEu(shipToCountry)));
                    }

                    if (shipFromCountry != "US") {
                        $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Units"]').val('string:KG').change();
                        $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Dimensions.Units"]').val('number:1').change();
                    }
                } /* if ($('div.modal-dialog.modal-md:visible') */

            }, 50); /* var checkExist = setInterval... */
        }
    };

// this.PageInitialize(viewModel) // returns void
    this.PageInitialize = function (viewModel) {
        vm = viewModel;
    };

// this.EmailNotificationAddress(event) // returns void
    this.EmailNotificationAddress = function (event) {
        var currentTarget = event.currentTarget;
        var ngModelName = currentTarget.attributes['ng-model'].nodeValue.split('.').pop();
        var emailAddress = this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Email;
        var pkg = this.currentShipment.Packages[0];
        debugger;
        // if (ngModelName.indexOf('DeliveryException') >= 0){
        //     SetDeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, ngModelName, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        // } else if (ngModelName.indexOf('Delivery') >= 0) {
        //     SetDeliveryNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, ngModelName, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        // } else {
        //     SetShipNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, ngModelName, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        // }

        if (ngModelName == 'ShipNotificationEmail') {
            SetShipNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        } else if (ngModelName == 'DeliveryExceptionNotificationEmail') {
            SetDeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        } else if (ngModelName == 'DeliveryNotificationEmail') {
            SetDeliveryNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        }
    };

// function SetShipNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, checked) // returns void
    function SetShipNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, checked) {
        if (checked) {
            if (pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail === undefined || pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail.trim() === '') {
                pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail = emailAddress;
            }
        } else {
            var notificationAddressEmail = pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail;
            var regexp = new RegExp(',?' + emailAddress, 'g');
            notificationAddressEmail = notificationAddressEmail.replace(regexp, '');
            pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail = notificationAddressEmail;
        }
    }

// function SetDeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, checked) // returns void
    function SetDeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, checked) {
        if (checked) {
            if (pkg.DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail === undefined || pkg.DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail.trim() === '') {
                pkg.DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail = emailAddress;
            }
        } else {
            var notificationAddressEmail = pkg.DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail;
            var regexp = new RegExp(',?' + emailAddress, 'g')
            notificationAddressEmail = notificationAddressEmail.replace(regexp, '');
            pkg.DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail = notificationAddressEmail;
        }
    }

// function SetDeliveryNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, checked) // returns void
    function SetDeliveryNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, checked) {
        if (checked) {
            if (pkg.DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail == undefined || pkg.DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail.trim() == '') {
                pkg.DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail = emailAddress;
            }
        } else {
            var notificationAddressEmail = pkg.DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail;
            var regexp = new RegExp(',?' + emailAddress, 'g')
            notificationAddressEmail = notificationAddressEmail.replace(regexp, '');
            pkg.DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail = notificationAddressEmail;
        }
    }

// function ReturnNameAddressCaption(isReturn) // returns void
    function ReturnNameAddressCaption(isReturn) {
        var shipFrom = isReturn ? 'Return To' : 'Ship From';
        var shipTo = isReturn ? 'Pickup From' : 'Ship To';
        $('ul.nav.nav-tabs').find('li[heading="Ship From"]:visible > a').first().text(shipFrom);
        $('ul.nav.nav-tabs').find('li[heading="Ship To"]:visible > a').first().text(shipTo);
    }

// function SetThirdPartyBilling(shipmentRequest) // returns void
    function SetThirdPartyBilling(shipmentRequest) {
        /* This enables the button to edit the Third Party Billing Information. */
        $('input[type=button][ng-disabled="!vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling"]').prop('disabled', false).attr('disabled', false);

        /* Check the box for Third Party Billing which will bring up the modal.  Fill the modal with values.  Click Save. */
        $('input[type=checkbox][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling"]').prop('checked', true).attr('checked', true).change();

        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress = {}
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Company = 'PRA Global';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Address1 = '995 Research Park Blvd';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Address2 = 'Suite 300';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.City = 'Charlottesville';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.StateProvince = 'VA';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.PostalCode = '22911';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Account = '883F79';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Country = 'US'
    }

// function DisableThirdPartyBillingElements() // returns void
    function DisableThirdPartyBillingElements() {
        $('input[type=checkbox][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling"]').prop('checked', false).attr('checked', false);
        $('input[type=button][ng-disabled="!vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling"]').prop('disabled', true).attr('disabled', true);
    }

// function BatchManager() // returns undefined
    this.BatchManager = function() {
        debugger;

        // set user email
        var userEmail = $("div.navbar-collapse").text();
        userEmail = userEmail.match(/([a-zA-Z0-9._-]+@[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+\.[a-zA-Z0-9._-]+)/gi).toString();
        $("#email").val(userEmail);
        $("#email").change();

        IPSUploadFile();

        function IPSUploadFile() {
            $('body').delegate('#ipsUploadFile', 'click', function () {
                alertMessage('info', "Rate Process Started, an email will be sent upon completion");
                showSpinner();
                var vm = $(this).attr('vm')
                if (ensureLoadIPS(vm)) {
                    var fileName = cbr.loadIPS.file.name.split('.')[0];
                    debugger;
                    var reader = new FileReader();
                    reader.readAsDataURL(cbr.loadIPS.file);
                    reader.onload = function () {
                        var data = {
                            'UserContext': cbr.userContext,
                            'Data' : JSON.stringify({
                                'Action': 'Rate',
                                'Shipper': cbr.loadIPS.shipper,
                                'ShipDate': cbr.loadIPS.shipDate,
                                'Email': cbr.loadIPS.email,
                                'FileName': fileName,
                                'EncodedFile': this.result.split(',')[1],
                            })
                        }

                        $.post({ 
                            url: clientService.config.ShipExecServiceUrl + '/UserMethod',
                            data,
                            headers: clientService.authorizationToken()
                        }).done(function (result) {
                            hideSpinner();
                            if (result.ErrorCode > 0) {
                                alertMessage('danger', response.ErrorMessage);
                            } else {
                                alertMessage('success', "Rate Completed");
                                loadIPSReset();
                            }
                        }).fail(function (err) {
                            hideSpinner();
                            alertMessage('danger',"The process is taking longer than usual to complete but will continue to run on the server until the rate file is complete");
                        });	
                    }
                }
                // hide the spinner after 15 seconds
                setTimeout(function(){
                    hideSpinner();
                }, 15000);
            });
        }

        function loadIPSReset() {
            $.each( cbr.loadIPS, function(name, value){
                $('[ng-model="vm.loadIPS.' + name + '"]').val(null);
            });
        }

        function ensureLoadIPS(vm) {
            var msg = [];
            var result = true;

            if (vm == '') {
                msg.push('Please update all options and try again.');
            } else {
                cbr.loadIPS = JSON.parse(vm);
                //if (cbr.loadIPS.type == undefined) msg.push('\u2022Select Rate or Address Validation radio button.');
                if (cbr.loadIPS.shipper == undefined) msg.push('\u2022Missing Shipper.');
                if (cbr.loadIPS.shipDate == undefined) msg.push("\u2022Missing Ship Date.");
                if (cbr.loadIPS.email == undefined) {
                    msg.push('\u2022Missing Email Address.');
                } else {
                    if (invalidEmailAddress(cbr.loadIPS.email)) msg.push('\u2022Email Address is invalid.')
                }

                var files = $('#ipsFileInputField').prop('files');
                if (files.length == 0) {
                    msg.push('\u2022Missing File.')
                } else {
                    cbr.loadIPS.file = files[0];
                }
            }

            if (msg.length > 0) {
                result = false;
                alertMessage('danger', msg.join("<br />"));
                hideSpinner();
            }
            
            return result;
        }
    }

// Source: Indiana University (INDIANAU)_IU.Ship.Returns_1548.cs
// this.PostSelectAddressBook(shipmentRequest, nameaddress) // returns void
    this.PostSelectAddressBook = function (shipmentRequest, nameaddress) {

        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference = shipmentRequest.IndianUnvStudyData[shipmentRequest.ConsigneeGroup];
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference = this.vm.currentShipment.ConsigneeGroup;
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Group = this.vm.currentShipment.ConsigneeGroup;

        var svc;
        if (nameaddress.Country == "CA") {
            svc = {
                Symbol: "UPSAPI.UPS.EXPRESS"
                , Name: "UPS Express (UPS Adapter)"
            };
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = svc;
        }
        else {
            svc = {
                Symbol: "UPSAPI.UPS.NDA"
                , Name: "UPS NEXT DAY AIR (UPS ADAPTER)"
            };
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = svc;
        }
    };

// client.dismiss() // returns void
        dismiss: $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function () { $('div[role="alert"]:visible').hide(); }),

// Info(msg) // returns void
                Info: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-success alert-danger');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-info').show();
                },

// Success(msg) // returns void
                Success: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-info alert-danger');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-success').show();
                },

// Danger(msg) // returns void
                Danger: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-info alert-success');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-danger').show();
                }

// ManifestDocuments() // returns void
this.ManifestDocuments = function () {
        testbutton();

        function testbutton() {
            $('body').delegate('#buttonExportCODFile', 'click', function () {
                debugger;
                var shipper = $(this).attr('shipper');
                var carrier = $(this).attr('carrier');
                var historyId = $(this).attr('historyId');
                var historyShipDateYear = $(this).attr('shipDateYear');
                var historyShipDateMonth = $(this).attr('shipDateMonth');
                var historyShipDateDay = $(this).attr('shipDateDay');
                var isSftpChecked = $('#SftprBtnId').prop('checked');
                var isLocalChecked = $('#LocalrBtnId').prop('checked');
                debugger;

                // Send data to user method on the server side
                var usermethodParams = { "action": 1, "usercontext": client.userContext, "shipper": shipper, "historyId": historyId, "historyShipDateYear": historyShipDateYear, "historyShipDateMonth": historyShipDateMonth, "historyShipDateDay": historyShipDateDay, "carrier": carrier, "sftpSelectrdStatus": isSftpChecked, "localSelectrdStatus": isLocalChecked };
                var codFileString;

                var data = { UserContext: client.userContext, "Data": JSON.stringify(usermethodParams) };
                
                clientService.thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false).done(function (response) {
                    debugger;                  

                    //****New code 01.24.2022****
                    var jsonString = $("<textarea/>").html(response.Data).text();

                    if (jsonString && isLocalChecked) {                        
                        codFileString = jsonString;

                        var data = new Blob([codFileString], { type: 'text/plain' });

                        var ie = navigator.userAgent.match(/MSIE\s([\d.]+)/),
                            ie11 = navigator.userAgent.match(/Trident\/7.0/) && navigator.userAgent.match(/rv:11/),
                            ieEdge = navigator.userAgent.match(/Edge/g),
                            ieVer = (ie ? ie[1] : (ie11 ? 11 : (ieEdge ? 12 : -1)));

                        // set the export file name 
                        var exportFileName = "ShipmentRequest" + historyShipDateYear + historyShipDateMonth + historyShipDateDay + "_1_" + shipper + ".txt"

                        if (ieVer > -1) {
                            window.navigator.msSaveBlob(codFileString, exportFileName);

                        } else {
                            var downloadLink = document.createElement("a");
                            downloadLink.download = exportFileName;
                            downloadLink.href = window.URL.createObjectURL(data);
                            downloadLink.style.display = "none";
                            document.body.appendChild(downloadLink);
                            downloadLink.click();
                            document.body.removeChild(link);
                        }
                    }
                });          
            })
        }
    }

        function goodsTabClick() {
            $('body').delegate('div ul li a:contains("Goods")', 'click', function () {
                debugger;
                $('#myTest').click();
                $('#goods > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > div > div > div > button:nth-child(1)').attr('disabled','disabled');
                $('#goods > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > div > div > div > button:nth-child(2)').attr('disabled','disabled');
                $('#goods > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > div > div > div > button:nth-child(3)').attr('disabled','disabled');
                $('#goods > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > div > div > div > button:nth-child(4)').attr('disabled','disabled');
            })
        }

            })
        }
    }

// PostRate(shipmentRequest, rateResults) // returns void
    this.PostRate = function (shipmentRequest, rateResults) {
        
        var vm = this.vm;
        
        for(var i=0; i<vm.profile.Services.length; i++){
            
                           if( vm.profile.Services[i].Symbol == "TANDATA_LTL.DATK.DATK"){
                    vm.profile.Services[i].Name = "Viking Delivery Service";
                    
                   // console.log(i + " "+ vm.profile.Services[i].Name);
                }
                
                if( vm.profile.Services[i].Symbol == "TANDATA_LTL.NEMF.NEMF"){
                    vm.profile.Services[i].Name = "Old Dominion";
                    
                   // console.log(i + " "+ vm.profile.Services[i].Name);
                }
                
                if( vm.profile.Services[i].Symbol == "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.EXP"){
                    vm.profile.Services[i].Name = "UPS Worldwide Express";
                    
                   // console.log(i + " "+ vm.profile.Services[i].Name);
                }

    this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest)

// AddPackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns void
     this.AddPackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
       
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData1 = null;
		var shipService = "";
		if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service!==undefined){
			shipService = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol;
		}
		var LTLFlag = false;
		if (shipService.includes("_LTL.") || shipService.includes("_UPSFREIGHT")){
			LTLFlag = true;
		}
		if(LTLFlag)
		{
		    if((shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].MiscReference20 != undefined && shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].MiscReference20 != null && shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].MiscReference20 != "")
		        &&(shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].ParentContainerCode == null || shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].ParentContainerCode == "") ){
                    shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].ParentContainerCode ="P" + shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].MiscReference20 + "-" + packageIndex;
		    }
		var dims = "0x0x0";
		
		var lastPackage = shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1];

		var length =0;
        var width = 0;
        var height =0;
	    if(lastPackage.Dimensions!=undefined){
			if(lastPackage.Dimensions.Length!= undefined && lastPackage.Dimensions.Width!=undefined && lastPackage.Dimensions.Height!=undefined){
				length =lastPackage.Dimensions.Length;
				width = lastPackage.Dimensions.Width;
				height =lastPackage.Dimensions.Height;
			} 	
		}

        const dimArr=[length,width,height];
        
        //To sort dimensions in descending order.
        dimArr.sort(function(a, b){return b-a});
		dims = dimArr[0]+"x"+dimArr[1]+"x"+dimArr[2];
		if(dims!="0x0x0"){
			const   dimtblx ="34,48,52,12,14,18,18,28,37".split(",");  
            const   dimtbly ="32,40,36,52,44,32,52,44,37".split(","); 
			for (let i = 0; i < dimtblx.length; i++){
				var   x = dimtblx[i];
                var   y = dimtbly[i];
				if (i < 3)
                {
                    
                    if (dimArr[0] == x && dimArr[1] == y )
                        break;
                    if (dimArr[0] == x && dimArr[1] == y )
                    {                           
                        dims= x + "x" + y + "x" + dimArr[1];                    
                        break;
                    }
                    if (dimArr[1] == x && dimArr[2] == y )
                    {
                    dims = x + "x" + y + "x" + dimArr[0];           
                    break;
                    }
                }
				else{                  
                     
                    if (dimArr[0] == y && dimArr[1] == x )
                    {
                        dims = x + "x" + y + "x" + dimArr[2];                    
                        break;
                    }
                    if (dimArr[0] == y && dimArr[2] == x )
                    {
                       dims = x + "x" + y + "x" + dimArr[1];
                    
                       break;
                    }
                    if (dimArr[1] == y && dimArr[2] == x )
                    {
                    dims = x + "x" + y + "x" + dimArr[0];                
                    break;
                    }
                }
			}
			if(lastPackage.BolComment == null)
			   lastPackage.BolComment = ""; 
			
			shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex-1].BolComment = lastPackage.BolComment+" "+dims;
			
		}
		//debugger;
		shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].Description = "DIESEL ENGINE PARTS NMFC # 133300, SUB 4, Class 60 L"+packageIndex; // + " L" + packageIndex-1;
		
		if(shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].WaybillBolNumber == null || shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].WaybillBolNumber == "" ){
			shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].WaybillBolNumber = shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex-1].MiscReference20;
		}
		}
	
	//setRef1Focus script start
	$("#referenceTab").children()[0].click();
	$('div[property = "MiscReference1"]').children().ready(function () {
	     $('div[property = "MiscReference1"]').children().focus();
	});
	//setRef1Focus script end
	 
}

// this.NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
   this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
       var shipment = new Shipment(shipmentRequest);  
       shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference = shipment.UserEmail;
   }

// this.AddPackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns void
   this.AddPackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
       shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].ShipperReference = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference; 
   }

// this.PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns void
   this.PreShip = function(shipmentRequest, userParams){
        if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress){
            var selection = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Code;
            if(selection && selection !== "---------------------"){
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling = true;
            }else{
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling = false;
            }
        }
        if(typeof shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ReturnDeliveryMethod != "undefined")shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnDelivery = true;
        
    }

// GetEmail() // returns string
   GetEmail(){
      var emailText = "";
      var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a"); 
      Array.from(tags).forEach(function(tag){
         if(tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!","").trim(); 
      });
      return emailText;
   }

// GetCustom(fieldName, customDataType) // returns string
   GetCustom(fieldName, customDataType) {
      var returnValue = "";
      var customData = null;
      if (customDataType === "User") customData = this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
      if (customDataType === "To") customData = this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.CustomData;

      if (customData) {
         customData.forEach(function (customField) {
            if (fieldName === customField.Key) returnValue = customField.Value;
         })
      }
      return returnValue;
   }

this.PostLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest) {

            var $terms = $('[ng-model="nameaddress.Address1"]');
            var loaded = $terms.length;
            if (loaded) {
                var button = document.querySelector('button.btn.btn-xs.btn-default.glyphicon.glyphicon-check[ng-click="validate(nameaddress)"]');
                button.click();
                                clearInterval(interval);
            }
            
        },50);
    }

// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
this.PageLoaded = function(location) {  
		if (location == "/shipping")
        {
			var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            const $shipping = $('form[name="shippingForm"]');

            if ($shipping.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);

                $('input[ng-model="vm.loadValue"]').attr('placeholder','Enter the Delivery Num');
				var divshipper = $('div[property="Shipper"]');
            if (divshipper.length > 0) {
				var div1 = $('div[class="col-sm-8 no-left-right-padding"]');
				let selectship = $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Shipper"]');
                let select = selectship.eq(0);
		        let options = select.find('option');//.eq(0);
                for(var ind=0;ind < options.length; ind++){
					let option = options.eq(ind);
					let opt = option.eq(0).val(); 
				//	debugger;	
					if (opt.includes("string:KARTDRATE")){
					option.hide();				
		}
				}
			}
				
            }
			}, 50);
		}
	}

// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
  this.PageLoaded = function (location)
  {
    if (location == '/shipping')
    {
      $('div.row.top-tool-bar:first').find('.pull-left:first').append($('<button>').attr('id', 'btnValidateAddress').addClass('btn btn-xs btn-primary').text('Validate Address'));

      $('#btnValidateAddress').on('click', (e) =>
      {
        console.log('GetNewGuid()', TOOLS.GetNewGuid());
        console.log('GetRandomNumber(13)', TOOLS.GetRandomNumber(13));
        console.log('GetRandomAlphaString(21)', TOOLS.GetRandomAlphaString(21));
        console.log('GetRandomAlphaNumericString(32)', TOOLS.GetRandomAlphaNumericString(32));
        console.log('GetRandomStringWithSpecialCharacters(48)', TOOLS.GetRandomStringWithSpecialCharacters(48));

        TOOLS.WaitForElement('[ng-model="vm.loadValue"]:first', 'FOCUSED', true).then((result) => console.log(result));

        AJAX.MakeAsyncUserMethodRequest({ "MethodName": "ValidateAddress", "MethodData": JSON.stringify(VALIDATE.Address()) }).then((result) =>
        {
          result.length === 1 ? $('#btnValidateAddress').addClass('btn-success') : null;
        });
      });
    }
  }

// Source: KeithCo (KC)_Augusta National CBR (sna6dxb)_2459.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
  this.PageLoaded = function (location) 
  {
    $('.localeSelect').animate({ marginRight: "+=20px" });

    if (location == '/shipping')
    {
      $('#divAugustaOverlay').show();
      $('[data-toggle="tooltip"]').tooltip();

      /* Make sure the input elements don't show previous entries. */
      $('input[required]').attr('autocomplete', 'off');

      /* Remove all but the Shipping option from the dropdown. */
      /* The other dropdowns are removed via the user profile. */
      $('.nav.navbar-nav:first ul.dropdown-menu').find('li:gt(0)').remove();

      /* Remove the logoff link. */
      $('#btnLogOff').remove();

      $('body').delegate('input[required]', 'keydown', (e) =>
      {
        $('input[required]').each((i, v) => 
        {
          $(v).val().length === 0 ? $(v).addClass('required-invalid') : $(v).removeClass('required-invalid');
        });

        $('input[required]').not('.requred-invalid').length === 0 ? $('.btn-augusta').removeAttr('required') : undefined;
      });
    }
  }

// Source: Kraft Heinz Foods Company  (KraftHeinz)_KraftHeinz_Business_Rules_92.cs
// ClientBusinessRules() // returns object containing business-rule handlers and helper classes
function ClientBusinessRules() {

    this.PreShip = function (shipmentRequest, userParams) {
    }

    this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        var shipment = new Shipment(shipmentRequest);
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference1 = shipment.UserRef1;
    }

    this.AddPackage = function (shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
    }

    this.PostSelectAddressBook = function (shipmentRequest, nameaddress) {
    }



    class Shipment {
        constructor(shipmentRequest) {
            this.ShipmentRequest = shipmentRequest;
        }
        
        get UserEmail() { return this.GetEmail(); }
        
        get Attn() { return this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.Contact; }
        
        get UserRef1() { return this.GetCustom("Custom1", "User"); }
        get UserRef2() { return this.GetCustom("Custom2", "User"); }
        get UserRef3() { return this.GetCustom("Custom3", "User"); }
        get UserRef4() { return this.GetCustom("Custom4", "User"); }
        get UserRef5() { return this.GetCustom("Custom5", "User"); }
        get UserRef6() { return this.GetCustom("Custom6", "User"); }
        get UserRef7() { return this.GetCustom("Custom7", "User"); }
        get UserRef8() { return this.GetCustom("Custom8", "User"); }
        get UserRef9() { return this.GetCustom("Custom9", "User"); }
        get UserRef10() { return this.GetCustom("Custom10", "User"); }

        get ToRef1() { return this.GetCustom("Custom1", "To"); }
        get ToRef2() { return this.GetCustom("Custom2", "To"); }
        get ToRef3() { return this.GetCustom("Custom3", "To"); }
        get ToRef4() { return this.GetCustom("Custom4", "To"); }
        get ToRef5() { return this.GetCustom("Custom5", "To"); }
        get ToRef6() { return this.GetCustom("Custom6", "To"); }
        get ToRef7() { return this.GetCustom("Custom7", "To"); }
        get ToRef8() { return this.GetCustom("Custom8", "To"); }
        get ToRef9() { return this.GetCustom("Custom9", "To"); }
        get ToRef10() { return this.GetCustom("Custom10", "To"); }

        get PkgRef1() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference; }
        get PkgRef2() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference; }

        get PkgMisc1() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference1; }
        get PkgMisc2() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference2; }
        get PkgMisc3() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference3; }
        get PkgMisc4() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference4; }
        get PkgMisc5() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference5; }
        get PkgMisc6() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference6; }
        get PkgMisc7() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference7; }
        get PkgMisc8() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference8; }
        get PkgMisc9() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference9; }
        get PkgMisc10() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference10; }

        get PkgMisc11() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference11; }
        get PkgMisc12() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference12; }
        get PkgMisc13() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference13; }
        get PkgMisc14() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference14; }
        get PkgMisc15() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference15; }
        get PkgMisc16() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference16; }
        get PkgMisc17() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference17; }
        get PkgMisc18() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference18; }
        get PkgMisc19() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference19; }
        get PkgMisc20() { return this.ShipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference20; }

        GetEmail() {
            var emailText = "";
            var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a");
            Array.from(tags).forEach(function (tag) {
                if (tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!", "").trim();
            });
            return emailText;
        }



        GetCustom(fieldName, customDataType) {
            var returnValue = "";
            var customData = null;
            if (customDataType === "User") customData = this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
            if (customDataType === "To") customData = this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.CustomData;

            if (customData) {
                customData.forEach(function (customField) {
                    if (fieldName === customField.Key) returnValue = customField.Value;
                })
            }
            return returnValue;
        }
        // End Shipment Class
    }

    class ViewModel {
        constructor(viewModel) {
            this.VM = viewModel;
        }

        IsValid(referenceField, referenceValue) {
            var isValid = false;
            if (this.VM.fieldOptions[referenceField]) {
                var options = this.VM.fieldOptions[referenceField].FieldOptionValidations
                options.forEach(function (option) {
                    if (option.Value.trim() === referenceValue.trim()) isValid = true;
                });
            }

            if (referenceValue.length === 0 || !referenceValue.trim()) isValid = false;
            return isValid;
        }

        // End ViewModel Class
    }

    // End ClientBusinessRules
}

        let goods = [{"UnitValue":{"Currency":"USD","Amount":"3450.25"},"UnitWeight":{"Units":"LB","Amount":"72"},"QuantityUnitMeasure":"EA","ExportQuantityUnitMeasure1":"PC","ExportQuantityUnitMeasure2":"PC","LicenseUnitValue":{"Currency":"USD"},"DdtcUnitMeasure":"PC","Quantity":"1","Description":"Rossignol SKY 7 HD Skis/Konect Binding KIT","Origin":{},"LicenseExpirationDate":null,"NaftaRvcAvgStartDate":null,"nAFTARVCAvgEndDate":null,"ProductCode":"CP213","packageIndex":0},{"UnitValue":{"Currency":"USD","Amount":"1499.90"},"UnitWeight":{"Units":"LB","Amount":"12"},"QuantityUnitMeasure":"EA","ExportQuantityUnitMeasure1":"PC","ExportQuantityUnitMeasure2":"PC","LicenseUnitValue":{"Currency":"USD"},"DdtcUnitMeasure":"PC","Quantity":"3","Description":"Ride Twinpig Snowboard 2023","Origin":{},"ProductCode":"PNTZ00262","packageIndex":0},{"UnitValue":{"Currency":"USD","Amount":"49.99"},"UnitWeight":{"Units":"LB","Amount":"3"},"QuantityUnitMeasure":"EA","ExportQuantityUnitMeasure1":"PC","ExportQuantityUnitMeasure2":"PC","LicenseUnitValue":{"Currency":"USD"},"DdtcUnitMeasure":"PC","Quantity":"4","Description":"Booster Straps","Origin":{},"ProductCode":"33197","packageIndex":0}];

// AddPackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns void
this.AddPackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
    toggleRateShopping(packageIndex);
  }

  }

// PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns void
this.PostLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest)
  {
    //debugger;
    loadValue = loadValue.replace('!!', '');

    if (typeof shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5 !== 'undefined' && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5 !== null && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5.length > 2)
    {
      alertMessage('danger', shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5);
    }

    this.vm.getWeight();
    //$("#overrideRateShopping_Y").prop("checked", true);

    // Warn user if expedited service selected and PO box is checked
    const expServices = "UPS.NDA,UPS.2AM,UPS.2DA,UPS.EXP,USPS.PRIORITY,USPS.EXPR".split(',');

    let hasExpedited = expServices.some(service => shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol.includes(service));
    if (hasExpedited && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.PoBox)
    {
      alertMessage('warning', "Order " + loadValue + " has an Expedited service selected but a PO box was used. Contact Customer Service for a new address.")
    }

    // if Int'l shipment, show Assign Commodities button, hide Add Package button group, and init AssignGoods
    //sna6dxb - 09-23-2022
    //don't need this any longer, the button is hidden by default in the template
    //$('#btnAssignCommodities').hide();
    if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country !== "US")
    {
      $('#btnAssignCommodities').show();
      $('button[title="Add Package"]').parent().hide();
      const Goods = new AssignGoods(this.vm);
    }
    else {
        // ensure Assign Commodities button is hidden in case they load an Int'l order by mistake, then load domestic
        $('#btnAssignCommodities').hide();
        $('button[title="Add Package"]').parent().show();
    }
  }

// PostShip(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) // returns void
this.PostShip = function(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse)
  {
    if (typeof shipmentResponse.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5 !== 'undefined' && shipmentResponse.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5 !== null && shipmentResponse.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5.length > 2)
    {
      alertMessage('danger', shipmentResponse.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5);
    }
  }

// GetViewModelFromTemplate(viewModel) // returns void

  {
    vm = viewModel;
  }

    $("#load-modal").hide();

// ShowAssignGoodsPane() // returns void
ShowAssignGoodsPane()
  {
    let that = this;
    //get rid of any previous entries
    $('#listItemContainer li:gt(0)').remove();

    //change the column width to make the descriptions longer
    //change this back when the user clicks the 'Apply' button
    $('div.ui-tab-container').toggleClass('col-md-8 col-md-6').siblings('div').toggleClass('col-md-4 col-md-6')

    //set a reference to the packages object as well as the commodities objects
    this.packages = this.viewModel.currentShipment.Packages;

    //get all the commodities in the shipment from all packages
    this.goods = $(this.packages).map(function(x, y)
    {
      return y.CommodityContents;
    });

    //loop the goods array and update the markup within the slideout panel
    $(this.goods).each(function(a, b)
    {
      //debugger;
      let k = 'e' + (Math.random() + 1).toString(36).substring(2);
      b.GoodsKey = k;

      if (b.packageIndex === undefined) {
        // initial index is undefined after loading order, default to fix NaN bug later
        b.packageIndex = 0;
      }
      //copy the source element
      let item = $('#liClone').clone(true).attr({ 'hash-key': b.$$hashKey, 'goods-key': b.GoodsKey, 'pkg-index': b.packageIndex }).removeAttr('id');

      //the customer is sending amounts that have sometimes 10 digits after the decimal point which is throwing exceptions when trying
      //to parseFloat so this is the simplest way to get around that.
      let cost = Math.round(b.UnitValue.Amount * 100) / 100;

      $(item).find('.goods-description').text(b.Description);
      $(item).find('.goods-quantity').html('(<strong>' + b.Quantity + '</strong>');
      $(item).find('.goods-unit-of-measure').text(b.QuantityUnitMeasure + ', ');
      $(item).find('.goods-declared-value').html('<strong>$' + cost + '</strong> ' + b.UnitValue.Currency + ')');
      $(item).find('.pkg-index-text').text(+(b.packageIndex) + 1);
      $(item).find('.header-logo').show();

      //append it to our list
      $('#divAssignCommodities ul.list-group').append(item);

      //show it gracefully
      $(item).show();

    });

    //create a working array object so we can manipulate the data non-destructively
    this.working = $.makeArray(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(this.goods)));

    $('#divAssignCommodities').show().animate({ left: 0 }, 400);
    $('.assign-to-pkg:visible').first().focus();
  }

// HideAssignGoodsPane() // returns void
HideAssignGoodsPane()
  {
    // restore the shipping panel sizes first, doing this last sometimes caused a scope issue and left pane wasn't getting resized
    $('div.ui-tab-container').toggleClass('col-md-8 col-md-6').siblings('div').toggleClass('col-md-4 col-md-6');
    let u = $('#divAssignCommodities').outerWidth() + 100;
    //$('#divAssignCommodities').find('[data-toggle="tooltip"]').tooltip('destroy');
    $('#divAssignCommodities').animate({ left: -u }, 400, function() { $(this).hide(); });
  }

// UpdateGoodsObject(pkgCount, listItem) // returns void
UpdateGoodsObject(pkgCount, listItem)
  {
    const itemkey = $(listItem).attr('hash-key');
    const goodkey = $(listItem).attr('goods-key');
    const findex = +$(listItem).attr('pkg-index');

    let val = $(listItem).find('.goods-declared-value');
    let cost = $(val).find('strong').text().replace('$', '');

    cost = (cost / pkgCount).toFixed(2);

    //get the object that matches the hash-key from the working array
    //this will be the template to use when creating new packages after a split operation
    //working on a copy of the vm commodity object so we can abandon changes if needed
    let src = $.grep(this.working, function(value, i) { return value.$$hashKey == itemkey; })[0];

    //update the declared value for the first package
    src.UnitValue.Amount = cost;

    for (let y = 1; y < pkgCount; y++)
    {
      let ccobj = this.GetNewCommodityObject(src);
      ccobj.packageIndex = findex + y;

      this.working.push(ccobj);

      this.UpdateScreenMarkup(ccobj, listItem);
    }
  }

// UpdateScreenMarkup(ccobj, li) // returns void
UpdateScreenMarkup(ccobj, li)
  {
    //this is all setting up the first list item to be cloned in the next function
    //hide the split button
    $(li).find('.btn-show-split-form').fadeOut();

    //show the input for number of items in this pkg
    $(li).find('.num-of-items-in-pkg').fadeIn();

    //display the header
    $(li).find('.header-logo').css('display', 'block');

    $(li).find('.goods-declared-value').html('<strong>$' + ccobj.UnitValue.Amount + '</strong> ' + 'USD' + ')');

    this.CreateListViewItem(ccobj.packageIndex, li)

    let input = $('#listItemContainer').find('.num-of-items-in-pkg');
    $(input).tooltip({ container: 'body' });

    //when done creating elements, focus on the first visible non-disabled input box
    $('#listItemContainer').find($('.num-of-items-in-pkg:visible:not(:disabled)').first().focus());

    //if there was a single item (i.e a KIT), split evenly and close
    let qty = +$(li).find('.goods-quantity strong').text();
    if (qty === 1)
    {
      let these = $('#listItemContainer').find('li[goods-key=' + $(li).attr('goods-key') + ']');
      $(these).attr('pkg-status', 'packed');
      $(these).find('.num-of-items-in-pkg').val(1).attr('disabled', 'disabled');
      $(these).find('.goods-quantity > strong').text(1);
      $(these).find('.split-pkgs-modal').hide().find('input').val([]);
      //$('#btnApplyCommodityAssignments').trigger('click');
    }
  }

// CreateListViewItem(idx, li) // returns void
CreateListViewItem(idx, li)
  {
    //the hash-key attr is the object id for the commodity in relation to the package
    //if we keep it, all packages will have the same hash-key (pkg 0)
    let item = $(li).clone(true).removeAttr('hash-key').removeAttr('id');
    $(item).attr('pkg-index', idx);

    $(item).find('.pkg-index-text').text(idx + 1);
    $(item).find('.goods-quantity').html('(<strong>0</strong>');

    let lastInList = $('#listItemContainer').find('li[goods-key="' + $(li).attr('goods-key') + '"]').last();

    //i have no idea why the opacity changes when i use .show().  first time i've ever seen that.
    //anyway, set it implicitly here so the element shows
    $(item).appendTo('#listItemContainer').insertAfter(lastInList).find('.num-of-items-in-pkg').css('opacity', '1').show();
  }

// UpdatePkgCountsInWorkingObject(li) // returns void
UpdatePkgCountsInWorkingObject(li)
  {
    let goodkey = $(li).attr('goods-key');
    let pkgindex = $(li).attr('pkg-index');
    let itemcount = $(li).find('.num-of-items-in-pkg').val();

    //find the object in this.working that has the matching pkg-index and goods-key, then update it
    let w = $.grep(this.working, function(pkg, i) { return pkg.GoodsKey == goodkey && pkg.packageIndex == pkgindex  })[0];

    w.Quantity = itemcount;
  }

// UpdateListItemPackageQuantities(li) // returns void
UpdateListItemPackageQuantities(li)
  {
    this.UpdatePkgCountsInWorkingObject(li);

    let numOfItems = $(li).find('.num-of-items-in-pkg');
    let remItems = $(li).find('.goods-quantity > strong');

    if (!$(numOfItems).val()) { return; }

    let x = (+$(remItems).text() - $(numOfItems).val());

    //sanity check to make sure we didn't pack more items that we had
    if (x < 0)
    {
      $(remItems).addClass('bad-math');
      return;
    }

    $(remItems).removeClass('bad-math');
    $(numOfItems).attr('disabled', 'disabled');
    $(li).attr('pkg-status', 'packed');

    //move to the next list item and update then focus
    $(li).next().find('.goods-quantity > strong').text(x)

    //on the second-to-last list item, use the input value to auto-set the last item
    //to get the number of rows that have already been assigned, count the list items with the goods-key
    //that have disabled input boxes
    let rowsForThisGood = $('#listItemContainer').find('li[goods-key="' + $(li).attr('goods-key') + '"]');
    let rowsDone = $(rowsForThisGood).find('input:disabled:visible').length;

    if (rowsForThisGood.length == (rowsDone + 1))
    {
      let lastLi = $('#listItemContainer').find('li[goods-key="' + $(li).attr('goods-key') + '"]').last();

      $(lastLi).attr('pkg-status', 'packed');

      let lastVal = $(li).next().find('.goods-quantity > strong').text();
      $(lastLi).find('.num-of-items-in-pkg').val(lastVal).attr('disabled', 'disabled');

      $('#listItemContainer').find('.assign-to-pkg:visible').first().focus();

      this.UpdatePkgCountsInWorkingObject(lastLi);
    }
  }

// ApplyCommodityAssignments() // returns void
ApplyCommodityAssignments()
  {
    let that = this;

    //every list item will have a pkg-index attr, get that highest value to determine how many pkgs we need
    //don't use pkg-status.length because that will include multiple commodities and the end result will be wrong
    let packed = $('#listItemContainer').find('li[pkg-status=packed]');

    //first get all the pkg-index attributes, then get the highest number and add one
    let pkgs = $(packed).map(function(x, value) { return +$(this).attr('pkg-index') }).toArray();
    let pkgCount = Math.max(...pkgs) + 1;

    while (this.packages.length < pkgCount)
    {
      //the vm.addPackage isn't firing, just click the button
      $('button[ng-click="vm.addPackage();"]').trigger('click').promise().done(function(e) { });
    }

    //loop the pkg count, get the commodities for that pkg, write the objects to the vm CommodityContents object
    for (let p = 0; p < pkgCount; p++)
    {
      let w = $.grep(this.working, function(item, i) { return item.packageIndex == p });
      this.packages[p].CommodityContents = w;
    }

    //click the General tab
    $('li[heading=General]:visible a').first().click();
    this.HideAssignGoodsPane();

    //after we are done, move back to the first package in the shipment
    while ($('#spanCurrentPackageIndex').text() !== '1')
    {
      $('button[ng-click="vm.previousPackage();"]').first().click();
    }

  }

// GetClassViewModel() // returns this.viewModel
GetClassViewModel()
  {
    //the goods data is going to come from vm.currentShipment.Packages[pkgIndex].CommodityContents as an array
    return this.viewModel
  }

// GetNewCommodityObject(obj) // returns object
GetNewCommodityObject(obj)
  {
    let c = {};

    Object.keys(obj).forEach(key =>
    {
      if (key != '$$hashKey' && key != 'packageIndex')
      {
        let value = obj[key];
        if (value) c[key] = value;
      }
    });

    return c;
  }

// CancelSplitOfPackages(li) // returns void
CancelSplitOfPackages(li)
  {
    //hide the split modal and clear the input value
    $('.escape-target').hide();
    $(li).find('.split-pkgs-modal').hide().find('input[type=number]').val([]).focus();
    $(li).find('.btn-show-split-form, .assign-to-pkg').fadeIn();
  }

// InitiateDelegates() // returns void
InitiateDelegates()
  {
    let that = this

    $('body').delegate('#btnApplyCommodityAssignments', 'click', function(e)
    {
      that.ApplyCommodityAssignments();
    });

    $('body').delegate('.btn-show-split-form', 'click', function(e)
    {
      let div = $(this).closest('div').find('.split-pkgs-modal').first();
      $(div).tooltip({ container: 'body' });

      $(div).css('display', 'flex').fadeIn();
      $('.split-pkgs-modal:visible').find('input').first().focus();

      //hide the split button now...and the input
      $(this).hide();
      $(this).closest('div').find('.assign-to-pkg').hide();
    });

    $('body').delegate('input.btn-go-split-pkgs', 'click', function(e)
    {
      console.log('btn-go-split-pkgs click event handler');

      let li = $(this).closest('li').first();
      let div = $(this).closest('div').first();

      $(li).find('.pkg-index-text').first().text('1');

      //val - 1 as the first entry will be the first package
      let v = $(div).find('input[type=number]').first().val();

      that.UpdateGoodsObject(v, li);

      $('.split-pkgs-modal').hide();
    });

    $('body').delegate('#btnCancelAssignGoods', 'click', function(e)
    {
      that.HideAssignGoodsPane();
    });

    //if the user escapes out of the split modal, hide the modal and show the previous forms
    $('body').delegate('.split-pkgs-modal', 'keydown', function(e)
    {
      var keycode = (e.keyCode ? e.keyCode : e.which);
      if (keycode === 27)
      {
        //need to show the previous input and button now
        let li = $(this).closest('li');

        that.CancelSplitOfPackages(li);
      }
    });

    //if the user presses enter or tab in the num-of-items number input, move to the next one
    //these are the number inputs after the items have been split across packages
    $('body').delegate('.num-of-items-in-pkg', 'keydown focusout', function(e)
    {
      console.log('.num-of-items-in-pkg keydown focusout event handler');

      $('[data-toggle="tooltip"]').tooltip('hide');

      var keycode = (e.keyCode ? e.keyCode : e.which);
      if (keycode === 13 || keycode === 9)
      {
        //disable the input, update the commodity object, focus on the next box input
        //$(this).closest('div').find('.assign-to-pkg').focus();
        that.UpdateListItemPackageQuantities($(this).closest('li'));
      }
    });

    //user hits enter in the input box, click the button for them
    $('body').delegate('.num-of-pkgs-to-use', 'keyup keydown', function(e)
    {
      console.log('.num-of-pkgs-to-use keyup keydown event handler');
      var keycode = (e.keyCode ? e.keyCode : e.which);
      let btn = $(this).closest('div:visible').find('input.btn-go-split-pkgs');

      $(btn).attr('disabled', $(this).val() < 2);

      if (keycode == 13) //enter
      {
        //let btn = $(this).closest('div:visible').find('input.btn-go-split-pkgs');
        $(btn).trigger('click');
      }
    });

    //this was formerly .scan-input.  as of 9/24/2022, removing the split functionality completely
    //with this change, only need to get the numerical value out of the input
    $('body').delegate('.assign-to-pkg', 'keydown focusout', function(e)
    {
      console.log('.assign-to-pkg keydown focusout event handler');
      var keycode = (e.keyCode ? e.keyCode : e.which);
      debugger;
      if (keycode == 13 || keycode == 9 || e.type == "focusout") //enter
      {
        e.preventDefault();
        //pull only the number from whatever was passed.  make sure it is greater than 0 since we can't assign a good a pkg zero.
        const val = $(this).val().replace(/[^1-9]/g, '');

        let li = $(this).closest('li');
        
        if (val)
        {
          //console.log('assigning this to ', val);
          //assign the integer to the line item header (not shown, but may be shown in the future)
          //this one is easy, just assign the pkg-index attr to whatever they scanned.  when the apply button is clicked it will assign the commodities
          //let li = $(this).closest('li');
          $(li).find('.pkg-index-text').first().text(val);
          $(li).find('button').attr('disabled', 'disabled');
          $(li).attr('pkg-index', val - 1);
          $(li).attr('pkg-status', 'packed');

          //find the matching item in the this.working array and update the package index
          let item = $.grep(that.working, function(good, i) { return good.$$hashKey == $(li).attr('hash-key') })[0];
          item.packageIndex = val - 1;
          //return;
        }
        // set focus to next li input box
        if (e.type !== "focusout") {
          $(li).next().find('.assign-to-pkg').focus().change();
        }
      }
    });

    $('#btnAssignCommodities').on('click', function(e)
    {
      if ($('#divAssignCommodities').is(':visible')) return;
      that.ShowAssignGoodsPane();
    });
  }

// function PostSelectAddressBook(shipmentRequest, nameaddress) // returns void

        if(nameaddress.Code == "A1 - Ship to Buffalo" || nameaddress.Code == "A2 - Ship to Baltimore" || nameaddress.Code == "A3 - Ship to Harrisburg" || nameaddress.Code == "A4 - Millsboro Doc Image")
        {

// function GetCustom(fieldName, customDataType, shipmentRequest) // returns string
this.GetCustom = function(fieldName, customDataType, shipmentRequest) {
    var returnValue = "";
    var customData = null;
    if (customDataType === "User") {
        if (shipmentRequest &&
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults &&
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress &&
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData)
            customData = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
    }

    if (customData) {
        customData.forEach(function(customField) {
            if (fieldName === customField.Key) returnValue = customField.Value;
        });
    }
    return returnValue;

};

// function getUserName() // returns string
function getUserName() {
    var helloUser = $('a[title="Manage"]:contains("Hello")').text();
    return helloUser.match(/[a-zA-Z]+[a-zA-Z0-9._]+@[a-zA-Z]+\.[a-zA-Z.]{2,5}/i)[0];
}

// function historyReady() // returns void
function historyReady() {
    $('body').delegate('#CostCenterReport', 'click', function () {
        getCostCenterReport(this);
    });
}

// function getCostCenterReport(element) // returns jQuery promise from $.post
function getCostCenterReport(element) {
    debugger;
    var shipExecServiceUrl = clientService.config.ShipExecServiceUrl;
    var authorizationToken = clientService.authorizationToken();
    var context = client.userContext;
    var costcenter = $(element).attr('data-costcenter');
    if (costcenter) {
        var searchCriteria = { DateStart: $('input[ng-model="vm.dtstart"]').val(), DateEnd: $('input[ng-model="vm.dtend"]').val(), CostCenter: costcenter };
        var data = { Action: element.id, Content: JSON.stringify(searchCriteria) };
       return $.post({ url:shipExecServiceUrl +'/UserMethod',
              data: {UserContext: userContext, Data:JSON.stringify(data)}, headers: authorizationToken},
            function (response, status, xhr) {
                downloadFile(costcenter, response["Data"]);
            }
        ).done(function () {
        });
    }
}

// function downloadFile(exportFileName, encodedString) // returns void
function downloadFile(exportFileName, encodedString) {
    var decodedResult = atob(encodedString); // decode a base-64 encoded string
    var csvFile = new Blob([decodedResult], { type: "text/csv" });

    var ie = navigator.userAgent.match(/MSIE\s([\d.]+)/),
        ie11 = navigator.userAgent.match(/Trident\/7.0/) && navigator.userAgent.match(/rv:11/),
        ieEdge = navigator.userAgent.match(/Edge/g),
        ieVer = (ie ? ie[1] : (ie11 ? 11 : (ieEdge ? 12 : -1)));

    exportFileName = exportFileName + '.csv';

    if (ieVer > -1) {
        window.navigator.msSaveBlob(csvFile, exportFileName);

    } else {
        var downloadLink = document.createElement("a");
        downloadLink.download = exportFileName;
        downloadLink.href = window.URL.createObjectURL(csvFile);
        downloadLink.style.display = "none";
        document.body.appendChild(downloadLink);
        downloadLink.click();
        document.body.removeChild(downloadLink);
    }
}

// function getUserContext() // returns void
    function getUserContext() {
    if (userContext == undefined) {
        $.get({ url: "api/usercontext/GET", async: false })
            .done(function (data) {
                userContext = data;
            })
    }
}

// function appendCSS() // returns void
function appendCSS() {
    var style = document.createElement('style');
    style.innerHTML = 'input:focus, textarea:focus, select:focus{background-color: #ffffcc;}';
    document.head.appendChild(style);
}

// function dismissDialog() // returns void
function dismissDialog() {
    $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function (e) {
        $('div.alert-danger:visible').hide();
    })
}

// SetAltairDCShipper(Shipper) // returns undefined
     function SetAltairDCShipper(Shipper)
    	{
    	     var UserContextmethod,GetClientProfilemethod,authorizationToken,getCompanyId,methodParams,getCustomData,options;
                 UserContextmethod = 'api/usercontext/GET';
                 GetClientProfilemethod='api/ShippingService/GetClientProfile';
                 authorizationToken = clientService.authorizationToken();
                 getCompanyId = $.get({url: clientService.config.ApiUrl + '/' + UserContextmethod, headers: authorizationToken, async: false}).responseJSON;
                 userContextDetails=getCompanyId;
                 methodParams = {"CompanyId":getCompanyId.CompanyId};
                 getCustomData =  $.post({url: clientService.config.ApiUrl + '/' + GetClientProfilemethod, data: methodParams, async: false, headers: authorizationToken }).responseJSON;
                 AllShipperList=getCustomData.Profile.Shippers;
                 Altair_Address = getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[0].CustomData[0].Value;
                
                var loadedShipperValue = $('select[ng-change="vm.shipperChange()"]').text();
    
                        if(AltairDCAddress.toUpperCase() != Shipper.toUpperCase())
                	    {
                	         $("select#IdAltairDCAddress option[value='ShipperAddress']").prop('selected',true);
                             $("select#IdAltairDCAddress option[value='AltairDCAddress']").prop('selected',false);
                	      for (var k = 0; k < getCustomData.Profile.Shippers.length; k++)
                                {
                                   if( getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Name.toUpperCase() == loadedShipperValue.toUpperCase()) 
                                    {
                                        
                                       $('input[ng-model="nameaddress.Address1"]:eq(0)').val(getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Address1);
                                        vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Address1=getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Address1;
                                    	$('input[ng-model="nameaddress.Address2"]:eq(0)').val(getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Address2);
                                    	vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Address2=getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Address2;
                                    	$('input[ng-model="nameaddress.Address3"]:eq(0)').val(getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Address3);
                                    	vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Address3=getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Address3;
                                    	$('input[ng-model="nameaddress.Contact"]:eq(0)').val(getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Contact);
                                    	vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Contact=getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Contact;
                                        $('input[ng-model="nameaddress.StateProvince"]:eq(0)').val(getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].StateProvince);
                                        vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.StateProvince=getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].StateProvince;
                                    	$('input[ng-model="nameaddress.PostalCode"]:eq(0)').val(getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].PostalCode);
                                    	 vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.PostalCode=getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].PostalCode;
                                    	$('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]:eq(0)').val("string:"+getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Country);
                                    	 vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country=getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Country;
                                    	$('input[ng-model="nameaddress.Email"]:eq(0)').val(getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Email);
                                    	 vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Email=getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Email;
                                    	$('input[ng-model="nameaddress.Company"]:eq(0)').val(getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Company);
                                    	vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Company=getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Company;
                                    	$('input[ng-model="nameaddress.City"]:eq(0)').val(getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].City);
                                    	vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.City=getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].City;
                                        $('input[ng-model="nameaddress.Phone"]:eq(0)').val(getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Phone);
                                        vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Phone=getCustomData.Profile.Shippers[k].Phone;
                                       
                                     }
                                }
                	    }
                	    else 
                	     {
                	            $("select#IdAltairDCAddress option[value='ShipperAddress']").prop('selected',false);
                                $("select#IdAltairDCAddress option[value='AltairDCAddress']").prop('selected',true);
                	            $('input[ng-model="nameaddress.Contact"]:eq(0)').val(Altair_Address.split(',')[0]);
