this.PageLoaded = function (location) {
    if (location === '/shipping') {
        this.Shipping();
    }
    }

// Shipping() // returns undefined
this.Shipping = function() {
    updateDryIceRegulationSet();
    function updateDryIceRegulationSet() {
        debugger;
        $('body').delegate('[ng-model="vm.hazmatdryIceBtn"]', 'click', function() {
            var interval = setInterval(function () {
                var $dryIceRegulationSet = $('[ng-model="vm.dryIceInfo.DryIceRegulationSet"]');
                if ($dryIceRegulationSet.length) {
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    $dryIceRegulationSet.find('option[label="Regulations Not Specified"]').remove();
                }
            }, 50);
        });
    }
};

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        //debugger;
        this.vm.NotificationAddressEmail = this.AddEmailToNotification;

        originCustomData = getCustomData(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress);
        if (originCustomData.length) {
            shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference = getKeyValue('Custom3', originCustomData);
            shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.Contact;
            shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference1 = getKeyValue('Custom2', originCustomData);
        }

        $('body').delegate('div[ng-if="vm.rateResults.length > 0"] tr td a', 'click', serviceUpgrade);

        //shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipNotificationEmail = true;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipNotificationAddressEmail = getUserName();
        if(getUserName() == 'SRPBulletin@mskcc.org' || this.vm.profile.Name == 'FIFTYTHIRDSTREET_Profile'){
            shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DeliveryExceptionNotificationEmail = true;
            shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail = getUserName();
            shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DeliveryNotificationEmail = true;
            shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail = getUserName();
        }

        var interval = setInterval(function() {
            var shipperReference = $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ShipperReference"]')
            var miscReference3 = $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference3"]')

            var loaded = shipperReference.length && miscReference3.length;
            if (loaded){
                clearInterval(interval);
                if (getKeyValue('custom5', originCustomData) == 1) {
                    // disable shipper reference on general and reference tab
                    $('div[property="ShipperReference"] input').prop('disabled', true);
                }
            }
        }, 50);
    }

// AddEmailToNotification(event) // returns undefined
this.AddEmailToNotification = function(event) {
        var currentTarget = event.currentTarget;
        var ngModelName = currentTarget.attributes['ng-model'].nodeValue.split('.').pop();
        var emailAddress = getShipmentEmailAddresses(this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults);
        var pkg = this.currentShipment.Packages[0];

        if (ngModelName.indexOf('DeliveryException') >= 0){
            SetDeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, ngModelName, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        } else if (ngModelName.indexOf('Delivery') >= 0) {
            SetDeliveryNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, ngModelName, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        } else {
            SetShipNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, ngModelName, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        }
    }

// Source: Meta Platforms (API Shipping) (METAPLATFORMSAPISHIPPING)_Meta Thin Client Profile CBR_1868.cs
// this.PageLoaded(location) // returns void
this.PageLoaded = function(location) {
        vm = this.vm;
        if (location == '/') {
            document.location = '#!/shipping';
        }

        if (window.location.hash == "#!/shipping") {
            var checkExist = setInterval(function() {
                if (window.jQuery) {
                    /* Stop the timer. */
                    clearInterval(checkExist);
                    $('button[ng-click="vm.showPendingShipmentModal()"]').click();
                }
            }, 50);

            var evaluateServices = setInterval(function() {
                $('body').delegate('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]:eq(0)', 'change', function(e) {
                    console.log("Listening!");
                    clearInterval(evaluateServices);
                });
            }, 50);
        }
    };

// this.PostRate(shipmentRequest, rateResults) // returns void
this.PostRate = function(shipmentRequest, rateResults) 
    {   
        const dateToday = new Date();

        var selectedDeliverDate = this.vm.deliverDate;

        LogRateInformationToConsole(shipmentRequest, rateResults);
        if (!shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service) 
        {
            ApplyRulesWithoutServiceRequested(shipmentRequest,rateResults,dateToday);
        }
        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service) 
        {
            ApplyRulesWithServiceRequested(shipmentRequest,rateResults,dateToday);
        }
        if (rateResults)        
        {
            var ratedServiceArrivalDateString = GetArriveDate(rateResults[0].PackageDefaults.ArriveDate);
            var ratedServiceArrivalAsDate = stringToDate(ratedServiceArrivalDateString, dateFormat, "-");    
            var expectedDeliveryDate = stringToDate(shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference5, dateFormat, "-");
            if (expectedDeliveryDate <= ratedServiceArrivalAsDate)
            {
                $('input[ng-model="vm.deliverDate.value"]').val(formatDate(ratedServiceArrivalAsDate)).change();   
            }
        }
    };

// this.NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) 
    {            
        //Services configured in Pending Shipments Profile Field Options
        var backup2DADomesticService = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference17; //UPSAPI.UPS.2DA        
        var backupNDADomesticService = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference18; //UPSAPI.UPS.NDA        
        var backupExpeditedIntlService = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference19; //UPSAPI.UPS.EXPEDITED        
        var backupExpressIntlService = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference20; //UPSAPI.UPS.EXPRESS         

        $('body').on('click', 'table[aria-describedby="Pending Shipments"] input[type="button"]', this.vm, 
        function(e) 
        {
            $('input[ng-model="vm.deliverDate.value"]').val(e.data.currentShipment.Packages[0].MiscReference5).change();
            if (e.data.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Service) 
            {
                $('input[type=text][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference8"]').val(e.data.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol).change();
                $('input[type=text][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference17"]').val(backup2DADomesticService).change();
                $('input[type=text][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference18"]').val(backupNDADomesticService).change();
                $('input[type=text][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference19"]').val(backupExpeditedIntlService).change();
                $('input[type=text][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').val(backupExpressIntlService).change();
            }
        });
    };

// Source: Meta Platforms Facebook (METAPLATFORMSFACEBOOK)_Meta Return Client Rules Phase 2_1857.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
this.PageLoaded = function (location) {
        client.hideMenu();
        client.hideHyperlink();
        if (location == '/') document.location = '#!/shipping';
        else if (location == '/shipping') this.Shipping();
    }

// Shipping() // returns void
this.Shipping = function () {
        this.vm.isMobile = isMobile;
        this.vm.metaBase64 = client.meta.imageBase64;
        this.vm.confirmationMessage = 'We have received your request and will ship boxes out to you soon.  Please check your personal email for shipping confirmation.'
        this.vm.clearNameAddress = clearNameAddress;
        //update fieldoption stateprovince validationdropdown for custom list
        this.vm.profile.FieldOptions['Consignee.StateProvince'].ValidationType = 5;
        this.vm.updateConsigneeStateProvince = updateConsigneeStateProvince;
        this.vm.focusNext = focusNext;
        this.vm.onChangeAssetType = onChangeAssetType;        
        this.vm.addReturnItem = addReturnItem;        
        this.vm.clickedPage = clickedPage;
        this.vm.buildPage = buildPage;
        this.vm.removeReturnItem = removeReturnItem;
        this.vm.returnInstructions = [
            'Please use the below drop-down menu to select the return package and input Meta Asset Tag number or Device Serial Number. For Prototype device, please select the best fit dimension package.',
            'Please only pack one item per package.'
        ]

        function isMobile () {
            var regex_mobile = new RegExp(/Android|BlackBerry|iPhone|iPad|iPod|Opera Mini|IEMobile/, 'i');
            var userAgent = window.navigator.userAgent;
            return regex_mobile.test(userAgent)
        };  

        function buildPage () {
            this.dataWithPagination = [];
            var start = (this.pagination.currentPage-1)*this.pagination.itemsPerPage;
            var end = start + this.pagination.itemsPerPage;
            for (var i = start; i < end; i++) {
                var item = this.dataArray[i];
                if (item != undefined) {
                    this.dataWithPagination.push(item);
                }
            }            
        }

        function clickedPage(e) {
            if (e.target.classList.contains('active')) return;
            this.pagination.currentPage = parseInt(e.target.innerText);
            this.buildPage();
        }        

        function removeReturnItem(index){
            this.dataWithPagination.splice(index, 1);

            var pageIndex = this.pagination.currentPage - 1;
            var pageDataArrayIndex = pageIndex*this.pagination.itemsPerPage;
            this.dataArray.splice(pageDataArrayIndex + index, 1);

            if (this.dataWithPagination.length == 0) {
                this.pagination.currentPage = pageIndex;
            }

            this.pagination.numberOfItems = this.dataArray.length;
            this.pagination.numberOfPages = Math.ceil(this.pagination.numberOfItems/this.pagination.itemsPerPage);
            this.buildPage();            
        }

        function addReturnItem () {            
            var item = {
                AssetType: this.selectedAssetType, 
                BoxSize: this.selectedBoxSize, 
                AssetTagOrSerialNumber: this.assetTagOrSerialNumber
            }
            if (!isComplete(item)) return;
            this.dataArray.push(item);
            this.pagination.numberOfItems = this.dataArray.length;

            var pageCount = Math.ceil(this.pagination.numberOfItems/this.pagination.itemsPerPage);
            if (this.pagination.numberOfPages != pageCount) {
                this.pagination.numberOfPages = pageCount;
                this.pagination.currentPage = pageCount;
                this.dataWithPagination = [];
            }
            
            if (this.dataWithPagination.length == this.pagination.itemsPerPage) {
                this.pagination.currentPage = this.pagination.numberOfPages;
                this.buildPage(); 
            } else {
                this.dataWithPagination.push(item);
            }
            this.clearSelectedReturns();
            $('[ng-model="vm.selectedAssetType"]').focus();
        }

        function focusNext () {
            var activeNgModel = document.activeElement.attributes['ng-model'].value;
            var textArray = $('[type="text"]');
            for (var i = 0; i < textArray.length - 1; i++) {
                var ngModel = textArray[i].attributes['ng-model'].value;
                if (ngModel == activeNgModel) {                    
                    textArray[i+1].focus();
                    return;
                }
            }
            $('button[name="addReturnItem"]').focus();
        }
        
        function onChangeAssetType () {
            var selectedBoxId = this.selectedAssetType.BoxSizeId;
            var boxIndex = $.map(this.boxSize, function(box, index){
                if (box.Id == selectedBoxId) { return index;}
            });
            this.selectedBoxSize = this.boxSize[boxIndex];
         
            this.assetTagOrSerialNumber = this.selectedAssetType.Code == 'LD' ? 'N/A' : '';
            this.readonlyAssetTagOrSerialNumber = this.selectedAssetType.Code == 'LD';

            var returnItem = { AssetType: this.selectedAssetType, BoxSize: this.selectedBoxSize, AssetTagOrSerialNumber: this.assetTagOrSerialNumber };
            isComplete(returnItem);
        }

        function isComplete(item) {
            var result = false;
            if (item.AssetType == '' || item.AssetType.BoxSizeId == 999)
                $('[ng-model="vm.selectedAssetType"]').focus();
            else if (item.BoxSize == '' || item.BoxSize == undefined)
                '[ng-model="vm.selectedBoxSize"]'.focus(); //wait to focus
            else if (item.AssetTagOrSerialNumber == '') {
                $('[ng-model="vm.assetTagOrSerialNumber"]').focus();
            }                
            else 
                result = true;
            return result;
        }
        
        function updateConsigneeStateProvince(country) {
            this.consigneeStateProvince = [];
            if (country == 'US') this.consigneeStateProvince = client.shipping.stateProvince.unitedStates;
            else if (country == 'CA') this.consigneeStateProvince = client.shipping.stateProvince.canada;
            this.profile.FieldOptions['Consignee.Phone'].IsRequired = country == 'CA';
        }

        function clearNameAddress(shipmentRequest, nameAddress) {
            if (nameAddress == 'Consignee') {
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee = {
                    Company: this.profile.FieldOptions['Consignee.Company'].DefaultValue,
                    Email: client.userName
                }
                shipmentRequest.Packages[this.packageIndex].MiscReference5 = '';
            }
            client.shipping.contact.focus();
        }
    }

// PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns void
this.PreShip = function (shipmentRequest, userParams) {
        var userData1 = {};
        for (var i = 0; i < this.vm.dataArray.length; i++) {
            var item = this.vm.dataArray[i];
            userData1[i + '-AssetCode'] = item.AssetType.Code;
            userData1[i + '-AssetName'] = item.AssetType.Name;
            userData1[i + '-AssetTagOrSerialNumber'] = item.AssetTagOrSerialNumber;
            userData1[i + '-BoxName'] = item.BoxSize.Name;
            userData1[i + '-Length'] = item.BoxSize.Length;
            userData1[i + '-Width'] = item.BoxSize.Width;
            userData1[i + '-Height'] = item.BoxSize.Height;
            userData1[i + '-OutboundWeight'] = item.BoxSize.OutboundWeight;
            userData1[i + '-InboundWeight'] = item.BoxSize.InboundWeight;
        }

        var isOriginSanDiego = client.meta.originSanDiego.includes(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.StateProvince);
        
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipper = isOriginSanDiego ? 'UPS_STORE_CA' : 'UPS_STORE_GA';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = { Symbol: 'PLACEHOLDER' };
        shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20 = '0';
        shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].UserData1 = JSON.stringify(userData1);
    }

// PostShip(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) // returns void
this.PostShip = function (shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) {
        if (shipmentResponse.PackageDefaults.ErrorCode == 0) {
            $('#confirmationModal').modal('show');
        }
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        client.shipping.contact.focus();
        
        this.vm.clearSelectedReturns = clearSelectedReturns;
        this.vm.pagination = {
            currentPage: 1,
            itemsPerPage: 6,
            numberOfPages: 1
        };        
        this.vm.tableheight = 40*this.vm.pagination.itemsPerPage+20;
        this.vm.dataArray = [];
        this.vm.dataWithPagination = [];
        this.vm.consigneeStateProvince = [];
        this.vm.selectedReturnItem = '';
        this.vm.returnItemQuantity = '';
        this.vm.readonlyAssetTagOrSerialNumber = false;
        this.vm.returnItems = client.meta.returnItems;
        this.vm.assetType = client.meta.assetType;
        this.vm.boxSize = client.meta.boxSize;
        this.vm.clearSelectedReturns();

        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee = {
            Company: this.vm.profile.FieldOptions['Consignee.Company'].DefaultValue,
            Email: client.userName
        }
        shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].MiscReference5 = '';

        function clearSelectedReturns() {
            this.selectedAssetType = { BoxSizeId: 999 };
            this.selectedBoxSize = '';
            this.assetTagOrSerialNumber = '';
        }
    }

// init() // returns void
init: function () {
            this.getUserName();
            
            String.prototype.focus = function () {
                if (!focus(this)) {
                    var interval = setInterval(function (selector) {
                        if (focus(selector)) clearInterval(interval)
                    }, 10, this)
                }

                function focus(selector) {
                    $(selector).focus();
                    return $(selector).length
                }
            };
        }

// hideHyperlink() // returns void
hideHyperlink: function () {
            $('a:contains("Thin Client")').removeAttr('href'); //version hyperlink
            // $('a:contains("Shipping")').removeAttr('data-toggle')
            //$('a[href="/ShipExecThinClient/"]').removeAttr('href'); //shipexec logo
            client.$hello.removeAttr('href'); //user id
        }

// hideMenu() // returns void
hideMenu: function () {
            $('a:contains("Shipping")').hide();
            $('a:contains("History")').hide();
            $('a:contains("End of Day")').hide();
            

            var separator = null;
            var menus = ['Scan Ship', 'Batch Manager', 'Create a Batch', 'Address Book', 'Distribution Lists'];
            angular.element('.dropdown-menu li').each(function() {
                var itemText = $(this).text();
                if (itemText == '') separator = $(this);
                if (menus.includes($(this).text())) {
                    $(this).hide();
                    separator.hide();
                }
            });
        }

// Source: MGMResorts (MGMRESOR)_Inbound Client Rules Import Control_2456.cs
// updateDropDownMenu() // returns void
    function updateDropDownMenu() {
        angular.element('a:contains("End of Day")').hide();
        //angular.element('a:contains("History")').hide();

        var separator = null;
        var menus = ['Scan Ship', 'Batch Manager', 'Create a Batch', 'AddressBook', 'Distribution List'];
        angular.element('.dropdown-menu li').each(function () {
            var itemText = $(this).text();
            if (itemText === '') {
                separator = $(this);
            }

            if (menus.includes($(this).text())) {
                $(this).hide();
                separator.hide();
            }
        });
    }

        generalCarrierInstructions.hide();

        internationalWorldEaseHeading.hide();

// disableConsigneeNameAddress(disabled) // returns void
    function disableConsigneeNameAddress(disabled) {
        if ($consigneeNameAddress !== undefined) {
            $consigneeNameAddress.find('input').each(function () {
                var type = $(this).attr('type');
                if (type == 'checkbox') {
				    $(this).prop('disabled', disabled);
                } else {
                    //alert($(this).prop('name'));
                    if ($(this).prop('name') !== 'phone') $(this).prop('readonly', disabled);
                }
            });
        }
		
    }

// setFocus(element) // returns void
    function setFocus(element) {
        var ng = angular.element(element);
        if (ng.length > 0) {
            ng.focus();
        }
    }

// clearAlert() // returns void
    function clearAlert() {
        var alertBox = $('div[role="alert"]');
        if (alertBox.length) {
            alertBox.find('.close').click();
        }
    }

// appendCSS() // returns void
    function appendCSS() {
        var style = document.createElement('style');
        style.innerHTML = 'input:focus, textarea:focus, select:focus{background-color: #ffffcc;}';
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    }

// dismissAlertDialog() // returns void
    function dismissAlertDialog() {
        $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function (e) {
            $('div.alert-danger:visible').hide();
        })
    }

// this.PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
    this.PageLoaded = function (location) {
        vm = this.vm;
        appendCSS();
        //getUserContext();  // not used in 2.3
        //dismissAlertDialog();

        angular.element('a:contains("Downloads")').hide();
        angular.element('#download-loading').hide();

        if (location === '/') {
            //document.location = '#!/shipping';

        } else if (location === '/shipping') {
            // debugger;
            //addStrattonWarrenMenuToShipping()
            if (!downloadMenu) {
                appendDownloadMenu();
            } else {
                angular.element('a:contains("Downloads")').show();
            }

            alertModal = angular.element('[ng-model="AlertModal"]');

            $('body').delegate('input:checkbox', 'click', singleCheckbox);
            $('body').delegate('input[ng-model="nameaddress.StateProvince"]', 'change', stateProvinceChange);
            $('body').delegate('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Packaging"]', 'change', function () {
                $('#dimensionChange').click();
            });

            // $('body').delegate('li[heading="Accessorials"] a', 'click', function () {

            //     $('[ng-click="vm.showAccessorial = \'returnsPane\'"]').click()
            // })

            var interval = setInterval(function () {
                var $consigneeNameAddress = $('name-address[address-property-name="Consignee"]');
                consigneeCompany = $consigneeNameAddress.find('[ng-model="nameaddress.Company"]');

                var $generalTab = $('general-tab');
                generalCarrierInstructions = $generalTab.find('[property="CarrierInstructions"]');
                generalDescription = $generalTab.find('[property="Description"]');
                generalDimensionLength = $generalTab.find('[name="length"]');
                generalDimensionWidth = $generalTab.find('[name="width"]');
                generalDimensionHeight = $generalTab.find('[name="height"]');

                $internationalTab = $('international-tab');
                internationalWorldEaseHeading = $internationalTab.find('h5:contains("World Ease")');


                // var loaded = consigneeCompany.length && generalCarrierInstructions.length && generalDescription.length &&
                //     generalDimensionLength.length && generalDimensionWidth.length && generalDimensionHeight.length && $accessorialsTab.length;

                var loaded = consigneeCompany.length && generalDescription.length && internationalWorldEaseHeading.length;

                if (loaded) {
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    pageLoaded = true;
                    documentReady();
                }
            }, 100);

            setFocus(consigneeCompany);
        }
    };

// function documentReady() // returns undefined
    function documentReady () {
        consigneeCompany.focus();
        generalCarrierInstructions.hide();
        generalDescription.hide();

        internationalWorldEaseHeading.hide();
        $internationalTab.find('div button').hide();
    }

// function appendDownloadMenu() // returns undefined
    function appendDownloadMenu () {
        $('body').on('click', '#sws-menu-item', function(e) {
            $('#StrattonWarrenFileDownload').click();
        })
        
        downloadMenu = true;
        var html = [
            '<li class="dropdown">',
                '<a class="dropdown-toggle" data-toggle="dropdown" href="">Downloads<span class="caret"></span></a>',
                '<ul class="dropdown-menu">',
                    '<li id="sws-menu-item"><a>Stratton Warren File</a></li>',
                    '<li role="separator" class="divider"></li>',
                    '<li id="gl-menu-item"><a href="javascript:glCodeFileDownload()">GL Code File</a></li>',
                '</ul>',
            '</li>',
            '<li id="download-loading">',
                '<img src="/Content/img/spinner-transparent.gif" class="loading-spinner" />',
                '<span class="loading-text"> Loading...</span>',
            '</li>'
        ].join("\n");

        //$('div > div.navbar.navbar-default.navbar-fixed-top > div > div.navbar-collapse.collapse > ul').append(html);
        $('div > div.navbar.navbar-default.navbar-fixed-top > div > div.navbar-collapse.collapse > div > ul').append(html);
    }

// function toggleDownloadLoading(downloading, menuOption) // returns undefined
    function toggleDownloadLoading(downloading, menuOption) {
        let menuItem = "";

        $('#download-loading').toggle();
        
        switch (menuOption) {
            case "SWS" : menuItem = "#sws-menu-item"; break;
            case "GLCODE" : menuItem = "#gl-menu-item"; break;
        }
        $(menuItem).toggleClass('disabled', downloading);
    }

// function stateProvinceChange() // returns undefined
    function stateProvinceChange() {
        var nameAddress = $(this).parents('name-address');
        vm.addressName = nameAddress.attr('address-property-name');
        $('#nameAddressChange').click();
    }

// this.DimensionChange(packaging) // returns undefined
    this.DimensionChange = function (packaging) {
        for (var i = 0; i < this.packageIndex + 1; i++) {
            this.currentShipment.Packages[i].Packaging = packaging;

            if (packaging == "LETTER") {
                this.currentShipment.Packages[i].Dimensions.Height = '';
                this.currentShipment.Packages[i].Dimensions.Length = '';
                this.currentShipment.Packages[i].Dimensions.Width = '';
            }
        }

        this.fieldOptions["Dimensions.Length"].IsRequired = packaging != "LETTER";
        this.fieldOptions["Dimensions.Width"].IsRequired = packaging != "LETTER";
        this.fieldOptions["Dimensions.Height"].IsRequired = packaging != "LETTER";

        generalDimensionLength.prop('disabled', packaging == "LETTER");
        generalDimensionWidth.prop('disabled', packaging == "LETTER");
        generalDimensionHeight.prop('disabled', packaging == "LETTER");
    };

// this.GLCodeUserMethod(e) // returns undefined
    this.GLCodeUserMethod = function (e) {
        //debugger;
        let option = "GLCODE";
        let data = { Action: option, Content: ''};
        let title = "GL Code File Download";
        let thisRef = this;

        // show loading spinner
        toggleDownloadLoading(true, option);
        
       $.post({
            url: clientService.config.ShipExecServiceUrl + '/UserMethod',
            cache: false,
            dataType: 'json',
			headers: clientService.authorizationToken(),
            data: Object.assign({ UserContext: client.userContext }, { Data: JSON.stringify(data) })
        }).done(function(response) {
            showModalDialog(thisRef, title, response, option);
        }).fail(function(error) {
            showModalDialog(thisRef, title, error.responseText, option);
        });
    }

// this.StrattonWarrenUserMethod(e) // returns undefined
    this.StrattonWarrenUserMethod = function (e) {
        // debugger;
        let option = "SWS";
        let data = { Action: option, Content: ''};
        let title = "Stratton Warren File Download";
        let thisRef = this;

        // show loading spinner
        toggleDownloadLoading(true, option);
        
        $.post({
            url: clientService.config.ShipExecServiceUrl + '/UserMethod',
            cache: false,
            dataType: 'json',
			headers: clientService.authorizationToken(),
            data: Object.assign({ UserContext: client.userContext }, { Data: JSON.stringify(data) })
        }).done(function(response) {
            showModalDialog(thisRef, title, response, option);
        }).fail(function(error) {
            showModalDialog(thisRef, title, error.responseText, option);
        });
    }

// function showModalDialog(thisRef, title, response, option) // returns undefined
    function showModalDialog(thisRef, title, response, option) {
        //debugger;
        // hide loading spinner
        toggleDownloadLoading(false, option);
        decodeReturnString(response);

        thisRef.AlertTitle = title;
        if (response.ErrorCode == 0) {
            thisRef.AlertMessage = response.Data;
        } else {
            thisRef.AlertMessage = response.ErrorMessage;
        }
        // setting dom values since ng-model isn't available
        var responseText = response.ErrorCode == 0 || !response.ErrorMessage  ? response.Data : response.ErrorMessage
        alertModal.find('h4').text(title);
        alertModal.find('p').text(responseText);
        alertModal.modal('show');
    }

// function decodeReturnString(data) // returns data or undefined
    // decode returned UserMethod data - SW 1/18/2022
    function decodeReturnString(data) {
        try {
            data.Data = $('<div />').html(data.Data).text();
            if (data.ErrorMessage) {
                data.ErrorMessage = $('<div />').html(data.ErrorMessage).text();
            }
            return data;
        }
        catch (error) {
            console.log(error);
            //console.log(data);
        }
    }

// function singleCheckbox() // returns undefined
    function singleCheckbox() {
        var $checkbox = $(this);
        if ($checkbox.is(':checked') && $checkbox.is('[name]')) {
            // the name of the box is retrieved using the .attr() method
            // as it is assumed and expected to be immutable
            var group = 'input:checkbox[name="' + $checkbox.attr("name") + '"]';

            // the checked state of the group/box on the other hand will change
            // and the current value is retrieved using .prop() method
            $(group).prop('checked', false);
            $checkbox.prop('checked', true);
        }
    }

// function setFocus(element) // returns undefined
    function setFocus(element) {
        var ng = angular.element(element);
        if (ng.length > 0) {
            ng.focus();
        }
    }

                        });

                        $('div[property="MiscReference3"]').children()[1].addEventListener("blur", function() {
                            $('div[property="MiscReference3"]').children()[2].hidden = false;
                            //$('div[property="MiscReference3"]').children()[2].style.cssText = "color:red";

                        });


                    }
                }
            }, 50);

        }
    }

// Source: Mimaki USA (MIMAKI)_Mimaki CBR_2455.cs
// this.PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
    this.PageLoaded = function (location) {

// this.Shipping() // returns undefined
    this.Shipping = function () {

        //uncomment this to auto get weight
        this.vm.getWeight = customGetWeight;
        debugger;

        function customGetWeight() {
            if (this.profile.ScaleConfiguration) {
                var url = client.config.ClientSupportServiceUrl + '/api/Scale/Read'
                var ret = $.post({ url: url, data: this.profile.ScaleConfiguration.ScaleDefinition, async: false }).responseJSON;
                
                if (ret != undefined) {
                    if (ret.ErrorCode == 0) {
                        this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].Weight = {
                            "Amount": ret.Weight.toFixed(2),
                            "Units": ret.WeightUnit.toUpperCase()
                        };
                    }
                }
            }
        }

    }//end of this.shipping

// this.PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.PostLoad = function (loadValue, shipmentRequest) {

        //enable this to get weight auto at order load time
        this.vm.getWeight();
		debugger;
        //scroll selected service into view
        scrollIntoView($('[ng-model="vm.selectedServices"]'), shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol);
        checkForCancelled(this.vm);
        sumCommodities();

        //scroll into view stuff
        function isIE() {
            return /*@cc_on!@*/false || !!document.documentMode;
        }

        function scrollIntoView(element, value) {
            if (!isIE()) {
                var interval = setInterval(function () {
                    if (element.val() == value) {
                        clearInterval(interval);
                        var optionTop = element.find('[value="' + value + '"]').offset().top;
                        var selectTop = element.offset().top;
                        element.scrollTop(element.scrollTop() + (optionTop - selectTop));
                    }
                }, 50);

            }

        }

        function checkForCancelled(view) {

            var $misc19 = $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference19"]');

            if (!isIE()) {
                var interval = setInterval(function () {
                    if ($misc19.length) {
                        clearInterval(interval);

                        if ($misc19.val() == "T") {
                            debugger;
                            //view.profile.ProfileSetting.DisableShip = true;
                            //view.profile.ProfileSetting.DisablePendingShipment = true;
                            $("input[value=\"Ship (F12)\"]").prop('disabled', true);
                            $("input[value=\"Rate (F9)\"]").prop('disabled', true);
                            $("input[value=\"Save\"]").prop('disabled', true);
                            alert("This order is marked as Cancelled. Please load a new order");
                        }
                    }
                }, 50);

            }
        }
		

        function sumCommodities()
        {
            var commoditiesValue = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].CommodityContents.map(m => +m.Quantity * +m.UnitValue.Amount);
            var commTotal = 0.00;
            if(!commoditiesValue || Array.isArray(commoditiesValue ) || arr.commoditiesValue  !== 0)
            {
                for (let i = 0; i < commoditiesValue.length; i++) {
                    commTotal += commoditiesValue[i];
                  }
            }
            $('#SumCommTotal').text('Commodity Total: $' + commTotal);
        }
    }

// this.NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        $('h1').removeClass('text-danger').removeClass('text-success');

        $('#SumCommTotal').text('Commodity Total: $');
		
        client.shipping.loadValue.focus();
        client.shipping.maintabfocus('General');
        client.shipping.subtabfocus('Consignee', 'Account/Tax');

        $("input[value=\"Ship (F12)\"]").prop('disabled', false);
        $("input[value=\"Rate (F9)\"]").prop('disabled', false);
        $("input[value=\"Save\"]").prop('disabled', false);
    }

    this.AddPackage = function (shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
        //enable this to auto get weight at add pacakge click
        debugger;
        this.vm.getWeight();

      
    }

// client.init() // returns undefined
        init: function () {

            String.prototype.focus = function () {
                if (!focus(this)) {
                    var interval = setInterval(function (selector) {
                        if (focus(selector)) clearInterval(interval)
                    }, 10, this)
                }

                function focus(selector) {
                    $(selector).focus();
                    return $(selector).length
                }
            };
        },

// client.shipping.maintabfocus(tabName) // returns undefined
            maintabfocus: function (tabName) {
                $('ul li[heading="' + tabName + '"] a').click()
            },

// client.shipping.subtabfocus(nameAddress, tabName) // returns undefined
            subtabfocus: function (nameAddress, tabName) {
                var index = tabName == 'Email' ? 0 : tabName == "Phone or Fax" ? 1 : 2;
                var interval = setInterval(function () {
                    var $ubtab = $('name-address[address-property-name="' + nameAddress + '"] ul li[index=' + index + '] a');
                    if ($ubtab.length) {
                        clearInterval(interval);
                        $ubtab.click();
                    }
                }, 10)
            }

// All() // returns undefined
                All: function () { $('div[role="alert"]').hide() },

// Info() // returns undefined
                Info: function () { $('div[role="alert"].alert-info:visible').hide() },

// Success() // returns undefined
                Success: function () { $('div[role="alert"].alert-success:visible').hide() },

// Danger() // returns undefined
                Danger: function () { $('div[role="alert"].alert-danger:visible').hide() }

// Info(msg) // returns undefined
                Info: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-success alert-danger');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-info').show();
                },

// Success(msg) // returns undefined
                Success: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-info alert-danger');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-success').show();
                },

// Danger(msg) // returns undefined
                Danger: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-info alert-success');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-danger').show();
                }

// Source: NAGINA INTERNATIONAL (NAGINA)_ISMEA_FTP_1585.cs
// getFTPUploaded() // returns void
function getFTPUploaded() {
        var selectedShipper = document.getElementById("Shipper").value;
		var shipper = '';
		debugger;
		if (selectedShipper !== "")
		{
			selectedShipper = JSON.parse(selectedShipper);
			shipper = selectedShipper.Name;
		}
        var data = { Action: 'ExportFTP', Shipper: shipper };

        $.post('api/ShippingService/UserMethod',
            {UserContext: userContext, Data: JSON.stringify(data) },
            function(response, status, xhr) {
            }
        ).done(function(response) {
            debugger;
            var resp = JSON.stringify(response);
            resp = JSON.parse(resp);
            debugger;
            if (resp.Data !== "" && resp.Data !== undefined)
            {
                alert('Lastest File: \n' + DecodeReturnString(resp.Data).substring(0,resp.Data.length -1));
            }
            else if (resp.ErrorMessage !== undefined)
            {
                if (resp.ErrorCode == '104')
                {
                    alert('Lastest File: \nNo files found!');
                }
                else
                {
                    alert(resp.ErrorMessage);
                }
            }
        });
    }

// DecodeReturnString(data) // returns parsed JSON data or undefined on error
function DecodeReturnString(data)
    { 
        try
        { 
            return JSON.parse($("<div />").html(data).text());
        }
        catch (error)
        { 
            console.log(error.name);
            console.log(error.message);
            console.log(data);
        }
    }

// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
        this.PageLoaded = function (location) {

		{
			this.Shipping();

// Shipping() // returns undefined
    this.Shipping = function () {
        
        var interval = setInterval(function () {
                loadText = ('[ng-model="vm.loadValue"]');  
                
                var loaded = loadText.length;
                
                if (loaded) {
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    setFocus(loadText);
                }
            }, 50);
            
        appendCSS();

        this.vm.loadWeight = loadWeight;
        
        function loadWeight() {
            if (this.profile.ScaleConfiguration === undefined) return;
            var scale = this.profile.ScaleConfiguration;
            var url = client.config.ClientSupportServiceUrl + '/api/Scale/Read';
            var data = {
                'PortType': scale.ScaleDefinition.PortType,
                'Port': scale.Port,
                'UsbVid': scale.ScaleDefinition.UsbVid,
                'UsbPid': scale.ScaleDefinition.UsbPid,
                'RequestCommand': scale.ScaleDefinition.RequestCommand,
                'BaudRate': scale.ScaleDefinition.BaudRate,
                'StopBits': scale.ScaleDefinition.StopBits,
                'Parity': scale.ScaleDefinition.Parity,
                'DataBits': scale.ScaleDefinition.DataBits,
                'RequestTimeout': scale.ScaleDefinition.RequestTimeout,
                'HostAddress': scale.HostAddress,
                'RegexPattern': scale.ScaleDefinition.RegexPattern,
                'DeviceParser': scale.ScaleDefinition.DeviceParserType,
                'DeviceName': scale.ScaleDefinition.Name,
                'Handshake': scale.ScaleDefinition.Handshake,
                'RetryCount': scale.ScaleDefinition.RetryCount,
                'RetryDelay': scale.ScaleDefinition.RetryDelay
            };
            var ret = $.post({ url: url, data: data, async: false }).responseJSON;
            if (ret.ErrorCode === 0) {
                this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].Weight = {
                    "Amount": ret.Weight,
                    "Units": ret.WeightUnit === null ? "LB" : ret.WeightUnit.toUpperCase()
                };


            } else {
                client.alert.Danger(this.translations.Common.ErrorCode + " : " + ret.ErrorCode + "  " + ret.ErrorMessage);
            }            
        }
    }

// PreLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
        this.PreLoad = function (loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams) {
        this.vm.loadWeight();
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) {
        client.vm = this.vm;
		shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference7 = intPicker;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference8 = intPacker;
        clearAlert();
        setFocus(loadText);      
    }

// AddPackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns undefined
   this.AddPackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {    
        shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].MiscReference7 = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference7;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].MiscReference8 = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference8;
}

// this.Shipping() // returns undefined
this.Shipping = function () {
        
        var interval = setInterval(function () {
                loadText = ('[ng-model="vm.loadValue"]');  
                
                var loaded = loadText.length;
                
                if (loaded) {
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    setFocus(loadText);
                }
            }, 50);

        //};
        appendCSS();

        this.vm.loadWeight = loadWeight;
        
        function loadWeight() {
            if (this.profile.ScaleConfiguration === undefined) return;
            var scale = this.profile.ScaleConfiguration;
            var url = client.config.ClientSupportServiceUrl + '/api/Scale/Read';
            var data = {
                'PortType': scale.ScaleDefinition.PortType,
                'Port': scale.Port,
                'UsbVid': scale.ScaleDefinition.UsbVid,
                'UsbPid': scale.ScaleDefinition.UsbPid,
                'RequestCommand': scale.ScaleDefinition.RequestCommand,
                'BaudRate': scale.ScaleDefinition.BaudRate,
                'StopBits': scale.ScaleDefinition.StopBits,
                'Parity': scale.ScaleDefinition.Parity,
                'DataBits': scale.ScaleDefinition.DataBits,
                'RequestTimeout': scale.ScaleDefinition.RequestTimeout,
                'HostAddress': scale.HostAddress,
                'RegexPattern': scale.ScaleDefinition.RegexPattern,
                'DeviceParser': scale.ScaleDefinition.DeviceParserType,
                'DeviceName': scale.ScaleDefinition.Name,
                'Handshake': scale.ScaleDefinition.Handshake,
                'RetryCount': scale.ScaleDefinition.RetryCount,
                'RetryDelay': scale.ScaleDefinition.RetryDelay
            };
            var ret = $.post({ url: url, data: data, async: false }).responseJSON;
            if (ret.ErrorCode === 0) {
                this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].Weight = {
                    "Amount": ret.Weight,
                    "Units": ret.WeightUnit === null ? "LB" : ret.WeightUnit.toUpperCase()
                };

                //if (ret.HasDimensions) {
                    //this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].Dimensions = {
                        //"Length": ret.Dimensions.split('x')[0],
                        //"Width": ret.Dimensions.split('x')[1],
                        //"Height": ret.Dimensions.split('x')[2],

            } else {
                client.alert.Danger(this.translations.Common.ErrorCode + " : " + ret.ErrorCode + "  " + ret.ErrorMessage);
            }            
        }
    }

// this.PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
this.PreShip = function(shipmentRequest, userParams) {
        debugger;
        var picker = "";
        var packer = "";

          picker = prompt("Picker ID", "" );
          packer = prompt("Packer ID", "");
          shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference7 = "Picker :" + picker;
          shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference8 = "Packer :" + packer;
          
            if(shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference16 == "true")
            {
                shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference17 = "TRUE";
            }

    }

// function clearAlert() // returns undefined
function clearAlert() {
        var alertBox = $('div[role="alert"]');
        if (alertBox.length) {
            alertBox.find('.close').click();
        }
    }

// function setFocus(element) // returns undefined
function setFocus(element){
        var ng = angular.element(element);
        if (ng.length > 0) {
            ng.focus();
        }
    }

// function appendCSS() // returns undefined
function appendCSS(){
        var style = document.createElement('style');
        style.innerHTML = 'input:focus, textarea:focus, select:focus{background-color: #ffffcc;}';
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    }

// Source: Nexus (NEXUS)_Nexus CBR 2.3 Fix_1760.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
this.PageLoaded = function(location) {
        if (location === '/shipping')
        {
            var loadInterval = setInterval(function()
            {
                loadText = $('[ng-model="vm.loadValue"]');
                if (loadText.length)
                {
                    clearInterval(loadInterval);
                    setFocus(loadText);
                }
            }, 50);
            $('body').delegate('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Dimensions.Length"]', 'keydown', function(e) {
                if (e.keyCode == 13 && $(this).val().indexOf(".") !== -1)
                {
                    $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Dimensions.Width"]').val($(this).val().split('.')[1]).change();
                    $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Dimensions.Height"]').val($(this).val().split('.')[2]).change();
                    $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Dimensions.Length"]').val($(this).val().split('.')[0]).change();
                    $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Amount"]').focus();
                }
            });
        }
    };

// PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
this.PostLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest) {
        //Setting the return address on Dicks Sporting Goods orders to their address
        if (shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference3 == "8778469997")
        {
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress.Company = "Dicks Sporting Goods";
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress.Contact = "";
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress.Address1 = "1314 Conklin Rd.";
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress.Address2 = "STE B";
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress.City = "Conklin";
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress.StateProvince = "NY";
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress.PostalCode = "13748";
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress.Country = "US";
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress.Phone = "8778469997";
        }
        
        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling)
        {
            var addressBook = this.GetAddressBook('NexusAddressBook', this.vm.UserInformation);
            var addressBookEntries = this.GetAddressBookEntries(addressBook, this.vm.UserInformation, shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference3);
            if (addressBookEntries == undefined)
            {
                alert("No entry found in Address Book for Company Code '" + shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference3 + "'. Please ensure Third Party Address and/or Account Number are manually entered if needed before shipping.");
            }
            else
            {
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Company = addressBookEntries[0].Company;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Contact = addressBookEntries[0].Contact;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Address1 = addressBookEntries[0].Address1;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Address2 = addressBookEntries[0].Address2;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Address3 = addressBookEntries[0].Address3;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.City = addressBookEntries[0].City;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.StateProvince = addressBookEntries[0].StateProvince;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.PostalCode = addressBookEntries[0].PostalCode;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Country = addressBookEntries[0].Country;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Phone = addressBookEntries[0].Phone;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Account = addressBookEntries[0].Account;
            }
        }   
        else if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Terms == "CONSIGNEE")
        {
            var addressBook = this.GetAddressBook('NexusAddressBook', this.vm.UserInformation);
            var addressBookEntries = this.GetAddressBookEntries(addressBook, this.vm.UserInformation, shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference3);
            if (addressBookEntries == undefined)
            {
                alert("No entry found in Address Book for Company Code '" + shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference3 + "'. Please ensure Third Party Address and/or Account Number are manually entered if needed before shipping.");
            }
            else
            {
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Account = addressBookEntries[0].Account;
            }
        }
        $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Dimensions.Length"]').focus();
        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData4 == "RTGD")
        {
            alert("Please ensure to rate and select the desired service for shipping.");
        }
    };

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) {
        setFocus(loadText);
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Terms = "SHIPPER";
    };

// GetAddressBook(addressBookName, context) // returns address book object or undefined
this.GetAddressBook = function (addressBookName, context) {
        var searchCriteria = { WhereClauses: [{ FieldName: "Name", FieldValue: addressBookName, Operator: 0 }] };
        var data = { SearchCriteria: searchCriteria, CompanyId: context.CompanyId, SiteId: context.SiteId, UserId: context.UserId };
        var response = this.thinClientAPIRequest('GetAddressBooks_Shared', data, false);
        if (response.ErrorCode != 0) {
            client.alert.Danger(response.ErrorMessage);
        } else {
            if (response.TotalRecords == 0) {
                client.alert.Danger('Address Book: "' + addressBookName + '" does not exist');                
            } else {
                return response.AddressBooks[0];
            }
        }
    }

// GetAddressBookEntries(addressBook, context, codeReference) // returns address book entries array or undefined
this.GetAddressBookEntries = function (addressBook, context, codeReference) {
        if (addressBook != undefined) {
            var searchCriteria = { WhereClauses: [{ FieldName: "Code", FieldValue: codeReference, Operator: 0 }] };
            var data = { AddressBookIds: [addressBook.Id], SearchCriteria: searchCriteria, CompanyId: context.CompanyId, SiteId: context.SiteId, UserId: context.UserId };
            var response = this.thinClientAPIRequest('GetAddressBookEntries_Shared', data, false);
            if (response.ErrorCode != 0) {
                client.alert.Danger(response.ErrorMessage);
            } else {
                if (response.TotalRecords == 0) {
                    client.alert.Danger('Address Book Entries: No address found in "' + addressBookName + '" address book');
                } else {
                    return response.AddressBookEntries;
                }
            }
        }
    }

this.PostLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest) {
        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling)
        {
            var addressBook = this.GetAddressBook('NexusAddressBook', this.vm.UserInformation);
            var addressBookEntries = this.GetAddressBookEntries(addressBook, this.vm.UserInformation, shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference3);
            if (addressBookEntries == undefined)
            {

            }
            else
            {
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Company = addressBookEntries[0].Company;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Contact = addressBookEntries[0].Contact;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Address1 = addressBookEntries[0].Address1;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Address2 = addressBookEntries[0].Address2;

                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.City = addressBookEntries[0].City;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.StateProvince = addressBookEntries[0].StateProvince;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.PostalCode = addressBookEntries[0].PostalCode;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Country = addressBookEntries[0].Country;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Phone = addressBookEntries[0].Phone;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Account = addressBookEntries[0].Account;
            }
        }   
        else if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeThirdPartyBilling)
        {
            var addressBook = this.GetAddressBook('NexusAddressBook', this.vm.UserInformation);
            var addressBookEntries = this.GetAddressBookEntries(addressBook, this.vm.UserInformation, shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference3);
            if (addressBookEntries == undefined)
            {
                alert("No entry found in Address Book for Company Code '" + shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference3 + "'. Please ensure Consignee Third Party Address and/or Account Number are manually entered if needed before shipping.");

            else

                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeThirdPartyBillingAddress.Contact = addressBookEntries[0].Contact;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeThirdPartyBillingAddress.Address1 = addressBookEntries[0].Address1;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeThirdPartyBillingAddress.Address2 = addressBookEntries[0].Address2;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeThirdPartyBillingAddress.Address3 = addressBookEntries[0].Address3;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeThirdPartyBillingAddress.City = addressBookEntries[0].City;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeThirdPartyBillingAddress.StateProvince = addressBookEntries[0].StateProvince;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeThirdPartyBillingAddress.PostalCode = addressBookEntries[0].PostalCode;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeThirdPartyBillingAddress.Country = addressBookEntries[0].Country;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeThirdPartyBillingAddress.Phone = addressBookEntries[0].Phone;
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ConsigneeThirdPartyBillingAddress.Account = addressBookEntries[0].Account;
            }
        }   
        else if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Terms == "CONSIGNEE")
        {
            var addressBook = this.GetAddressBook('NexusAddressBook', this.vm.UserInformation);
            var addressBookEntries = this.GetAddressBookEntries(addressBook, this.vm.UserInformation, shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference3);

// this.AddPackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns undefined
this.AddPackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
        shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].ShipperReference = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].ConsigneeReference = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].Description = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Description;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].Packaging = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Packaging
        shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].MiscReference1 = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference1;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].MiscReference2 = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference2;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].MiscReference3 = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference3;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].CommodityContents = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].CommodityContents;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].CommodityClass = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].CommodityClass;
    };

// this.GetAddressBook(addressBookName, context) // returns address book object or undefined
this.GetAddressBook = function (addressBookName, context) {

            client.alert.Danger(response.ErrorMessage);
        } else {
            if (response.TotalRecords == 0) {
                client.alert.Danger('Address Book: "' + addressBookName + '" does not exist');

                return response.AddressBooks[0];
            }
        }
    }

// this.GetAddressBookEntries(addressBook, context, codeReference) // returns address book entries array or undefined
this.GetAddressBookEntries = function (addressBook, context, codeReference) {
        if (addressBook != undefined) {
            var searchCriteria = { WhereClauses: [{ FieldName: "Code", FieldValue: codeReference, Operator: 0 }] };
            var data = { AddressBookIds: [addressBook.Id], SearchCriteria: searchCriteria, CompanyId: context.CompanyId, SiteId: context.SiteId, UserId: context.UserId };

                } else {
                    return response.AddressBookEntries;
                }

        }

// this.thinClientAPIRequest(method, data, isAsync) // returns responseJSON
this.thinClientAPIRequest = function (method, data, isAsync) {
        var shipExecServiceUrl = clientService.config.ShipExecServiceUrl;
        var authorizationToken = clientService.authorizationToken();
        return $.post({ url: shipExecServiceUrl + '/' + method, data: data, async: isAsync, headers: authorizationToken }).responseJSON
    }

// Source: Nike (Nike)_Nike_Reference_Rules_1540.cs
// this.PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
    this.PageLoaded = function (location) {
        vm = this.vm;
        if (location == "/shipping") {
            // Select PPO vs Non-PPO
                    
            $('body').delegate('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference18"]', 'change', function () {
                var $referenceOptions = $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference18"]');
                if ($referenceOptions.val() === "PPO") {
                    //alert("PPO" + $referenceOptions.val());
                    vm.profile.FieldOptions.MiscReference14.IsRequired = false;
                    vm.profile.FieldOptions.MiscReference15.IsRequired = false;
                    vm.profile.FieldOptions.MiscReference16.IsRequired = true;
                    vm.profile.FieldOptions.MiscReference17.IsRequired = true;
                    $('label:contains("Enter Name of Shipment Requestor")').hide();
                    $('input[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference14"]').hide();
                    $('label:contains("NIKE Cost/Profit Center Bill To")').hide();
                    $('input[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference15"]').hide();


                    $('label:contains("C/N CARTON ID NUMBER 1 Per Carton")').show();
                    $('input[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference16"]').show();
                    $('label:contains("PO# (Begins with 35, 45)")').show();
                    $('input[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference17"]').show();
                } else if ($referenceOptions.val() === "Non-PPO") {
                    //alert("Non-PPO" + $referenceOptions.val());
                    vm.profile.FieldOptions.MiscReference14.IsRequired = true;
                    vm.profile.FieldOptions.MiscReference15.IsRequired = true;
                    vm.profile.FieldOptions.MiscReference16.IsRequired = false;
                    vm.profile.FieldOptions.MiscReference17.IsRequired = false;
                    $('label:contains("Enter Name of Shipment Requestor")').show();
                    $('input[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference14"]').show();
                    $('label:contains("NIKE Cost/Profit Center Bill To")').show();
                    $('input[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference15"]').show();

                    $('label:contains("C/N CARTON ID NUMBER 1 Per Carton")').hide();
                    $('input[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference16"]').hide();
                    $('label:contains("PO# (Begins with 35, 45)")').hide();
                    $('input[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference17"]').hide();
                } else {
                    //alert("blank" + $referenceOptions.val());
                    vm.profile.FieldOptions.MiscReference14.IsRequired = false;
                    vm.profile.FieldOptions.MiscReference15.IsRequired = false;
                    vm.profile.FieldOptions.MiscReference16.IsRequired = false;
                    vm.profile.FieldOptions.MiscReference17.IsRequired = false;
                    $('label:contains("Enter Name of Shipment Requestor")').hide();
                    $('input[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference14"].').hide();
                    $('label:contains("NIKE Cost/Profit Center Bill To")').hide();

// this.NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        if (typeof shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress !== "undefined") shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Code = "";
        this.vm.profile.FieldOptions.MiscReference14.IsRequired = false;
    };

// this.PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
    this.PreShip = function (shipmentRequest, userParams) {
        debugger;
        var originCustomData = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference1 = GetCustom('Custom10','User', shipmentRequest);
		shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference8 = GetCustom('Custom10','User', shipmentRequest);

        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.TransportationCharges == "consignee" || shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.DutiesAndTaxes == "receiver") {
            SendFreightCollect(shipmentRequest);
        }

        for (var i = 0; i < shipmentRequest.Packages.length; i++) {
            if (shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference18 === "PPO") {
                //PPO
                shipmentRequest.Packages[i].ShipperReference = shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference16;
                shipmentRequest.Packages[i].ConsigneeReference = shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference17;
			}else
			{
                //Non PPO
                shipmentRequest.Packages[i].ShipperReference = shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference14;
                shipmentRequest.Packages[i].ConsigneeReference = shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference15;
            }
        }
    }

// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
this.PageLoaded = function(location) {
	    vm = this.vm;
	    //console.log(vm);
		globalVar = location;
		if (globalVar === '/createbatch') {
			var checkExist = setInterval(function() {
				if (window.jQuery) {
					/* Stop the timer */
					clearInterval(checkExist);
					var emailText = "";
					var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a");
					Array.from(tags).forEach(function(tag) {
						if (tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!", "").trim();
					});
					let i = emailText.indexOf("@");
					$('input[name="batchReference"]').val(emailText.substring(0, i) + GetDateTimeToString()).change();

				}
			}, 50);
			
			HighlightWrongOrderNumber();
		}
		
		
        if (globalVar === '/scanship') {
        	HighlightWrongOrderNumber();
        }
		
		if (globalVar === '/history' || globalVar === '/groupmanager' ) {
			var emailText = "";
			var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a");
			Array.from(tags).forEach(function(tag) {
				if (tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!", "").trim();
			});
			let i = emailText.indexOf("@");
			if(emailText.substring(0, i)==='demo0')
			{ ReplaceAccountNumberWithXXXXXX();} 
        }
        
        if(globalVar === '/closemanifest'){
            // Provide a default label function to avoid "undefined" in the select
            vm.getManifestLabel = function(item) {
                // Show nothing or a placeholder until real data is loaded
                return item && item.Name ? item.Name : '';
            };
            getDates(vm);
        }
        
	}

// PostProcessBatch(batchResponse, vm) // returns void
this.PostProcessBatch = function(batchResponse, vm) {
		if (globalVar === '/createbatch') {
			var checkExist = setInterval(function() {
				if (window.jQuery) {
					/* Stop the timer */
					clearInterval(checkExist);
					var emailText = "";
					var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a");
					Array.from(tags).forEach(function(tag) {
						if (tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!", "").trim();
					});
					let i = emailText.indexOf("@");
					$('input[name="batchReference"]').val(emailText.substring(0, i) + GetDateTimeToString()).change();

				}
			}, 50);
		}
	}

// PreSearchHistory(searchCriteria) // returns void
this.PreSearchHistory = function(searchCriteria) {


		if (searchCriteria.WhereClauses !== null && searchCriteria.WhereClauses !== undefined) {
			if (searchCriteria.WhereClauses.length > 0) {
				var StartShipDate = null;
				var EndShipDate = null;
				var Shipper = "";
				for (var i = 0; i <= searchCriteria.WhereClauses.length - 1; i++) {
					if (searchCriteria.WhereClauses[i].FieldName == "Shipper") {
						Shipper = searchCriteria.WhereClauses[i].FieldValue;
					} else if (searchCriteria.WhereClauses[i].FieldName == "Shipdate" && StartShipDate == null) {
						StartShipDate = searchCriteria.WhereClauses[i].FieldValue;
					} else if (searchCriteria.WhereClauses[i].FieldName == "Shipdate" && StartShipDate != null) {
						EndShipDate = searchCriteria.WhereClauses[i].FieldValue;
					} else if (searchCriteria.WhereClauses[i].FieldName == "MiscReference1") {
						var miscReferenceObject = searchCriteria.WhereClauses[i];
						searchCriteria.WhereClauses.splice(i, 1);
						searchCriteria.WhereClauses.push({
							"FieldName": "ConsolidationTrackingNumber",
							"FieldValue": miscReferenceObject.FieldValue,
							"Operator": miscReferenceObject.Operator
						});
					}
				}



				var data = {
					UserContext: client.userContext,
					Data: "ShipDate=" + StartShipDate + ";" + "Shipper=" + Shipper
				}
				if (StartShipDate == EndShipDate) {
					sendSearchPackages("UserMethod", data, false)
				} else {
					var divResults = document.getElementById("divResults");
					divResults.innerHTML = "Select one day only to show package count!";
				}
			}
		}

	}

// ReplaceAccountNumberWithXXXXXX() // returns void
function ReplaceAccountNumberWithXXXXXX() {
		const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
			// Select all child tracking numbers
			const trackingNumberElements = document.querySelectorAll('div.ng-binding');
			trackingNumberElements.forEach(element => {
				const text = element.textContent.trim();
				if (text.length === 18) {
					element.textContent = text.substring(0, 3) + 'XXXXXX' + text.substring(9);
				}
			});

			// Select all lead tracking numbers
			const tableCells = document.querySelectorAll('td.ng-binding');
			tableCells.forEach(cell => {
				const text = cell.textContent.trim();
				if (text.length === 18) {
					cell.textContent = text.substring(0, 3) + 'XXXXXX' + text.substring(9);
				}
			});
		});

		// Start observing the body for changes
		observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
	}

// HighlightWrongOrderNumber() // returns void
function HighlightWrongOrderNumber() {
		$('input[name="orderNumber"]').focusout(function() {
			$(this).css("background-color", ($(this).val().length > 0 && $(this).val().length < 8) ? "#f44336" : "#FFFFFF");
		})
	}

// thinClientApiRequest(method, data, isAsync) // returns request result from $.post via $.getJSON callback
    var thinClientApiRequest = function (method, data, isAsync) {
        $.getJSON('config.json', function (config) {
            var shipExecServiceUrl = config.ShipExecServiceUrl;
            var authorizationToken = shipExecServiceUrl.startsWith('http') ? { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + JSON.parse(window.localStorage.getItem("TCToken")).access_token } : '';
            return $.post({ url: shipExecServiceUrl + '/' + method, data: data, async: isAsync, headers: authorizationToken });
        });
    }
