// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
this.PageLoaded = function(location) { 
    if(location === "/")
     document.location = "#!/shipping";
     
    if (window.location.hash == "#!/shipping") 
    {
      var checkExist = setInterval(function() 
      {
          if (window.jQuery) 
          {
              /* Stop the timer. */
              clearInterval(checkExist);
              $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function(e) { $('div.alert-danger:visible').hide(); });
            }
          }, 50);
      }
    }

// PreLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
    this.PreLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams) {
        shipmentRequest.SendViewModelToClient = this.GetViewModelFromTemplate;        
        //$.get({ url: "http://localhost:9091/api/websites/96659", cache: false })
        //    .fail(function (e) {
        //        alert('The Scale Service may not be running. Please check to make sure the ShipExec Client Service is running');
        //    });
        //}
     
        if(scale == 'EC')   {
            $.ajax({
                type: "GET",
                url: "http://localhost:9093/api/websites/96659",
                async: false,
                cache: false,
                success: function(result) {
                    //debugger;
                    //alert(result);
                    shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5= result;
                    shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference7= "EC";                       
                },
                error: function(jqXhr, exception) {
                alert("Please check the Express Cube Scale Service to make sure the service is running " + exception);                    
                }
            });
        }
    }

// PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.PostLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest) {
        shipmentRequest.SendViewModelToClient = this.GetViewModelFromTemplate;

        //shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference11 = vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].Weight.Amount;                        

        if( shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference6 !== null)              {
            if( shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference6 == 'YES' ) {
                shipmentRequest.AlertTitle = "ShipExec Alert";
                shipmentRequest.AlertMessage = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference + " has previously shipped today " + shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ShipDate +  ". Click Yes to ship again. Click No to abort.";
                angular.element('[ng-model="AlertModal"]').modal('show');
            }
        }
        
        if( shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference16 !== null)              {
            if( shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference16 !== 'ADDRESS1MATCH' ) {
                //alert("The Address Line 1 was not matched. Please run Address Validation prior to shipping this package");
                this.vm.alerts = [{type:'danger', msg:'The Address Line 1 was not matched. Please run Address Validation prior to shipping this package'}];
            }   
        }
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) {
        shipmentRequest.SendViewModelToClient = this.GetViewModelFromTemplate;        
        shipmentRequest.AlertTitle = '';
        shipmentRequest.AlertMessage = '';
        angular.element('[ng-model="vm.loadValue"]').focus();
        
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipper="OEMCONNECT";
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Terms="SHIPPER";
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Packaging="CUSTOM";
        //var Service = { Symbol: "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.GND", Name: "UPS Ground (CSAdapter)" };
        var Service = { Symbol: "OEMCONNE.Custom.SPPS", Name: "UPS SurePost lb or Greater" };        
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = Service;
        var ConsigneeAddress = {Country: "US"};
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee = ConsigneeAddress;  
    }

// AddPackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns undefined
    this.AddPackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
        shipmentRequest.SendViewModelToClient = this.GetViewModelFromTemplate;        
        if(scale == 'EC')   {
            $.ajax({
                type: "GET",
                url: "http://localhost:9093/api/websites/96659",
                async: false,
                cache: false,
                success: function(result) {
                    //debugger;
                    //alert(result);
                    shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5= result;
                    shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference7= "EC";                       
                },
                error: function(jqXhr, exception) {
                }
            });
        }	    
    }

// GetViewModelFromTemplate(viewModel) // returns undefined
    this.GetViewModelFromTemplate = function(viewModel) {
        //runs after NewShipment
        if (vm == undefined) {
            vm = viewModel;
        }
    }

// Source: Office Depot (ODP)_Sample_CBR_2454.cs
// addShipperRelease() // returns undefined
    function addShipperRelease() {
        if(checkShipperReleaseAvailable())
        {
            var htmlShipperRelease = "<div class='form-check' property='DeliveryMethod' model='vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].DeliveryMethod' caption='Require Shipper Release'>" +
                "<input type='checkbox' id='shipperRelease' class='form-check-input ng-pristine ng-untouched ng-valid ng-empty' ng-model='vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].DeliveryMethod'>" +
                "<label class='form-check-label ng-binding' style='padding-left: 6px;'>Shipper Release</label>" +
                "</div>"
            $('[ng-model="proofofdeliverypane"]').children().first().after(htmlShipperRelease);
    
            $('#shipperRelease').prop('checked', vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].DeliveryMethod);
    
            $('#shipperRelease').change(function() {
                var shipperRelease = $('#shipperRelease').is(":checked");
                vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].DeliveryMethod = shipperRelease;
            });
        }
    }

// checkShipperReleaseAvailable() // returns boolean
    function checkShipperReleaseAvailable()
    {
        var profileName = vm.profile.Name;
        var returnValue = false;
        if(profileName == "Warehouse Operations Profile" 
            || profileName == "Private Fleet Profile")
            {
                returnValue = true;
            }
        return returnValue
    }

// GetEmail() // returns string
        GetEmail() {
            var emailText = "";
            var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a");
            Array.from(tags).forEach(function (tag) {
                if (tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!", "").trim();
            });
            return emailText;
        }

// GetCustom(fieldName, customDataType) // returns string
        GetCustom(fieldName, customDataType) {
            var returnValue = "";
            var customData = null;
            if (customDataType === "User") customData = this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
            if (customDataType === "To") customData = this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.CustomData;

            if (customData) {
                customData.forEach(function (customField) {
                    if (fieldName === customField.Key) returnValue = customField.Value;
                })
            }
            return returnValue;
        }

// IsValid(referenceField, referenceValue) // returns boolean
        IsValid(referenceField, referenceValue) {
            var isValid = false;
            if (this.VM.fieldOptions[referenceField]) {
                var options = this.VM.fieldOptions[referenceField].FieldOptionValidations
                options.forEach(function (option) {
                    if (option.Value.trim() === referenceValue.trim()) isValid = true;
                });
            }

            if (referenceValue.length === 0 || !referenceValue.trim()) isValid = false;
            return isValid;
        }

// Source: PackVerify Demos (PACKVERIFY)_PV Sliding Panel CBR_1858.cs
// ShowAssignGoodsPane() // returns void
    ShowAssignGoodsPane()
    {
      let that = this;

      //get rid of any previous entries
      $('#listItemContainer li:gt(0)').remove();

      //change the column width to make the descriptions longer
      //change this back when the user clicks the 'Apply' button
      $('div.ui-tab-container').toggleClass('col-md-8 col-md-6').siblings('div').toggleClass('col-md-4 col-md-6')

      //set a reference to the packages object as well as the commodities objects
      this.packages = this.viewModel.currentShipment.Packages;
      this.goods = this.json.data.map(m => m.boxes).flat();
      this.goods.sort((a, b) => { return a.skuId - b.skuId });

      //loop the commodities to create a master list item for each
      $(this.goods).each(function(a, b)
      {
        let k = 'e' + (Math.random() + 1).toString(36).substring(2);
        b.UniqueId = k;

        //copy the source element
        let item = $('#liClone').clone(true).data(b);

        //change the id of the main containing element so we don't run into issue later
        //each clone is a discreet list item which corresponds to a commodity
        $(item).attr('id', k);

        //the customer is sending amounts that have sometimes 10 digits after the decimal point which is throwing exceptions when trying
        //to parseFloat so this is the simplest way to get around that.
        //let cost = Math.round(b.UnitValue.Amount * 100) / 100;

        $(item).find('.goods-sku').html('SKU: <strong>' + b.skuId + '</strong>');
        $(item).find('.goods-quantity').html('Quantity: <strong>' + b.quantity + '</strong>');
        $(item).find('.goods-declared-value').html('Unit Cost: <strong>$' + b.unitPrice + '</strong>');

        //append it to our list
        $('#divAssignCommodities ul.list-group').append(item);

        //assign all goods to the first package
        that.packages[0].CommodityContents.push(that.GetCommodityContentObject(b));

        //update the weight and declared value in the root of the object
        let weight = that.packages[0].Weight;
        let dva = that.packages[0].DeclaredValueAmount;
        const thisWeight = (+b.quantity * +b.weightLbs);
        const thisValue = (+b.quantity * +b.unitPrice);

        if (!weight.Amount) { weight.Amount = 0; }
        that.packages[0].Weight.Amount += (+b.quantity * +b.weightLbs).toFixed(2);

        if (!dva.Amount) { dva.Amount = 0; }
        that.packages[0].DeclaredValueAmount.Amount += Math.round((+b.quantity * +b.unitPrice) * 100) / 100;

        //show it gracefully
        $(item).show();
      });

      //that.UpdatePackageCounts();
      //$('li[heading=Goods] a:first').click();
      $('#divAssignCommodities').show().animate({ left: 0 }, 400);
      $('.scan-input:visible').first().focus();
      $('#divAssignCommodities').find('[data-toggle="tooltip"]').tooltip();
    }

// HideAssignGoodsPane() // returns void
    HideAssignGoodsPane()
    {
      let u = $('#divAssignCommodities').outerWidth() + 100;
      $('#divAssignCommodities').animate({ left: -u }, 400, function() { $(this).hide(); });
      $('div.ui-tab-container').toggleClass('col-md-8 col-md-6').siblings('div').toggleClass('col-md-4 col-md-6');
    }

// InitiateDelegates() // returns void
    InitiateDelegates()
    {
      let that = this

      $('body').delegate('#btnAssignCommodities', 'click', function()
      {
        if ($('#divAssignCommodities:visible').length > 0) return;
        that.ShowAssignGoodsPane();
      });

      $('body').delegate('#btnApplyCommodityAssignments', 'click', function(e)
      {
        that.ApplyCommodityAssignments();
      });

      $('body').delegate('#btnCancelAssignGoods', 'click', function(e)
      {
        that.HideAssignGoodsPane();
      });

      $('body').delegate('.assign-to-new-box', 'click', function(e)
      {
        let li = $(e.target).closest('li');
        $('button[ng-click="vm.addPackage();"]').trigger('click').promise().done((e) =>
        {
          const cp = +$('#spanCurrentPackageIndex').text();
          that.MoveGoodToBox(li, cp);
        });
      });

      $('body').delegate('.assign-to-current-box', 'click', function(e)
      {
        let li = $(e.target).closest('li');
        const cp = +$('#spanCurrentPackageIndex').text();
        that.MoveGoodToBox(li, cp);
      });

      $('body').delegate('.undo-box-assignment', 'click', function(e)
      {
        let li = $(e.target).closest('li');
        that.MoveGoodToBox(li, 1);
      });

    }

    this.PageLoaded = function(location){

                if($thirdPartyBilling.val() != "string:--------------------"){
                    $('name-address[address-property-name="ThirdPartyBillingAddress"] button[title="Search Addresses"]').click();
                    //alert($thirdPartyBilling.val());
                } 
            })
            
            var startTime = new Date();
            var pageLoaded = setInterval(function() {
                if ((new Date().getTime() - startTime.getTime()) / 1000 >= 2) {
                    clearInterval(pageLoaded);
                    console.log('clearinterval')
                } else {
                    var tpbFound = false;
                    var consigneeFound = false;
                    var $thirdPartyBillingAddress = $('name-address[address-property-name="ThirdPartyBillingAddress"]');
                    var tpbSearchAddress = $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Search Addresses"]');
                    var $consignee = $('name-address[address-property-name="Consignee"]');
                    var consineeSearchAddress = $consignee.find('[title="Search Addresses"]');
                    if ($thirdPartyBillingAddress.length && tpbSearchAddress.length) {
                        tpbFound = true;
                    }
                    
                    if ($consignee.length && consineeSearchAddress.length) {
                        consigneeFound = true;
                    }
                    var loaded = tpbFound && consigneeFound;
                    

                    console.log(`is consignee loaded: ${loaded}`)

                    if (loaded) {
                        if($thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Search Addresses"]').length > 0){
                            startTime.setMinutes(startTime.getMinutes() - 1);
                            
                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Search Addresses"]').hide();
                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Validate Address"]').hide();
                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('label:contains("Save Address")').hide();
                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('select[ng-model="nameaddress.IsUpdateAddressBookEntry"]').hide();
                        }   $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('select[ng-model="nameaddress.AddressBookIdToProcess"]').hide();
                        
                    }
                }
            }, 125);


        }
    }

// jobAndWBSInPrintLabel(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
   function jobAndWBSInPrintLabel(shipmentRequest)
   {

        
        for(var i=0;i<shipmentRequest.Packages.length;i++)
        {
            var shipperReference = "";
            //JOB input field
            if(shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference1 != null || shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference1.length > 0)
            {
                shipperReference = shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference1;
                shipperReference += "/";
            }
            
            
            //WBS
             if(shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference2 != null || shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference2.length > 0)
            {
                shipperReference += shipmentRequest.Packages[i].MiscReference2;
            }
            shipmentRequest.Packages[i].ShipperReference = shipperReference;
        }
        
       
   }

// PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
    this.PreShip = function(shipmentRequest, userParams){
        console.log(shipmentRequest);
                console.log(userParams);
        
        jobAndWBSInPrintLabel(shipmentRequest);
        
        if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress){
            var selection = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Code;
            if(selection && selection !== "---------------------"){
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling = true;
            }else{
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling = false;
            }
        }
        if(typeof shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ReturnDeliveryMethod != "undefined")shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnDelivery = true;
        
    }

// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
    this.PageLoaded = function(location) {
		var licenseTab;
		var documentsMethodsTab;
		var DDTCTab;
		
		//HIDE LICENSE TAB
		//HIDE Documents Methods TAB
		//HIDE DDTC TAB
		if (location === '/shipping') {
			var interval = setInterval(function () {
				
				var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("li"); 
				
               Array.from(tags).forEach(function(tag){
                     if(tag.innerHTML.includes("License")) licenseTab = tag;
                     if(tag.innerHTML.includes("Documents Methods")) documentsMethodsTab = tag;
                     if(tag.innerHTML.includes("DDTC")) DDTCTab = tag;
                   });
				
				if (licenseTab && documentsMethodsTab && DDTCTab) {
				    clearInterval(interval);
				    //licenseTab.style.display = "none"; 
				    documentsMethodsTab.style.display = "none";
				    //DDTCTab.style.display = "none";
			    }
			    
			}, 50); 
		 }
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
   this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
       var shipment = new Shipment(shipmentRequest);  
       shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference = shipment.UserRef1;
       shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference  = shipment.UserRef2;
       //shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference = shipment.UserEmail;
       //alert(JSON.stringify(shipment)); 
       
       //NEW
       shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipNotificationAddressEmail = shipment.UserEmail;
       shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail = shipment.UserEmail;
       shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail = shipment.UserEmail;
   }

// AddPackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns void

       shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].ShipperReference = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference; 
       //alert("PMUSAInt");
   }

// GetEmail() // returns string
   GetEmail(){
      var emailText = "";
      var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a"); 
      Array.from(tags).forEach(function(tag){
         if(tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!","").trim(); 
      });
      return emailText;
   }

// GetCustom(fieldName, customDataType) // returns string
   GetCustom(fieldName, customDataType) {
      var returnValue = "";
      var customData = null;
      
      if (customDataType === "User")
      {
          if(this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress)
          {
            customData = this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
          }
      }
      
      if (customDataType === "To") 
      {
          if(this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee)
          {
            customData = this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.CustomData;
          }
      }
      
      if (customData) {
         customData.forEach(function (customField) {
            if (fieldName === customField.Key) returnValue = customField.Value;
         })
      }
      return returnValue;
   }

// function ClientBusinessRules() // returns constructor/initializer for business rules
function ClientBusinessRules() {
  
   this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
       var shipment = new Shipment(shipmentRequest);  
       shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference = shipment.UserRef1;
       shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference  = shipment.UserRef2;
       shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference1 = shipment.UserRef3;
       //shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference = shipment.UserEmail;
       // alert(JSON.stringify(shipment)); 
   }
   
   this.AddPackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
       shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].ShipperReference = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference; 
       shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].ConsigneeReference = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference;
      // alert("PMUSADom");
   }
   
   
   
   
class Shipment {
   constructor(shipmentRequest) {
      this.ShipmentRequest = shipmentRequest;
   }

 
   get UserEmail() { return this.GetEmail(); }

   get UserRef1() { return this.GetCustom("Custom1", "User"); }
   get UserRef2() { return this.GetCustom("Custom2", "User"); }
   get UserRef3() { return this.GetCustom("Custom3", "User"); }
   get UserRef4() { return this.GetCustom("Custom4", "User"); }
   get UserRef5() { return this.GetCustom("Custom5", "User"); }
   get UserRef6() { return this.GetCustom("Custom6", "User"); }
   get UserRef7() { return this.GetCustom("Custom7", "User"); }
   get UserRef8() { return this.GetCustom("Custom8", "User"); }
   get UserRef9() { return this.GetCustom("Custom9", "User"); }
   get UserRef10() { return this.GetCustom("Custom10", "User"); }

   get ToRef1() { return this.GetCustom("Custom1", "To"); }
   get ToRef2() { return this.GetCustom("Custom2", "To"); }
   get ToRef3() { return this.GetCustom("Custom3", "To"); }
   get ToRef4() { return this.GetCustom("Custom4", "To"); }
   get ToRef5() { return this.GetCustom("Custom5", "To"); }
   get ToRef6() { return this.GetCustom("Custom6", "To"); }
   get ToRef7() { return this.GetCustom("Custom7", "To"); }
   get ToRef8() { return this.GetCustom("Custom8", "To"); }
   get ToRef9() { return this.GetCustom("Custom9", "To"); }
   get ToRef10() { return this.GetCustom("Custom10", "To"); }

   GetEmail(){
      var emailText = "";
      var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a"); 
      Array.from(tags).forEach(function(tag){
         if(tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!","").trim(); 
      });
      return emailText;
   }
   
   GetCustom(fieldName, customDataType) {
      var returnValue = "";
      var customData = null;
      if (customDataType === "User") customData = this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
      if (customDataType === "To") customData = this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.CustomData;

      if (customData) {
         customData.forEach(function (customField) {
            if (fieldName === customField.Key) returnValue = customField.Value;
         })
      }
      return returnValue;
   }
// End Shipment Class    
}

        
         
}

// myMethod() // returns void
    function myMethod() {
        if ($('#ordersPerPage').val().trim() === "") {
            $('#ordersPerPage').val("10");
        }
        if ($('#pageNumber').val().trim() === "") {
            $('#pageNumber').val("1");
        }
        if ($('#dateAfter').val().trim() === "") {
            $('#dateAfter').val("2021-01-01");
        }
        if ($('#batchType').val().trim() === "" || $('#batchType').val().search("undefined") > -1) {
            $('#batchType').val("processing");
        }
    }

// this.PreProcessBatch(batchReference, actions, params, vm) // returns void
    this.PreProcessBatch = function (batchReference, actions, params, vm) {

        // Get the custom fields and store them in the params so they can be passed to the server side
        var dateAfter = $('#dateAfter').val();
        params.dateAfter = dateAfter;

        var dateBefore = $('#dateBefore').val();
        params.dateBefore = dateBefore;

        var batchType = $('#batchType').val();
        params.batchType = batchType;

        var batchShipDate = $('#batchShipDate').val();
        params.batchShipDate = batchShipDate;

        var ordersPerPage = $('#ordersPerPage').val();
        params.ordersPerPage = ordersPerPage;

        var pageNumber = $('#pageNumber').val();
        params.pageNumber = pageNumber;
    }

// Source: PRA Developer (PRADeveloper)_PRA Intl Business Rules_1523.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
    this.PageLoaded = function (location) {
       
        /* Only apply these functions to the shipping page. */
        if (window.location.hash == "#!/shipping") {
            $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function (e) {
                $('div.alert-danger:visible').hide();
            })

            var checkExist = setInterval(function () {

                if ((window.jQuery !== undefined) && ($('select[name=Country]').length > 0)) {
                    /* Stop the timer. */
                    clearInterval(checkExist);

                    /* Register the event that fires when a user clicks the 'Reset' button on the main page. */
                    $('body').delegate('button[ng-click="vm.newShipment()"]:eq(0)', 'click', function (e) {
                        DisableThirdPartyBillingElements();
                    });

                    /* Disable the ThirdPartyBilling edit button. */
                    $('input[type=button][ng-disabled="!vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling"]').prop('disabled', true).attr('disabled', true);

                    /* For select boxes which are enabled, remove the default country of United States. */
                    $('select[name=Country][disabled!=disabled]').prop('selectedIndex', 0);

                    /* Trying to fix a bug where the Ship From country select element is disabled and set to the wrong country. */
                    /* Enable the element. */
                    $('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]:eq(1)').prop('disabled', false);

                    /* Hide the End Of Day dropdown menu. */
                    $('ul.nav.navbar-nav li.dropdown:eq(1) > a.dropdown-toggle').hide();

                    /* Change captions for tabs when processing return shipments. */
                    /* Register the event on change. */
                    $('body').delegate('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ReturnDeliveryMethod"]', 'change', function (e) {
                        var isReturn = $(this).val().length > 0;
                        ReturnNameAddressCaption(isReturn);
                        vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ReturnDelivery = isReturn;
                    });

                    $('body').delegate('name-address[address-property-name="Consignee"] select[name="Country"]', 'change', checkOriginConsigneeCountry);
                    $('body').delegate('name-address[address-property-name="OriginAddress"] select[name="Country"]', 'change', checkOriginConsigneeCountry);
                } /* if ((window.jQuery... */

            }, 50); /* var checkExist = setInterval... */

        } /* if (window.location.hash... */
    };

// checkOriginConsigneeCountry() // returns boolean|undefined
    function checkOriginConsigneeCountry() {
        var shipFromCountry = getObjectValue(vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.Country);
        var shipToCountry = getObjectValue(vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country);

        /* If we have no shipToCountry OR the shipFromCountry is either US or CA, disable the elements, return out. */
        if (!shipToCountry | shipFromCountry == "US" | shipFromCountry == "CA") {
            DisableThirdPartyBillingElements();
            return false;
        }

        if (shipFromCountry != shipToCountry) {
            /* If the shipFromCountry does NOT equal the shipToCountry then ship Third Party. */
            SetThirdPartyBilling(vm.currentShipment);
        }
        else {
            /* Now check to see if both the origin and destination countries are members of the EU. */
            if ((IsMemberOfEu(shipFromCountry)) && (IsMemberOfEu(shipToCountry))) {
                SetThirdPartyBilling(vm.currentShipment);
            }

            //ShipThirdPartyBilling((IsMemberOfEu(shipFromCountry)) && (IsMemberOfEu(shipToCountry)));
        }

        if (shipFromCountry != "US") {
            $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Units"]').val('string:KG').change();
            $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Dimensions.Units"]').val('number:1').change();
        }
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        this.vm.IsValid = this.IsValidated;
        this.vm.TemplateInit = this.PageInitialize;
        this.vm.emailNotificationAddress = this.EmailNotificationAddress;
        var originCustomData = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference1 = GetKeyValue('Custom1', originCustomData);
        ReturnNameAddressCaption(false);
    };

// PostSelectAddressBook(shipmentRequest, nameaddress, addressName) // returns undefined|boolean
    this.PostSelectAddressBook = function (shipmentRequest, nameaddress, addressName) {
        debugger;
        if (addressName !== '' && addressName !== 'ThirdPartyBillingAddress') {
            var checkExist = setInterval(function () {

                if (($('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]:eq(0)').val().length > 0) && ($('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]:eq(1)').val().length > 0)) {

                    /* Stop the timer. */
                    clearInterval(checkExist);
                    /* The values are stored in the format of 'string:CC'.  We only want the CC. */
                    var shipToCountry = $('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]:eq(0)').val().replace('string:', '');
                    var shipFromCountry = $('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]:eq(1)').val().replace('string:', '');

                    /* If we have no shipToCountry OR the shipFromCountry is either US or CA, disable the elements, return out. */
                    if (!shipToCountry | shipFromCountry == "US" | shipFromCountry == "CA") {
                        DisableThirdPartyBillingElements();
                        return false;
                    }

                    if (shipFromCountry != shipToCountry) {
                        /* If the shipFromCountry does NOT equal the shipToCountry then ship Third Party. */
                        SetThirdPartyBilling(shipmentRequest);
                    }
                    else {
                        /* Now check to see if both the origin and destination countries are members of the EU. */
                        if ((IsMemberOfEu(shipFromCountry)) && (IsMemberOfEu(shipToCountry))) {
                            SetThirdPartyBilling(shipmentRequest);
                        }

                        //ShipThirdPartyBilling((IsMemberOfEu(shipFromCountry)) && (IsMemberOfEu(shipToCountry)));
                    }

                    if (shipFromCountry != "US") {
                        $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Units"]').val('string:KG').change();
                        $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Dimensions.Units"]').val('number:1').change();
                    }
                } /* if ($('div.modal-dialog.modal-md:visible') */

            }, 50); /* var checkExist = setInterval... */
        }
    };

// PreRate(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
    this.PreRate = function (shipmentRequest, userParams) {
        if (!this.vm.IsValid('ShipperReference', shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference)) {
            throw ({ message: 'Project Id/Dept. Code is invalid', errorCode: '001' });
        }
    };

// PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
    this.PreShip = function (shipmentRequest, userParams) {
    };

// PreSearchHistory(searchCriteria) // returns undefined
    this.PreSearchHistory = function(searchCriteria) {
    };

// PageInitialize(viewModel) // returns undefined
    this.PageInitialize = function (viewModel) {
        vm = viewModel;
    };

// IsValidated(referenceField, referenceValue) // returns boolean
    this.IsValidated = function(referenceField, referenceValue) {
        var isValid = false;
        if (this.fieldOptions[referenceField]) {
            var options = this.fieldOptions[referenceField].FieldOptionValidations;
            options.forEach(function (option) {
                if (option.Value.trim() === referenceValue.trim()) isValid = true;
            });
        }
        if(referenceValue.length === 0 || !referenceValue.trim()) isValid = false;
        return isValid;
    };

// EmailNotificationAddress(event) // returns undefined
    this.EmailNotificationAddress = function (event) {
        var currentTarget = event.currentTarget;
        var ngModelName = currentTarget.attributes['ng-model'].nodeValue.split('.').pop();
        var emailAddress = this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Email;
        var pkg = this.currentShipment.Packages[0];
        debugger;
        // if (ngModelName.indexOf('DeliveryException') >= 0){
        //     SetDeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, ngModelName, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        // } else if (ngModelName.indexOf('Delivery') >= 0) {
        //     SetDeliveryNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, ngModelName, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        // } else {
        //     SetShipNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, ngModelName, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        // }

        if (ngModelName == 'ShipNotificationEmail') {
            SetShipNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        } else if (ngModelName == 'DeliveryExceptionNotificationEmail') {
            SetDeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        } else if (ngModelName == 'DeliveryNotificationEmail') {
            SetDeliveryNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, currentTarget.checked);
        }
    };

// SetShipNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, checked) // returns undefined
    function SetShipNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, checked) {
        if (checked) {
            if (pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail === undefined || pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail.trim() === '') {
                pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail = emailAddress;
            }
        } else {
            var notificationAddressEmail = pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail;
            var regexp = new RegExp(',?' + emailAddress, 'g');
            notificationAddressEmail = notificationAddressEmail.replace(regexp, '');
            pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail = notificationAddressEmail;
        }
    }

// SetDeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, checked) // returns undefined
    function SetDeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, checked) {
        if (checked) {
            if (pkg.DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail === undefined || pkg.DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail.trim() === '') {
                pkg.DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail = emailAddress;
            }
        } else {
            var notificationAddressEmail = pkg.DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail;
            var regexp = new RegExp(',?' + emailAddress, 'g');
            notificationAddressEmail = notificationAddressEmail.replace(regexp, '');
            pkg.DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail = notificationAddressEmail;
        }
    }

// SetDeliveryNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, checked) // returns undefined
    function SetDeliveryNotificationAddressEmail(pkg, emailAddress, checked) {
        if (checked) {
            if (pkg.DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail === undefined || pkg.DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail.trim() === '') {
                pkg.DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail = emailAddress;
            }
        } else {
            var notificationAddressEmail = pkg.DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail;
            var regexp = new RegExp(',?' + emailAddress, 'g');
            notificationAddressEmail = notificationAddressEmail.replace(regexp, '');
            pkg.DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail = notificationAddressEmail;
        }
    }

// ReturnNameAddressCaption(isReturn) // returns undefined
    function ReturnNameAddressCaption(isReturn) {
        var shipFrom = isReturn ? 'Return To' : 'Ship From';
        var shipTo = isReturn ? 'Pickup From' : 'Ship To';
        $('ul.nav.nav-tabs').find('li[heading="Ship From"]:visible > a').first().text(shipFrom);
        $('ul.nav.nav-tabs').find('li[heading="Ship To"]:visible > a').first().text(shipTo);
    }

// SetThirdPartyBilling(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    function SetThirdPartyBilling(shipmentRequest) {
        /* This enables the button to edit the Third Party Billing Information. */
        $('input[type=button][ng-disabled="!vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling"]').prop('disabled', false).attr('disabled', false);

        /* Check the box for Third Party Billing which will bring up the modal.  Fill the modal with values.  Click Save. */
        $('input[type=checkbox][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling"]').prop('checked', true).attr('checked', true).change();

        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress = {}
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Company = 'PRA Global';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Address1 = '995 Research Park Blvd';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Address2 = 'Suite 300';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.City = 'Charlottesville';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.StateProvince = 'VA';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.PostalCode = '22911';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Account = '883F79';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress.Country = 'US'
    }

// DisableThirdPartyBillingElements() // returns undefined
    function DisableThirdPartyBillingElements() {
        $('input[type=checkbox][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling"]').prop('checked', false).attr('checked', false);
        $('input[type=button][ng-disabled="!vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling"]').prop('disabled', true).attr('disabled', true);
    }

// IsMemberOfEu(v) // returns boolean
    function IsMemberOfEu(v) {
        return ($.inArray(v, EuCountries) !== -1) ? true : false;
    }

// GetKeyValue(key, arr) // returns string
    function GetKeyValue(key, arr) {
        for (var index in arr) {
            if (arr[index].Key.toLowerCase() === key.toLowerCase()) return arr[index].Value;
        }
        return '';
    }

// getObjectValue(varReference) // returns string
    function getObjectValue(varReference) {
        if (varReference) return varReference;
        return "";
    }

// Source: Promega (Promega)_Promega BR_36.cs
// GetEmail() // returns the extracted email text from document anchor elements
        GetEmail() {
            var emailText = "";
            var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a");
            Array.from(tags).forEach(function (tag) {
                if (tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!", "").trim();
            });
            return emailText;
        }

// Source: Purolator (PURT)_PurolatorCBR_1906.cs
// this.PageLoaded(location) // returns void
    this.PageLoaded = function(location) {       
        lang = $("#Locales").val();
        DisableHyperLink();
        ReplaceShippingRatingName();
        RemoveLanguage();   
        if (location == "/shipping")
        {
            DisableShipmentMode();
            HidePackageButtons();
            HideConsigneeItems();
            HideOriginItems();
            HideRateSaveButtons();
            HidePickupRequest();
            HideSelectAll();
            HideReturnItems();
            ReplaceReturnToShipperHeader();
            RemoveShowLastShipment();

            $('body').delegate('a[ng-click="select($event)"]', 'click', VisibilityButtons);
            $('body').delegate('button[ng-click="vm.showAccessorial = \'pickupDeliveryPane\'"]', 'click', HideHoldAtLocation);
            $('body').delegate('input[ng-click="vm.showLastShipmentPanel = true;"]', 'click', RemoveAmountFromLastShipment);
            $('body').delegate('a[ng-click="select($event)"]', 'click', AccessorialButtons);
            $('body').delegate('button[ng-click="vm.showInternationalConsolidationModal()"]', 'click', RemoveItemsConsolidation);
            $('body').delegate('button[class="btn btn-xs btn-primary btnInternational ng-binding"]', 'click', HideCustomerBrokerAddVali);
            $('body').delegate('button[ng-click="vm.addCommodity()"]', 'click', HideRenameCommodityContents); 
            $('body').delegate('a[ng-click="vm.editCommodity(item)"]', 'click', HideRenameCommodityContents); 
            $('body').delegate('a[ng-click="vm.editCommodity(vm.tableParams._params.count * (vm.tableParams._params.page - 1) + $index)"]', 'click', HideRenameCommodityContents);

            ReplaceNaming();
            //DisableHyperLink();
            //ReplaceShippingRatingName();
            //RemoveLanguage();   
            
        }
        else if (location == "/history")
        {
            HideHistory();
            //DisableHyperLink();
            //ReplaceShippingRatingName();
            //RemoveLanguage();   
        }
        else if (location == "/groupmanager")
        {
            $('body').delegate('select[ng-model="vm.carrier"]', 'change', HideGroupManager); 
            //RenameGroupStatusFrench();
            //DisableHyperLink();
            //ReplaceShippingRatingName();
            //RemoveLanguage();
        }
        else if (location == "/closemanifest" || location == "/manifestdocuments" || location == "/transmit")
        {
            RenameShipper();
            //ReplaceShippingRatingName();
            //RemoveLanguage();  
            //DisableHyperLink(); 
        }
        else if (location == "/")
        {
            HideOnlyWelcome();
            //DisableHyperLink();
            //ReplaceShippingRatingName();
            //RemoveLanguage();   
        }
    }

// this.PostShip(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) // returns void
    this.PostShip = function(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) {
        $('input[ng-model="vm.loadValue"]').focus();
    }

// this.PreLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns void
    this.PreLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams) {  
        $('button[ng-click="vm.newShipment()"]').trigger('click');
        this.vm.loadValue = loadValue;
        vm = this.vm;
    }

// this.NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
    this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) { 
        $('input[ng-model="vm.loadValue"]').focus();
    }

// function DisableShipmentMode() // returns void
    function DisableShipmentMode(){
        var div1 = $('div[class="row top-tool-bar"]');
        var div2 = div1.find('div[class="pull-right"]');
        var label = div2.find('label[class="ng-binding"]');
        label.hide();
        var shipMode = $('select[ng-change="vm.changeShipMode()"]');
        //shipMode.prop('disabled',true);
        shipMode.hide();
    }

        addPackBtn.hide();
        var copyPackBtn = $('button[class="btn btn-xs btn-default glyphicon glyphicon-duplicate"]');
        copyPackBtn.hide();
        var deletePackBtn = $('button[ng-click="vm.removePackage()"]');
        deletePackBtn.hide();

        var lblLoad = $('')
    }

// function HideSelectAll() // returns void
    function HideSelectAll(){
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var chkSelAll = $('input[ng-model="vm.isAllServicesSelected"]');
            if (chkSelAll.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                chkSelAll.hide();
                var txtSelAll = $('span[class="chkLabel ng-binding"]');
                txtSelAll.hide();
            }
        }, 10);
    }

// function HideConsigneeItems() // returns void
    function HideConsigneeItems(){
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var na = $('name-address[nameaddress="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee"]');
            if (na.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                var row = na.find('div[class="row"]');
                var div1 = row.find('div[class="col-md-3 small text-left no-bottom-left no-bottom-right"]');
                div1.hide();
                var div2 = row.find('div[class="pull-right col-md-3 no-left-right-padding"]');
                div2.hide();
                row.hide();
            }
        }, 50);
        
        var loaded1 = setInterval(function() {
            var frm = $('form[name="addressForm"]');
            if (frm.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded1);
                var div1 = frm.find('div[class="form-group"]');
                var div2 = div1.find('div[class="col-md-4 no-left-right-padding"]');
                div2.hide();
                var div3 = div1.find('div[class="col-md-8 no-right-padding"]');
                div3.hide();
            }
        }, 50);
        
    }

// function HideOriginItems() // returns void
    function HideOriginItems(){

            var na = $('name-address[caption="Origin"]');
            if (na.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                var row = na.find('div[class="row"]');
                var div1 = row.find('div[class="col-md-3 small text-left no-bottom-left no-bottom-right"]');
                div1.hide();

                div2.hide();
                var div3 = row.find('div[class="pull-right col-md-3 no-left-right-padding"]');
                div3.hide();
            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function HideReturnItems() // returns void
    function HideReturnItems(){
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var na = $('name-address[nameaddress="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress"]');
            if (na.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                var row = na.find('div[class="row"]');
                var div1 = row.find('div[class="col-md-3 small text-left no-bottom-left no-bottom-right"]');
                div1.hide();

                div2.hide();

                div3.hide();

                pobox.hide();
                var res = row.find('div[ng-hide="residential.isHidden()"]');
                res.hide();
            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function RemoveShowLastShipment() // returns void
    function RemoveShowLastShipment()
    {
        var div = $('div[ng-class="{ \'col-md-10\': vm.showLastShipmentPanel==true , \'col-md-12\': vm.showLastShipmentPanel == false  }"]');
        var div1 = div.find('div[class="pull-right cstom-margin-left"]');
        div1.hide();        
    }

// function RemoveAmountFromLastShipment() // returns void
    function RemoveAmountFromLastShipment()
    {
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var lastShip = $('div[ng-show="vm.showLastShipmentPanel"]');
            if (lastShip.length > 0)
            {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                var spanBase = lastShip.find('currency[currency_symbol="vm.lastShipmentResponse.PackageDefaults.BaseCharge.Currency"]');
                spanBase.text('');
                var spanDiscount = lastShip.find('currency[currency_value="vm.lastShipmentResponse.PackageDefaults.Discount.Amount"]');
                spanDiscount.text('');
                var spanSpecial = lastShip.find('currency[currency_value="vm.lastShipmentResponse.PackageDefaults.Special.Amount"]');
                spanSpecial.text('');
                var spanTotal = lastShip.find('currency[currency_value="vm.lastShipmentResponse.PackageDefaults.Total.Amount"]');
                spanTotal.text('');
                var gMSN = lastShip.find('div[class="ng-binding ng-scope"]');
                gMSN.text('');
            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function ReplaceShippingRatingName() // returns void
    function ReplaceShippingRatingName(){
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var a = $('a[href="/#!/shipping"]');
            if (a.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                RenameElement(a, 'Shipping', 'Expédition');
                //debugger;
            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function DisableHyperLink() // returns void
    function DisableHyperLink() {
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var a = $('a[href="/Manage"]');
            if (a.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                a.removeAttr('href');

                var shex = $('a[href="#!"]');
                shex.removeAttr('href');
            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function RemoveItemsConsolidation() // returns void
    function RemoveItemsConsolidation() {
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var h4 = $('h4[class="modal-title ng-binding"]');
            if (h4.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                $('select').children('option[value="string:GUARDIAN"]').remove();
                $('select').children('option[value="string:TRADE_DIRECT"]').remove();
            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function HideCustomerBrokerAddVali() // returns void

            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function HideRenameCommodityContents() // returns void
    function HideRenameCommodityContents() {
        debugger;
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var formCommo = $('form[name="commoditiesModalForm"]');
            if (formCommo.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                var divOD = $('div[property="CommodityContent.OriginDescription"]');
                divOD.hide();
                var divCC = $('div[property="CommodityContent.CommodityCondition"]');
                divCC.hide();

                //Tabs
                var ulNavs = formCommo.find('ul[class="nav nav-tabs"]');
                var commTabs = ulNavs.eq(0);
                var liTabs = commTabs.find('li');
                for(var i=0; i<=liTabs.length; i++) {
                    if (i !== 0 && i !== 4 && i !== 5)
                    {
                        var element = liTabs.eq(i);
                        element.hide();
                    }
                }
                
                //Restricted Article
                var divs = formCommo.find('div[ng-repeat="raTypes in vm.profile.RestrictedArticleTypes"]');
                var numOfElements = divs.length;
                for(var i=0; i<=numOfElements; i++) {
                    if (i < 7)
                    {
                        var element = divs.eq(i);
                        element.hide();
                    }
                }
                
                //Renaming NAFTA to CUSMA
                var liNAFTA = $('li[index="4"]');
                liNAFTA.hide();
                var ahrefNAFTA = liNAFTA.find('a[ng-click="select($event)"]');
                RenameElement(ahrefNAFTA, 'CUSMA', 'CUSMA');
                var divNAFTA = $('div[property="CommodityContent.NaftaProducer"]');
                var lblNAFTAProducer = divNAFTA.find('label');
                RenameElement(lblNAFTAProducer, 'CUSMA Producer Indicator', 'Indicateur ACEUM pour les producteurs');

                //RemovingCurrencyCommodity();

            }
        }, 50);
        
    }

// function RemoveLanguage() // returns void
    function RemoveLanguage() {
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var div = $('div[style="display: flex; padding-top: 2%"]');
            if (div.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                $('select').children('option[value="de-DE"]').remove();
                $('select').children('option[value="es-MX"]').remove();
            }
        }, 50);
        
    }

// function ReplaceNaming() // returns void
    function ReplaceNaming() {
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var divMain = $('div[class="main-container"]');
                if (divMain.length > 0) {
                    clearInterval(loaded);

                    var divLoad = $('div[ng-if="!vm.profile.FieldOptions.Load.IsHidden"]');
                    var lblLoad = divLoad.find('label');
                    RenameElement(lblLoad, 'Purolator PIN', 'NIP de Purolator');                   
                    $('input[ng-model="vm.loadValue"]').attr('placeholder', (lang == 'en-US' ? 'Purolator PIN':'NIP de Purolator'));

                    var divShipper = $('div[model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Shipper"]');
                    var lblShipper = divShipper.find('label');
                    RenameElement(lblShipper,'Gateway', 'passerelle');

                    var divPaymentTerms = $('div[model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Terms"]');
                    var lblPaymentTerms = divPaymentTerms.find('label');
                    RenameElement(lblPaymentTerms,'Bill Duties and Taxes To', 'Facturer les droits et taxes à');

                    //Nav Tabs
                    var ulTabs = $('ul[class="nav nav-tabs"]');
                    var shippingTabs = ulTabs.eq(7);
                    var liTabs = shippingTabs.find('li');
                    
                    var Tab = liTabs.eq(1);
                    var ahref = Tab.find('a');
                    RenameElement(ahref, 'Saturday Service', 'Service du samedi');

                    Tab = liTabs.eq(2);
                    ahref = Tab.find('a');
                    RenameElement(ahref, 'Commercial Invoice', 'Facture commerciale');

                    Tab = liTabs.eq(3);
                    ahref = Tab.find('a');
                    RenameElement(ahref, 'Dangerous Goods', 'Marchandises dangereuses');

                    Tab = liTabs.eq(6);
                    ahref = Tab.find('a');
                    RenameElement(ahref, 'Signature Required', 'Signature requise');

                    Tab = liTabs.eq(7);
                    ahref = Tab.find('a');
                    RenameElement(ahref, 'Commercial Invoice Details', 'Détails de la facture commerciale');
                    
                    $('body').delegate('a[ng-click="select($event)"]', 'click', ReplaceButton); 
                    $('body').delegate('button[ng-model="vm.hazmatdryIceBtn"]','click',DryIceContents);
                }
        }, 50);
    }

// function RenameElement(Element, EnName, FrName) // returns void
    function RenameElement(Element, EnName, FrName)
    {
        Element.text(lang == 'en-US' ? EnName : FrName);
    }

        ReplaceSaturdayServiceButton();
        ReplaceSignatureRequiredButton();
        ReplaceDangeroudGoodsButton();

        $('body').delegate('button[ng-click="vm.showCustomsBrokerInformationModal(vm.profile.FieldOptions.CustomsBroker.Caption || vm.translations.ThinClient.CustomsBrokerInformation)"]', 'click', HideCustomBorkersButtons); 
    }

// function DryIceContents() // returns void
    function DryIceContents() {
        debugger;

        if (vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].DryIceWeight == undefined)
        {
            const dryIceWeight = {"DryIceWeight" : {"Amount": 0, "Units": "KG"}};
            vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].DryIceWeight = dryIceWeight;
            
        }

        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var frmDry = $('form[name="dryIceModalForm"');
            if (frmDry.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);

                //Dry Ice UOM
                $('select[ng-model="vm.dryIceInfo.DryIceWeight.Units"]> option[value="string:LB"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.dryIceInfo.DryIceWeight.Units"]> option[value="string:OZ"]').remove();
                
                /** 
                var select = frmDry.find('select[ng-model="vm.dryIceInfo.DryIceWeight.Units"]');
                select.empty();
                select.append($('<option>', {
                    label: 'MG',
                    value: 'string:MG',
                    text: 'MG'
                }));
                select.append($('<option>', {
                    label: 'G',
                    value: 'string:G',
                    text: 'G'
                }));
                select.append($('<option>', {
                    label: 'KG',
                    value: 'string:KG',
                    text: 'KG'
                }));
                */

                //Regulation Set
                $('select[ng-model="vm.dryIceInfo.DryIceRegulationSet"]> option[value="number:0"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.dryIceInfo.DryIceRegulationSet"]> option[value="number:1"]').remove();
                /** 
                var selRS = frmDry.find('select[ng-model="vm.dryIceInfo.DryIceRegulationSet"]');
                selRS.empty();
                selRS.append($('<option>', {
                    label: '',
                    value: '',
                    text: ''
                }));
                selRS.append($('<option>', {
                    label: 'International Air Transportation Association regulations',
                    value: 'number:1',
                    text: 'International Air Transportation Association regulations'
                }));

                $('body').delegate('button[ng-click="vm.ok()"]', 'click', SaveDG);
                */
            }

        }, 50);
    }

// function ReplaceDangeroudGoodsButton() // returns void
    function ReplaceDangeroudGoodsButton() {
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var hazTab = $('hazmat-tab');
            if (hazTab.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                var divs = hazTab.find('div');
                var div = divs.eq(10);
                var div1 = div.find('div[class="col-md-12"]');
                var div2 = div1.find('div[ng-hide="vm.profile.FieldOptions.HazmatContents.IsHidden"]');
                var btnHaz = div2.find('button');
                RenameElement(btnHaz, 'Add Dangerous Goods Content', 'Ajouter du contenu sur les marchandises dangereuses');
                
                var divHandInfo = divs.eq(2);
                divs = divHandInfo.find('div');
                div1 = divs.eq(6);
                var lbl = div1.find('label');
                RenameElement(lbl, 'Dangerous Goods Information', 'Informations sur les marchandises dangereuses');

                var btn = $('button[ng-click="vm.showhazmatsignatoryaddress()"]');
                //debugger;
                $('body').delegate(btn, 'click', HideSignatoryButtons);
                $('body').delegate(btnHaz, 'click', ReplaceHazmatHeader);
                //$('body').delegate();
            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function DefaultDangerousGoods() // returns void

                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatRegulationSet"]> option[value="number:2"]').prop('selected', true);
            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function ReplaceExportReason() // returns void
    function ReplaceExportReason() {
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var it = $('international-tab');
            if (it.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                var frm = $('form[name="intlForm"]');
                var divRows = frm.find('div');
                var divFirst = divRows.eq(0);
                var divsFirst = divFirst.find('div');
                var divSecond = divsFirst.eq(14);
                var divsThird = divSecond.find('div');
                var divExport = divsThird.eq(5);
                var lblExport = divExport.find('label');
                RenameElement(lblExport, 'Import/Export Type', 'Type d\'importation/exportation');

                $('button[ng-click="vm.showInternationalConsolidationModal()"]').hide();
                $('button[ng-click="vm.showImporterOfRecordModal(vm.profile.FieldOptions.ImporterofRecord.Caption || vm.translations.ThinClient.ImporterofRecordInformation)"]').hide();
            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function ReplaceHazmatHeader() // returns void
    function ReplaceHazmatHeader(){
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var divHaz = $('div[class="modal-dialog modal-lg"]');
            if (divHaz.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                var div1 = divHaz.find('div[class="modal-content"]');
                var div2 = div1.find('div[class="modal-content ng-scope"]');
                var div3 = div2.find('div[class="modal-header"]');
                var h4 = div3.find('h4');
                //debugger;
                if (h4.text() == 'Add Hazmat Content')
                {
                    RenameElement(h4, 'Add Dangerous Goods Content', 'Ajouter du contenu sur les marchandises dangereuses');
                }
                var form = $('form[name="hazmatModalForm"]');
                div1 = form.find('div[class="modal-body"]');
                div2 = div1.find('div[class="row"]');
                var div3 = div2.find('div[ng-show="vm.hazmatContentDiv == \'labelcategory\'"]');
                var div4 = div3.find('div[class="row col-md-12"]');
                var div5 = div4.find('div[class="col-md-6 ng-isolate-scope"]');
                var div = div5.find('div[class="form-group"]');
                var lbl = div.find('label');
                //debugger;
                RenameElement(lbl.eq(0), 'Dangerous Goods Labels', 'Étiquettes de marchandises dangereuses')

                var na = $('name-address[nameaddress="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatInfectiousResponsibleParty"]');
                var divRow = na.find('div[class="row"]');
                var div1 = divRow.find('div[class="col-md-3 small text-left no-bottom-left no-bottom-right"]');
                div1.hide();

                //Removing Hazmat UOM
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatQuantity.Units"]> option[value="string:FOZ"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatQuantity.Units"]> option[value="string:GAL"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatQuantity.Units"]> option[value="string:GLB"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatQuantity.Units"]> option[value="string:OZ"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatQuantity.Units"]> option[value="string:PT"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatQuantity.Units"]> option[value="string:LB"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatQuantity.Units"]> option[value="string:QT"]').remove();
                }

                //Removing CA Category
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatCaCategory"]> option[value="number:0"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatCaCategory"]> option[value="number:1"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatCaCategory"]> option[value="number:2"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatCaCategory"]> option[value="number:3"]').prop('selected', true);

                //Removing Regulation Set
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatRegulationSet"]> option[value="number:0"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatRegulationSet"]> option[value="number:1"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatRegulationSet"]> option[value="number:3"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatRegulationSet"]> option[value="number:4"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatRegulationSet"]> option[value="number:2"]').prop('selected', true);

                //Removing Radioactive dropdown contents
                let hzra = $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatRadioactiveActivity.Units"]');
                let select = hzra.eq(0);

                let options = select.find('option');//.eq(0);
                for(var ind=0;ind < options.length; ind++)
                {
                    let option = options.eq(ind);
                    let opt = option.eq(0).val();
                    //debugger;
                    if (opt == "?" || opt == "string:BQ" || opt == "string:GBQ" || opt == "string:KBQ" || opt == "string:MBQ" || opt == "string:TBQ")
                    {}
                    else
                    {
                        option = options.eq(ind);
                        opt = option.eq(0);
                        opt.remove();
                    }
                }
                /** 
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatRadioactiveActivity.Units"]> option[string:"BQ"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatRadioactiveActivity.Units"]> option[label="GBQ"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatRadioactiveActivity.Units"]> option[label="KBQ"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatRadioactiveActivity.Units"]> option[label="MBQ"]').remove();
                $('select[ng-model="vm.hazmatContent.HazmatRadioactiveActivity.Units"]> option[label="TBQ"]').remove();
                */

                //Removing checkboxes from Dangerous Goods Labels
                var hazLabel = $('div[field="HazmatContent.HazmatLabel"]');
                var div2 = hazLabel.find('div');
                var div = div2.eq(1);
                var dgl = div.find('div[ng-repeat="hazmatLabel in vm.hazmatLabels"]');
                
                dgl.eq(0).hide();
                dgl.eq(7).hide();
                dgl.eq(3).hide();
                for (var cnt=0; cnt < dgl.length; cnt++)
                {
                    var chk = dgl.eq(cnt).find('div');
                    var label = chk.find('label'); //eq(2);
                    //let childNodes = label.eq(0).childNodes;
                    var text = label.eq(0).children;
                    //debugger;
                    /** 
                    label = dgl.eq(cnt).find('div>label').text();
                    var par2 = label.indexOf(')');
                    var indsp = label.indexOf(' ');
                    var text = label.substring((indsp + 20), (par2 +1)).replace('                         ','');
                    var par1 = text.indexOf('(');
                    var classN = text.substring(par1);
                    var repText = text.replace(classN, '');
                    var finText = classN.trim() + ' ' + repText.trim();
                    label = label.replace(text,finText);
                    dgl.eq(cnt).find('div>label').text(label);
                    */
                }
                //debugger;
                DefaultDangerousGoods();
                
        }, 50);
    }

            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function RemovingCurrency() // returns void
    function RemovingCurrency() {
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var divDecVal = $('div[value-property="DeclaredValueCustoms.Amount"]');
            if (divDecVal.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                //var div = divDecVal.find('div[class="input-group my-group"]');
                var select = $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].DeclaredValueCustoms.Currency"]');
                //debugger;
                select.empty();
                select.append($('<option>', {
                    label: 'CAD',
                    value: 'string:CAD',
                    text: 'CAD'
                }));
                select.append($('<option>', {
                    label: 'USD',
                    value: 'string:USD',
                    text: 'USD'
                }));
                select.prop("selectedIndex", 1);
            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function HideGroupManager() // returns void
    function HideGroupManager(){
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var select = $('select[ng-change="vm.groupTypeChange()"]');
            if (select.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                //debugger;
                select.children('option[value="GUARDIAN"]').remove();
                select.children('option[value="TRADE_DIRECT"]').remove();
                $('body').delegate('select[ng-change="vm.groupTypeChange()"]', 'change', RenameShipperGroupManager); 
            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function RenameShipperGroupManager() // returns void
    function RenameShipperGroupManager() {
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var div = $('div[ng-if="vm.groupType && vm.groupType.Symbol !== vm.enumGroupTypes.TradeDirect"]');
            if (div.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                var div2 = div.find('div[class="row"]');
                var div3 = div2.find('div[class="col-md-3 ng-binding"]');
                var div4 = div3.find('div[class="form-group"]');
                var label = div4.find('label');
                RenameElement(label, 'Gateway', 'passerelle');

                //Sorting
                var select = div4.find('select[name="shipper"]');
                //$("[label$=jander]")
                select.html($("option[label^=\'Purolator\']").sort(function (a, b) {
                    //debugger;
                    return a.text == b.text ? 0 : a.text < b.text ? -1 : 1
                }));
                //adding select gateway
                select.prepend($('<option>', {
                    value: '',
                    text: lang == 'en-US' ? 'Select Gateway...' : 'Sélectionnez Passerelle...'
                }));
                select.prop("selectedIndex", 1);

                //var date = new Date();
                //var dateStr = date.getFullYear() + "-" + ("00" + (date.getMonth() + 1)).slice(-2) + "-" + ("00" + date.getDate()).slice(-2);
                //var input = $('input[datepicker-options="vm.shipDateOptions"]');
                //input.val(dateStr);
                //debugger;
                //this.vm;
                //input.hide();

                //$('body').delegate(select, 'change', HidingDefaultShipDate); 
            }
        }, 50);
        
    }

            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function RenameShipper() // returns void
    function RenameShipper() {
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
            var shipper = $('shipper-carrier');           
            if (shipper.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                var div1 = shipper.find('div[class="col-md-4 col-sm-4 col-xs-12 no-left-padding"]');
                var div2 = div1.find('div[class="customDivLeft"]');
                var div3 = div2.find('div[class="side-by-side clearfix form-group"]');
                var label = div3.find('label');
                RenameElement(label, 'Gateway', 'passerelle');

                //Sorting
                var select = $('select[ng-model="vm.selectedShipper"]');
                select.html($("option[label]").sort(function (a, b) {
                    //debugger;
                    return a.text == b.text ? 0 : a.text < b.text ? -1 : 1
                }));
                //adding select gateway
                select.prepend($('<option>', {
                    value: '',
                    text: lang == 'en-US' ? 'Select Gateway...' : 'Sélectionnez Passerelle...'
                }));
                select.prop("selectedIndex", 0);
            }
        }, 50);
    }

// function AddItemsToGeneral() // returns void
    function AddItemsToGeneral(){
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
	        var $generalTab = $('form[name="generalForm"]');
            if ($generalTab.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                var itemsToAdd = '<div class="form-check" property="SaturdayDelivery" model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].SaturdayDelivery" caption="Saturday Delivery"><input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input ng-pristine ng-valid ng-empty ng-touched" ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].SaturdayDelivery"><label class="form-check-label ng-binding" style="padding-left: 6px;">Saturday Delivery</label></div>' +
                                '<div class="form-check" property="ProofRequireSignature" model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ProofRequireSignature" caption="Require Proof of Delivery Signature"><input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input ng-pristine ng-valid ng-empty ng-touched" ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ProofRequireSignature"><label class="form-check-label ng-binding" style="padding-left: 6px;">Require Proof of Delivery Signature</label></div>';
                let description = $generalTab.find('div[property="Description"]');
                //debugger;
                description.after(itemsToAdd);
            }
        }, 50);
        
    }

// this.PageLoaded(location) // returns void
    this.PageLoaded = function(location) {   
        if (location == '/transmit')
        {

            CopyShipperList();
            $('body').delegate('button[ng-click="vm.customUserMethod()"]', 'click', customUserMethod);
        }
    }

// this.PostShip(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) // returns void
    this.PostShip = function(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) {

    }

// customUserMethod() // returns void
    function customUserMethod () {
        debugger;
        var dateSelected = $('#exportDate').val();
        var shipper = $('#gateway :selected').text();
        var carrier = $('#carrier :selected').text();
        
        if (carrier === 'UPS')
        {
            carrier = 'CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS';
        }
        else
        {
            carrier = 'CONNECTSHIP_DHLXMLPI.DHL';
        }

        var data = { DateSelected: dateSelected, Shipper: shipper, Carrier: carrier};
        var payload = { UserContext: client.userContext, Data: JSON.stringify(data) };
        var result = client.thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', payload, false).responseJSON;
        
        debugger;
        if (result.ErrorCode > 0 || result == undefined) {
            client.alert.Danger(result.ErrorCode + ': ' + result.ErrorMessage);
        } else if (result.Message != undefined || result.Message != "") {
            client.alert.Success(result.Message);
        } else {
            client.alert.Success(result.Message);
        }
    }

// CopyShipperList() // returns void
    function CopyShipperList() {
        var loaded = setInterval(function() {
        debugger;
        let shipper = $('shipper-carrier');
            if (shipper.length > 0) {
                clearInterval(loaded);
                let div1 = shipper.find('div');
                let div2 = div1.find('div');
                let div3 = div2.find('div');
                let dpShip = div3.find('Select[ng-model="vm.selectedShipper"]');
                let dpOpt = dpShip.find('option');
                var $options = dpOpt.clone();
                $('#gateway').append($options);
            }
        }, 50);
        
        
    }

// client.init() // returns void
        init: function () {
            this.getUserContext();

            String.prototype.focus = function () {
                if (!focus(this))
                    var interval = setInterval(function(selector) { 
                        if (focus(selector)) clearInterval(interval);
                    }, 10, this);

                function focus(selector) {
                    $(selector).focus();
                    return $(selector).length;
                }
            };
        },

// client.dismiss.Danger() // returns void
                Danger: function () { $('div[role="alert"].alert-danger:visible').hide() }

// client.alert.Info(msg) // returns void
                Info: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-success alert-danger');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-info').show();
                },

// client.alert.Success(msg) // returns void
                Success: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-info alert-danger');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-success').show();
                },

// client.alert.Danger(msg) // returns void
                Danger: function (msg) {
                    uibalert.removeClass('alert-info alert-success');
                    uibalert.find('span:eq(1)').text(msg);
                    uibalert.addClass('alert-danger').show();
                }

// thinClientApiRequest(method, data, isAsync) // returns void
    var thinClientApiRequest = function (method, data, isAsync) {
        $.getJSON('config.json', function (config) {
            var shipExecServiceUrl = config.ShipExecServiceUrl;
            var authorizationToken = shipExecServiceUrl.startsWith('http') ? { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + JSON.parse(window.localStorage.getItem("TCToken")).access_token } : '';
            return $.post({ url: shipExecServiceUrl + '/' + method, data: data, async: isAsync, headers: authorizationToken });
        });
    }

// this.PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
    this.PageLoaded = function(location) { 
        if (location == "/closemanifest")
        {
            document.getElementById("ftpButton").addEventListener("click",function() {getFTPUploaded()});
            getUserContext();
