// function getFTPUploaded() // returns undefined
    function getFTPUploaded() {
        var selectedShipper = document.getElementById("Shipper").value;
		var shipper = '';
		debugger;
		if (selectedShipper !== "")
		{
			selectedShipper = JSON.parse(selectedShipper);
			shipper = selectedShipper.Name;
		}
        var data = { Action: 'ExportFTP', Shipper: shipper };

        $.post('api/ShippingService/UserMethod',
            {UserContext: userContext, Data: JSON.stringify(data) },
            function(response, status, xhr) {
            }
        ).done(function(response) {
            debugger;
            var resp = JSON.stringify(response);
            resp = JSON.parse(resp);
            debugger;
            if (resp.Data !== "" && resp.Data !== undefined)
            {
                alert('Lastest File: \n' + DecodeReturnString(resp.Data).substring(0,resp.Data.length -1));
            }
            else if (resp.ErrorMessage !== undefined)
            {
                if (resp.ErrorCode == '104')
                {
                    alert('Lastest File: \nNo files found!');
                }
                else
                {
                    alert(resp.ErrorMessage);
                }
            }
        });
    }

// function DecodeReturnString(data) // returns parsed decoded string or undefined on error
    function DecodeReturnString(data)
    { 
        try
        { 
            return JSON.parse($("<div />").html(data).text());
        }
        catch (error)
        { 
            console.log(error.name);
            console.log(error.message);
            console.log(data);
        }
    }

// function getUserContext() // returns undefined
    function getUserContext() {
        debugger;
        if (userContext === undefined) {
            $.get({ url: "api/usercontext/GET", async:false })
            .done(function (data) {
               userContext = data;
            })
        }
    }

// Source: Rainier Arms (RNRARMS)_RainierArms shipping CBR_1640.cs
// function PageLoaded(loaded) // returns void
this.PageLoaded = function(loaded) {
        //debugger;
        if (loaded === '/shipping') {
           var interval = setInterval(function () {  
                var loaded = $('li[heading=Reference]').length && $('form[name=referenceForm]').find('div[property=MiscReference18]').length;

                if (loaded) {
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    // after page loads, hide misc props used for settings
                    $('form[name=referenceForm]').find('div[property=MiscReference18]').hide();
                    $('form[name=referenceForm]').find('div[property=MiscReference19]').hide();
                    $('form[name=referenceForm]').find('div[property=MiscReference20]').hide();
                }
            }, 200);
        }
    };

// function toggleDownloadLoading(downloading) // returns void
    function toggleDownloadLoading(downloading) {
        $('#download-loading').toggle();
        $('#download-button').prop('disabled',downloading);
    }

// function NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) {
		debugger;
		vmTemp = this.vm;

		let index = this.vm.currentShipment.Packages.length - 1;
		this.vm.downloadFromCin7 = this.downloadFromCin7API;
		this.vm.downloadLoading = downloadOrders;
		this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[index].MiscReference19 = false;    // signature_required_checkbox
		this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[index].MiscReference20 = true;    // autoship_checkbox
		//this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[index].MiscReference17 = false;    // noshop_checkbox - not used
		
		if (downloadOrders) {
		    toggleDownloadLoading(downloadOrders);
		}
		
		//debugger; // example code
		//this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ShipperReference = 
        //    $('#logoutForm')[0].children[1].getElementsByTagName('li')[0].children[0].text.replace('Hello ', '').replace('!', '');
	};

// function AddPackage(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) // returns void
this.AddPackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
		// This function is called only when Shipment Mode = Together (option 0)
		//debugger;
		// Copy some previous package settings to new one
		// if ($('select[ng-model="vm.shipMode"]').find('option:selected').val() === "number:0")
		// {
			shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].UserData1 = shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].UserData1;
			shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].ShipperReference = shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].ShipperReference;
			shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].ConsigneeReference = shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].ConsigneeReference;
			shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].MiscReference1 = shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].MiscReference1;
			shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].MiscReference2 = shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].MiscReference2;
			shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].MiscReference3 = shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].MiscReference3;
			shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].MiscReference4 = shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].MiscReference4;
			shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].MiscReference5 = shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].MiscReference5;
			shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].Description = shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].Description;
			shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].CommercialInvoiceMethod = shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].CommercialInvoiceMethod;
			shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex].SaturdayDelivery = shipmentRequest.Packages[packageIndex - 1].SaturdayDelivery;
		//}

		//getWeight(this.vm);   // TODO: disabled until scale issue resolved
	};

// function PreLoad(value, shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns void
this.PreLoad = function(value, shipmentRequest, userParams) {
		//debugger;
		//getWeight(this.vm);   // TODO: disabled until scale issue resolved
		
		// signed checkbox value
		let signedChecked = $('.form-check[property=MiscReference19]').find('input').prop('checked');
		if (signedChecked === true) {
			userParams.autoship = "autoship";
		}
	};

// function PostLoad(value, shipmentRequest) // returns void
this.PostLoad = function(value, shipmentRequest) {
		//debugger;
		
		if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service !== undefined && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol === undefined) {
			alert("No service selected!");
		}

		if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage !== null  && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage === 'validate')
		{
			// click validate button
			$('name-address[nameaddress="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee"]').find('button[ng-click="validate(nameaddress)"]').click();
			return;
		}

		if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage !== null && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage.substring(0, 4) === 'pop:') {
			alert(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage.substring(4));
			return;
		}

		if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage !== null && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage !== '')
		{
			alert(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage);
			return;
		}

		if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country === 'US') {
			this.vm.shipMode = 1;
		} else {
			this.vm.shipMode = 0;
		}
		
		//getWeight(this.vm);   // TODO: disabled until scale issue resolved
		
		if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5 !== null && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5 === 'autoship')
		{
			if (!this.vm.profile.ProfileSetting.DisableShip) {
				this.vm.checkShip();
			}
		}
	};

// function PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns void
this.PreShip = function(shipmentRequest, userParams) {
		//debugger;

		if (shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Weight !== undefined) {
			userParams.weight = shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Weight.Amount;
		}
	};

// function PostShip(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) // returns void
this.PostShip = function(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) {
		//debugger;
		if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorCode !== undefined && shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorCode !== 0)
		{
			alert("Shipping error: " + shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorCode);
		}
		this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].MiscReference19 = false;    // signature_required_checkbox
		this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20 = true;    // autoship_checkbox
	};

// function downloadFromCin7API() // returns void
this.downloadFromCin7API = function() {
		//debugger;
		let data = { Action: 'Download_Orders', Params: ''};
		
		downloadOrders = true;
		toggleDownloadLoading(downloadOrders);

		// call SBR UserMethod to access Cin7 API to download orders
		$.post({
			url: clientService.config.ShipExecServiceUrl + '/UserMethod',
			headers: clientService.authorizationToken(),
			data: {
			    UserContext: client.userContext,
			    Data: JSON.stringify(data)
			}
		}).done(function (data) {
		    //debugger;
			downloadOrders = false;
		    toggleDownloadLoading(downloadOrders);
		    
			if (data.Data === true) {
				alert('Download successful!');
			}
			else {
				alert('Download was not successful');
			}
		}).fail(function (err) {
		    //debugger;
			downloadOrders = false;
		    toggleDownloadLoading(downloadOrders);
			console.log(err.responseJSON);
			alert('Download was not successful');
		});
	}

// Source: Revvity Omics (PerkinElmer)_Perkin Elmer Reference Rule_1531.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
    this.PageLoaded = function (location) {
        if (location == '/shipping') {
            var shippers = this.vm.profile.Shippers;
            this.vm.profile.Shippers = shippers.sort(function (a, b) {
                if (a.Name > b.Name) return 1;
                if (a.Name < b.Name) return -1;
                return 0;
            });
        }
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
	this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest){
        this.vm.myShipperChange = this.MyShipperChange;
        this.vm.myShipperChange();
    }

// PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
    this.PreShip = function(shipmentRequest, userParams) {
		var today = new Date();
		var dayOfWeek = today.getDay();
		// if(dayOfWeek==5){
		//     shipmentRequest.Packages[0].SaturdayDelivery = true;
        // }

        if (today.toLocaleDateString() === '12/24/2020') {
            shipmentRequest.Packages[0].SaturdayDelivery = true;
        } else if (dayOfWeek == 5) {
            shipmentRequest.Packages[0].SaturdayDelivery = true;
        }
    }

// MyShipperChange() // returns undefined
    this.MyShipperChange = function () {
        var shipmentRequest = this.currentShipment;
        var originName = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.Name;

        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference = originName ? shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.Symbol : '';
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference = originName ? shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.StateProvince + "," + originName.split('(')[0] : '';
    }

// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
    this.PageLoaded = function(location) { 
        if(location === "/"){

             }

        if (location == '/history') {
            $('#reports').on('change', function (e)
            {
                    let v = $(this).find('option:selected').text();
                    if (v == 'Hazmat Report')
                        {
                            $('button[value="Export"]').off();
                                        $('body').delegate('button[value=Export]', 'click', function(e) {

            });
                        }
                })
            }   
    });
    }

            $('button[value=Export]').removeAttr('ng-click');
            $('body').delegate('button[value=Export]', 'click', function(e) {
               // getHazmatReport();
            });
        }
    }

// Shipping() // returns void
    this.Shipping = function () {    
        this.vm.hideSaveAddress = true;
        this.vm.isUpdateAddressBookEntry = true;
        this.vm.hideAddressSearch = true;
        this.vm.thirdPartyBillingDisabled = thirdPartyBillingDisabled;
        debugger;
        
        client.shipping.consignee.searchAddresses.addButtonLabel(' ' + this.vm.translations.Common.SearchAddresses);
        client.shipping.consignee.validateAddress.addButtonLabel(' ' + this.vm.translations.Common.ValidateAddress);

        function thirdPartyBillingDisabled(isDisabled) {
            var $tpb = $('div[property="ThirdPartyBilling"]');
            if (isDisabled) {
                this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling = false;
                this.thirdPartyBilling();
                $tpb.find('input').attr('disabled', true);
                $tpb.find('label').addClass('disabled');
            } else {
                $tpb.find('input').removeAttr('disabled');
                $tpb.find('label').removeClass('disabled');
            }
        }
    }

// PreLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns void
    this.PreLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams) {
        client.dismiss.All();
        // shipmentRequest.Packages.length = 1;
        // shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference20 = null;
        // var packages = shipmentRequest.Packages;
        // for (var i = 0; i < packages.length; i++) {
        //     packages[i].MiscReference20 = null;
        // }
    }

// PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns void
    this.PostLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest) {
        debugger;
        this.vm.thirdPartyBillingDisabled(true);
        this.vm.disableMiscReference20 = true;
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
    this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) {
        debugger;
        if (typeof this.vm.thirdPartyBillingDisabled === 'function')
            this.vm.thirdPartyBillingDisabled(false);

        this.vm.disableMiscReference20 = false;
        client.shipping.loadValue.focus();
    }

// GetEmail() // returns string
        GetEmail() {
            var emailText = "";
            var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a");
            Array.from(tags).forEach(function (tag) {
                if (tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!", "").trim();
            });
            return emailText;
        }

// GetCustom(fieldName, customDataType) // returns string
        GetCustom(fieldName, customDataType) {
            var returnValue = "";
            var customData = null;
            if (customDataType === "User") customData = this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
            if (customDataType === "To") customData = this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.CustomData;

            if (customData) {
                customData.forEach(function (customField) {
                    if (fieldName === customField.Key) returnValue = customField.Value;
                })
            }
            return returnValue;
        }

            event.data.keyDownAction = undefined;
            if (event.key === "/") {
                event.preventDefault();
                event.data.keyDownAction = 'Save';
                $('#cbrKeydown').click();
            }
        });

        function keyDown() {
            this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Contact = "hello";
            this.selectedServices = [
                { Symbol: "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.NDS" }
            ];
        }           
    }

// thinClientApiRequest(method, data, isAsync) // returns any
    var thinClientApiRequest = function (method, data, isAsync) {
        $.getJSON('config.json', function (config) {
            var shipExecServiceUrl = config.ShipExecServiceUrl;
            var authorizationToken = shipExecServiceUrl.startsWith('http') ? { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + JSON.parse(window.localStorage.getItem("TCToken")).access_token } : '';
            return $.post({ url: shipExecServiceUrl + '/' + method, data: data, async: isAsync, headers: authorizationToken });
        });
    }

            }
        */
    }

// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
    this.PageLoaded = function(location) {  
        if (location === '/shipping') {
            // hide the select all checkbox and text
            var checkboxInterval = setInterval(function() {
                var selectAll = $('input[ng-model="vm.isAllServicesSelected"]');
                if (selectAll.length > 0) {  // if the element has rendered
                    clearInterval(checkboxInterval); // <-- important to turn the interval off
                    selectAll.hide();
                    $(".chkLabel").hide();                    
                    $('div[model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.MiscReference11"]').hide();
                    $('div[model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.MiscReference12"]').hide();
                    $('div[ng-if="vm.showServiceSelection"]').attr("class", "col-md-6 no-left-right-padding");
                    $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Amount"]').on('input', function () {
                        this.value = this.value.match(/^\d+\.?\d{0,2}/);
                    });
                }
            }, 200);
        }
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) { 
        // set defaults
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference7 = "No";
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference11 = "-- choose option --";
        $('#LoadInput').prop('disabled', false);
        $('#LoadButton').prop('disabled', false);
        $('div[model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.MiscReference11"]').hide();
        $('div[model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.MiscReference12"]').hide();
        
        // Pending Shipment
        $('body').on('click', 'table[aria-describedby="Pending Shipments"] input[type="button"]', this.vm, function(e) {
            $([property=MiscReference12] input).attr('maxlength','35'); // limit the charecter number for the service change reason field
            $('body').delegate('select[property="Service"]', 'change', function (e) { serviceChangeOptions(this.value); });
            $('body').delegate('[property="MiscReference11"] select', 'change', function (e) { serviceChangeComment(this.value); });
            $('#LoadInput').prop('disabled', true);
            $('#LoadButton').prop('disabled', true);
            serviceChangeOptionsPending();
        });
    }

// PreLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
     this.PreLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams) { 
         if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipper == null || shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipper == ""){
             throw new Error('WARNING: Shipper not selected');
         }
    }

// PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.PostLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest) {
        commentRequired = false;
        showChangeOptions = true; 
        // style changes
        $([property=MiscReference12] input).attr('maxlength','35'); // limit the charecter number for the service change reason field
        $('body').delegate('select[property="Service"]', 'change', function (e) { serviceChangeOptions(this.value); });
        $('body').delegate('[property="MiscReference11"] select', 'change', function (e) { serviceChangeComment(this.value); });
        $('#LoadInput').prop('disabled', true);
        $('#LoadButton').prop('disabled', true);
    }

// PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
    this.PreShip = function(shipmentRequest, userParams) {  
        //validate comment required
        var ServiceChangeCode = $('div[model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.MiscReference11"] :input').val();
        if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol != shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference10){
            if(ServiceChangeCode == "string:Other - Comment Field" && (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference12 == null || shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference12 == "")){
                throw new Error('WARNING: Service Change Comment is required');
            } else if(ServiceChangeCode == "string:-- choose option --" || ServiceChangeCode == "?" || ServiceChangeCode == "" || ServiceChangeCode == null) {
                throw new Error('WARNING: Service Change Reason Code is required');
            }
        } else {
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference11 = "Select Option";
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference12 = "";
        }

        // weight package rule
        for (let i = 0; i < shipmentRequest.Packages.length; i++) {
            if(shipmentRequest.Packages[i].Weight.Amount == null | shipmentRequest.Packages[i].Weight.Amount == ""){
                var pagckageNum = i+1;
                throw new Error('WARNING: Package '+pagckageNum+' is missing a weight value');
            }
        }

        // 150lb package rule
        for (let i = 0; i < shipmentRequest.Packages.length; i++) {
            if(shipmentRequest.Packages[i].Weight.Amount > 150){
                var pagckageNum = i+1;
                throw new Error('WARNING: Package '+pagckageNum+' Has a weight of more than 150Lbs');
            }
        }

        // ShipDate in the past
        var now = new Date();
        var Year = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate.Year;
        var Month = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate.Month - 1;
        var Day = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate.Day;
        var shipDate = new Date(Year, Month, Day);
        if(shipDate.setHours(0,0,0,0) < now.setHours(0,0,0,0)){
            throw new Error('WARNING: Package ShipDate is in the past');
        }
        
        // Weight units is not LB
        for (let i = 0; i < shipmentRequest.Packages.length; i++) {
            if(shipmentRequest.Packages[i].Weight.Units != 'LB'){
                var pagckageNum = i+1;
                throw new Error('WARNING: Package '+pagckageNum+' Has an incorrect unit for weight. Please use LB');
            }
        }
    }

// PostShip(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) // returns undefined
    this.PostShip = function(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) {
        // reset the hidden values
        showChangeOptions = false;
        $('body').delegate('select[property="Service"]', 'change', function (e) {  });
        $('div[model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.MiscReference11"]').hide();
        $('div[model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.MiscReference12"]').hide();
        
        // alert any errors
        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData1){
            alert(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData1);
        }
        
        // remove discount from lastShipment
        $("label:contains('Discount:')").next("span").remove();
        $("label:contains('Discount:')").next("br").remove();
        $("label:contains('Discount:')").remove();
    }

// Source: SAVERS (SAVERS)_Savers Client Side Rules_1715.cs
// function ClientBusinessRules() // returns constructor-like object with UI-related rule methods
function ClientBusinessRules()
{
    this.PageLoaded = function(location)
    {
        if (location === '/shipping')
            this.Shipping();
    }

    this.Shipping = function()

    {
		
		
        //Set Consignee Countries
        var consigneeCountries = ['', 'US', 'CA', 'AU']
        setConsigneeCountries(consigneeCountries);

        //Set Currency Options
        declaredValueCurrencyOptions();
        customsDeclaredValueCurrencyOptions();
        commodityUnitValueCurrencyOptions();
        invoiceDiscountCurrencyOptions();
        invoiceFreightCurrencyOptions();
        invoiceInsuranceFeeCurrencyOptions();


        $(document).ready(function () {
            filterPickupPaymentType();
        });

        function filterPickupPaymentType() {
            $('body').delegate('button[ng-click="vm.createPickupRequestClick()"]', 'click', function (event) {
                var list = ['PAY_BY_SHIPPER_ACCOUNT'];
                var element = '[ng-model="vm.pickup.PaymentType"] option';
                replaceOptionValues(list, element);
            });
        }
        //var currencies = ['USD', 'CAD'];
        //setCurrency(currencies);
    }

    //Consignee Countries Options
    function setConsigneeCountries(selectedCountries)
    {
        var countryStringValue = ('string:' + selectedCountries.join('|string:')).split('|');
        var interval = setInterval(function()

        {
            var consigneeCountries = $('name-address[address-property-name="Consignee"] select[name="Country"] option');
            if (consigneeCountries.length)
            {
                clearInterval(interval);
                Array.from(consigneeCountries).forEach(function(opt)

                {
                    if (opt.value != '')
                    {
                        if (!countryStringValue.includes(opt.value))
                        {
                            opt.remove();
                        }
                    }
                });
            }
        }, 50);            
    }

    //Declared Value Currency Options
    function declaredValueCurrencyOptions()
    {
        var list = ['USD', 'CAD'];
        var element = '[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].DeclaredValueAmount.Currency"] option';
        setCurrencyOptions(list, element);
    }

    //Customs Declared Value Currency Options
    function customsDeclaredValueCurrencyOptions()
    {
        var list = ['USD', 'CAD'];
        var element = '[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].DeclaredValueCustoms.Currency"] option';
        setCurrencyOptions(list, element);
    }

    //Commodity Unit Value Currency Options
    function commodityUnitValueCurrencyOptions()
    {
        var list = ['USD', 'CAD'];
        var element = '[ng-model="vm.commodityContent.UnitValue.Currency"] option';
        setCurrencyOptions(list, element);
    }

    //Invoice Discount Currency Options
    function invoiceDiscountCurrencyOptions()
    {
        var list = ['USD', 'CAD'];
        var element = '[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].InvoiceDiscount.Currency"] option';
        setCurrencyOptions(list, element);
    }

    //Invoice Freight Currency Options
    function invoiceFreightCurrencyOptions()
    {
        var list = ['USD', 'CAD'];
        var element = '[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].InvoiceFreight.Currency"] option';
        setCurrencyOptions(list, element);
    }

    //Invoice Insurance Fee Currency Options
    function invoiceInsuranceFeeCurrencyOptions()
    {
        var list = ['USD', 'CAD'];
        var element = '[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].InvoiceInsuranceFee.Currency"] option';
        setCurrencyOptions(list, element);
    }

    //Invoice Other Fee Currency Options
    function invoiceOtherFeeCurrencyOptions()
    {
        var list = ['USD', 'CAD'];
        var element = '[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].InvoiceOtherFee.Currency"] option';
        setCurrencyOptions(list, element);
    }



//SetCurrencyOptions Function
function setCurrencyOptions(list, element)
    {
        var interval = setInterval(function() 
            {
                var currencies = $(element);
                if (currencies.length)
                {
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    currencies.each(function(){ if (!list.includes(this.text)) this.remove(); });
                }
            }, 50);
    }

 function replaceOptionValues(list, element) {
        var valuelist = list.map(function (e) { return 'string:' + e });
        var interval = setInterval(function () {
            var $element = $(element);
            if ($element.length) {
                clearInterval(interval);
                $element.each(function () {
                    if (!valuelist.includes(this.value) && this.value != '') this.remove();
                });
            }
        }, 50);
    }

    {

    this.vm.disableShipMode = true;
    filterPickupPaymentType();

        function filterPickupPaymentType() {
            var list = ['Pay by shipper account'];            
            var interval = setInterval(function () {
                var currencies = $('[ng-model="vm.pickup.PaymentType"] option');
                if (currencies.length) {
                    debugger;
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    currencies.each(function (){ if (!list.includes(this.text)) this.remove(); });
                }
            }, 50);
        }
}

this.NextPackage = function(shipmentRequest, packageIndex) {
}

this.PostSelectAddressBook = function(shipmentRequest, nameaddress) {

    //debugger;

    //Map Store Number to ShipperReference
    shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference = nameaddress.Code;

    //Set Default Services Based on From and To Countries		
    var fromCountry = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.Country;
    var toCountry = nameaddress.Country;

    //Email Address Mappings
	if(nameaddress.Email != null)
	{
		shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipNotificationAddressEmail = nameaddress.Email.trim();
		shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail = nameaddress.Email.trim();
		shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail = nameaddress.Email.trim();
		shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ReturnDeliveryNotificationAddressEmail = nameaddress.Email.trim();
		shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ReturnDeliveryAddressEmail = nameaddress.Email.trim();
	}

    //Store Address Book ID value in MiscReference20 to signify that consignee address came from Address Book and was not manually entered.
    shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference20 = nameaddress.AddressBookId.toString();


    if (fromCountry == 'US' && toCountry == 'US')
    {
        this.SetSelectedService("UPSAPI.UPS.GND")
		this.SetCurrencyCAD(toCountry)
		this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].DeclaredValueAmount = { Currency: "USD" };
	}

    if (fromCountry == 'US' && toCountry == 'CA')
    {
        this.SetSelectedService("UPSAPI.UPS.STANDARD")
		this.SetCurrencyCAD(toCountry)
		this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].DeclaredValueAmount = { Currency: "USD" };
	}

    if (fromCountry == 'CA' && toCountry == 'CA')
    {
        this.SetSelectedService("UPSAPI.UPS.STANDARD")
		this.SetCurrencyCAD(toCountry)
		this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].DeclaredValueAmount = { Currency: "CAD" };
	}

    if (fromCountry == 'CA' && toCountry == 'US')
    {
        this.SetSelectedService("UPSAPI.UPS.STANDARD")
		this.SetCurrencyCAD(toCountry)
		this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].DeclaredValueAmount = { Currency: "CAD" };
	}
}


//Select Service in Service List Box 
this.SetSelectedService = function(serviceSymbol)
    {
    if (this.vm.profile != null)
    {
        for (var i = 0; i < this.vm.profile.Services.length; i++)
        {
            if (this.vm.profile.Services[i].Symbol === serviceSymbol)
            {
                this.vm.selectedServices = [this.vm.profile.Services[i]];
                this.vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Service = this.vm.profile.Services[i];
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}

//Set Currency to CAD
this.SetCurrencyCAD = function(shipToCountry)
{
    if (this.vm.profile != null)
    {
        if (shipToCountry === "CA")
        {
            //this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].DeclaredValueAmount = { Currency: "CAD" };
            this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].DeclaredValueCustoms = { Currency: "CAD" };
            this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].CodAmount = { Currency: "CAD" };
            this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].InvoiceDiscount = { Currency: "CAD" };
            this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].InvoiceFreight = { Currency: "CAD" };
            this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].InvoiceInsuranceFee = { Currency: "CAD" };
            this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].InvoiceOtherFee = { Currency: "CAD" };
        }
        else
        {
            //this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].DeclaredValueAmount = { Currency: "USD" };
            this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].DeclaredValueCustoms = { Currency: "USD" };
            this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].CodAmount = { Currency: "USD" };
            this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].InvoiceDiscount = { Currency: "USD" };
            this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].InvoiceFreight = { Currency: "USD" };
            this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].InvoiceInsuranceFee = { Currency: "USD" };
            this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].InvoiceOtherFee = { Currency: "USD" };
        }
    }
}



}

// function CreateCustomShippingElements(vm) // returns void
    function CreateCustomShippingElements(vm) {
        //debugger;
        //#region Create Ship Goods Type DropDown
        var shipGoodsType = "<div class='form-group col-md-12 no-left-right-padding'>" +
        "<div class='col-md-6 no-left-padding'>" +

        "<option value='non_distilled'>Non Distilled Spirit</option>" +
        "<option value='non_sample'>Non Sample Case Goods</option>" +
        "<option value='sample'>Sample</option>" +
        "</select>" +
        "</div>" +
        "<div class='col-md-6'>" +
        "<div style='margin-top: 6px'>&nbsp;</div>" +
        "<label style='margin-right: 8%'><input id='third_party_rule' type='checkbox' ng-model='vmTemp.currentShipment.Packages[vmTemp.packageIndex].MiscReference19'>&nbsp; Third Party Rule</label>" +
        "<label><input id='adult_signature_required_rule' type='checkbox' ng-model='vmTemp.currentShipment.Packages[vmTemp.packageIndex].MiscReference20'>&nbsp; Adult Signature Required Rule</label>" +
        "</div>" +
        "</div>" +
        // Cost Code dropdown
        "<div class='col-md-6 no-left-padding'>" +
        "<label for='search_input' style='margin-top: 6px'>Person you are shipping for: </label>" +
        "<div class='col-md-12 no-left-right-padding'>" +
        "<div class='col-md-10 no-left-padding'><input id='search_input' type='text' name='inputsearch' class='form-control'></div>" +
        "<input id='searchButton' type='button' value='Search' class='btn btn-primary col-md-2'>" +
        "</div></div>" +
        "<div class='col-md-6 no-right-padding'>" +
        "<div style='margin-top: 6px'>&nbsp;</div>" +
        "<select id='costcodes' class='form-control'>" +
        "<option value='Default' selected='selected'>Select Cost Center</option></select>" +
        "</div>";
        
        $('form[name="generalForm"]').find('textarea').after(shipGoodsType);
        $('#costcodes').hide();

        //#endregion

        //#region Create Ship Goods List Select Event
        $("#ship_goods_type").change(function () {
            //Capture ship goods type and store
            var shipGoodsType = $('#ship_goods_type').val();
            vmTemp.currentShipment.Packages[vmTemp.packageIndex].MiscReference4 = shipGoodsType;

            //Assign shipper in listbox
            //$('#ctl00_cphContent_shipper_list').val('S_FREDERICKSBURG_VA');
        });
        //#endregion

        $('#third_party_rule').prop('checked', vmTemp.currentShipment.Packages[vmTemp.packageIndex].MiscReference19);
        $('#third_party_rule').change(function () {
            var thirdParty = $('#third_party_rule').prop('checked');
            vmTemp.currentShipment.Packages[vmTemp.packageIndex].MiscReference19 = thirdParty;
        });

        $('#adult_signature_required_rule').prop('checked', vmTemp.currentShipment.Packages[vmTemp.packageIndex].MiscReference20);
        $('#adult_signature_required_rule').change(function () {
            var signatureRequired = $('#adult_signature_required_rule').prop('checked');
            vmTemp.currentShipment.Packages[vmTemp.packageIndex].MiscReference20 = signatureRequired;
        });
        //#endregion

        //#region Click Search Button
        $("#searchButton").click(function() {
            //Remove drop-down control if it exists before creating a new one
            //$("#costcodes").remove();

            // added prefix to beginning of search value for UserMethod call, since method is used for other functions
            var searchName = "search|" + $('#search_input').val();

            if (searchName.length !== 0 && searchName != 'search|')
            {
                // reset dropdown
                $('#costcodes').off('change');
                $('#costcodes option:not(:first)').remove();
                $('#costcodes').hide();

                // call user method
                var params = searchName;

                //$.post('api/ShippingService/UserMethod',
                //{
                //    UserContext: userContext,
                //    Data: JSON.stringify(params)
                
                // updated for 2.3
                $.post({
                    url: clientService.config.ShipExecServiceUrl + '/UserMethod',
                    data: {
                        UserContext: client.userContext,
                        Data: JSON.stringify(params)
                    },
                    headers: clientService.authorizationToken()
                }).done(function(result) {
                    //debugger;
                    result = decodeReturnString(result);
                    if (result !== null && result !== undefined && result !== '') {
                        if (result.ErrorCode === 0 && result.Data !== undefined && !(typeof(result.Data) == 'string' && result.Data.indexOf('[Error]') == -1)) {
                            ParseJson(result.Data);
                        }
                        else {
                            //Display Error
                            alert(result.Data);
                        }
                    }
                    else {
                        alert("No data was returned from search");
                    }
                }).fail(function (e) {
                    alert(e.message);
                });
            }
            else
            {
                alert("Please enter name of whom you are shipping for before clicking the search button.");
                $('#search_input').css('background-color', '#fffef0');
                $('#search_input').focus();
            }
        });
        //#endregion

        //#region Create Cost Code File Button
        var costCodeFileButton = "<span>" +
            "<input type='file' id='fileLoader' name='files' title='Load Cost Code File' style='display:none;'> " +
            "<button id='btnOpenFileDialog' value='Import New GL Code File' class='btn btn-xs btn-primary'>Import New GL Code File</button>" +
            "</span>";

        // add button beside Pending Shipments
        $("div.row.top-tool-bar").find("div.pull-left").append(costCodeFileButton);
        $("#fileLoader").change(function() {
            openFileDialog();
        });
        $("#btnOpenFileDialog").click(function() {
            $("#fileLoader").click();
        });
        //#endregion
    }

// function openFileDialog() // returns void
    function openFileDialog() {
        //debugger;
        var filesSelected = document.getElementById("fileLoader");

        if (filesSelected !== undefined) {
            const fileReader = new FileReader();

            if (filesSelected.files[0]) {
                fileReader.readAsDataURL(filesSelected.files[0]);
            }

            fileReader.onload = function (event) {
                var files = event.target.result;

                // Get base64 file data
                var contents = event.target.result.split(',')[1];

                // adding prefix to beginning of file data to send to user method
                var fileData = "file|" + contents;

                // $.post('api/ShippingService/UserMethod',
                // {
                //     UserContext: userContext,
                //     Data: JSON.stringify(fileData)

                // updated for 2.3
                $.post({
                    url: clientService.config.ShipExecServiceUrl + '/UserMethod',
                    data: {
                        UserContext: client.userContext,
                        Data: JSON.stringify(fileData)
                    },
                    headers: clientService.authorizationToken()
                }).done(function(result) {
                    //debugger;
                    // result.Data should be unencoded [Success] or [Error] string
                    if (result.ErrorCode === 0 && result.Data !== undefined && result.Data.indexOf('[Error]') == -1) {
                        alert(result.Data);
                    }
                    else {
                        // display error
                        alert(result.Data);
                    }
                }).fail(function (e) {
                    alert(e.message);
                });
            };
        }
    }

// function decodeReturnString(data) // returns parsed response object or undefined
    function decodeReturnString(data) {
        try {
            data.Data = JSON.parse($('<div />').html(data.Data).text());
            if (data.ErrorMessage) {
                data.ErrorMessage = $('<div />').html(data.ErrorMessage).text();
            }
            return data;
        }
        catch (error) {
            console.log(error);
            //console.log(data);
        }
    }

// function ParseJson(result) // returns void
    function ParseJson(result) {
        //debugger;
        var jsonLoad = result; //jQuery.parseJSON(result);
       
        if (jsonLoad !== null && jsonLoad !== undefined)
        {
            $('#search_input').css('background-color', '#fffef0');
    
            //#region Build Drop-Down List
            var html = "";

            for (let i in jsonLoad.listData)
            {
                html += "<option value='" + jsonLoad.listData[i].glCode + "'>" + jsonLoad.listData[i].fullName + " " + jsonLoad.listData[i].glCode + "</option>";
            }
    
            if (jsonLoad.listData.length === 0)
            {
                alert("No records were returned from search")
            }
            else //More than one record returned
            {
                //$("#costcodes").remove();
                //$(html).insertAfter("#searchButton");
                $("#costcodes").append(html);
                $('#costcodes').change(function() {
                    populateShipExec();
                });
                $("#costcodes").show();
            }
    
        }
        else
        {
            alert("Error populating dropdown box --- " + jsonLoad.ErrorMessage);
        }
    
    }

// function populateShipExec() // returns void
    function populateShipExec() {
        //Get cost code value from selected value in drop down list
        var costcode = document.getElementById('costcodes').value;
        var fullitemtext = document.getElementById('costcodes').options[document.getElementById('costcodes').selectedIndex].text;
    
        //Populate Cost Code in shipper_reference field
        vmTemp.currentShipment.Packages[vmTemp.packageIndex].ShipperReference = costcode;
    
        //Populate Full Value in Reference Field 3
        vmTemp.currentShipment.Packages[vmTemp.packageIndex].MiscReference3 = fullitemtext;
    
        //Reset ShipExec Controls
        //document.getElementById('costcodes').outerHTML = "";
        $('#costcodes').off('change');
        $('#costcodes option:not(:first)').remove();
        $('#costcodes').hide();
        ////resetShipExec();
        $('#search_input').val('');
        $('#search_input').css('background-color', '#fffef0');
    }

// function resetShipExec() // returns void
    function resetShipExec() {    
        $('#search_input').val('');
        $('#search_input').css('background-color', '#fffef0');
        $('#ship_goods_type').val("default");
    }

// this.Shipping() // returns void
    this.Shipping = function () {
        
         var userContext = client.userContext;
          this.vm.loadVendorConsignee = function () {
            console.log(this.profile.UserInformation);
           
            this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress = {
                
                Company: this.profile.UserInformation.Address.Company,
                Contact: this.profile.UserInformation.Address.Contact,
                Address1: this.profile.UserInformation.Address.Address1,
                Address2: this.profile.UserInformation.Address.Address2,
                Address3: this.profile.UserInformation.Address.Address3,
                City: this.profile.UserInformation.Address.City,
                StateProvince: this.profile.UserInformation.Address.StateProvince,
                PostalCode: this.profile.UserInformation.Address.PostalCode,
                Country: this.profile.UserInformation.Address.Country,
                Email: this.profile.UserInformation.Address.Email,
                Phone: this.profile.UserInformation.Address.Phone
            }
            
            var consigneeaddress = consigneeAddress(); 
               
           this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee = {

                Company: consigneeaddress[0].Company,
                Contact: consigneeaddress[0].Contact,
                Address1: consigneeaddress[0].Address1,
                Address2: consigneeaddress[0].Address2,
                Address3: consigneeaddress[0].Address3,
                City: consigneeaddress[0].City,
                StateProvince: consigneeaddress[0].StateProvince,
                PostalCode: consigneeaddress[0].PostalCode,
                Country: consigneeaddress[0].Country,
                Email: consigneeaddress[0].Email,
                Phone: consigneeaddress[0].Phone,
                Account : consigneeaddress[0].Account
            }
            
            var shipper =  $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Shipper"]').val();
            shipper = shipper.replace('string:', '');
           debugger;
            if(shipper !== '' && shipper !== 'SCH_FARGO'){
            
               this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling = true;
               
               var thirdpartybillingaddress = thirdPartyBillingAddress(); 
               
               this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBillingAddress = {
    
                    Company: thirdpartybillingaddress[0].Company,
                    Contact: thirdpartybillingaddress[0].Contact,
                    Address1: thirdpartybillingaddress[0].Address1,
                    Address2: thirdpartybillingaddress[0].Address2,
                    Address3: thirdpartybillingaddress[0].Address3,
                    City: thirdpartybillingaddress[0].City,
                    StateProvince: thirdpartybillingaddress[0].StateProvince,
                    PostalCode: thirdpartybillingaddress[0].PostalCode,
                    Country: thirdpartybillingaddress[0].Country,
                    Email: thirdpartybillingaddress[0].Email,
                    Phone: thirdpartybillingaddress[0].Phone,
                    Account : thirdpartybillingaddress[0].Account
                }
            }
            else
            {
                this.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling = false;
            }
            
        }
    }

// this.PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns void
    this.PostLoad = function (loadValue, shipmentRequest) {
       
        vm.loadVendorConsignee();
    }

        this.vm.loadVendorConsignee(); 
    }

// Source: Schenker, Inc (schenker)_Schenker CBR 2.3 Fix_1756.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
    this.PageLoaded = function (location) {
        vm = this.vm;
        appendCSS();
        dismissAlertDialog();

        if (location === '/shipping') {
            consigneeStateIsRequired = vm.fieldOptions["Consignee.StateProvince"].IsRequired;
            consigneePhoneIsRequired = vm.fieldOptions["Consignee.Phone"].IsRequired;
            descriptionIsRequired = vm.fieldOptions.Description.IsRequired;

            var interval = setInterval(function () {
                var $consigneeNameAddress = $('name-address[address-property-name="Consignee"]')
                consigneeState = $consigneeNameAddress.find('[name="stateProvince"]');
                consigneeCountry = $consigneeNameAddress.find('[name="Country"]');
                consigneePhoneLabel = $consigneeNameAddress.find('label:contains("Phone")');
                consigneePhone = $consigneeNameAddress.find('[name="Phone"]');

                descriptionLabel = $('label:contains("Description Of Goods")');

                var loaded = consigneeCountry.length;

                if (loaded) {
                    pageLoaded = true;
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    documentReady();
                }
            }, 50);
        }
    };

// PostSelectAddressBook(shipmentRequest, nameaddress, addressName) // returns undefined
    this.PostSelectAddressBook = function (shipmentRequest, nameaddress, addressName) {
        setConsigneeStateProvinceRequirement();
    };

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        this.vm.IsValid = this.IsValidated;
        var originCustomData = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference = GetKeyValue('Custom1', originCustomData);

        if (!this.vm.IsValid('ShipperReference', shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference)) {
            throw ({ message: 'Cost Center is invalid from User Custom Data', errorCode: '001' });
        }

        if (pageLoaded) {
            vm.fieldOptions["Consignee.StateProvince"].IsRequired = consigneeStateIsRequired;
            vm.fieldOptions["Consignee.Phone"].IsRequired = consigneePhoneIsRequired
            vm.fieldOptions.Description.IsRequired = descriptionIsRequired;
        }
    };

		var vm, userContext ;

				//pickupDeliveryPane = $('[ng-model="pickupDeliveryPane"]');
				pickupDeliveryPane = $('[name="pickupDeliveryForm"]')

        $("#chkCallBeforePickup").prop("checked", vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20 == "true");
    }

// ClientBusinessRules(shipmentRequest) // returns void
function ClientBusinessRules() {
     
    this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) { 
        var shipment =  new Shipment(shipmentRequest);
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference   = shipment.UserRef1;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference = shipment.UserRef2;
    }
  

// GetEmail() // returns string
   GetEmail(){
      var emailText = "";
      var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a"); 
      Array.from(tags).forEach(function(tag){
         if(tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!","").trim(); 
      });
      return emailText;
   }

// Source: ShipExec Essentials Demo (CF_DEMO)_CBR_SE_Demo_1854.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
    this.PageLoaded = function (location) {

// focus(selector) // returns void
        focus: function (selector) {
            if (setFocus(selector) == 0) {
                var intervalId = setInterval(function () {
                    if (setFocus(selector)) clearInterval(intervalId)
                }, 10)
            }

            function setFocus(selector) {
                var element = $(selector);
                element.focus();
                return element.length;
            }
        }

// loadValueFocus() // returns void
            loadValueFocus: function () { client.focus(this.loadValue) },

// consigneeCompanyFocus() // returns void
            consigneeCompanyFocus: function () { client.focus(this.consigneeCompany) }

// dismiss() // returns void
        dismiss: $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function () { $('div[role="alert"]:visible').hide(); }),

// style() // returns jQuery object
        style: $('body').append('<style>input:focus, textarea:focus, select:focus{background-color: #ffffcc;}</style>'),

// Source: ShipExec Essentials Demo (CF_DEMO)_Huntington Bank_1907.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
this.PageLoaded = function(location) {  
        if (location == '/') document.location = '#!/shipping';
    }

// thinClientApiRequest(method, data, isAsync) // returns void
var thinClientApiRequest = function (method, data, isAsync) {
        $.getJSON('config.json', function (config) {
            var shipExecServiceUrl = config.ShipExecServiceUrl;
            var authorizationToken = shipExecServiceUrl.startsWith('http') ? { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + JSON.parse(window.localStorage.getItem("TCToken")).access_token } : '';
            return $.post({ url: shipExecServiceUrl + '/' + method, data: data, async: isAsync, headers: authorizationToken });
        });
    }

// Source: SPEEDTECH (SPEEDTECH)_SpeedTech Client Side Business Rules_1645.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
this.PageLoaded = function(location) 
    {        
        vm = this.vm;
        if (location === '/shipping') {
            var aTags = document.getElementsByTagName("a");
            var searchText = "Email";
            
            var interval = setInterval(function () {
                for (var i = 0; i < aTags.length; i++) {
                    if (aTags[i].textContent == searchText) {
                        var loaded = aTags[i];
                        aTags[i].click();
                    }
                }
                
                if (loaded) {
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    pickupDeliveryPaneReady(pickupDeliveryPane);
                }
            }, 50); 
        }
        
           if (location === '/batchmanager') {
            $( "#btnCreateNewBatches" ).click(function() {                
                var userMethodParams = { "action": "CreateNewBatchForProcessing"};
            
                var data = { Data: JSON.stringify(userMethodParams), UserContext: client.userContext };
            
                var response = thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false);
            
            if (response.ErrorCode != 0) {
                client.alert.Danger(response.ErrorMessage);
            } 
            else {
                    alert("Batch creation request sent");
                }
            });
            
            $("#btnSetBatchAsPrinted").click(function() {

            var batchId = $('#cboAvailableBatchReferences').find(":selected").text();
            
            if(batchId !== null && batchId !== '')
            {
                var proceedToSetBatchPrinted = confirm("Confirm to set batch" + batchId + " as deleted? Click OK to continue or Cancel");
                
                if(proceedToSetBatchPrinted)
                {
                    var userMethodParams = { "action": "SetBatchAsPrinted", "batchid" : $('#cboAvailableBatchReferences').find(":selected").text()};
        
                    var data = { Data: JSON.stringify(userMethodParams), UserContext: client.userContext };
        
                    var response = thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false);
        
                    if (response.ErrorCode != 0) 
                    {
                        client.alert.Danger(response.ErrorMessage);
                    } 
                    else 
                    {
                        alert(batchId + " was set to deleted");
                    }
                }
            }
            else
            {
                alert("No batch has been selected");
            }
            }); // end function
        }
    }

// PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
this.PostLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest) 
    {               
        loadselectedValue=loadValue;
        // Converting JS object to an array
        shipmentRequestObject =  JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(shipmentRequest));
        
        ChromeScrollIntoView($('[ng-model="vm.selectedServices"]'), shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol);

        // Check for not found error
        if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference20)
        {
            if( shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference20.substring(0,1) == '~')    
                {
                 alert(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference20.substring(1));
				  $("input:text").eq(0).focus();   
			  this.vm.newShipment();
	       		return;
                }
        }
        
        //Send OSCO related errors to end user
        if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference20)
        {
            if (window.confirm(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.MiscReference20 + "\nContinue with shipment?")) 
            {
              //alert("You pressed OK");
            } 
            else 
            {
                $("input:text").eq(0).focus();
            }   
        }
      
        // Check for address validation required
        if(shipmentRequest.Packages[0].UserData4)
        {
            if( shipmentRequest.Packages[0].UserData4 == 'Y')    
                {
                var interval = setInterval(function() {
                const consigneeNameAddress = $('name-address[address-property-name="Consignee"]');
                consigneeCompany = consigneeNameAddress.find('[ng-model="nameaddress.Company"]');
                consigneePostalCode = consigneeNameAddress.find('[name="postalCode"]');
                consigneeCity = consigneeNameAddress.find('[name="city"]');
                consigneeState = consigneeNameAddress.find('[name="stateProvince"]');

                var loaded = consigneeCompany.length && consigneePostalCode.length && consigneeCity.length && consigneeState.length;

                if (loaded) {
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    $('name-address[address-property-name="Consignee"] button[title="Validate Address"]').click();                    
                    }
                }, 50);
            }
        }
  
        $('[name="address1"]:eq(0)').val(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Address1);
        
        $('[name="company"]:eq(0)').val(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Company);
        
    //debugger;
    }

    }

                       {

// function PageLoaded(location) // returns void
this.PageLoaded = function(location) {

// function getFTPUploaded() // returns void
function getFTPUploaded() {
        var selectedShipper = document.getElementById("Shipper").value;
		var shipper = '';
		debugger;
		if (selectedShipper !== "")
		{
			selectedShipper = JSON.parse(selectedShipper);
			shipper = selectedShipper.Name;
		}
        var data = { Action: 'ExportFTP', Shipper: shipper };

        $.post('api/ShippingService/UserMethod',
            {UserContext: userContext, Data: JSON.stringify(data) },
            function(response, status, xhr) {
            }
        ).done(function(response) {
            debugger;
            var resp = JSON.stringify(response);
            resp = JSON.parse(resp);
            debugger;
            if (resp.Data !== "" && resp.Data !== undefined)
            {
                alert('Lastest File: \n' + DecodeReturnString(resp.Data).substring(0,resp.Data.length -1));
            }
            else if (resp.ErrorMessage !== undefined)
            {
                if (resp.ErrorCode == '104')
                {
                    alert('Lastest File: \nNo files found!');
                }
                else
                {
                    alert(resp.ErrorMessage);
                }
            }
        });
    }

// function DecodeReturnString(data) // returns parsed decoded string or undefined on error
function DecodeReturnString(data)
    { 
        try
        { 
            return JSON.parse($("<div />").html(data).text());
        }
        catch (error)
        { 
            console.log(error.name);
            console.log(error.message);
            console.log(data);
        }
    }

// function getUserContext() // returns void
function getUserContext() {
        debugger;
        if (userContext === undefined) {
            $.get({ url: "api/usercontext/GET", async:false })
            .done(function (data) {
               userContext = data;
            })
        }
    }

// getFTPUploaded() // returns void
function getFTPUploaded() {
        var selectedShipper = document.getElementById("Shipper").value;
		var shipper = '';
		debugger;
		if (selectedShipper !== "")
		{
			selectedShipper = JSON.parse(selectedShipper);
			shipper = selectedShipper.Name;
		}
        var data = { Action: 'ExportFTP', Shipper: shipper };

        $.post('api/ShippingService/UserMethod',
            {UserContext: userContext, Data: JSON.stringify(data) },
            function(response, status, xhr) {
            }
        ).done(function(response) {
            debugger;
            var resp = JSON.stringify(response);
            resp = JSON.parse(resp);
            debugger;
            if (resp.Data !== "" && resp.Data !== undefined)
            {
                alert('Lastest File: \n' + DecodeReturnString(resp.Data).substring(0,resp.Data.length -1));
            }
            else if (resp.ErrorMessage !== undefined)
            {
                if (resp.ErrorCode == '104')
                {
                    alert('Lastest File: \nNo files found!');
                }
                else
                {
                    alert(resp.ErrorMessage);
                }
            }
        });
    }

// DecodeReturnString(data) // returns parsed JSON data or undefined on error
function DecodeReturnString(data)
    { 
        try
        { 
            return JSON.parse($("<div />").html(data).text());
        }
        catch (error)
        { 
            console.log(error.name);
            console.log(error.message);
            console.log(data);
        }
    }

        }

    function appendChildElement(tag, innerHTML) {
        var element = document.createElement(tag);
        element.innerHTML = innerHTML;
        document.head.appendChild(element)
    }

        {
            alert("Error loading access token value");
        }

        {            
            alert("No valid ship to address candidates found.  Check with supervisor");
        }
		else if(ValidationMsg=='msg3')
		{
		alert("Order requires rate shop.  Final service to be set during Shipping.");
		}
        if(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage != undefined)
          {
         debugger;
          if (!confirm(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage))

            {

            }

            else

            {
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorCode = 0;                

                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage = "";              

            }
          }
    }

// myMethod() // returns undefined
    function myMethod() {
        if ($('#ordersPerPage').val().trim() === "") {
            $('#ordersPerPage').val("0");
        }
        //if ($('#dateAfter').val().trim() === "") {
          //  $('#dateAfter').val("");
        //}
        if ($('#batchType').val().trim() === "" || $('#batchType').val().search("undefined") > -1) {
            $('#batchType').val("processing");
        }
    }

// setFocus(element) // returns undefined
    function setFocus(element){
        var ng = angular.element(element);
        if (ng.length > 0) {
            ng.focus();
        }
    }

// appendCSS() // returns undefined
    function appendCSS(){
        var style = document.createElement('style');
        style.innerHTML = 'input:focus, textarea:focus, select:focus{background-color: #ffffcc;}';
        document.head.appendChild(style);
    }

// function Shipping() // returns void
    this.Shipping = function () {
        this.vm.getWeight = customGetWeight;
 
        function customGetWeight() {
            if (this.profile.ScaleConfiguration) {
                var url = client.config.ClientSupportServiceUrl + '/api/Scale/Read'
                var ret = $.post({ url: url, data: this.profile.ScaleConfiguration.ScaleDefinition, async: false }).responseJSON;
                if (ret != undefined) {
                    if (ret.ErrorCode == 0) {
                        this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].Weight = {
                            "Amount": ret.Weight.toFixed(2),
                            "Units": ret.WeightUnit.toUpperCase()
                        };
                    }
                    vm.checkShip();                    
                }
            }
        }
    }

// function PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns void
    this.PostLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest) {
        this.vm.getWeight();        
    }

// function NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
    this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) {
        this.vm.getWeight();        
    }

// Source: Sysco Foods (SYSCO)_Sysco_1674.cs
// PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns void
this.PostLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest) {
        shipmentRequest.SendViewModelToClient = this.GetViewModelFromTemplate;

        if (!angular.element('input[value="Get Weight"]').prop('disabled')){
            if (vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].Weight.Amount == undefined) {
                vm.getWeight();
            }
        }
        var startTime = new Date();
        var weightExists = setInterval(() => {
            if ((new Date().getTime() - startTime.getTime()) / 1000 >= 2) {
                clearInterval(weightExists);
            } else {
                if (vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].Weight.Amount != undefined) {
                    startTime.setMinutes(startTime.getMinutes() - 1);
                    vm.checkShip();
                    //$('#myShipBtn').click()
                }
            }
        }, 333);
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) {
        shipmentRequest.SendViewModelToClient = this.GetViewModelFromTemplate;
        $('#myLoadValue').focus();
    }

		var vm, userContext ;

		if (location === '/shipping') 
		{
            var addedConsolidationCheckBox = '<div class="col-md-12 no-left-right-padding ng-scope" ng-if="!vm.profile.FieldOptions.Load.IsHidden"><label class="col-md-4 control-label no-left-right-padding ng-binding"></label><div class="col-md-8 no-left-right-padding"><div class="input-group"><input type="checkbox" class="form-check-input ng-pristine ng-untouched ng-valid ng-empty" id="chkIsConsolidated"><label class="form-check-label" style="padding-left: 6px;">Consolidate Opportunities</label></div></div></div>';
            var addedConsolidatedField = '<div id="txtConsolidatedFields" style="display: none;" class="col-md-12 no-left-right-padding ng-scope"><label class="col-md-4 control-label no-left-right-padding ng-binding">Opportunities</label><div class="col-md-8 no-left-right-padding"><input type="text" class="form-control ng-pristine ng-untouched ng-valid ng-empty" ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.UserData1" placeholder="Enter comma separated opportunities"></div></div>';
            $('body').delegate('input[id="chkIsConsolidated"]', 'change', function () { IsConsolidatedChange(this);});
            $('form[name="shippingForm"]').before(addedConsolidationCheckBox);
            $('form[name="shippingForm"]').before(addedConsolidatedField);
		 }
    }

// PostShip(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) // returns undefined
    this.PostShip = function(shipmentRequest, shipmentResponse) {
		$("#chkIsConsolidated").prop("checked", false);
		$("#txtConsolidatedFields").find('*').filter(':input:visible:first').val("");
    }

// PreLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
    this.PreLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams) { 
    debugger;
    var consolidatedOpportunities = $("#txtConsolidatedFields").find('*').filter(':input:visible:first').val();
    
       if ($("#chkIsConsolidated").prop("checked") && ValidateConsolidatedOpportunitiesEntry(consolidatedOpportunities))
       {
         var shippingSession = CreateShippingSession("true",consolidatedOpportunities,loadValue);
         shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData1 = shippingSession;
       }
       else
       {
            var shippingSession = CreateShippingSession("false","",loadValue);
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.UserData1 = shippingSession
       }
    }

// ValidateConsolidatedOpportunitiesEntry(consolidatedOpportunities) // returns boolean
    function ValidateConsolidatedOpportunitiesEntry(consolidatedOpportunities)
    {
        var rexVal = /^[A-Z0-9]+((,|-)[A-Z0-9]+)*[A-Z0-9]+$/;
        var result = true;
        if (!rexVal.test(consolidatedOpportunities.toUpperCase()))
        {
            if (consolidatedOpportunities.trim()==="")
            {
                result=true;
            }
            else
            {
                alert("Consolidated opportunities not well formed.");
                result= false;
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

// CreateShippingSession(IsConsolidatedShipping, ConsolidatedOpportunities, OpportunityLoaded) // returns string
    function CreateShippingSession(IsConsolidatedShipping,ConsolidatedOpportunities,OpportunityLoaded)
    {
        var jsonObject = {};
        jsonObject["IsConsolidatedShipping"] = IsConsolidatedShipping;
        jsonObject["ConsolidatedOpportunities"] = ConsolidatedOpportunities.split(',');
        jsonObject["OpportunityLoaded"] = OpportunityLoaded;
        return JSON.stringify(jsonObject);
    }

// RepeatShipment(currentShipment) // returns undefined
    this.RepeatShipment = function(currentShipment) {
		var vm;
		vm = this.vm;
		$("#chkIsConsolidated").prop("checked", vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.UserData1 == "true");       
    }

// IsConsolidatedChange(elementCheck) // returns undefined
    function IsConsolidatedChange(elementCheck){
        if ($("#chkIsConsolidated").prop("checked"))
        {
            $("#txtConsolidatedFields").show();   
        }
        else
        {
            $("#txtConsolidatedFields").hide();
        }
        
	}

// Source: Target (TARGET)_Target CBR_2489.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
this.PageLoaded = function(location) {
        
        const vm = this.vm;
        
        if (location == '/shipping') {

            shipping();
        }
        
        function shipping() {
            vm.AddReturnLabel = function () {
            vm.currentShipment.Packages.push(getPackageObject());
            vm.totalPackages = vm.currentShipment.Packages.length;
            };

            vm.CreateReturnLabelFromPrevious = function () {
                debugger;
                vm.currentShipment = structuredClone(vm.lastShipmentRequest);
                vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].ReturnDelivery = true;
                vm.currentShipment.Packages[0].ReturnDeliveryMethod = 0;
                vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Service = { Symbol: "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.GND" };
                if (!vm.selectedServices) {
                    vm.selectedServices = [];
                }
                vm.selectedServices.push(vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Service);
            };
            

            function getPackageObject() {
                debugger;
                let addedPackage = structuredClone(vm.currentShipment.Packages[0]);
                addedPackage.ReturnDelivery = true;
                addedPackage.ReturnDeliveryMethod = 0;
                return addedPackage;
            };

        }
    }

// PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns void
this.PreShip = function(shipmentRequest, userParams) {    
        if (!shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference1 || shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference1.trim() === '') {
            // Highlight the field if it has no value
            waitForInputs();    

            const err = new Error('MiscReference1 is required');
            err.name = 'ValidationError'; // Optional custom name
            err.code = 'MISC_REF_001';    // Custom property
            throw err;
        } else {
            const inputs = document.querySelectorAll('[ng-model*="MiscReference1"]');
            if (inputs.length > 0) {
                inputs.forEach(input => {
                    input.style.border = null;
                });
            }
        }

        function waitForInputs() {
            const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
            const inputs = document.querySelectorAll('[ng-model$="MiscReference1"]');
            if (inputs.length > 0) {
                inputs.forEach(input => {
                input.style.border = '1px solid red';
                });
                observer.disconnect(); // stop watchin
            }
            });

            observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });

        }
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) { 
        const inputs = document.querySelectorAll('[ng-model*="MiscReference1"]');
            if (inputs.length > 0) {
                inputs.forEach(input => {
                    input.style.border = null;
                });
            }
    }

// getFTPUploaded() // returns undefined
function getFTPUploaded() {
        var selectedShipper = document.getElementById("Shipper").value;
		var shipper = '';
		debugger;
		if (selectedShipper !== "")
		{
			selectedShipper = JSON.parse(selectedShipper);
			shipper = selectedShipper.Name;
		}
        var data = { Action: 'ExportFTP', Shipper: shipper };

        $.post('api/ShippingService/UserMethod',
            {UserContext: userContext, Data: JSON.stringify(data) },
            function(response, status, xhr) {
            }
        ).done(function(response) {
            debugger;
            var resp = JSON.stringify(response);
            resp = JSON.parse(resp);
            debugger;
            if (resp.Data !== "" && resp.Data !== undefined)
            {
                alert('Lastest File: \n' + DecodeReturnString(resp.Data).substring(0,resp.Data.length -1));
            }
            else if (resp.ErrorMessage !== undefined)
            {
                if (resp.ErrorCode == '104')
                {
                    alert('Lastest File: \nNo files found!');
                }
                else
                {
                    alert(resp.ErrorMessage);
                }
            }
        });
    }

// DecodeReturnString(data) // returns parsed JSON value or undefined on error
function DecodeReturnString(data)
    { 
        try
        { 
            return JSON.parse($("<div />").html(data).text());
        }
        catch (error)
        { 
            console.log(error.name);
            console.log(error.message);
            console.log(data);
        }
    }

// getUserContext() // returns undefined
function getUserContext() {
        debugger;
        if (userContext === undefined) {
            $.get({ url: "api/usercontext/GET", async:false })
            .done(function (data) {
               userContext = data;
            })
        }
    }
