                var $billOption = $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.TransportationCharges"]');
                //  alert($billOption.val());
                if ($billOption.val() == "thirdParty") {
                    $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').hide();
                    $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').hide();

                    $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] label:contains("Third Party Options")').show();
                    $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').show();
                } else if ($billOption.val() == "consignee") {
                    $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').show();
                    $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').show();

                    $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] label:contains("Third Party Options")').hide();
                    $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').hide();
                } else {
                    $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').hide();
                    $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').hide();

                    $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] label:contains("Third Party Options")').hide();
                    $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').hide();
                }
            });
            $('body').delegate('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]', 'change', function () {

                $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] button[title="Search Addresses"]').click();
            });
            // International Tab
            $('body').delegate('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.DutiesAndTaxes"]', 'change', function () {
                var $billOption = $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.DutiesAndTaxes"]');
                //   alert($billOption.val());
                if ($billOption.val() == "thirdParty") {
                    $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').hide();
                    $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').hide();

                    $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] label:contains("Who pays Duties and Taxes")').show();
                    $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').show();
                } else if ($billOption.val() == "consignee") {
                    $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').show();
                    $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').show();

                    $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] label:contains("Who pays Duties and Taxes")').hide();
                    $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').hide();
                } else {
                    $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').hide();
                    $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').hide();

                    $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] label:contains("Who pays Duties and Taxes")').hide();
                    $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').hide();
                }
            });
            $('body').delegate('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]', 'change', function () {

                $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"] button[title="Search Addresses"]').click();
            });

            var startTime = new Date();
            var pageLoaded = setInterval(function () {
                if ((new Date().getTime() - startTime.getTime()) / 1000 >= 2) {
                    clearInterval(pageLoaded);
                    //    console.log('clearinterval');
                } else {
                    var tpbFound = false;
                    var consigneeFound = false;
                    var $thirdPartyBillingAddress = $('name-address[address-property-name="TransportationChargesThirdPartyBillingAddress"]');
                    var $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress = $('name-address[address-property-name="DutiesAndTaxesThirdPartyBillingAddress"]');
                    var tpbSearchAddress = $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Search Addresses"]');
                    var $consignee = $('name-address[address-property-name="Consignee"]');
                    var consineeSearchAddress = $consignee.find('[title="Search Addresses"]');
                    if ($thirdPartyBillingAddress.length && tpbSearchAddress.length) {
                        tpbFound = true;
                    }

                    if ($consignee.length && consineeSearchAddress.length) {
                        consigneeFound = true;
                    }
                    var loaded = tpbFound && consigneeFound;


                    // console.log(`is consignee loaded: ${loaded}`)

                    if (loaded) {
                        if ($thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Search Addresses"]').length > 0) {
                            startTime.setMinutes(startTime.getMinutes() - 1);

                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Search Addresses"]').hide();
                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Validate Address"]').hide();

                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('label:contains("Save Address")').hide();
                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('select[ng-model="nameaddress.IsUpdateAddressBookEntry"]').hide();
                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('select[ng-model="nameaddress.AddressBookIdToProcess"]').hide();

                            $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').hide();
                            $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').hide();

                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('label:contains("Third Party Options")').hide();
                            $thirdPartyBillingAddress.find('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').hide();

                            //International
                            $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Search Addresses"]').hide();
                            $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress.find('button[title="Validate Address"]').hide();

                            $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress.find('label:contains("Save Address")').hide();
                            $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress.find('select[ng-model="nameaddress.IsUpdateAddressBookEntry"]').hide();
                            $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress.find('select[ng-model="nameaddress.AddressBookIdToProcess"]').hide();

                            $('label:contains("Receiver Options")').hide();
                            $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].MiscReference20"]').hide();

                            $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress.find('label:contains("Who pays Duties and Taxes")').hide();
                            $dutyAndTaxesthirdPartyBillingAddress.find('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Code"]').hide();

                        }
                    }
                }
            }, 125);
        }
    };

    this.PreRate = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest, userParams) {

       let tpb = $('input[type=checkbox][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.ThirdPartyBilling"]').first();
      
      
      if ($(tpb).prop('checked') === false)  {
            $(tpb).checked = true;
            $(tpb).click();
            $(tpb).val('True');
        }
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        debugger;
        var inservicelock = $("#ServiceLockCheckBox").prop('checked');
        if(inservicelock)
        {
            debugger;
            if(vm.lastShipmentRequest != null)
       {
      // globalservice = vm.lastShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol;
      globalservice = vm.lastShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol;
       }
       if(globalservice !=null || globalservice != undefined )
       {
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Service ={Symbol:globalservice};
       }
        }
        this.vm.getUserContext = this.GetUserContext;
        this.vm.postalCodeLookup = this.PostalCodeLookup;
        this.vm.thinClientAPIRequest = this.ThinClientAPIRequest;

        shipmentRequest.selectAddress = this.SelectAddress;
        shipmentRequest.updateNameAddressCSZ = this.UpdateNameAddressCSZ;

        $('body').on('click', 'input[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ReturnDelivery"]', function (e) {
            let returnDeliveryCheckBox = $('input[type=checkbox][ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ReturnDelivery"]').first();

            if ($(returnDeliveryCheckBox).prop('checked') === true) {
                shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ReturnDeliveryMethod = 0;   // Print Return Label
                shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Description = "Computer Equipment";
            }
            else {
                shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ReturnDeliveryMethod = "";
                shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Description = "";
            }
        });

        $('body').delegate('[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]', 'change', function (e) {

            var Con = $('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]').val();

            console.log(Con);
            if (Con != "string:US") {
                $("button.glyphicon-duplicate").attr("disabled", "disabled");
            }
            else {
                $("button.glyphicon-duplicate").attr("disabled", false);
            }
        });

        this.vm.changeReturnLabel = changeReturnLabel
        function changeReturnLabel() {
            this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].MiscReference12 = this.returnLabel ? 'true' : 'false'
        }

        this.vm.changeReturnLabel();

        // GTS Global Technology Service return label
        this.vm.changeGTSReturnLabel = changeGTSReturnLabel
        function changeGTSReturnLabel() {
            this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].MiscReference13 = this.GTSreturnLabel ? 'true' : 'false'
        }

        this.vm.changeGTSReturnLabel();
        
         // Generic return label
        this.vm.changeGenericReturnLabel = changeGenericReturnLabel
        function changeGenericReturnLabel() {
            this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].MiscReference15 = this.GenericreturnLabel ? 'true' : 'false'
        }

        this.vm.changeGenericReturnLabel();

        // UPS Next Day Air return label
        this.vm.changeNextDayReturnLabel = changeNextDayReturnLabel
        function changeNextDayReturnLabel() {
            this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].MiscReference16 =  this.returnNextDayAir ? 'true' : 'false'
        }
            this.vm.changeNextDayReturnLabel();

        client.shipping.loadValueFocus();

        $('body').on('click', 'button[ng-click="vm.ok(commodityContent)"]', this.vm, selectCommodityBtn);
    }

// PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.PostLoad = function (loadValue, shipmentRequest) {

// PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
    this.PreShip = function (shipmentRequest, userParams) {
        if (this.vm.returnLabel && this.vm.GTSreturnLabel) {
            throw Error('You have selected to include a Return Label AND Global Tech Return Label. Please un-check one or the other and try again.');
        }

        if (this.vm.returnLabel || this.vm.GTSreturnLabel) {
            if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Phone === null ||
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Phone === '') {
                {
                    throw Error('You selected to print a return label but you did not provide the consignee phone number.');
                }
            }
        }
    }

// selectCommodityBtn(e) // returns undefined
    function selectCommodityBtn(e) {
        var interval = setInterval(function (vm) {
            if ($('h4.modal-title:contains("Search Commodity Content")').length === 0) {

                clearInterval(interval);

                var cc = vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].CommodityContent;
                console.log(cc)

                $('input[ng-model="vm.commodityContent.Quantity"]').val(1).change();

               $('select[ng-model="vm.commodityContent.QuantityUnitMeasure"]').val('string:EA').change();
            }

        }, 150, e.data);
    }

// Shipping() // returns undefined
    this.Shipping = function () {

        $('body').delegate('input[name="postalCode"]', 'keydown', this.vm, postalCodeLookUp)

        function postalCodeLookUp(e) {
            var nameAddress = $(this).parents('name-address');
            e.data.addressName = nameAddress.attr('address-property-name');
            if (e.data.addressName == "Consignee" || e.data.addressName == "ReturnAddress") {
                var keyEvent = (event.keyCode ? event.keyCode : event.which);
                if (keyEvent == 13 || keyEvent == 9) {
                    var city = nameAddress.find('[name="city"]');
                    var stateProvince = nameAddress.find('[name="stateProvince"]');
                    var postalCode = $(this).val();
                    if ((city.val() === '' || stateProvince.val() === '') && postalCode !== '') {
                        $(client.shipping.cbrPostalCodeLookup).click();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

// PostalCodeLookup(addressName) // returns undefined
    this.PostalCodeLookup = function (addressName) {
        var userContext = this.getUserContext(this);
        var postalCode = $('[address-property-name="' + addressName + '"] [name="postalCode"]').val();
        var content = { AddressName: addressName, PostalCode: postalCode };
        var payload = { Action: 'CSZ', Content: JSON.stringify(content) };
        var data = { Data: JSON.stringify(payload), UserContext: userContext };
        var response = this.thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false).responseJSON;
        if (response.ErrorCode > 0) {
            client.shipping.alertModalShow(this, 'Postal Code Search', response.ErrorMessage)
        } else {
            var responseData = JSON.parse(client.htmlText(response.Data));
            if (responseData === null) {
                client.shipping.alertModalShow(this, 'Postal Code Search', 'Invalid or Not US Postal Code');
            } else {
                if (responseData.length > 1) {
                    this.addressResults = responseData;
                    client.shipping.validateAddressModalShow();
                } else {
                    this.currentShipment.updateNameAddressCSZ(addressName, responseData[0].City, responseData[0].StateProvince)
                }
            }
        }
    }

// UpdateNameAddressCSZ(addressName, city, stateProvince) // returns undefined
    this.UpdateNameAddressCSZ = function (addressName, city, stateProvince) {
        var nameAddress = this.PackageDefaults.Consignee;
        if (addressName == 'ReturnAddress') {
            if (this.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress === undefined)
                this.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress = {};
            nameAddress = this.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress;
        }
        nameAddress.City = city;
        nameAddress.StateProvince = stateProvince;

        if (stateProvince == 'PR') {
            nameAddress.Country = 'PR';
        }
        else {
            nameAddress.Country = 'US';
        }
    }

// SelectAddress(address) // returns undefined
    this.SelectAddress = function (address) {
        client.shipping.validateAddressModalHide();
        this.updateNameAddressCSZ(address.AddressName, address.City, address.StateProvince);
    }

// GetUserContext(vm) // returns userContext or UserInformation
    this.GetUserContext = function (vm) {
        if (vm.userContext) return vm.userContext;
        if (vm.UserInformation) return vm.UserInformation;
    }

// ThinClientAPIRequest(method, data, isAsync) // returns jQuery AJAX promise from $.post
    this.ThinClientAPIRequest = function (method, data, isAsync) {
        var shipExecServiceUrl = client.config.ShipExecServiceUrl;
        var authorizationToken = client.getAuthorizationToken();
        return $.post({ url: shipExecServiceUrl + '/' + method, data: data, async: isAsync, headers: authorizationToken })
    }

// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
    this.PageLoaded = function (location) {
        vm = this.vm;
        appendCSS();
        getUserContext();
        dismissAlertDialog();

        if (location === '/shipping') {
            //consigneeStateIsRequired = vm.fieldOptions["Consignee.StateProvince"].IsRequired;


            var interval = setInterval(function () {
                $terms = $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Terms"]')
                $termsOfSale = $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].TermsOfSale"]');

                var $consigneeNameAddress = $('name-address[address-property-name="Consignee"]')
                consigneeState = $consigneeNameAddress.find('[name="stateProvince"]');
                consigneeCountry = $consigneeNameAddress.find('[name="Country"]');
                miscReference8 = $('[property="MiscReference8"] input');
                returnLabel = $('label:contains("Return Label")');
                returnOption = $('[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].ReturnDelivery"]');

                var loaded = $terms.length && $termsOfSale.length && consigneeState.length &&
                consigneeCountry.length && miscReference8.length && returnLabel.length && returnOption.length;

                if (loaded) {
                    clearInterval(interval);
                    documentReady();
                }
            }, 50);
        }
    }

// PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
    this.PreShip = function(shipmentRequest, userParams){
        /*var consigneeAddress = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee;
        var userAddress = this.vm.profile.UserInformation.Address;
        if(consigneeAddress.Country!=userAddress.Country)
        {
            shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Exporter = userAddress
        }*/
        
        var ret = returnPropertyValue(shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference8);;
        
        shipmentRequest.Packages.forEach(function (pkg)
        {
            if(pkg.MiscReference7)
            {
                if (shipmentRequest.Packages.length > 1 ) {
                    throw ({message: 'Multiple Packages Not Support with Dry Ice', errorCode: ''});
                }

                if (returnPropertyValue(pkg.MiscReference8) === '')
                {
                    throw ({message: 'Missing Dry Ice Weight', errorCode: ''});
                }
                var DryIceWeight = {
                    "Amount": ret.replace('kgs',''),
                    "Units": "KG"
                };
				pkg.DryIceWeight = DryIceWeight;
				
				var Country = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country;
				console.log(Country);
				if(Country =="US"){
				    pkg.DryIceRegulationSet = 1;
				}else{
				    pkg.DryIceRegulationSet = 2;
				}
				
                pkg.DryIcePurpose = 2;
            }
        });
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        returnNameAddressCaption(false);
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail = getUserName();
        //shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipNotificationAddressEmail = theUsersName;

            this.vm.fieldOptions["Consignee.StateProvince"].IsRequired = consigneeStateIsRequired;
        }
    }

// PreRate(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
    this.PreRate = function(shipmentRequest, userParams) {
        debugger;

        var shipToEmail = returnPropertyValue(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Email);
        var shipFromEmail = returnPropertyValue(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.Email);
        var ref1 = returnPropertyValue(shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference1);
        var ref2 = returnPropertyValue(shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference2);
        var ref3 = returnPropertyValue(shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference3);
        var ref4 = returnPropertyValue(shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference4);
        var ref5 = returnPropertyValue(shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference5);
        var ref6 = returnPropertyValue(shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference6);
        var ref7 = returnPropertyValue(shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference7);
        var ref8 = returnPropertyValue(shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference8);

        var shipperRef = ref1 + "~" + ref2 + "~" + ref3 + "~" + ref4;
        var consigneeRef = ref5 + "~" + ref6;//ref7 + "~" + ref8 + "~" +

        shipmentRequest.Packages.forEach(function (pkg)
        {
            if(pkg.MiscReference7)
            {
                if (shipmentRequest.Packages.length > 1 ) {
                    throw ({message: 'Multiple Packages Not Support with Dry Ice', errorCode: ''});
                }

                if (returnPropertyValue(pkg.MiscReference8) === '')
                {
                    throw ({message: 'Missing Dry Ice Weight', errorCode: ''});
                }
                
                var ret = ref8;
                
                var DryIceWeight = {
                    "Amount": ret.replace('kgs',''),
                    "Units": "KG"
                };
				pkg.DryIceWeight = DryIceWeight;
				
				var Country = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country;
				console.log(Country);
				if(Country =="US"){
				    pkg.DryIceRegulationSet = 1;
				}else{
				    pkg.DryIceRegulationSet = 2;
				}
                pkg.DryIcePurpose = 2;
            }
            pkg.ShipperReference = shipperRef;
            pkg.ConsigneeReference = consigneeRef;
            pkg.MiscReference20 = userContext.UserId;

            pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail = '';
            pkg.ShipNotificationEmail = shipToEmail != '' || shipFromEmail != '';
            if (shipToEmail != '') {
                pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail = shipToEmail;
            }

            if (shipFromEmail != '' ) {
                if (pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail) {
                    pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail += ',' + shipFromEmail;
                } else {
                    pkg.ShipNotificationAddressEmail = shipFromEmail;
                }
            }
        });
    }

    this.PostSelectAddressBook = function (shipmentRequest, nameaddress, addressName) {
        setConsigneeStateProvinceRequirement();
    }

    this.PreSearchHistory = function(searchCriteria) {

    }

// GetEmail() // returns string
        GetEmail() {
            var emailText = "";
            var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a");
            Array.from(tags).forEach(function (tag) {
                if (tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!", "").trim();
            });
            return emailText;
        }

// this.PreSearchHistory(searchCriteria) // returns undefined
    this.PreSearchHistory = function (searchCriteria) {
        var selectedValue = $('select[id="reports"]:eq(0)').val();
        var selectedReport = $("select[id='reports'] option[value='" + selectedValue + "'");
        //debugger;
        if(selectedReport[0].innerText !=="All History"){
            searchCriteria.WhereClauses.push({ FieldName: 'UserId', FieldValue: userContext.UserId, Operator: 0 });
        }
    };

// this.PostSelectAddressBook(shipmentRequest, nameaddress) // returns undefined

        });

                glenallenShipment=true;

            } 
    };

// function getUserName() // returns string
     function getUserName() {
        var helloUser = $('a[title="Manage"]:contains("Hello")').text();
        return helloUser.match(/[a-zA-Z]+[a-zA-Z0-9._]+@[a-zA-Z]+\.[a-zA-Z.]{2,5}/i)[0];
    }

// PreRate(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
    this.PreRate = function(shipmentRequest, userParams) {
        if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country == 'US') {
            var state = String(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.StateProvince).toLowerCase();
            if (state.length == 2) {
                state = state.toUpperCase();
            } else if (state.length > 2) {
                switch (state) {
                case "alabama":
                    state = "AL";
                    break;
                case "alaska":
                    state = "AK";
                    break;
                case "arizona":
                    state = "AZ";
                    break;

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) {
         vm = this.vm;
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference = this.GetCustom("Custom1", "User", shipmentRequest);
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference = this.GetCustom("Custom2", "User", shipmentRequest);
    };

// GetCustom(fieldName, customDataType, shipmentRequest) // returns string
    this.GetCustom = function(fieldName, customDataType, shipmentRequest) {
        var returnValue = "";
        var customData = null;
        if (customDataType === "User") {
            if (shipmentRequest &&
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults &&
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress &&
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData)
                customData = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
        }
        if (customDataType === "To") {
            if (shipmentRequest &&
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults &&
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee &&
                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.CustomData)
                customData = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.CustomData;
        }

        if (customData) {
            customData.forEach(function(customField) {
                if (fieldName === customField.Key) returnValue = customField.Value;
            });
        }
        return returnValue;

    };

// PreSearchHistory(searchCriteria) // returns undefined
    this.PreSearchHistory = function (searchCriteria) {
        var selectedValue = $('select[id="reports"]:eq(0)').val();
        var selectedReport = $("select[id='reports'] option[value='" + selectedValue + "'");
        //debugger;
        if(selectedReport[0].innerText !=="All History"){
            searchCriteria.WhereClauses.push({ FieldName: 'UserId', FieldValue: userContext.UserId, Operator: 0 });
        }
    };

// PostSelectAddressBook(shipmentRequest, nameaddress) // returns undefined
        this.PostSelectAddressBook = function (shipmentRequest, nameaddress) {
            var customData = nameaddress.CustomData;
            var fieldName = "Custom2"
        if (customData) {
            customData.forEach(function(customField) {
                if (fieldName === customField.Key) shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference3 = customField.Value;
        });
        }
             
            if(nameaddress.Code == "hSTI-GLENALLEN")
            {
                glenallenShipment=true;
                var service = [{Symbol: "UPSAPI.UPS.NDA", Name: "UPS Next Day Air (UPS Adapter)"}];
                vm.profile.ProfileSetting.ServiceSelectionMode = 1;
                this.vm.selectedServices = service;
                this.vm.showServiceSelection=false;
            } 
    };

// Source: UMG (UMD)_UMD_Reference_Rule_78.cs
// GetEmail() // returns the extracted email text from document anchor elements
        GetEmail() {
            var emailText = "";
            var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a");
            Array.from(tags).forEach(function (tag) {
                if (tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!", "").trim();
            });
            return emailText;
        }

// GetCustom(fieldName, customDataType) // returns the matching custom field value or an empty string
    GetCustom(fieldName, customDataType) {
      var returnValue = "";
      var customData = null;
      if (customDataType === "User") customData = this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.CustomData;
      if (customDataType === "To") customData = this.ShipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.CustomData;

      if (customData) {
         customData.forEach(function (customField) {
            if (fieldName === customField.Key) returnValue = customField.Value;
         })
      }
      return returnValue;
   }

// Source: Volt Lighting (VOLT)_Volt_Business_Rules_1666.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
this.PageLoaded = function(location) {  
        GetUserContext();
        vm = this.vm;
        if (location === '/shipping') {
            $('body').delegate('#FinalizeMultipieceShipment', 'click', function () {
                UserMethod(4);
            });
        }
        if(location === '/closemanifest'){
            getShippersByProfile();
            $('body').delegate('#CVIS_Shippers', 'change', function () {
                getTrailerSortCodeByShipper();
            });
            
            $('body').delegate('#AddItems', 'click', function () {
                validationCVIS('Add');
            });
            
            $('body').delegate('#Close', 'click', function () {
                validationCVIS('Close');
            });
            
            $('body').delegate('#CancelCloseModal', 'click', function () {
                CloseModalClose();
            });
            
            $('body').delegate('#CloseReal', 'click', function () {
                CloseReal();
            });
            
             $('body').delegate('#UPSPackageCarPickup', 'change', function () {
                UPSPackageCarPickup();
            });
        }
    }

// UPSPackageCarPickup(event) // returns undefined
function UPSPackageCarPickup(event){
        
        if($('#UPSPackageCarPickup').is(":checked")){
             $('#AddItems').prop('disabled', true);
        }else{
             $('#AddItems').prop('disabled', false);
        }       
    }

// GetUserContext() // returns undefined
function GetUserContext() {
        if (userContext == undefined) {
            var userContextUrl = 'api/usercontext/GET';
            var shipExecServiceUrl =  client.config.ShipExecServiceUrl;
            if (shipExecServiceUrl.startsWith('http')) {
                var url = new URL(shipExecServiceUrl);
                userContextUrl = url.origin + '/' + userContextUrl;
            }
            var authorizationToken =  client.getAuthorizationToken();
            userContext = $.get({url: userContextUrl, headers: authorizationToken, async: false}).responseJSON;
        }
    }

// validationCVIS(Type) // returns undefined
function validationCVIS(Type){
        var Shipper = $("#CVIS_Shippers").val();
        if(Shipper === "0"){
            client.alert.Danger("Select a valid Shipper");
        }else{
            var TrailerSortCode = $("#TrailerSortCode").val();
            if(TrailerSortCode === ""){
                client.alert.Danger("No Trailer Sort Code found for Shipper "+ Shipper);
            }else{
                //AllGood
                execCvisAction(Type);
            }
        }
       
    }

// getShippersByProfile() // returns undefined
function getShippersByProfile(){
	    var usermethodParams = { "action": 5, "orderNumber": "0", "percentageComplete":"0", "trailerNumber":"", "shipper":""};
	    var data = { UserContext: userContext, "Data": JSON.stringify(usermethodParams) };
		var response = client.thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false).done(function (response) {
			if (response.ErrorCode != 0) {
				client.alert.Danger(response.ErrorMessage);
			} else {
				var json = DecodeReturnString(response.Data); //$.parseJSON($("<div />").html(response.Data).text());//$.parseJSON(response.Data);
                $.each(json.Shippers, function (i, item) {
                    $('#CVIS_Shippers').append($('<option>', { 
                        value: item["value"],
                        text : item["text"] 
                    }));
                });
			}
		});            
		
		/*$.ajax({
            type: "POST",
            url: "api/ShippingService/UserMethod",
            async: false,
            cache: false,
            dataType: "json",
            data: { UserContext: userContext, "Data": JSON.stringify(usermethodParams) },
            success: function(response) {
                var json = DecodeReturnString(response.Data); //$.parseJSON($("<div />").html(response.Data).text());//$.parseJSON(response.Data);
                $.each(json.Shippers, function (i, item) {
                    $('#CVIS_Shippers').append($('<option>', { 
                        value: item["value"],
                        text : item["text"] 
                    }));
                });
            },
            error: function (error) {
                alert(error);
            }
        });*/
	}

// getTrailerSortCodeByShipper() // returns undefined
function getTrailerSortCodeByShipper(){
        var Shipper = $("#CVIS_Shippers").val();
        if(Shipper != "0"){
            var usermethodParams = { "action": 6, "orderNumber": "0", "percentageComplete":"0", "trailerNumber":"", "shipper":Shipper};
			var data = { UserContext: userContext, "Data": JSON.stringify(usermethodParams) };
        	var response = client.thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false).done(function (response) {
				if (response.ErrorCode != 0) {
					client.alert.Danger(response.ErrorMessage);
				} else {
					$("#TrailerSortCode").val(response.Data);
				}
			});     
			
			/*$.ajax({
            type: "POST",
                url: "api/ShippingService/UserMethod",
                async: false,
                cache: false,
                dataType: "json",
                data: { UserContext: userContext, "Data": JSON.stringify(usermethodParams) },
                success: function(response) {
                    $("#TrailerSortCode").val(response.Data);
                },
                error: function (error) {
                    alert(error);
                }
            });*/
        }
        
    }

// execCvisAction(Type) // returns undefined
function execCvisAction(Type){
	    if(Type === "Add"){
			var TrailerNumber = $("#TrailerNumber").val();
			if(TrailerNumber === ""){
				client.alert.Danger("No Trailer Number provided");
			}else{
				var Shipper = $("#CVIS_Shippers").val();
				var usermethodParams = { "action": 7, "orderNumber": "0", "percentageComplete":"0", "trailerNumber":TrailerNumber, "shipper":Shipper};
				
				var data = { UserContext: userContext, "Data": JSON.stringify(usermethodParams) };
				var response = client.thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false).done(function (response) {
					if (response.ErrorCode != 0) {
						client.alert.Danger(response.ErrorMessage);
					} else {
						client.alert.Success(response.Data);
					}
				});
			}
			/*$.ajax({
            type: "POST",
                url: "api/ShippingService/UserMethod",
                async: false,
                cache: false,
                dataType: "json",
                data: { UserContext: userContext, "Data": JSON.stringify(usermethodParams) },
                success: function(response) {
                    alert(response.Data);
                },
                error: function (error) {
                    alert(error);
                }
            });*/
            
	    }
	    if(Type === "Close"){
	        if($('#UPSPackageCarPickup').is(":checked")){
	            var Shipper = $("#CVIS_Shippers").val();
    	        var TrailerNumber = $("#TrailerNumber").val();
                var usermethodParams = { "action": 9, "orderNumber": "0", "percentageComplete":"0", "trailerNumber":TrailerNumber, "shipper":Shipper};
            	var data = { UserContext: userContext, "Data": JSON.stringify(usermethodParams) };
				var response = client.thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false).done(function (response) {
					if (response.ErrorCode != 0) {
						client.alert.Danger(response.ErrorMessage);
					} else {
						client.alert.Success(response.Data);
                        getTrailerSortCodeByShipper();
                        $("#TrailerNumber").val("");
					}
				});
				
				/*$.ajax({
                type: "POST",
                    url: "api/ShippingService/UserMethod",
                    async: false,
                    cache: false,
                    dataType: "json",
                    data: { UserContext: userContext, "Data": JSON.stringify(usermethodParams) },
                    success: function(response) {
                        alert(response.Data);
                        getTrailerSortCodeByShipper();
                        $("#TrailerNumber").val("");
                    },
                    error: function (error) {
                        alert(error);
                    }
                });*/
	        }else{
	            var TrailerNumber = $("#TrailerNumber").val();
	            if(TrailerNumber === ""){
                    client.alert.Danger("No Trailer Number provided");
                }else{
                    //AllGood
                    OpenModalClose();
                }
	            
	            
	        }
	        
	    }
	}

// CloseReal() // returns undefined
function CloseReal(){
	    var Shipper = $("#CVIS_Shippers").val();
        var TrailerNumber = $("#TrailerNumber").val();
		var percentageComplete = $("#percentageComplete").val();
		if(percentageComplete === null || percentageComplete === ""){
		    client.alert.Danger("Percentage Complete is required")
		    return;
		}
        var usermethodParams = { "action": 8, "orderNumber": "0", "percentageComplete":percentageComplete, "trailerNumber":TrailerNumber, "shipper":Shipper};
    	
		var data = { UserContext: userContext, "Data": JSON.stringify(usermethodParams) };
		var response = client.thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false).done(function (response) {
			if (response.ErrorCode != 0) {
				client.alert.Danger(response.ErrorMessage);
			} else {
				client.alert.Info(response.Data);
                if(response.Data === "Success"){
                    CloseModalClose();
                    getTrailerSortCodeByShipper();
                    $("#TrailerNumber").val("");
                }
			}
		});
		
		/*$.ajax({
        type: "POST",
            url: "api/ShippingService/UserMethod",
            async: false,
            cache: false,
            dataType: "json",
            data: { UserContext: userContext, "Data": JSON.stringify(usermethodParams) },
            success: function(response) {
                alert(response.Data);
                if(response.Data === "Success"){
                    CloseModalClose();
                    getTrailerSortCodeByShipper();
                    $("#TrailerNumber").val("");
                }
                
            },
            error: function (error) {
                alert(error);
            }
        });*/
	}

// OpenModalClose() // returns undefined
function OpenModalClose(){
	    //$('#CloseModal').modal('show');
	    $('#CloseModal').modal('show', {backdrop: 'static', keyboard: false});
	}

// CloseModalClose() // returns undefined
function CloseModalClose(){
	    $('#CloseModal').modal('hide')
	}

// DecodeReturnString(data) // returns parsed JSON object or undefined on error
function DecodeReturnString(data){
	    try{
	        return JSON.parse($("<div />").html(data).text());
        }catch (error){
            console.log(error.name);
            console.log(error.message);
            console.log(data);
        }
    
    }

// UserMethod(logoNumber) // returns undefined
function UserMethod(logoNumber) {

		if (logoNumber == 4) {

			var orderNumber = $('[ng-model="vm.loadValue"]').val();

			if (orderNumber === undefined || orderNumber === null || orderNumber === "") {

				client.alert.Danger("Missing or invalid Order Number, no update made.  Please enter a valid order number and try again.");
			}
			else {
			
				var usermethodParams = { "action": 4, "orderNumber": orderNumber, "percentageComplete":"0", "trailerNumber":"", "shipper":""};
				var results;
				var data = { UserContext: userContext, "Data": JSON.stringify(usermethodParams) };
				var response = client.thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false).done(function (response) {
					if (response.ErrorCode != 0) {
						client.alert.Danger(response.ErrorMessage);
					} else {
						results = response["Data"];
					}
				});
				
				
				/*$.ajax({
                    type: "POST",
                    url: "api/ShippingService/UserMethod",
                    async: false,
                    cache: false,
                    dataType: "json",
                    data: { UserContext: userContext, "Data": JSON.stringify(usermethodParams) },
                    success: function(response) {
                        results = response["Data"];
                        ;
                    },
                    error: function (error) {
                        alert("Finalize Shipment has failed, no update made to the system.  Contact Support.");
                    }
                });*/
			}
		}
		else {

			$("#fileLoader").click();

			var encodedBase64Logo;

			var filesSelected = document.getElementById("fileLoader").files;

			if (filesSelected.length > 0) {
				var fileToLoad = filesSelected[0];

				var fileReader = new FileReader();

				fileReader.readAsDataURL(fileToLoad);

				fileReader.onload = function (event) {
					var encodedBase64Logo = logoNumber + event.target.result;

					SoxOnWcfDblHop.userMethod(encodedBase64Logo,
						function (result) {
							// Do something with the data

							DisplayLogoSaveMessage(result);

						},
						function (e) {
							// Do something with the error

							alert(e.message);
						});
				};
			}
		}
	}

// DisplayLogoSaveMessage(result) // returns undefined
function DisplayLogoSaveMessage(result) {

		var jsonLoad = jQuery.parseJSON(result);

		if (jsonLoad.logosuccess != null && jsonLoad.logosuccess != undefined) {

			if (jsonLoad.logosuccess != undefined) {
				alert(jsonLoad.logosuccess);
			}
			else {
				alert("There was an error attempting to save file to server.  File NOT updated, please try again.");
			}
		}
		else {

			if (jsonLoad != undefined && jsonLoad.error != null && jsonLoad.error != undefined) {
				alert(jsonLoad.error);
			}
			else {
				alert("There was an error attempting to save file to server.  File NOT updated, please try again.");
			}
		}
	}

// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
  this.PageLoaded = function(location)
  {
    angular.element('a:contains("End of Day")').hide();
    //angular.element('a:contains("History")').hide();

    if (location === '/')
    {
      document.location = '#!/shipping';
    }
    if (location === '#!/shipping')
    {
        //console.log('shipping page');
        //shipmentRequest.TemplateInit = this.PageInitialize;        
    }
  };

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
  this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest)
  {
    shipmentRequest.TemplateInit = this.PageInitialize;

    if (!angular.isUndefined(tpbAddressBookEntries)) 
    {
      shipmentRequest.xConsigneeCodes = tpbAddressBookEntries;
    }
  };

// PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns void
  this.PreShip = function(shipmentRequest, userParams)
  {
    var consigneeCode = $('select[ng-model="xConsigneeCode"]');
    var selectCode = consigneeCode.val().substring(7);

    if (selectCode === '')
    {
      throw ({ message: 'Please select a lab', errorCode: 43770 });
    }
    var arr = this.vm.currentShipment.xConsigneeCodes;
    var obj = arr.filter(function(nameaddress)
    {
      if (nameaddress.Code === selectCode) { return nameaddress; }
    });

    if (obj.length)
    {
      var nameaddress = obj[0];
      var consignee = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee;
      consignee.Company = nameaddress.Company;
      consignee.Contact = nameaddress.Contact;
      consignee.Address1 = nameaddress.Address1;
      consignee.Address2 = nameaddress.Address2;
      consignee.Address3 = nameaddress.Address3;
      consignee.City = nameaddress.City;
      consignee.StateProvince = nameaddress.StateProvince;
      consignee.PostalCode = nameaddress.PostalCode;
      consignee.Country = nameaddress.Country;
      consignee.Phone = nameaddress.Phone;
      consignee.Email = nameaddress.Email;
      consignee.Account = nameaddress.Account;

      shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipper = GetKeyValue('shipper', nameaddress.CustomData);
      shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.StateProvince = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.StateProvince.toUpperCase();
    }
  };

// PageInitialize(viewModel) // returns void
    this.PageInitialize = function(viewModel) {
        vm = viewModel;
        //console.log(client.userContext);
        var searchCriteria = {WhereClauses:[{ FieldName:"Name", FieldValue:"Company Address Book", Operator:0 }]};
        var data = { SearchCriteria: searchCriteria, CompanyId: client.userContext.CompanyId, UserId: client.userContext.UserId };
        //var data = { UserContext: client.userContext, SearchCriteria: searchCriteria };
        
		//debugger;
		
        $.when(client.thinClientAPIRequest('GetAddressBooks_Shared', data, false).done(function(response, status, xhr)
        {
            //console.log('response from inside method: ', response);

            if (response.TotalRecords > 0) 
            {
                var addressBookId = response.AddressBooks[0].Id;
    
                data = { UserContext: client.userContext, AddressBookIds: [addressBookId], CompanyId: client.userContext.CompanyId, UserId: client.userContext.UserId };
                //console.log(data);
                
                $.when(client.thinClientAPIRequest('GetAddressBookEntries_Shared', data, false).done(function(response, status, xhr)
                {
                    //console.log(response);
                    if (response.TotalRecords > 0) 
                    {
                        tpbAddressBookEntries = response.AddressBookEntries;
                        vm.currentShipment.xConsigneeCodes = tpbAddressBookEntries;
                    }                    
                    //debugger;
                }));
            }
        }));

    };

// PreShip(shipmentRequest, userParams) // returns undefined
  this.PreShip = function(shipmentRequest, userParams)
  {
    var consigneeCode = $('select[ng-model="xConsigneeCode"]');
    var selectCode = consigneeCode.val().substring(7);

    if (selectCode === '')
    {
      throw ({ message: 'Please select a lab', errorCode: 43770 });
    }
    var arr = this.vm.currentShipment.xConsigneeCodes;
    var obj = arr.filter(function(nameaddress)
    {
      if (nameaddress.Code === selectCode) { return nameaddress; }
    });

    if (obj.length)
    {
      var nameaddress = obj[0];
      var consignee = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee;
      consignee.Company = nameaddress.Company;
      consignee.Contact = nameaddress.Contact;
      consignee.Address1 = nameaddress.Address1;
      consignee.Address2 = nameaddress.Address2;
      consignee.Address3 = nameaddress.Address3;
      consignee.City = nameaddress.City;
      consignee.StateProvince = nameaddress.StateProvince;
      consignee.PostalCode = nameaddress.PostalCode;
      consignee.Country = nameaddress.Country;
      consignee.Phone = nameaddress.Phone;
      consignee.Email = nameaddress.Email;
      consignee.Account = nameaddress.Account;

      shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipper = GetKeyValue('shipper', nameaddress.CustomData);
      shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.StateProvince = shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.OriginAddress.StateProvince.toUpperCase();
    }
  };

// PageInitialize(viewModel) // returns undefined
    this.PageInitialize = function(viewModel) {
        vm = viewModel;
        //console.log(client.userContext);
        var searchCriteria = {WhereClauses:[{ FieldName:"Name", FieldValue:"Company Address Book", Operator:0 }]};
        var data = { SearchCriteria: searchCriteria, CompanyId: client.userContext.CompanyId, UserId: client.userContext.UserId };
        //var data = { UserContext: client.userContext, SearchCriteria: searchCriteria };
        
		debugger;
		
        $.when(client.thinClientAPIRequest('GetAddressBooks', data, false).done(function(response, status, xhr)
        {
            //console.log('response from inside method: ', response);

            if (response.TotalRecords > 0) 
            {
                var addressBookId = response.AddressBooks[0].Id;
    
                data = { UserContext: client.userContext, AddressBookIds: [addressBookId], CompanyId: client.userContext.CompanyId, UserId: client.userContext.UserId };
                //console.log(data);
                
                $.when(client.thinClientAPIRequest('GetAddressBookEntries', data, false).done(function(response, status, xhr)
                {
                    //console.log(response);
                    if (response.TotalRecords > 0) 
                    {
                        tpbAddressBookEntries = response.AddressBookEntries;
                        vm.currentShipment.xConsigneeCodes = tpbAddressBookEntries;
                    }                    
                    debugger;
                }));
            }
        }));

    };

// Source: VW Group (VW)_VW Client Rules_1513.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
this.PageLoaded = function(location) {
        GetUserContext();
        
        if(location=="/")
        {
        var welcomeExist = setInterval(function() {
           var welcome =  $('h1:contains("Welcome")');
            if (welcome.length)
            {
                clearInterval(welcomeExist);
                welcome.text("VW / Audi Versandportal");
            }
             
         }, 50); 
        
        
        var SystemExist = setInterval(function() {
           var SystemN =  $('h2:contains("System")');
            if (SystemN.length)
            {
                clearInterval(SystemExist);
                SystemN.text("Systembenachrichtigungen");
            }
             
         }, 50); 
        
        var CompanyExist = setInterval(function() {
           var CompanyN =  $('h2:contains("Company")');
            if (CompanyN.length)
            {
                clearInterval(CompanyExist);
                CompanyN.text("Unternehmensnachrichten");
            }
             
         }, 50); 
         
        var SiteExist = setInterval(function() {
           var SiteN =  $('h2:contains("Site")');
            if (SiteN.length)
            {
                clearInterval(SiteExist);
                SiteN.text("Seitenbenachrichtigung");
            }
             
         }, 50); 
            
        }
        
        var checkExist = setInterval(function() {
            if (window.jQuery)
            {
                /* Stop the timer. */
                clearInterval(checkExist);
                $('a:contains("Log off")').text("Abmelden");
                $('li a:contains("Shipping and Rating")').text("Versandbearbeitung");
                $('li a:contains("Shipping")').text("Versand");
                $('li a:contains("History")').text("Versandarchiv");
                $('li a:contains("Address Book")').text("Adressbuch");
            }
         }, 50); 
         
    };

// PrePrint(doc, localPort, viewModel) // returns undefined
this.PrePrint = function(doc, localPort, viewModel){
        // WORKAROUND for bug #544 where printer profile doesn't send optional settings
    	// attach control string to set defaults to start of document string
    	//if(doc.RawData){  !!
    	if((doc.DocumentSymbol == 'UPSAPI.UPS.PACKAGE_LABEL.STANDARD') && doc.RawData){
        	var printerDefaults = "^XA^LH0,0^XSY,Y^MD30^XZ\n";
        	var oldraw = atou(doc.RawData[0]);
        	var newraw = printerDefaults + oldraw;
        	doc.RawData[0] = utoa(newraw);
    	}
    };

// Source: Wesbanco Inc (Wesbanco)_Wesbanco Reference Rule_50.cs
// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
    this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) { 
        var shipment = new Shipment(shipmentRequest);
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ShipperReference   = shipment.UserRef1
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].ConsigneeReference = shipment.UserRef2
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].MiscReference1 = "Ground";
    }

// GetEmail() // returns string
   GetEmail(){
      var emailText = "";
      var tags = document.getElementsByTagName("a"); 
      Array.from(tags).forEach(function(tag){
         if(tag.innerHTML.includes("Hello")) emailText = tag.innerHTML.replace("Hello", "").replace("!","").trim(); 
      });
      return emailText;
   }

// Source: William Sonoma (WMS) (WMS)_WMS Reference Rule_76.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
    this.PageLoaded = function(location) {
        vm = this.vm;
        var checkExist = setInterval(function() {
            if (window.jQuery)
            {
                /* Stop the timer. */
                clearInterval(checkExist);
                $('li[class="dropdown"]:eq(1)').remove();
            }
             
         }, 50); 
    }

// Source: WILLIAMS-SONOMA (WSintl) (WSintl)_WSIntl Reference Rule_75.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
    this.PageLoaded = function(location) {
       // GetUserContext();
        vm = this.vm;
        var checkExist = setInterval(function() {
            
            if (window.jQuery)
            {
                /* Stop the timer. */
                clearInterval(checkExist);
                $('body').delegate('input[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Amount"]','focus', function(e) { 
                    ChangeWeightUnit(e);
                });
                $('body').delegate('*', 'focus', function(e) { $('div.alert-danger:visible').hide(); });
            }
             
         }, 50); 
    }

// ChangeWeightUnit(e) // returns void
    function ChangeWeightUnit(e) {
       var country = $('select[ng-model="nameaddress.Country"]:eq(0)').val();
       switch(vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country)
       {
            case "US": case "GU": case "MP": case "AS": case "VI": case "PR": case "LR": case "MM":
                $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Units"] option[label="LB"]').attr('selected','selected');
                $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Units"] option[label="KG"]').removeAttr('selected');
                break;
            default:
                $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Units"] option[label="KG"]').attr('selected','selected');
                $('select[ng-model="vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Units"] option[label="LB"]').removeAttr('selected');
       }


    }

// PageLoaded(location) // returns void

    };

// GetWeight() // returns void
this.GetWeight = function () {
        if (this.vm.profile.ScaleConfiguration !== null) {
           
            var url = "https://localhost:5001/api/Scale/Read";
            var data ={
                "PortType": this.vm.profile.ScaleConfiguration.ScaleDefinition.PortType,
                "Port": this.vm.profile.ScaleConfiguration.Port,
                "UsbVid": this.vm.profile.ScaleConfiguration.ScaleDefinition.UsbVid,
                "UsbPid": this.vm.profile.ScaleConfiguration.ScaleDefinition.UsbPid,
                "RequestCommand": this.vm.profile.ScaleConfiguration.ScaleDefinition.RequestCommand,
                "StopBits": this.vm.profile.ScaleConfiguration.ScaleDefinition.StopBits,
                "Parity": this.vm.profile.ScaleConfiguration.ScaleDefinition.Parity,
                "RequestTimeout": this.vm.profile.ScaleConfiguration.ScaleDefinition.RequestTimeout,
                "HostAddress": this.vm.profile.ScaleConfiguration.HostAddress,
                "RegexPattern": this.vm.profile.ScaleConfiguration.ScaleDefinition.RegexPattern,
                "DeviceParser": this.vm.profile.ScaleConfiguration.ScaleDefinition.DeviceParserType,
                "DeviceName": this.vm.profile.ScaleConfiguration.ScaleDefinition.Name,
                "Handshake": this.vm.profile.ScaleConfiguration.ScaleDefinition.Handshake
            };
            var ret = $.post({ url: url, data: data, async: false }).responseJSON;
            //debugger;
            console.log(data);
            console.log(ret);
            
            if (ret.ErrorCode === 0) {
                
                this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].Weight = {
                    "Amount": ret.Weight,
                    "Units": "LB"
                };
               
                if (ret.HasDimensions) {
                    this.vm.currentShipment.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].Dimensions = {
                        "Length": ret.Dimensions.split('x')[0],
                        "Width": ret.Dimensions.split('x')[1],
                        "Height": ret.Dimensions.split('x')[2],
                        //"Units": ret.DimensionUnit.toUpperCase() === "IN" ? 0 : 1
                        "Units": "In"
                    };
                }
            }
        }
    };

// validateOrderValue(val) // returns string
    function validateOrderValue(val) {
        if ((isEmpty(val)) === false) {
            var apicallpattern = /^(61|42|57)\d{8}(\-\d{1,2})?$/;   // Actual WOODLAND
            if (apicallpattern.test(val) === true) {
                return "VALIDAPI";
            }
            else { return "MANUAL"; }
            }   
            else { return "EMPTY"; }
    }

// isEmpty(str) // returns boolean
    function isEmpty(str) {
        return (!str || 0 === str.length);
    }

// PostLoad(loadValue, shipmentRequest) // returns void
    this.PostLoad = function(loadValue, shipmentRequest) {
        if (sbrMessage(shipmentRequest)) {
            alert(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage);
        }
    };

// sbrMessage(shipment) // returns boolean
    function sbrMessage(shipment) {
        return (shipment.PackageDefaults.ErrorCode === undefined || shipment.PackageDefaults.ErrorCode === 0)
        && (shipment.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage !== undefined && shipment.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage !== 'No error' && shipment.PackageDefaults.ErrorMessage !== null);
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns void
    this.NewShipment = function(shipmentRequest) { 
        $("input:text").first().focus();
        shipmentRequest.Packages[0].Packaging = 'CUSTOM';
        shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Terms = 'SHIPPER';
        
       
        
    };

// Source: Worldwide Cargo Services Inc (WORLDWIDECSI)_API TEST_1781.cs
// PageLoaded(location) // returns void
    this.PageLoaded = function (location) {
        if (location === '/shipping')
            this.Shipping();
    }

// Shipping() // returns void
    this.Shipping = function () {
        this.vm.profile.Services.sort(byService);

        $(client.shipping.buildShipmentModal).on('shown.bs.modal', function () {
            client.shipping.buildTotalPackagesFocus();
        });

        $('body').delegate('input[name="postalCode"]', 'keydown', this.vm, postalCodeLookUp)

        function byService(a, b) {
            var sortingArr = [
                "UPS Next Day Air EAM (UPS Adapter)",
                "UPS Next Day Air (UPS Adapter)",
                "UPS Next Day Air Saver (UPS Adapter)",
                "UPS Second Day Air AM (UPS Adapter)",
                "UPS Second Day Air (UPS Adapter)",
                "UPS Three-Day Select (UPS Adapter)",
                "UPS Ground (UPS Adapter)"
            ]
            return sortingArr.indexOf(a.Name) - sortingArr.indexOf(b.Name);
        }

        function postalCodeLookUp(e) {
            var nameAddress = $(this).parents('name-address');
            e.data.addressName = nameAddress.attr('address-property-name');
            if (e.data.addressName == "Consignee" || e.data.addressName == "ReturnAddress") {
                var keyEvent = (event.keyCode ? event.keyCode : event.which);
                if (keyEvent == 13 || keyEvent == 9) {
                    var city = nameAddress.find('[name="city"]');
                    var stateProvince = nameAddress.find('[name="stateProvince"]');
                    var postalCode = $(this).val();
                    if ((city.val() == '' || stateProvince.val() == '') && postalCode != '') {
                        $(client.shipping.cbrPostalCodeLookup).click();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

// BuildShipment(ret) // returns void
    this.BuildShipment = function (ret) {
        client.shipping.buildShipmentModalHide();

        var weightPerPackage;
        var multiPackage = this.currentShipment.Packages.length > 1;

        if (ret.TotalWeight !== undefined && ret.TotalWeight !== 0 && ret.TotalWeight !== "")
            weightPerPackage = (ret.TotalWeight / ret.TotalPackages).toFixed(3);

        for (var i = 0; i < ret.TotalPackages; i++) {
            this.packageIndex = this.currentShipment.Packages.length - 1;
            if (i > 0 || multiPackage) {
                this.addPackage();
                multiPackage = true;
            }

            if (weightPerPackage !== undefined)
                this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].Weight.Amount = weightPerPackage;
            if (ret.WeightUnit !== undefined)
                this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].Weight.Units = ret.WeightUnit;
            else
                this.currentShipment.Packages[this.packageIndex].Weight.Units = this.translations.WeightUnit;
        }
        this.totalPackages = this.currentShipment.Packages.length;

        ret.TotalWeight = '';
        ret.TotalPackages = '';
    }

// PostalCodeLookup(addressName) // returns void
    this.PostalCodeLookup = function (addressName) {
debugger;
        var userContext = this.getUserContext(this);
        var postalCode = $('[address-property-name="' + addressName + '"] [name="postalCode"]').val();
        var content = { AddressName: addressName, PostalCode: postalCode };
        var payload = { Action: 'CSZ', Content: JSON.stringify(content) };
        var data = { Data: JSON.stringify(payload), UserContext: userContext };
        var response = this.thinClientAPIRequest('UserMethod', data, false).responseJSON;
        if (response.ErrorCode > 0) {
            client.shipping.alertModalShow(this, 'Postal Code Search', response.ErrorMessage)
        } else {
            var responseData = JSON.parse(client.htmlText(response.Data));        
            if (responseData == null) {
                client.shipping.alertModalShow(this, 'Postal Code Search', 'Invalid or Not US Postal Code');
            } else {
                if (responseData.length > 1) {
                    this.addressResults = responseData;
                    client.shipping.validateAddressModalShow();
                } else {
                    this.currentShipment.updateNameAddressCSZ(addressName, responseData[0].City, responseData[0].StateProvince)
                }
            }
        }
    }

// UpdateNameAddressCSZ(addressName, city, stateProvince) // returns void
    this.UpdateNameAddressCSZ = function (addressName, city, stateProvince) {
        var nameAddress = this.PackageDefaults.Consignee;
        if (addressName == 'ReturnAddress') {
            if (this.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress == undefined)
                this.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress = {};
            nameAddress = this.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress;
        }
        nameAddress.City = city;
        nameAddress.StateProvince = stateProvince;
    }

// SelectAddress(address) // returns void
    this.SelectAddress = function (address) {
        client.shipping.validateAddressModalHide();
        this.updateNameAddressCSZ(address.AddressName, address.City, address.StateProvince);
    }

// CreateShipmentAutoSubmit(keyEvent) // returns void
    this.CreateShipmentAutoSubmit = function (keyEvent) {
        if (keyEvent.keyCode === 13 || keyEvent.keyCode === 9) {            
            event.preventDefault();
debugger;
            var $createShipmentBtn = $('#createShipmentBtn');
            var createShipmentInput = '#buildShipmentModalBody input';

            if (document.activeElement.id == $createShipmentBtn.attr('id')) {
                if (!isInputsEmpty($(createShipmentInput))) {
                    // click on create build button if sending tab or enter while focus is on button
                    $createShipmentBtn.click();
                }
            } else {
                if (!isInputsEmpty($(createShipmentInput))) {
                    // allow shipper chance to change weight unit
                    $createShipmentBtn.focus();
                }
            }
        }

        function isInputsEmpty($inputs) {
            var inputsIsEmpty = false;
            $inputs.each(function () {
                if (this.type == 'text') {
                    if (this.value.trim() == "") {
                        this.focus();
                        inputsIsEmpty = true;
                        return false;
                    };
                };
            });
            return inputsIsEmpty;
        }
    }

// GetUserContext(vm) // returns userContext or UserInformation
    this.GetUserContext = function (vm) {
        if (vm.userContext) return vm.userContext;
        if (vm.UserInformation) return vm.UserInformation;
    }

// ThinClientAPIRequest(method, data, isAsync) // returns jqXHR from $.post
    this.ThinClientAPIRequest = function (method, data, isAsync) {
        var shipExecServiceUrl = client.config.ShipExecServiceUrl;
        var authorizationToken = client.getAuthorizationToken();
        return $.post({ url: shipExecServiceUrl + '/' + method, data: data, async: isAsync, headers: authorizationToken })
    }

// PageLoaded(location) // returns undefined
    this.PageLoaded = function (location) {

        if (location === "/") {
            //document.location = '#!/shipping';
        } else if (location === '/shipping') {

            $buildShipmentModal = angular.element('#buildShipmentModal'); //$('#buildShipmentModal');

            $buildShipmentModal.on('shown.bs.modal', function () {
                angular.element('[ng-model="vm.createshipment.TotalPackages"]').focus();
            });
        }
    }

// NewShipment(shipmentRequest) // returns undefined
    this.NewShipment = function (shipmentRequest) {
        vm = this.vm;
        shipmentRequest.SendViewModelToClient = this.GetViewModelFromTemplate;
        shipmentRequest.CreateShipmentSubmit = this.CreateShipmentAutoSubmit;
        shipmentRequest.CreateShipment = this.BuildShipment;

        // debugger;
    }

// BuildShipment(ret) // returns undefined
    this.BuildShipment = function (ret) {
        $buildShipmentModal.modal('hide');

        var weightPerPackage;
        var multiPackage = vm.currentShipment.Packages.length > 1;

        if (ret.TotalWeight !== undefined && ret.TotalWeight !== 0 && ret.TotalWeight !== "")
            weightPerPackage = (ret.TotalWeight / ret.TotalPackages).toFixed(3);

        for (var i = 0; i < ret.TotalPackages; i++) {
            vm.packageIndex = vm.currentShipment.Packages.length - 1;
            if (i > 0 || multiPackage) {
                vm.addPackage();
                multiPackage = true;
            }

            if (weightPerPackage !== undefined)
                vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Amount = weightPerPackage;
            if (ret.WeightUnit !== undefined)
                vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Units = ret.WeightUnit;
            else
                vm.currentShipment.Packages[vm.packageIndex].Weight.Units = vm.translations.WeightUnit;
        }

        vm.totalPackages = vm.currentShipment.Packages.length;

        ret.TotalWeight = '';
        ret.TotalPackages = '';
    }

// CreateShipmentAutoSubmit(keyEvent) // returns undefined
    this.CreateShipmentAutoSubmit = function (keyEvent) {
        if (keyEvent.keyCode === 13 || keyEvent.keyCode === 9) {
            event.preventDefault();

            var $createShipmentBtn = $('#createShipmentBtn');

            if (document.activeElement.id == $createShipmentBtn.attr('id')) {
                if (!isInputsEmpty($('#buildShipmentModalBody input'))) {
                    // click on create build button if sending tab or enter while focus is on button
                    $createShipmentBtn.click();
                }
            } else {
                if (!isInputsEmpty($('#buildShipmentModalBody input'))) {
                    // all shipper chance to change weight unit
                    $createShipmentBtn.focus();
                }
            }
        }
    }

// PostSelectAddressBook(shipmentRequest, nameaddress) // returns undefined
this.PostSelectAddressBook = function (shipmentRequest, nameaddress) {
        // default phone number
        if (nameaddress.Phone === '' || nameaddress.Phone === null){
            // default phone number to the return return address
            nameaddress.Phone = '(508) 650-2008';
        }

        if(nameaddress.Email !== null){
            var userEmail = nameaddress.Email;
            var senderName = 'Zyno Medical';
            
            // general visibility
            //shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].CarrierMonitoring= true;
            //shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].PriorDeliveryNotificationConsignee = true;
            //shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].NotificationFailureAddressEmail = userEmail;

            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ShipNotificationEmail = true;
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ShipNotificationSenderName = senderName;
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ShipNotificationSubjectText = "ShipExec Shipment Notification";
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ShipNotificationAddressEmail = userEmail;
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ShipNotificationDescription = '';
            
            // delivery notification
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].DeliveryNotificationEmail = true;
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].DeliveryNotificationSenderName = senderName;
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].DeliveryNotificationSubjectText = "ShipExec Delivery Notification"
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].DeliveryNotificationAddressEmail = userEmail;
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].DeliveryNotificationDescription = '';
            
            // delivery exeption notification
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].DeliveryExceptionNotificationEmail = true;
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].DeliveryExceptionNotificationSenderName = senderName;
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].DeliveryExceptionNotificationSubjectText = "ShipExec Delivery Exeption Notification";
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].DeliveryExceptionNotificationAddressEmail = userEmail;
            shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].DeliveryExceptionNotificationDescription = '';
            
            // return delivery notification
            //shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ReturnDeliveryNotificationEmail = true;
            //shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ReturnDeliveryNotificationSenderName = senderName;
            //shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ReturnDeliveryNotificationSubjectText = "ShipExec Return Delivery Notification"
            //shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ReturnDeliveryNotificationAddressEmail = userEmail;
            //shipmentRequest.Packages[this.vm.packageIndex].ReturnDeliveryNotificationDescription = '';
           
            // remove the email field from the consignee
            nameaddress.Email = '';
        }
    }

// GetViewModelFromTemplate(viewModel) // returns undefined
this.GetViewModelFromTemplate = function (viewModel) {
        vm = viewModel;
    }

// ShipWithReturn() // returns undefined
this.ShipWithReturn = function () {
        vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5 = "RETURN SERVICE";
        vm.checkShip();
    }

// ShipNoReturn() // returns undefined
this.ShipNoReturn = function () {
        vm.currentShipment.PackageDefaults.MiscReference5 = "";
        vm.checkShip();
    }
